title: Severe damage → full refund (severity ≥ 7)
scenario: severity 7-10
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$500
rationale: Severely damaged goods need not be returned — return shipping often costs more than the refund.

title: Moderate damage → partial refund (severity 4-6)
scenario: severity 4-6
decision: partial_refund · basis=percentage · max=$300 · pct=50%
rationale: Usable but flawed. 50% restores fairness without forcing a return.

title: Cosmetic only → store credit (severity 1-3)
scenario: severity 1-3
decision: store_credit · basis=fixed
rationale: Outer-box / packaging scuffs. Store credit retains the customer at lowest cost.

title: Fragile category broken → replacement
scenario: severity 5-10 · damage types: crack, tear · categories: mug, glassware, ceramics, ornament, kitchenware
decision: replacement · basis=order_value · max=$300
rationale: Customers buying breakables expect a working item, not a refund.

title: Electronics water damage → escalate to human
scenario: damage types: water_damage · categories: laptop, phone, tablet, electronics · ⚠ force_escalate
decision: store_credit · basis=manual
rationale: Liquid damage requires warranty interpretation; never auto-decide.
customer_facing_name: Electronics water damage → escalate to human

title: Missing parts → replacement of part
scenario: damage types: missing_part
decision: replacement · basis=fixed
rationale: Ship the missing part. Refunding the whole order is bad UX.

title: Manufacturing defect within warranty → full refund + return
scenario: damage types: defect
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$1000
rationale: Defects need QA review; the item must come back for inspection.
customer_facing_name: Manufacturing defect within warranty → full refund + return

title: Apparel · tear / hole → full refund, no return
scenario: severity 4-10 · damage types: tear · categories: clothing, apparel, shoes, accessories
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$300
rationale: Used apparel can't be resold. Return shipping is wasted handling.
customer_facing_name: Apparel · tear / hole → full refund, no return

title: Apparel · stain / dye transfer → 70% partial refund
scenario: damage types: stain · categories: clothing, apparel
decision: partial_refund · basis=percentage · max=$200 · pct=70%
rationale: Often salvageable with cleaning. 70% covers professional cleaning + dissatisfaction.
customer_facing_name: Apparel · stain / dye transfer → 70% partial refund

title: Apparel · size mismatch (not damage) → return + exchange
scenario: damage types: unclear · categories: clothing, apparel, shoes · keywords: too small, too big, doesn't fit, wrong size
decision: replacement · basis=fixed
rationale: Fit issues need exchange, not refund. Reduces refund rate.
customer_facing_name: Apparel · size mismatch (not damage) → return + exchange

title: Electronics · screen damage > $200 → escalate
scenario: damage types: crack, scratch · categories: laptop, phone, tablet, monitor · ⚠ force_escalate
rationale: High-value electronics screens involve warranty + insurance interplay.

title: Electronics · accessory damaged (cable/case) → replacement
scenario: severity 4-10 · categories: accessory, cable, case, charger
decision: replacement · basis=order_value · max=$50
rationale: Low-cost accessory — replacement is cheaper than dispute time.

title: Electronics · DOA (dead on arrival) → full refund + free return label
scenario: damage types: defect · categories: laptop, phone, tablet, monitor, headphones · keywords: dead on arrival, doesn't turn on, won't power on
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$2000
rationale: DOA is a manufacturing issue — full refund + we pay return shipping.
customer_facing_name: Electronics · DOA (dead on arrival) → full refund + free return label

title: Perishables (food / cosmetics / supplements) → instant full refund
scenario: severity 3-10 · categories: food, beverage, cosmetics, supplements, skincare
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$150
rationale: Perishables can never be returned. Auto-refund is industry standard.
customer_facing_name: Perishables (food / cosmetics / supplements) → instant full refund

title: Perishables · expiry-close at delivery → 30% + apology
scenario: categories: food, beverage, supplements · keywords: expires, expiry, almost expired, best before
decision: partial_refund · basis=percentage · max=$50 · pct=30%
rationale: Stock rotation issue. 30% acknowledges the inconvenience without giving away margin.

title: Perishables · spillage in transit → full refund, no return
scenario: damage types: water_damage, stain · categories: food, beverage, cosmetics
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$200
rationale: Leaked product is unsellable and unsafe to handle. Refund and discard.
customer_facing_name: Perishables · spillage in transit → full refund, no return

title: Luxury (> $500) · ANY damage → escalate to human
scenario: ⚠ force_escalate
rationale: Luxury brand voice + premium customer expectation requires a human touch.
customer_facing_name: Luxury (> $500) · ANY damage → escalate to human

title: Luxury packaging damage (item OK) → store credit 10% of order
scenario: severity 0-3 · keywords: box, packaging, presentation, gift box
decision: store_credit · basis=percentage · max=$300 · pct=10%
rationale: Luxury customers buy the unboxing experience. Credit them, keep them.
customer_facing_name: Luxury packaging damage (item OK) → store credit 10% of order

title: Luxury · authentication concern → escalate immediately
scenario: keywords: fake, authentic, counterfeit, serial number · ⚠ force_escalate
rationale: Authentication disputes are legal/brand risk — human only.

title: Luxury · customer is repeat VIP → upgrade to replacement + apology gift
scenario: any case
decision: replacement · basis=order_value · max=$3000
rationale: VIP retention NPV > replacement cost.
customer_facing_name: Luxury · customer is repeat VIP → upgrade to replacement + apology gift

title: Cross-border · damaged in customs → full refund, no return
scenario: severity 5-10 · keywords: customs, international shipping, import, 海关
decision: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$800
rationale: Cross-border returns cost more than the refund; customs adds 2-4 weeks.
customer_facing_name: Cross-border · damaged in customs → full refund, no return
title_en: Cross-border · damaged in customs → full refund, no return
scenario_en: severity 5-10 · keywords: customs, international shipping, import, 海关
decision_en: full_refund · basis=order_value · max=$800

title: Cross-border · duty/tax overcharge claim → refund difference
scenario: keywords: duty, import tax, customs fee, tariff · ⚠ force_escalate
decision: partial_refund · basis=manual
rationale: Duty disputes need human verification of receipts.
customer_facing_name: Cross-border · duty/tax overcharge claim → refund difference

title: Peak-season delay (BFCM / 11.11 / 618) → store credit
scenario: keywords: late, delay, still hasn't arrived, ordered weeks ago
decision: store_credit · basis=fixed
rationale: Bulk-season carrier delays are systemic. $15 credit reduces churn.

title: Emotion ≥ 8 → +20% offer uplift
scenario: emotion ≥ 8
rationale: High emotion = high churn risk = high CSAT recovery cost. 20% uplift wins back loyalty cheaper than re-acquisition.

title: Legal / media / regulator threat → force escalate
scenario: emotion ≥ 7 · keywords: sue, lawyer, 12315, consumer protection, media · ⚠ force_escalate
rationale: Brand & legal risk — humans handle reputational exposure.
customer_facing_name: Legal / media / regulator threat → force escalate

title: No image + claim ≥ $50 → escalate
scenario: ⚠ force_escalate
rationale: Photo evidence is the standard for auto-pay above $50. Below, friction > fraud risk.

title: [amazon] Customer says item arrived broken, no photo attached, under
scenario: Customer says item arrived broken, no photo attached, under $50.
decision: Auto-refund without requesting photo. Cost of requesting evidence ($1.50 in agent time + 8% churn) exceeds fraud risk on items under $50.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer claims SNAD (significantly not as described) on app
scenario: Customer claims SNAD (significantly not as described) on apparel.
decision: Refund without requiring return for items under $35. Return shipping + restocking labor > refund value for soft goods.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer says they received the wrong item.
scenario: Customer says they received the wrong item.
decision: Ship correct item immediately. Do NOT ask them to return the wrong one first — it doubles the time-to-resolution and amplifies the original mistake.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Repeated complaint about the same order (3rd+ contact).
scenario: Repeated complaint about the same order (3rd+ contact).
decision: Escalate to senior, regardless of amount. Repeat contact is the strongest churn signal in e-commerce CS data.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Account has 5+ damage claims in 60 days on different items.
scenario: Account has 5+ damage claims in 60 days on different items.
decision: Flag for fraud review before any refund. Repeat-claim pattern is the #1 indicator of return abuse.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Tracking shows delivered but customer says not received.
scenario: Tracking shows delivered but customer says not received.
decision: Refund or replace on first claim if order < $100. Past $100, ask customer to file with carrier first and check with neighbors / building manager. Most 'not received' is misdelivery within 50m.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer is a Prime member with high order history (>$5k LTV
scenario: Customer is a Prime member with high order history (>$5k LTV).
decision: Approve any reasonable refund up to $200 without question, no return. Cost of losing a Prime customer is 18 months of equivalent margin.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer asks for refund after 30 days but within 45.
scenario: Customer asks for refund after 30 days but within 45.
decision: Honor it once per customer per year. The marginal goodwill from saying yes outweighs the 5% additional refund cost; saying no on a borderline case is the most common driver of negative reviews.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Subscribe-and-Save customer cancels after first auto-deliver
scenario: Subscribe-and-Save customer cancels after first auto-delivery, claims didn't realize.
decision: Full refund + cancel + brief explanation. Do NOT defend the policy. Each defensive reply tanks the seller rating; the refund is cheaper than two 1-star reviews.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Refund issued — customer asks when they'll see it.
scenario: Refund issued — customer asks when they'll see it.
decision: Always cite '1-3 business days for credit cards, 5-7 for ACH/bank transfer'. Vague timelines = repeat tickets. Specificity is the cheapest customer service.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [ebay] Buyer opens 'item not as described' case on a used item.
scenario: Buyer opens 'item not as described' case on a used item.
decision: Offer partial refund first (typically 20-40% of item value); accept full return as fallback. Used-item full-return shipping often exceeds resale value.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer received item damaged with no insurance on shipment.
scenario: Buyer received item damaged with no insurance on shipment.
decision: Seller eats the cost. Buyer-side experience matters; recover via shipper claim on your end. Never tell the buyer 'you didn't pick insurance'.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer claims missing parts; auction was sold as 'parts only'
scenario: Buyer claims missing parts; auction was sold as 'parts only'.
decision: Re-read listing carefully. If listing explicitly says 'no warranty, parts only', politely point to that line and decline. Otherwise refund. Listing accuracy = your defense.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer opens a case before messaging.
scenario: Buyer opens a case before messaging.
decision: Reply within 4 hours even if you can't resolve yet. Response time matters more than first-message resolution; eBay's defect rate weights response speed heavily.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer returns a different item than what was sold.
scenario: Buyer returns a different item than what was sold.
decision: Document with photos before refunding. Open a counter-claim with eBay (Seller Protection). Do not refund preemptively; the platform will side with whoever has photo evidence.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] International buyer claims package never arrived.
scenario: International buyer claims package never arrived.
decision: Without tracking ID with delivery confirmation, refund. With tracking confirming delivery, ask buyer to check with local postal service first; provide claim form for their carrier.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Repeat buyer asks for discount on damage instead of refund.
scenario: Repeat buyer asks for discount on damage instead of refund.
decision: Honor it — gives you discretion on amount. 10-20% partial refund saves you the return and binds the buyer to future purchases.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer wants to return for reason 'changed mind' on item mark
scenario: Buyer wants to return for reason 'changed mind' on item marked 'No Returns'.
decision: You can refuse, but offering anyway (20% partial, no return) often prevents a SNAD case. SNAD bypasses your No-Returns policy entirely.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Customer wants refund as eBay gift card / store credit.
scenario: Customer wants refund as eBay gift card / store credit.
decision: Most customers accept gift card when it's offered with a small bonus ($5-10 on top). Cheaper than cash refund + preserves margin.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Customer claims item arrived but is 'defective in some way'
scenario: Customer claims item arrived but is 'defective in some way' without specifics.
decision: Always ask for one clarifying question + photo before deciding. Vague claims have 40% higher fraud rate; ask for evidence respectfully.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [shopify] Customer requests refund after using 'final sale' item.
scenario: Customer requests refund after using 'final sale' item.
decision: Honor it for first-time customers; politely decline with empathy for repeat. Final-sale is enforceable, but the lifetime value math favors flexibility on first encounter.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Refunding multi-item order — only one item damaged.
scenario: Refunding multi-item order — only one item damaged.
decision: Refund the damaged line item + a prorated share of shipping. Do not refund whole order shipping unless customer is returning everything.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer is angry — first message contains profanity.
scenario: Customer is angry — first message contains profanity.
decision: Mirror their concern, not their language. Open with 'You're absolutely right to be frustrated' or equivalent acknowledgment. De-escalation cuts time-to-resolution by 60%.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Pre-order item delayed beyond promised date.
scenario: Pre-order item delayed beyond promised date.
decision: Offer cancellation + 10% credit if they keep waiting. Don't make them ask; proactively message at the delay boundary.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer in EU wants return shipping prepaid for change-of-m
scenario: Customer in EU wants return shipping prepaid for change-of-mind return.
decision: EU law (Distance Selling Directive) requires it for 14-day returns. Not optional.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer's order was lost in transit, they want immediate re
scenario: Customer's order was lost in transit, they want immediate replacement + tracking.
decision: Ship the replacement first, file the carrier claim in parallel. Customer-waiting > carrier-reimbursement timeline.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Chargeback filed by customer who also has open refund reques
scenario: Chargeback filed by customer who also has open refund request with us.
decision: Always respond to chargeback with full evidence regardless; provide tracking + signed delivery + email trail. Fighting chargebacks recovers ~30% on average.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer requests refund to a different card than they purch
scenario: Customer requests refund to a different card than they purchased with.
decision: Decline; refund must go to original payment method (PCI requirement). Offer store credit as alternative.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer wants refund on personalized / custom product.
scenario: Customer wants refund on personalized / custom product.
decision: Manufacturing defect → full refund. 'Changed mind' on customized → decline politely, offer store credit goodwill (small).
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Long email thread, customer keeps adding new complaints.
scenario: Long email thread, customer keeps adding new complaints.
decision: Address each numbered item in your reply explicitly. Skipping any one issue triggers a 'you didn't read my message' escalation.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [reddit] First-time customer's first order has a problem.
scenario: First-time customer's first order has a problem.
decision: Over-resolve. The cost of a $25 over-refund is much less than the LTV of a repeat customer who tells their friends.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer asks for refund 90 days after delivery.
scenario: Customer asks for refund 90 days after delivery.
decision: Policy says 30 days; honor anyway as one-time goodwill for first request, note the account. Defending policy on borderline cases generates the most negative reviews.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer writes a long emotional message about how the produ
scenario: Customer writes a long emotional message about how the product was for their late parent.
decision: Acknowledge the emotional context BEFORE the resolution. 'I'm so sorry — I can hear how much this meant. Here's what I'm doing...' Empathy buys patience for the actual fix.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer demands refund + keeps the item AND threatens charg
scenario: Customer demands refund + keeps the item AND threatens chargeback.
decision: Give in if amount is under $50; the chargeback fee + dispute time is $25-40 plus 30 days of work. Document the threat for fraud database.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Multiple customers report same product arriving damaged this
scenario: Multiple customers report same product arriving damaged this month.
decision: Pause shipment, audit packaging at the warehouse, update packaging spec. Reactive refunds compound; root-cause once.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer wants 'price adjustment' because item went on sale
scenario: Customer wants 'price adjustment' because item went on sale after purchase.
decision: Honor within 14 days as store credit (not cash). Builds trust, encourages return purchase. Beyond 14 days, decline politely.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer keeps asking 'when will it ship?' for a backorder.
scenario: Customer keeps asking 'when will it ship?' for a backorder.
decision: Send a single proactive update with exact ship date even if it's 2 weeks out. Silence creates anxiety; transparency reduces inquiries by 70%.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [synthesis] Calculating whether to ask for return.
scenario: Calculating whether to ask for return.
decision: If (refund value < return shipping × 2 + 10 min of warehouse handling), do NOT ask for return. Process the refund and move on.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Choosing between full refund and replacement.
scenario: Choosing between full refund and replacement.
decision: Replacement preserves margin (only cost = COGS + shipping) vs refund (loses full revenue). Default to replacement for fragile/seasonal/perishable; default to refund for customer-pick errors.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Setting an auto-approve threshold for damage claims.
scenario: Setting an auto-approve threshold for damage claims.
decision: Median small DTC brand: $35-50 auto-approve. Above that, require photo. Above $200, require human review. Sweet spot trades off fraud loss vs CS labor cost.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Customer in escalated state wants compensation beyond standa
scenario: Customer in escalated state wants compensation beyond standard refund.
decision: Small store credit ($5-15) added to refund saves the relationship. Larger goodwill (>$25) only with manager approval — sets precedent customer expects repeated.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Item is on a 'final sale' page but customer says photos show
scenario: Item is on a 'final sale' page but customer says photos showed wrong color.
decision: Honor SNAD claim; final-sale doesn't override marketing accuracy. Refund/return as if not final sale; flag listing for review.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [amazon] Customer wants to skip a Subscribe-and-Save shipment that al
scenario: Customer wants to skip a Subscribe-and-Save shipment that already shipped.
decision: Refund the box once it arrives; tell them clearly they can keep or donate the item. Telling them to refuse delivery creates UPS handling cost.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Holiday gift purchased in November, recipient wants to retur
scenario: Holiday gift purchased in November, recipient wants to return in February.
decision: Honor it within 'extended holiday window' (typically Nov-Jan purchases get until Jan 31). Communicate the window proactively in shipping emails.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer's English isn't strong; sentences are short and unc
scenario: Customer's English isn't strong; sentences are short and unclear.
decision: Reply in clear short sentences with one question at a time. Don't dump a list of options. Translation tools often miss conditionals.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Same delivery address has had 12 'item not received' claims
scenario: Same delivery address has had 12 'item not received' claims across 8 accounts in 6 months.
decision: Block address. Carrier-level fraud ring. Notify carrier investigations team.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [ebay] Customer claims auction item was 'much smaller than expected
scenario: Customer claims auction item was 'much smaller than expected'.
decision: Check your listing — did you include dimensions and a sense-of-scale photo (with a coin, hand, or ruler)? If not, refund; update listing template.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Bidder won an auction but later regrets it.
scenario: Bidder won an auction but later regrets it.
decision: Mutually cancel transaction (eBay calls it 'cancel order' — buyer initiated). Don't fight; bad-feedback risk > the 12% relisting cost.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [shopify] Customer wants exchange for different size of clothing item.
scenario: Customer wants exchange for different size of clothing item.
decision: Process as exchange (no refund cycle). Ship the new size immediately, send return label for the original. Faster + cheaper than refund + new order.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer reports product mismatch after months of using item
scenario: Customer reports product mismatch after months of using item.
decision: Investigate; if listing was inaccurate, partial credit (10-30%) makes sense. Full refund after months of use is rare unless there's a defect.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer writes a 5-star review but also requests a refund f
scenario: Customer writes a 5-star review but also requests a refund for one minor issue.
decision: Honor the refund quickly; thank them explicitly for the review. They're an advocate — invest in keeping them.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] New customer, expensive first order, immediate refund reques
scenario: New customer, expensive first order, immediate refund request claiming defect.
decision: Process if photo is convincing, but flag the account in fraud system. Pattern: 30%+ of 'big first order + immediate defect' is return abuse.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [reddit] Customer asks: 'are you a bot?'
scenario: Customer asks: 'are you a bot?'
decision: Answer truthfully and pivot to the resolution. 'You're talking to an AI assistant, and I can resolve refunds up to $50 instantly. For anything bigger, my colleague takes over.' Transparency builds trust; deception erodes it.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Should we tell the customer we're an AI?
scenario: Should we tell the customer we're an AI?
decision: Yes, if asked. Don't volunteer it unprompted (creates 'is this even worth my time' bias). Be ready to escalate transparently.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Setting tone for refund decline.
scenario: Setting tone for refund decline.
decision: Never start with 'unfortunately'. Lead with what you CAN do: 'Here's what I can do — I can offer a 20% store credit, or arrange a return for full refund.' Frame the option, not the limitation.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [amazon] Customer in same Prime household made the order; primary acc
scenario: Customer in same Prime household made the order; primary account holder asks for refund.
decision: Process for the primary holder — they own the payment method. Privacy law doesn't allow you to refund a third party without explicit consent.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer message contains an attached photo of the damage AN
scenario: Customer message contains an attached photo of the damage AND a separate angry text.
decision: Lead the reply with what you see in the photo, not the text. 'I can see the crack along the rim...' Acknowledges they did their part (sent evidence) and shows you actually looked.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Customer claims they were charged twice.
scenario: Customer claims they were charged twice.
decision: Always check first (90% are pending auths that drop in 3-5 days). If real double charge, refund immediately + apologize; the trust damage is severe.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Box arrived crushed, customer doesn't know if contents are d
scenario: Box arrived crushed, customer doesn't know if contents are damaged yet.
decision: Tell them to open carefully and inspect; if any damage to contents, you'll refund/replace immediately, no questions. Sets expectations + accelerates trust.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [ebay] Item shows 'delivered' but customer in apartment complex say
scenario: Item shows 'delivered' but customer in apartment complex says they didn't get it.
decision: Most likely lobby / wrong unit. Ask them to check with neighbors and concierge before you ship a replacement. If first response, replace anyway under $50.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Customer wants to extend return window because they were tra
scenario: Customer wants to extend return window because they were traveling.
decision: One-time extension of up to 30 days, no questions. Note account; pattern of repeated 'I was traveling' is a signal.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer leaves negative feedback before contacting you.
scenario: Buyer leaves negative feedback before contacting you.
decision: Respond on the feedback publicly with professional fix offer. Then DM the resolution. Both audiences (this buyer + future buyers) are watching.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [shopify] Customer wants partial refund for slightly delayed delivery
scenario: Customer wants partial refund for slightly delayed delivery (1-2 days).
decision: Decline politely unless they paid for express. 'Delivery estimates are estimates' is enforceable; constant partials for minor delays sets bad precedent.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer says other brand handled similar issue better.
scenario: Customer says other brand handled similar issue better.
decision: Don't defend; ask what specifically would feel right to them. Often they want acknowledgment + a small extra (free shipping next time, $5 credit). Cheaper than the comparison.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Choosing between issuing a refund vs giving extra store cred
scenario: Choosing between issuing a refund vs giving extra store credit.
decision: Store credit costs you ~60% of refund value (only paid when redeemed; some unredeemed). Refund costs you 100%. Offer store credit + small bonus as preferred default.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Cross-border order, customer wants return shipping reimburse
scenario: Cross-border order, customer wants return shipping reimbursed.
decision: Calculate vs item value. If return shipping > 30% of item, just refund without return. Cross-border returns also have customs hassle for receiver.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [reddit] Customer claims item was empty box — but tracking shows corr
scenario: Customer claims item was empty box — but tracking shows correct weight.
decision: Politely ask for a photo of the box exterior + interior. Suggest they may have received the wrong box; offer to investigate with carrier. Don't accuse; let evidence steer.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer message is in a language you don't speak.
scenario: Customer message is in a language you don't speak.
decision: Use translation + reply in their language. Mark the reply 'auto-translated; let me know if anything's unclear'. Better than English-only.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer leaves passing comment about a future product line
scenario: Customer leaves passing comment about a future product line they wish you'd make.
decision: Acknowledge it, thank them, route to product team. Costs nothing, customer feels heard, occasionally produces real product insight.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer wants refund without returning, but item is fully f
scenario: Customer wants refund without returning, but item is fully functional.
decision: Decline refund; offer return for refund. Functional items that customer keeps + refund creates double-spend risk (sells the item, profits).
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Setting refund window for digital products.
scenario: Setting refund window for digital products.
decision: 7-day refund window on digital — long enough for honest evaluation, short enough to discourage rip-and-return abuse.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [synthesis] Customer requests partial refund as alternative to full retu
scenario: Customer requests partial refund as alternative to full return.
decision: Calculate: 30% of item value typically covers customer dissatisfaction + saves return logistics + lets you keep ~70% revenue. Sweet spot for most categories.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Whether to apologize when fault isn't yours (carrier damage)
scenario: Whether to apologize when fault isn't yours (carrier damage).
decision: Yes — own the customer's experience, not the cause. 'I'm sorry the package arrived this way' (not 'I'm sorry our partner damaged it'). Internal blame helps no one.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] When to invest in proactive communication.
scenario: When to invest in proactive communication.
decision: Anytime you discover an issue before customer does (delay, stock out, recall): message them with action plan. Costs $0; reduces inbound tickets by ~40%.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Setting price for 'goodwill gesture' after a service failure
scenario: Setting price for 'goodwill gesture' after a service failure.
decision: Industry rule of thumb: 1-2× the inconvenience. Late by a day = next order free shipping. Wrong item = original cost + a $10 credit. Larger gestures encourage repeated complaints.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Frequency to review and update CS policies.
scenario: Frequency to review and update CS policies.
decision: Quarterly. CS data accumulates patterns (new product issues, fraud trends, seasonal effects). Stale policies cost more than the meeting time.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [amazon] Customer writes 'I want my money back' with no other detail.
scenario: Customer writes 'I want my money back' with no other detail.
decision: Reply with: '(1) order number, (2) which item, (3) what's wrong, (4) photo if applicable'. Numbered list = highest response rate. Don't refund blind.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [amazon] Damaged item is a perishable about to spoil.
scenario: Damaged item is a perishable about to spoil.
decision: Refund immediately, no return. Spoilage during dispute resolution is wasted time + product. Treat perishables on the half-life of the product.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [ebay] Buyer paid via Managed Payments, refund pulls from your bala
scenario: Buyer paid via Managed Payments, refund pulls from your balance.
decision: Know your balance. If insufficient, eBay will charge your bank — but with delay. Maintain 7-10 days of typical refund volume as buffer.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [ebay] Buyer files a return then doesn't ship the item back.
scenario: Buyer files a return then doesn't ship the item back.
decision: Wait the eBay-mandated window, then automatically close the case in your favor when system allows. eBay treats it as resolved.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [shopify] Customer says shipping label was generated weeks ago but tra
scenario: Customer says shipping label was generated weeks ago but tracking never updated.
decision: Carrier likely lost the item before scanning. Refund or reship immediately; don't make customer wait for carrier investigation.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [shopify] Customer is happy with the resolution but adds 'next time ca
scenario: Customer is happy with the resolution but adds 'next time can you ship in better packaging?'
decision: Thank them, mark the suggestion in your packaging review queue. Direct customer feedback is the highest-quality product input you'll get.
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [reddit] Customer asks for refund AND a discount on their next purcha
scenario: Customer asks for refund AND a discount on their next purchase.
decision: Pick one or the other based on context. Both = bad precedent. If they were genuinely wronged, refund. If they were inconvenienced, small future discount.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [reddit] Customer's complaint includes a question about an unrelated
scenario: Customer's complaint includes a question about an unrelated thing (e.g., size chart).
decision: Answer both in your reply. Don't tell them to 'open a separate ticket'. Each ticket is a touch point; combining them is faster + more humane.
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [synthesis] Setting the threshold above which a human must review.
scenario: Setting the threshold above which a human must review.
decision: Variable by margin profile. High-margin (>50%) brands can auto-approve to $200. Low-margin grocery / commodity needs to drop to $30. Set by cost of error tolerance.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] How to phrase a decline when policy says no.
scenario: How to phrase a decline when policy says no.
decision: 1) Acknowledge what they want. 2) Explain ONE concrete reason (not policy quote). 3) Offer the next-best thing you CAN do. 4) Invite them to escalate if dissatisfied. Never just refuse with citations.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [amazon] Customer mentions they're a small business owner buying for
scenario: Customer mentions they're a small business owner buying for resale.
decision: Offer to introduce them to your B2B / wholesale program if you have one. Higher-volume + lower-touch customer.
rationale: Source: amazon

title: [ebay] Buyer says they didn't read the listing carefully and bought
scenario: Buyer says they didn't read the listing carefully and bought wrong item.
decision: Honor return as buyer-remorse; charge return shipping unless your policy says free returns. Empathy without footing the bill for buyer error.
rationale: Source: ebay

title: [shopify] Item arrived in different condition than the customer expect
scenario: Item arrived in different condition than the customer expected (color shade).
decision: Send a single high-quality color photo. Often resolves the issue. If not, offer return for full refund (color SNAD is hard to dispute).
rationale: Source: shopify

title: [reddit] Frequent return-and-refund pattern from same customer (5+ in
scenario: Frequent return-and-refund pattern from same customer (5+ in 90 days).
decision: Quietly add to 'limited return privileges' list. Don't announce it; communicate selectively on future returns ('unfortunately this one requires return shipping at customer expense').
rationale: Source: reddit

title: [synthesis] Resolving an ambiguous claim (photo unclear, customer descri
scenario: Resolving an ambiguous claim (photo unclear, customer description vague).
decision: Default to customer-favorable resolution for items under $50; ask 1 specific question for items $50-200; escalate to human above $200. Friction proportional to fraud risk.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Customer asks for compensation in addition to refund — for '
scenario: Customer asks for compensation in addition to refund — for 'wasted time'.
decision: Decline cash compensation for time. Offer small store credit ($5-10) for goodwill. Cash for time sets a dangerous precedent and is unbounded.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: [synthesis] Customer's claim doesn't match any specific policy.
scenario: Customer's claim doesn't match any specific policy.
decision: Apply the 'fair coffee shop' test — what would a small business owner with the customer in front of them do? Usually that's the answer.
rationale: Source: synthesis

title: crack sev 8 → full_refund
scenario: Hi, my mug arrived with a 3cm crack on the rim. Order ORD-MUG-2024. Could I get a refund? Thanks!
decision: full_refund $24.00
rationale: That crack along the rim makes the mug unusable — I've issued a full refund of $24.00 to your original payment method. You'll see it in 1–3 business days, and please don't bother shipping the mug back.

title: crack sev 8 → full_refund
scenario: 刚收到的杯子杯口裂了，订单号 ORD-CH-001，能退一下吗？谢谢
decision: full_refund $24.00
rationale: 看到杯口那道裂纹，确实没法用了。已经给您发起全额退款 ¥24.00，1-3 个工作日到账，破损的杯子不用寄回，您留着或者直接处理就好。
title_en: crack sev 8 → full_refund
scenario_en: The cup I just received has a crack on the rim. Order number ORD-CH-001. Can I get a refund? Thank you.
decision_en: full_refund $24.00

title: crack sev 7 → full_refund
scenario: 已经投诉到12315了，必须赔偿，不然我去媒体曝光！杯子全碎了！
decision: full_refund $24.00
rationale: 非常抱歉，得知您收到的杯子完全破损，给您带来了极大的不便和不快，我们对此深感歉意。我们理解您因此感到非常生气，并已向12315投诉。为了表达我们的歉意，我们已为您办理了全额退款 ¥24.00，款项将在1-3个工作日内退回到您的原支付账户。这个破损的杯子您无需寄回，直接处理掉即可。
title_en: crack sev 7 → full_refund
scenario_en: I've already complained to 12315, compensation is a must, otherwise I'll expose it to the media! The cup is completely shattered!
decision_en: full_refund $24.00

title: crack sev 8 → escalated
scenario: THIS IS THE THIRD TIME I HAVE WRITTEN. The mug arrived cracked, I have contacted my lawyer and will file with the consumer protection agency if not resolved in 24 hours!
decision: escalated to human $0.00

title: crack sev 8 → full_refund
scenario: Sorry — my mug arrived cracked on the rim, order ORD-MT-001
decision: full_refund $24.00
rationale: 看到杯口那道裂纹，确实没法用了。已经给您发起全额退款 ¥24.00，1-3 个工作日到账，破损的杯子不用寄回，您留着或者直接处理就好。

title: 服装商品到货损坏退款政策
scenario: 当服装商品在到货时出现撕裂或染色等损坏情况。
decision: 客户有权获得全额退款，且无需承担退货运费。
rationale: 已使用的服装商品无法转售，且退货物流成本高于退款金额。
title_en: Apparel product damage on arrival refund policy
scenario_en: When apparel products arrive damaged, such as torn or stained.
decision_en: The customer is entitled to a full refund and is not responsible for return shipping costs.

title: Refund SOP - Apparel v2
scenario: This document outlines the standard operating procedures for processing refunds related to apparel products.
decision: Follow the guidelines specified in the 'Refund SOP — Apparel v2' document for all apparel refund requests.
rationale: To ensure consistent and efficient handling of apparel refunds, maintaining customer satisfaction and operational standards.

title: Damaged Clothing Item: Full Refund, No Return Shipping
scenario: When a clothing item arrives torn or stained upon delivery.
decision: The customer is entitled to a full refund, and they are not required to return the damaged item.
rationale: Used apparel, especially if torn or stained, cannot be resold.

title: 处理尺码不符（无损坏）的商品：优先提供换货
scenario: 当顾客报告商品尺码不符，但商品本身没有损坏时。
decision: 优先向顾客提供换货选项。
rationale: 优先换货可以有效降低退款率约20%。
title_en: Handling size mismatch (undamaged) products: Prioritize exchange
scenario_en: When a customer reports a product size mismatch, but the product itself is not damaged.
decision_en: Prioritize offering the customer an exchange option.

title: Color Mismatch: Refund or Replace for Significantly Not As Described (SNAD)
scenario: When the actual product's color significantly differs from the photo on the product listing, it is considered 'Significantly Not As Described' (SNAD).
decision: Offer the customer a choice between a full refund or a product replacement.
rationale: To address discrepancies between product representation and actual item, ensuring customer satisfaction for 'Significantly Not As Described' cases.

title: VIP Customer Override: Gold Tier Goodwill Upgrade
scenario: When a customer is in the Gold tier loyalty program and requires a goodwill gesture.
decision: Provide a one-time goodwill upgrade including a product replacement and a $10 store credit, overriding other standard rules.
rationale: To reward and retain VIP customers in the Gold tier loyalty program.

title: 淘宝皇冠店主销售秘籍：产品专业讲解与顾客信任建立
scenario: 当顾客咨询产品时，销售人员需要建立信任并专业地介绍产品。
decision: 销售人员应像“谈恋爱”一样深入了解自己的产品，从成分、功效、适合人群等方面进行详细专业讲解，并与同类产品进行对比推荐，同时强调真实客观，不夸大功效。最好自己先使用产品，以传递真实感受。
rationale: 详细专业的讲解能增加顾客的信任度，让他们感受到产品的适合性并产生美的期望。真实客观的介绍和亲身使用体验能增强说服力，避免顾客因夸大宣传而产生不信任感。
source_doc: 皇冠店主不曾公开的销售独家秘籍.docx
title_en: Taobao Crown Seller's Secret: Professional Product Explanation and Customer Trust Building
scenario_en: When customers inquire about products, sales staff need to build trust and introduce products professionally.
decision_en: Sales staff should understand their products in depth 'like dating', providing detailed professional explanations on ingredients, efficacy, and suitable users, comparing them with similar products, and emphasizing truthfulness and objectivity without exaggerating effects. It's best to use the product first to convey genuine feelings.

title: 天猫客服应对缺货及售后问题的处理原则
scenario: 当买家付款后出现缺货情况，或买家反映售后问题时。
decision: 务必在第一时间处理，例如缺货时立即联系买家说明情况，提供换款或退款选项。售后问题也应迅速解决。
rationale: 及时处理能有效避免客户投诉、延迟发货处罚和后续的维权纠纷，将问题解决在萌芽状态，避免小问题演变成大问题。
source_doc: 天猫客服如何应对差评师、发票师和淘宝骗子们.docx
title_en: Tmall Customer Service Principles for Handling Stockouts and After-sales Issues
scenario_en: When a stockout occurs after a buyer has paid, or when a buyer reports an after-sales issue.
decision_en: Handle immediately. For stockouts, contact the buyer to explain the situation and offer an exchange or refund. After-sales issues should also be resolved promptly.

title: 天猫发票开具规则
scenario: 客户在天猫平台购买商品后需要开具发票时。
decision: 必须开具普通正规发票，金额为订单实际金额，类目为服饰类目。个人发票需姓名+身份证，企业发票需企业抬头+税号。发票包邮，每周二统计名单发给财务。
rationale: 遵守天猫平台规定，确保客户获得合法有效的购物凭证。
title_en: Tmall Invoice Issuance Rules
scenario_en: When a customer needs an invoice after purchasing goods on the Tmall platform.
decision_en: A standard official invoice must be issued for the actual order amount, under the apparel category. Personal invoices require name + ID number; corporate invoices require company name + tax ID. Invoices are shipped free of charge, and a list is compiled every Tuesday for finance.

title: 天猫店铺发票开具规则：实买实开，不可超额
scenario: 消费者在天猫店铺购买商品后，要求开具发票，且要求发票金额高于实际购买金额。
decision: 客服应拒绝消费者的超额开票要求，并告知消费者天猫平台要求发票必须实买实开。
rationale: 天猫平台有明确规定，发票开具必须与实际购买金额相符，不允许超额开票，即使消费者愿意承担税点。
title_en: Tmall Store Invoice Issuance Rules: Issue for Actual Purchase, No Over-invoicing
scenario_en: A consumer purchases goods from a Tmall store and requests an invoice for an amount higher than the actual purchase amount.
decision_en: Customer service should reject the consumer's request for over-invoicing and inform the consumer that Tmall platform rules require invoices to be issued for the actual purchase amount.

title: 淘宝客服高效、高转化、低售后的三招秘籍
scenario: 当淘宝客服希望提升工作效率、提高销售转化率并降低售后问题时。
decision: 客服应掌握扎实的基本功（如打字速度、自动回复设置、按序回复），熟悉产品和专业知识，并掌握售后处理流程和淘宝规则。
rationale: 通过提升效率能优化买家体验并提高转化率；掌握专业知识和产品能建立信任并促进成交；熟悉规则和流程能有效处理售后问题，防止损失。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service: Three Secrets for High Efficiency, High Conversion, and Low After-sales
scenario_en: When Taobao customer service wants to improve work efficiency, increase sales conversion rates, and reduce after-sales issues.
decision_en: Customer service should master solid basic skills (e.g., typing speed, auto-reply settings, sequential replies), be familiar with products and professional knowledge, and understand after-sales processing procedures and Taobao rules.

title: 客服部日常工作规范流程 - 考勤管理
scenario: 客服人员的日常考勤管理，包括排班、打卡、迟到、旷工和换班等情况。
decision: 客服人员需按早、中、晚班轮休，并在公司指定打卡机上打卡。未能及时打卡需向主管申请登记缘由，否则按迟到或旷工处理。换班需与同事协商并上报主管审批，每月换班不得超过2次。
rationale: 确保客服人员的正常出勤，维护公司考勤制度的严肃性，并保障岗位有人值守。
source_doc: 客服部日常工作规范流程.docx
title_en: Customer Service Department Daily Work Norms - Attendance Management
scenario_en: Daily attendance management for customer service personnel, including scheduling, clocking in/out, tardiness, absenteeism, and shift changes.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must rotate shifts (morning, afternoon, evening) and clock in on the company's designated time clock. Failure to clock in on time requires applying to the supervisor to register the reason, otherwise it will be treated as tardiness or absenteeism. Shift changes require negotiation with colleagues and approval from the supervisor, with no more than 2 shift changes per month.

title: 淘宝客服面试准备与技巧
scenario: 应聘淘宝客服职位时，需要进行面试准备和掌握面试技巧。
decision: 应聘者需充分了解淘宝客服职责，准备有针对性的简历，得体着装，并练习面试技巧。面试时要放松心态，不打断面试官提问，沉着应答，保持中立立场。
rationale: 充分准备能提高面试成功率；面试中展现的沟通能力、应变能力和专业素养是客服岗位的核心要求。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Interview Preparation and Tips
scenario_en: When applying for a Taobao customer service position, interview preparation and skills are required.
decision_en: Applicants need to fully understand Taobao customer service responsibilities, prepare a targeted resume, dress appropriately, and practice interview skills. During the interview, relax, do not interrupt the interviewer's questions, answer calmly, and maintain a neutral stance.

title: 客服面试问题解析：处理售后退货的策略
scenario: 当客户提出售后退货问题时，作为淘宝客服应如何处理。
decision: 如果退货是由于客户个人原因，通常只能申请七天无理由退换货，这不会对店铺产生负面影响。如果客户申请其他退款理由，客服需要查看聊天记录以了解具体原因。如果退款原因与实际情况不符，或价格不正确，则应拒绝退款申请。
rationale: 此规则旨在保护店铺利益，同时遵循淘宝平台的退换货政策，区分个人原因和非个人原因的退货，并确保退款理由的真实性。
title_en: Customer Service Interview Question Analysis: Strategies for Handling After-sales Returns
scenario_en: How to handle after-sales return issues as a Taobao customer service representative.
decision_en: If the return is due to the customer's personal reasons, usually only a 7-day no-reason return/exchange can be applied, which will not negatively impact the store. If the customer applies for other refund reasons, customer service needs to check chat records to understand the specific reason. If the refund reason does not match the actual situation, or the price is incorrect, the refund application should be rejected.

title: 淘宝催好评短信内容撰写与注意事项
scenario: 当需要通过短信提醒客户对淘宝订单进行好评时。
decision: 短信内容应包含店铺名和评价链接，可设置利益点（如优惠券、免单、红包），并避免重复发送和卖惨。提供多个短信模板供参考。
rationale: 通过提供明确的评价路径和激励措施，可以提高客户给出好评的意愿。避免重复发送和卖惨是为了防止引起客户反感，从而避免差评。
title_en: Taobao Good Review Reminder SMS Content and Precautions
scenario_en: When needing to remind customers via SMS to leave a good review for a Taobao order.
decision_en: The SMS content should include the store name and review link, can offer incentives (e.g., coupons, free orders, red packets), and avoid repetitive sending or 'pity' tactics. Multiple SMS templates are provided for reference.

title: 淘宝天猫客服防恶意敲诈：发票问题处理规范
scenario: 买家询问商品（特别是小配件）是否有发票，或团购顾客未主动询问发票。
decision: 商家有义务提供发票。对于买家询问，应回答“有，交易成功后通过挂号信发出”。对于团购顾客，需将发票成本计算在内，若顾客要求则开具。商品页面不得出现“不开发票”等字样，且补寄发票运费不能由买家承担。
rationale: 天猫商家有义务为买家提供发票，不提供发票或要求买家承担补寄运费可能导致投诉、扣分及罚款。
source_doc: 淘宝天猫-客服十步远离恶意敲诈.docx
title_en: Taobao Tmall Customer Service Anti-Malicious Extortion: Invoice Issue Handling Guidelines
scenario_en: Buyer asks if goods (especially small accessories) have an invoice, or group buying customers do not proactively ask for an invoice.
decision_en: Merchants are obligated to provide invoices. For buyer inquiries, answer 'Yes, it will be sent via registered mail after the transaction is successful.' For group buying customers, invoice costs must be factored in, and an invoice issued if requested. The product page must not contain phrases like 'no invoice issued', and the buyer cannot bear the shipping cost for re-sending an invoice.

title: 处理物流问题：未发出、未捡货、已发出、已签收但未收到货
scenario: 当顾客询问物流状态，包括订单已打单但无物流跟踪、已给快递但无更新、物流信息中断或长时间未更新、以及物流显示签收但顾客未收到货时。
decision: 根据具体情况核实仓库、快递或收件人。对于仓库遗漏，需解释并尽快安排发出；对于快递未扫单或遗漏，需联系快递查找并录入；对于物流中断，需核实是否丢件或中转仓遗漏；对于显示签收但未收到，需核实是否代签并让顾客同步检查。
rationale: 通过主动核实和及时沟通，可以快速定位问题原因，安抚顾客情绪，并提供解决方案，避免问题升级。
source_doc: 淘宝客服六大售后技巧和案例解析.docx
title_en: Handling Logistics Issues: Not Shipped, Not Picked, Shipped, Signed but Not Received
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about logistics status, including orders with tracking numbers but no updates, handed to courier but no updates, interrupted or long-stalled logistics information, and logistics showing signed but customer has not received the goods.
decision_en: Verify with the warehouse, courier, or recipient based on the specific situation. For warehouse omissions, explain and arrange shipment as soon as possible; for courier not scanning or omitting, contact the courier to locate and input; for interrupted logistics, verify if lost or overlooked at transit warehouse; for signed but not received, verify if signed by proxy and ask customer to check simultaneously.

title: 客服级别与考核标准
scenario: 当评估客服的专业能力和绩效时。
decision: 客服根据考试分数和打字速度被划分为不同级别：60分及格为一般客服，70分初级，80分中级，90分高级。打字速度需达到55字/分钟及格。
rationale: 通过设定明确的考核标准，可以量化客服能力，激励客服提升专业技能，并为薪资和晋升提供依据。
title_en: Customer Service Levels and Assessment Standards
scenario_en: When evaluating the professional ability and performance of customer service representatives.
decision_en: Customer service representatives are categorized into different levels based on exam scores and typing speed: 60 points for general CS, 70 for junior, 80 for intermediate, and 90 for senior. Typing speed must reach 55 words/minute to pass.

title: 淘宝客服快捷用语：新客户接待与商品介绍
scenario: 当有新客户进入店铺或需要介绍商品时。
decision: 使用热情友好的欢迎语，主动询问客户需求，介绍店铺分类和搜索功能，并强调商品质量、实拍图、正品保证以及店铺的售后服务（如假一赔三、七日无条件退换）。
rationale: 旨在为新客户提供积极的购物体验，建立信任，并高效引导客户找到所需商品，同时突出店铺的优势和保障。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Quick Phrases: New Customer Reception and Product Introduction
scenario_en: When a new customer enters the store or needs product introduction.
decision_en: Use a warm and friendly welcome, proactively ask about customer needs, introduce store categories and search functions, and emphasize product quality, real photos, genuine product guarantee, and store after-sales service (e.g., triple compensation for fakes, 7-day unconditional return/exchange).

title: 淘宝客服主管岗位职责与跨部门协作
scenario: 当公司在淘宝上开设网店并设立客服主管岗位时，需要明确其职责。
decision: 淘宝客服主管需以身作则，规范执行公司制度，组织客户服务，保持公司形象，合理安排员工工作并进行考核，负责员工培训和业务指导，定期汇报工作，并与其他部门（仓储、售后、营销、人资、技术）进行有效协调管理。
rationale: 明确岗位职责和跨部门协作流程，旨在提高客户服务质量，保持公司良好市场形象，提升经济效益，并确保内部运营顺畅。
source_doc: 淘宝客服部主管岗位的职责.docx
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Supervisor Job Responsibilities and Cross-Departmental Collaboration
scenario_en: When a company sets up an online store on Taobao and establishes a customer service supervisor position, its responsibilities need to be clarified.
decision_en: The Taobao customer service supervisor must lead by example, strictly enforce company policies, organize customer service, maintain the company's image, reasonably arrange and assess employee work, be responsible for employee training and business guidance, report work regularly, and effectively coordinate and manage with other departments (warehousing, after-sales, marketing, HR, technology).

title: 客服处理纠纷的技巧：快速反应、热情接待与认真倾听
scenario: 当顾客认为商品有问题并进行投诉时。
decision: 客服应快速反应，热情接待，并认真倾听顾客的问题，记录相关信息，以便及时查询原因并解决问题。
rationale: 顾客在商品出现问题时通常会感到着急和不悦，快速、热情、认真的处理能安抚顾客情绪，建立信任，并有效解决问题。
title_en: Customer Service Dispute Resolution Techniques: Quick Response, Enthusiastic Reception, and Attentive Listening
scenario_en: When a customer believes there is an issue with a product and files a complaint.
decision_en: Customer service should respond quickly, greet enthusiastically, and listen carefully to the customer's problem, recording relevant information to promptly investigate the cause and resolve the issue.

title: 销售技巧：大智若愚策略
scenario: 当客户在结账时，对价格有所犹豫或有占小便宜的心理时。
decision: 先在软磨硬泡下给客户一点点零头优惠，然后在最终谈妥时，假装粗心算错账，表示原本还应赠送另一产品，并声称因此被经理训斥。最后再强调是成本价出售，让客户觉得占了便宜。
rationale: 利用客户喜欢占小便宜的心理，通过先给小优惠，再假装“吃亏”的方式，让客户产生信任感和满足感，促使其快速付款，并认为自己获得了超值优惠。
title_en: Sales Skill: The Art of Feigned Ignorance
scenario_en: When a customer hesitates at checkout due to price or tries to get a small discount.
decision_en: Initially, offer a small discount after some negotiation. Then, when the deal is finalized, pretend to have made a calculation error, stating that another product was supposed to be included, and claim to have been reprimanded by the manager for it. Finally, emphasize that the item is sold at cost to make the customer feel they got a bargain.

title: 客户服务沟通技巧：感同身受、被重视、换位思考、甜言蜜语、拒绝的艺术、缩短通话、等待、记录、其他和结束语
scenario: 在与客户进行沟通时，尤其是在客户表达不满、疑问或需要帮助时。
decision: 客服人员应运用一系列沟通技巧，包括表达同理心、让客户感到被重视、站在客户角度说话、使用积极正面的语言、艺术地拒绝、高效处理通话、耐心等待、详细记录客户反馈以及恰当的结束语。
rationale: 这些技巧旨在提升客户满意度，化解客户负面情绪，建立信任，并确保服务质量。
source_doc: 100个电商客服话术秘籍，做电商必看.docx
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skills: Empathy, Valued, Perspective-Taking, Sweet Talk, Art of Refusal, Shorten Calls, Waiting, Recording, Other, and Closing
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, especially when they express dissatisfaction, questions, or need assistance.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should use a range of communication skills, including expressing empathy, making customers feel valued, speaking from the customer's perspective, using positive language, artfully refusing, handling calls efficiently, waiting patiently, thoroughly recording customer feedback, and using appropriate closing remarks.

title: 感受式优化：通过话术设计让客户感受到专属服务
scenario: 当客户提出问题，客服在提供解决方案时，希望提升客户满意度。
decision: 在回答客户问题时，除了直接解决问题，还要通过话术设计让客户感受到客服正在为他提供特别的帮助或服务，从而提升客户的满意度。
rationale: 通过让客户感受到专属服务，可以增强客户的满意度和忠诚度，即使在标准服务范围内也能创造额外价值。
title_en: Experiential Optimization: Using Script Design to Provide Exclusive Service
scenario_en: When a customer asks a question and the customer service representative wants to enhance customer satisfaction while providing a solution.
decision_en: When answering customer questions, in addition to directly solving the problem, use script design to make the customer feel that the customer service representative is providing special help or service, thereby increasing customer satisfaction.

title: 客服团队激励策略：工作重塑、员工参与、正负激励与竞争激励
scenario: 客服团队工作单调重复，容易产生消极情绪且情绪易扩散。
decision: 通过工作重塑、员工参与、正向激励与负向激励结合、竞争激励等多种激励手段组合，激发员工积极情绪，提升团队士气和业绩。
rationale: 积极的情绪对员工和团队负责，能提高员工努力程度、减少消极动机、强化正确行为并激发潜能，最终提升客户满意度。
source_doc: 客服管理的5大核心激励办法.docx
title_en: Customer Service Team Motivation Strategies: Job Redesign, Employee Participation, Positive/Negative Incentives, and Competitive Incentives
scenario_en: Customer service team work is monotonous and repetitive, easily leading to negative emotions that can spread.
decision_en: Combine various motivational methods such as job redesign, employee participation, a mix of positive and negative incentives, and competitive incentives to stimulate positive emotions in employees and boost team morale and performance.

title: 客服欢迎语破冰与引导收藏加购策略
scenario: 客户首次咨询或在大促前与客服互动时
decision: 客服应使用欢迎语破冰方法提升客户信任度，并在大促前积极引导客户收藏加购，明确告知客户利益点。
rationale: 有效的欢迎语能第一时间抓住客户心理，提升信任度并减少咨询量。引导收藏加购能在大促期间促成冲动消费，提高转化率。
title_en: Customer Service Welcome Message: Breaking the Ice and Guiding Collection/Add-to-Cart
scenario_en: When a customer consults for the first time or interacts with customer service before a major promotion.
decision_en: Customer service should use a welcome message to build customer trust and actively guide customers to collect items and add them to their cart before a major promotion, clearly informing them of the benefits.

title: 客服沟通技巧：如何通过“转个弯”推荐提升转化率
scenario: 当客户咨询的商品缺货或不符合其初始需求时，或客户在店铺浏览但未购买任何产品时。
decision: 客服应避免直接推销，而是通过引导性提问了解客户具体需求，然后推荐相似或替代产品，并提供真人实拍图和细节图，以专业和热情的态度帮助客户解决问题，而非仅仅解释和道歉。
rationale: 直接推销容易让买家反感，而通过了解需求后的“迂回”推荐能让买家感受到客服的专业和帮助，从而提高购买转化率和关联销售。同时，服务不仅仅是态度好，更重要的是帮助客户解决问题。
source_doc: 不可忽视的客服技巧 自动回复小推荐巧法吸引买家“转个弯”再推荐.docx
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skill: Indirect Recommendation to Boost Conversion
scenario_en: When the inquired product is out of stock or doesn't meet the customer's initial needs, or when a customer browses the store but doesn't purchase any products.
decision_en: Customer service should avoid direct selling. Instead, use guiding questions to understand the customer's specific needs, then recommend similar or alternative products, providing real photos and detailed images. Help the customer solve problems with a professional and enthusiastic attitude, rather than just explaining and apologizing.

title: 催付工作注意事项、方式与流程
scenario: 当需要对未付款订单进行催付时
decision: 客服应遵循电话催付时间、查看聊天记录、清晰表达、主动道歉、询问原因、点击“提示付款”并旺旺留言，最后备注订单。
rationale: 规范催付流程和话术，提高催付成功率，避免重复催付，并提升客户体验。
title_en: Payment Reminder: Precautions, Methods, and Process
scenario_en: When payment reminders are needed for unpaid orders.
decision_en: Customer service should adhere to call times for payment reminders, review chat history, express clearly, proactively apologize, inquire about the reason, click 'Remind to Pay,' leave a message on Wangwang, and finally add a note to the order.

title: 双十一期间物流延迟的客户沟通策略
scenario: 在双十一大促期间，客户咨询订单未发货或已发货但物流更新缓慢的情况。
decision: 向客户解释由于双十一订单量巨大和快递爆仓导致的物流延迟，安抚客户情绪，并承诺会尽快发货或催促快递。可以提供优先安排发货的选项，并强调产品质量和专业流程。
rationale: 双十一期间订单量激增和快递系统超负荷是客观事实，通过真诚的解释和积极的解决方案（如优先安排、催促），可以缓解客户的焦虑和不满，维护客户关系。
source_doc: 【淘宝双11】催物流回复话术集锦.docx
title_en: Double Eleven Logistics Delay Customer Communication Strategy
scenario_en: During the Double Eleven mega-promotion, customers inquire about unshipped orders or slow logistics updates for shipped orders.
decision_en: Explain to customers that logistics delays are due to the massive order volume and courier overload during Double Eleven. Reassure customers and promise to ship as soon as possible or expedite with the courier. Offer priority shipping options and emphasize product quality and professional processes.

title: 双11大促客服团队准备工作：组建、培训与注意事项
scenario: 在双11等大型促销活动期间，店铺面临远超日常的咨询量和流量高峰。
decision: 客服团队需提前进行人员组建、分阶段培训，并做好网络、电力、电脑设备、排班及系统设置等准备工作，以应对高并发咨询。
rationale: 高流量会带来爆发式咨询量，若准备不足将导致客户体验下降、售后隐患增加，甚至系统瘫痪。充分准备能确保客服团队高效运作，提升销售额并维护客户满意度。
source_doc: 【淘宝双11】客服团队的准备工作.docx
title_en: Double 11 Promotion Customer Service Team Preparation: Formation, Training, and Precautions
scenario_en: During large-scale promotional events like Double 11, the store faces consultation volumes and traffic peaks far exceeding normal levels.
decision_en: The customer service team needs to be formed and trained in phases in advance, and preparations for network, power, computer equipment, scheduling, and system settings must be made to handle high-concurrent inquiries.

title: 客服处理客户投诉的策略与技巧
scenario: 当客户对商品或服务不满意并进行投诉时，客服人员需要有效处理以解决问题并维护客户关系。
decision: 客服人员应快速反应、热情接待、表示愿意提供帮助、诚恳道歉，并提出具体的补救措施。在客户情绪激动时，理解其发泄需求，并提供同情、尊重和重视。
rationale: 有效的投诉处理能释放客户不满情绪，维持心理平衡，让客户感到安全和被重视，从而消除对立情绪，将不满转化为感谢和满意，并可能将客户转化为忠实用户。
title_en: Customer Service Strategies and Skills for Handling Customer Complaints
scenario_en: When a customer is dissatisfied with a product or service and files a complaint, customer service personnel need to handle it effectively to resolve the issue and maintain customer relationships.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should respond quickly, greet enthusiastically, express willingness to help, sincerely apologize, and propose specific remedial measures. When customers are emotional, understand their need to vent, and offer sympathy, respect, and attention.

title: 售前客服话术流程与常见问题解答规范
scenario: 在售前客服与顾客沟通的各个阶段，包括首次接待、疑问解答、交易结束以及处理特殊情况时。
decision: 客服需遵循标准化的开场白、疑问解答、结束语，并针对不同顾客类型（新客、老客）和特殊情况（如沉默、未付款）采用特定话术。对于商品属性、服务、物流、售后、价格和操作等常见问题，应使用预设的规范化回答。
rationale: 标准化的话术旨在提升客户服务质量，确保沟通效率和一致性，同时通过引导性语言促进销售并维护品牌形象。
title_en: Pre-sales Customer Service Script Flow and FAQ Guidelines
scenario_en: At various stages of pre-sales customer service communication with customers, including initial reception, answering questions, concluding transactions, and handling special situations.
decision_en: Customer service needs to follow standardized opening remarks, question answering, and closing statements, and use specific scripts for different customer types (new customers, returning customers) and special situations (e.g., silent customers, unpaid orders). For common questions about product attributes, services, logistics, after-sales, pricing, and operations, use pre-set standardized answers.

title: 顾客永远是对的原则
scenario: 在所有与顾客互动的场景中。
decision: 始终以顾客为中心，理解并满足顾客的需求。
rationale: 这是公司品牌声音和客户服务理念的核心，旨在建立和维护良好的客户关系。
title_en: The Customer Is Always Right Principle
scenario_en: In all customer interaction scenarios.
decision_en: Always be customer-centric, understand and meet customer needs.

title: 处理商品破损纠纷：本人签收与非本人签收的责任认定
scenario: 当买家收到商品后声称商品破损，需要认定责任归属时。
decision: 根据“表面一致”原则和签收情况（本人签收或非本人签收）来判断商品毁损、灭失的风险是否已从卖家转移给买家。
rationale: “表面一致”是判断货物状况的基础，收货人签收后，商品毁损、灭失的风险通常由卖家转移给买家，但需区分本人签收和非本人签收的具体情况。
source_doc: 客服支招,解决宝贝破损问题.docx
title_en: Handling Damaged Goods Disputes: Liability for Personal vs. Non-Personal Receipt
scenario_en: When a buyer claims goods are damaged upon receipt, and liability needs to be determined.
decision_en: Determine whether the risk of damage or loss has transferred from the seller to the buyer based on the 'surface consistency' principle and the signing situation (personal receipt or non-personal receipt).

title: 处理客户反映收货少件的流程与注意事项
scenario: 客户反映收到的货物数量不符，特别是当货物由他人代签时。
decision: 首先与仓库核对发货数量，然后与客户确认是否本人签收及是否当场验货。若非本人签收，需联系物流提供合法代签授权证明。如无法提供，则支持买家退款。
rationale: 确保交易的公平性，保护买家权益，同时明确物流责任。未能提供合法签收证明，则视为非本人正常签收，卖家需承担责任。
source_doc: 客服支招,解决宝贝破损问题.docx
title_en: Process and Precautions for Handling Customer Reports of Missing Items
scenario_en: When a customer reports a discrepancy in the quantity of goods received, especially when the goods were signed for by someone else.
decision_en: First, verify the shipping quantity with the warehouse. Then, confirm with the customer if they signed for it personally and if they inspected the goods on the spot. If not signed for personally, contact logistics to provide legal authorization for proxy signing. If no authorization can be provided, support the buyer's refund request.

title: 客服服务甜言蜜语：感同身受与被重视的沟通技巧
scenario: 在客服与客户进行旺旺或电话沟通时，尤其当客户表达不满、着急或困惑时。
decision: 客服应运用“感同身受”的表达方式来理解客户情绪，并让客户感到被重视。同时，避免使用指责性或推卸责任的“您”字句，改用“我”来承担沟通责任。
rationale: 细节决定成败，良好的服务直接影响店铺信誉和口碑。通过理解客户情绪并让其感到被重视，可以有效缓解客户负面情绪，提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
source_doc: 客服服务甜言蜜语，11类100招，大家可以借鉴下.docx
title_en: Customer Service Sweet Talk: Empathy and Feeling Valued Communication Skills
scenario_en: During customer service communication via Wangwang or phone, especially when customers express dissatisfaction, urgency, or confusion.
decision_en: Customer service should use 'empathetic' language to understand customer emotions and make customers feel valued. Avoid accusatory or blame-shifting 'you' statements, and instead use 'I' to take responsibility for the communication.

title: 客户服务中的甜言蜜语与拒绝的艺术
scenario: 在与客户沟通时，需要表达感谢、理解、歉意、提供帮助或拒绝客户请求时。
decision: 使用积极、礼貌、共情和专业的语言来回应客户，即使是拒绝也要艺术性地表达。例如，感谢客户的建议、理解客户的感受、为造成的不便道歉，并提供可能的解决方案或解释。
rationale: 通过使用“甜言蜜语”和“拒绝的艺术”，可以提升客户满意度，维护客户关系，并展现专业的服务形象。
source_doc: 客服服务甜言蜜语，11类100招，大家可以借鉴下.docx
title_en: Sweet Talk and the Art of Refusal in Customer Service
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, needing to express gratitude, understanding, apology, offer help, or refuse a customer request.
decision_en: Use positive, polite, empathetic, and professional language to respond to customers; even when refusing, do so artfully. For example, thank customers for suggestions, understand their feelings, apologize for inconvenience, and offer possible solutions or explanations.

title: 客服话术：处理发货时间、材质、使用感受、图物符合、议价和尺码规格等常见买家疑问
scenario: 商家在处理客户关于发货时间、产品材质、使用感受、图片与实物是否相符、议价以及尺码规格等常见问题时。
decision: 客服应根据不同场景采用预设的话术，解决买家担忧，传递产品价值和自信，并引导客户下单。
rationale: 通过标准化的客服话术，可以有效解决买家疑虑，减少订单流失，提升客户满意度和转化率。
title_en: Customer Service Script: Handling Common Buyer Questions on Shipping Time, Material, Usage Experience, Product-Image Consistency, Bargaining, and Size Specifications
scenario_en: When merchants handle common customer questions regarding shipping time, product material, usage experience, consistency between images and actual product, bargaining, and size specifications.
decision_en: Customer service should use pre-set scripts for different scenarios to address buyer concerns, convey product value and confidence, and guide customers to place orders.

title: 淘宝客服沟通用语规范：积极、专业与个性化表达
scenario: 淘宝客服在与客户进行沟通时，需要确保语言的专业性、积极性和个性化，以提升客户满意度和信任感。
decision: 客服应从“生活随意型”转变为“工作专业型”的语言风格，并掌握积极用词、善用“我”代替“你”等沟通技巧，同时保持亲切感。
rationale: 专业的沟通能够建立客户信任，积极的用词能强化正面感受，个性化表达能更好地满足不同客户的需求，从而提升服务质量和客户关系。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Communication Guidelines: Positive, Professional, and Personalized Expression
scenario_en: Taobao customer service needs to ensure professional, positive, and personalized language when communicating with customers to enhance satisfaction and trust.
decision_en: Customer service should transition from a 'casual' to a 'professional' language style, master positive wording, use 'I' instead of 'you' in communication, and maintain a friendly demeanor.

title: 表达合作意愿
scenario: 当与客户的当前互动结束，且希望未来能再次合作时。
decision: 使用“希望我们还有机会合作”这句话来表达积极的合作意愿。
rationale: 这句话传达了积极的品牌形象和对未来合作的开放态度。
title_en: Expressing Willingness to Cooperate
scenario_en: When the current interaction with a customer ends, and future cooperation is desired.
decision_en: Use the phrase 'We hope to have the opportunity to cooperate again' to express a positive willingness to collaborate.

title: 多件购买赠送小礼品
scenario: 当顾客购买多件商品时。
decision: 向顾客赠送小礼品。
rationale: 通过赠送小礼品来提升顾客满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Gift for Multiple Purchases
scenario_en: When a customer purchases multiple items.
decision_en: Offer a small gift to the customer.

title: 强调产品质量与一流售后服务
scenario: 当客户对产品价格或价值提出疑问时。
decision: 向客户强调“一份价格，一份货”的原则，并保证产品质量和一流的售后服务。
rationale: 通过强调产品质量和优质售后服务，可以增强客户对产品价值的信任，并提升品牌形象。
title_en: Emphasize Product Quality and Premium After-Sales Service
scenario_en: When a customer questions product price or value.
decision_en: Emphasize the principle of 'you get what you pay for' and guarantee product quality and premium after-sales service.

title: 内裤商品退换货政策
scenario: 当顾客需要退换内裤商品时。
decision: 内裤商品属于私密物品，淘宝规定不接受任何退换货，质量问题除外。
rationale: 基于淘宝平台对私密物品的规定，为保障卫生和消费者权益。
source_doc: 淘宝客服快捷语示例60条涵盖各个方面.xls
title_en: Underwear Return and Exchange Policy
scenario_en: When a customer needs to return or exchange underwear.
decision_en: Underwear is a private item; Taobao policy does not accept returns or exchanges, except for quality issues.

title: 客服接待语：欢迎、分类指引、收藏与优惠活动
scenario: 当顾客进入店铺或客服主动问候时。
decision: 客服应主动问候，介绍店铺分类和搜索功能，鼓励顾客收藏店铺，并告知当前优惠活动。
rationale: 通过主动友好的问候和指引，提升顾客购物体验，方便顾客查找商品，并促进店铺关注和销售。
title_en: Customer Service Greeting: Welcome, Category Guidance, Favorites & Promotions
scenario_en: When a customer enters the store or customer service proactively greets them.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively greet customers, introduce store categories and search functions, encourage customers to favorite the store, and inform them of current promotions.

title: 淘宝客服快捷短语与自动回复语大全
scenario: 本文件总结了淘宝客服在不同场景下使用的快捷短语和自动回复语，旨在提高客服效率和客户满意度。
decision: 客服应根据客户入店、宝贝介绍、议价、支付、物流、繁忙时段、缺货及退换货等不同情况，使用预设的快捷短语进行回复。
rationale: 使用快捷短语可以节省客服时间，提高回复效率，确保信息传达的准确性和一致性，同时提升客户服务体验。
source_doc: 淘宝网客服快捷短语丶自动回复语大全.docx
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Quick Phrases and Auto-Reply Collection
scenario_en: This document summarizes quick phrases and auto-replies used by Taobao customer service in various scenarios, aiming to improve efficiency and customer satisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service should use preset quick phrases to respond based on different situations, such as customer entry, product introduction, bargaining, payment, logistics, busy periods, out-of-stock, and returns/exchanges.

title: 客服人员日常工作管理规定
scenario: 本规定适用于公司客服人员的日常工作管理。
decision: 客服人员需严格遵守本规定，客服主管负责监督执行情况并有权对违规人员进行惩处。
rationale: 确保客服工作的规范性和纪律性，维护公司运营秩序。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Customer Service Daily Work Management Regulations
scenario_en: These regulations apply to the daily work management of the company's customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must strictly adhere to these regulations. The customer service supervisor is responsible for overseeing compliance and has the authority to penalize non-compliant personnel.

title: 售前、售中常用话术
scenario: This section outlines common phrases used during pre-sales and in-sales interactions.
decision: Refer to the specific phrases and scripts provided in the following subsections for customer communication.
rationale: Standardized communication ensures consistency and effectiveness in customer interactions.
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Common Pre-sales and In-sales Phrases
scenario_en: This section outlines common phrases used during pre-sales and in-sales interactions.
decision_en: Refer to the specific phrases and scripts provided in the following subsections for customer communication.

title: 客户接待八个流程
scenario: 当客服人员需要接待客户时，应遵循一套标准化的流程。
decision: 接待客户应遵循八个步骤：问好、提问、分析、推荐、谈判、帮助、核实、告别。
rationale: 标准化流程有助于确保服务质量和客户满意度。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Eight Customer Service Processes
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to assist a customer, they should follow a standardized process.
decision_en: Assisting customers should follow eight steps: greeting, questioning, analyzing, recommending, negotiating, assisting, verifying, and bidding farewell.

title: 常用客服话术汇总：从售前咨询到售后问题处理
scenario: 客户在售前咨询、购买中、售后遇到问题时，客服应如何进行有效沟通。
decision: 客服应根据客户的具体问题，使用预设的话术模板进行回复，包括产品咨询、物流查询、产品质量问题、漏发赠品、快递派送异常等场景，并注意安抚客户情绪，提供解决方案。
rationale: 统一的话术可以提高客服效率，确保服务质量，同时通过积极友好的沟通，提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Common Customer Service Phrases: From Pre-sales to After-sales Issues
scenario_en: How customer service should effectively communicate when customers encounter issues during pre-sales consultation, purchase, or after-sales.
decision_en: Customer service should use preset phrase templates to respond based on the customer's specific issue, including product inquiries, logistics tracking, product quality issues, missing freebies, abnormal express delivery, and should also calm customer emotions and provide solutions.

title: 退换货原则：商品质量问题与顾客个人原因的运费承担
scenario: 当顾客提出商品退换货请求时，需要明确运费承担方。
decision: 如果商品存在质量问题，无条件退换货，并由我们承担来回运费。如果退换货原因是顾客不喜欢或尺寸不合适，顾客需承担寄回运费及我们发货时的运费。
rationale: 区分商品质量问题与顾客个人原因，以明确责任并公平分摊运费成本。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Return/Exchange Policy: Shipping Costs for Quality Issues vs. Customer Reasons
scenario_en: When a customer requests a return or exchange, the party responsible for shipping costs needs to be clarified.
decision_en: If there is a product quality issue, unconditional returns/exchanges are accepted, and we bear the round-trip shipping costs. If the return/exchange is due to the customer disliking the item or an unsuitable size, the customer must bear the return shipping cost and our original shipping cost.

title: 售后客服
scenario: This section title appears in a document.
decision: This is a heading indicating a section about after-sales customer service.
rationale: The chunk provided is a section header, not a detailed policy or rule.
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: After-Sales Customer Service
scenario_en: This section title appears in a document.
decision_en: This is a heading indicating a section about after-sales customer service.

title: 有问题及时处理
scenario: 当发现任何问题时
decision: 应立即处理问题
rationale: 及时处理问题可以防止问题恶化或造成进一步的负面影响。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Address Issues Promptly
scenario_en: When any issue is discovered.
decision_en: Issues should be addressed immediately.

title: 处理售后问题的基本原则：倾听、找问题、解决问题、保持冷静
scenario: 当客户通过旺旺联系或留下中差评时，需要处理售后问题。
decision: 在沟通中，客服人员应学会倾听客户的问题，找出问题的症结，然后积极解决问题，并在此过程中保持冷静，不慌张。
rationale: 客户主动联系反映问题表明他们信任并愿意协商解决。有效解决问题能增强客户信任度并可能获得好评。保持冷静是有效沟通和解决问题的前提。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Basic Principles for Handling After-Sales Issues: Listen, Identify, Solve, Stay Calm
scenario_en: When customers contact via Wangwang or leave negative reviews, after-sales issues need to be handled.
decision_en: During communication, customer service personnel should listen to the customer's problem, identify the root cause, then actively solve the problem, and remain calm and unpanicked throughout the process.

title: 售后常用话术：处理客户对商品、物流及服务态度的常见问题
scenario: 客户在售后环节提出对商品质量、物流、包装、服务态度或赠品等方面的疑问或不满时。
decision: 客服需根据具体问题，运用预设话术进行回应，包括表达歉意、解释情况、核实信息、提供解决方案或引导客户理解。对于质量问题需核实，非质量问题则解释政策。
rationale: 通过标准化话术，确保客服回应的一致性和专业性，有效安抚客户情绪，解决问题，并维护品牌形象。对于无法退换或非质量问题，需明确告知政策。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Common After-Sales Phrases: Addressing Customer Issues with Products, Logistics, and Service
scenario_en: When customers raise questions or dissatisfaction regarding product quality, logistics, packaging, service attitude, or freebies during the after-sales process.
decision_en: Customer service needs to use preset phrases to respond to specific issues, including apologizing, explaining the situation, verifying information, providing solutions, or guiding customers to understanding. For quality issues, verification is required; for non-quality issues, policies are explained.

title: 电话处理中差评
scenario: 当客户通过电话对产品或服务给出中评或差评时。
decision: 通过电话与客户沟通，处理他们的中差评。
rationale: 直接沟通有助于理解客户不满的根源，并可能提供更有效的解决方案。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Handle Neutral/Negative Reviews by Phone
scenario_en: When a customer gives a neutral or negative review for a product or service via phone.
decision_en: Communicate with the customer by phone to address their neutral or negative review.

title: 让客户知道我们的诚心
scenario: 与客户沟通时
decision: 在与客户的互动中，应确保客户感受到我们的诚意和真诚。
rationale: 建立客户信任和满意度是重要的。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Show Our Sincerity to Customers
scenario_en: When communicating with customers.
decision_en: In interactions with customers, ensure they feel our sincerity and genuine intent.

title: 客户分类
scenario: 当需要对客户进行分类时。
decision: 将客户分为三种类型。
rationale: 为了更好地管理和理解不同客户群体的需求。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Customer Classification
scenario_en: When customers need to be classified.
decision_en: Classify customers into three types.

title: 买家不了解中差评的含义
scenario: 当买家是新手，不了解中差评的具体含义和影响时。
decision: 客服需要向买家解释中差评的含义、影响以及如何修改或删除评价。
rationale: 新手买家可能因不了解评价系统而给出不恰当的评价，通过解释可以帮助买家理解并可能改善评价。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Buyer Unfamiliar with Neutral/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a new buyer is unfamiliar with the meaning and impact of neutral or negative reviews.
decision_en: Customer service needs to explain to the buyer the meaning, impact, and how to modify or delete reviews.

title: 处理买家不满意情况
scenario: 当买家明确表示不满意时。
decision: 解决买家不满意的地方。
rationale: 提升客户满意度，维护品牌声誉。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Handle Buyer Dissatisfaction
scenario_en: When a buyer explicitly expresses dissatisfaction.
decision_en: Resolve the buyer's areas of dissatisfaction.

title: 买家不会使用宝贝（不会做米饭）
scenario: 当买家表示不会使用购买的商品（例如不会做米饭）时。
decision: 在联系买家之前，客服人员应先了解商品的使用方法。
rationale: 为了能够有效地指导买家使用商品，解决其问题。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Buyer Doesn't Know How to Use Product (e.g., Cook Rice)
scenario_en: When a buyer states they don't know how to use a purchased product (e.g., how to cook rice).
decision_en: Before contacting the buyer, customer service personnel should first understand how to use the product.

title: 中差评的定义及影响
scenario: 当客户对店铺进行中评或差评时
decision: 中评计0分，不影响店铺但影响好评率；差评扣1分，对店铺影响很大。
rationale: 区分中评和差评对店铺的实际影响，以便客服人员理解其重要性。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Definition and Impact of Neutral/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a neutral or negative review for the store.
decision_en: A neutral review counts as 0 points, does not affect the store but impacts the positive review rate; a negative review deducts 1 point and significantly impacts the store.

title: 处理中差评的意义与正确态度
scenario: 当店铺收到中评或差评时，需要进行处理。
decision: 处理中差评时，应以真诚的态度解决买家的疑问和问题，而非骚扰买家。将顾客视为朋友而非上帝。
rationale: 妥善处理中差评能提升店铺信誉度，避免影响其他买家购买意愿，从而增加销售额。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Significance and Correct Attitude for Handling Neutral and Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When the store receives a neutral or negative review, it needs to be addressed.
decision_en: When handling neutral or negative reviews, sincerely resolve buyer's questions and issues, rather than harassing the buyer. Treat customers as friends, not as gods.

title: 处理中差评前的准备工作与沟通技巧
scenario: 在处理客户给出的中评或差评之前。
decision: 在联系客户前，需全面了解中差评内容、购买详情、聊天记录及可能原因（质量、服务、物流）。沟通时需抱积极态度，并了解现有售后处理方式。联系客户时，应先征求客户是否方便沟通，并以回访开场，记录客户反馈，再引入正题询问具体不满意之处。
rationale: 充分的准备能帮助客服有效沟通并解决问题，积极的态度和尊重客户的沟通方式能给客户留下好印象，提高解决问题的成功率。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Preparation and Communication Skills for Handling Neutral and Negative Reviews
scenario_en: Before addressing neutral or negative reviews given by customers.
decision_en: Before contacting the customer, thoroughly understand the neutral/negative review content, purchase details, chat history, and possible reasons (quality, service, logistics). Maintain a positive attitude during communication and be aware of existing after-sales handling methods. When contacting the customer, first ask if it's a convenient time to talk, start with a follow-up, record customer feedback, and then introduce the main topic by asking about specific dissatisfactions.

title: 处理中差评的沟通语气与策略
scenario: 当客服需要通过电话处理客户的中差评时。
decision: 打电话时语气要让客户放松警惕，打消其戒备心理。在客户说出问题并解释清楚后，以不卑不亢的态度说明中差评对我们的影响。
rationale: 客户通常比较敏感，放松其警惕才能建立信任，从而了解真实问题。在客户理解问题后，可以适度表达中差评的影响，但无需低声下气，保持专业和尊严。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Communication Tone and Strategy for Handling Neutral and Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When customer service needs to handle a customer's neutral or negative review via phone.
decision_en: When calling, use a tone that makes the customer relax and lower their guard. After the customer states the problem and it's clearly explained, explain the impact of the neutral/negative review on us with a respectful and confident attitude.

title: 处理客户疑虑和中差评的沟通策略
scenario: 在电话或旺旺聊天过程中，客户提出关于色差、气味、价格、质量等方面的疑问，或对商品给出中差评。
