decision: 对于色差和气味问题，解释为网络购物的常见现象并寻求理解。对于价格问题，强调性价比并承认个体期望差异。对于质量问题，明确告知支持7天无理由退换并承担邮费。若无法解决，则申请主管介入并承诺回电。对于中差评，若客户接受修改则表示感谢并预告活动；若不接受则提供补偿措施，并对未修改的评价进行二次跟进，核实修改时间和下次电话联系时间。
rationale: 通过预设的沟通话术解决常见疑虑，维护客户满意度。对于无法立即解决的问题，通过升级处理和后续跟进，确保问题得到妥善解决，并引导客户修改负面评价，同时加深客户对事件的印象并促使其履行承诺。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Communication Strategy for Handling Customer Concerns and Neutral/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: During a phone call or Wangwang chat, a customer raises questions about color difference, smell, price, quality, etc., or gives a neutral/negative review for a product.
decision_en: For color difference and smell issues, explain them as common phenomena in online shopping and seek understanding. For price issues, emphasize cost-effectiveness and acknowledge individual expectation differences. For quality issues, clearly state support for 7-day no-reason returns/exchanges and cover postage. If unresolved, request supervisor intervention and promise a callback. For neutral/negative reviews, if the customer agrees to modify, express gratitude and announce upcoming activities; if not, offer compensation measures and follow up on unrevised reviews to confirm modification time and next call time.

title: 如何修改中差评
scenario: 当需要修改客户对产品或服务的“中评”或“差评”时。
decision: 本节将提供修改中差评的具体方法和步骤。
rationale: 改善客户评价对于维护品牌声誉和提升客户满意度至关重要。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: How to Modify Neutral or Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer's 'neutral' or 'negative' review of a product or service needs to be modified.
decision_en: This section will provide specific methods and steps for modifying neutral or negative reviews.

scenario: This chunk is a header indicating the start of a first step in a process.
decision: This chunk itself does not contain an actionable decision, but rather signals the beginning of a procedural step.
rationale: This is a structural element within a document, indicating a sequence of actions.

title_en: Step Two:
scenario_en: This chunk is a header indicating a step in a process.

title: 修改中差评的步骤：点击“修改评价”而非“删除评价”
scenario: 当需要修改给出的中差评时。
decision: 在“给他人的评价”页面中找到对应的交易，然后点击“修改评价”。
rationale: 点击“删除评价”将导致评价未被修改，无法达到改善评价的目的。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Steps to Modify Neutral/Negative Reviews: Click 'Modify Review' Not 'Delete Review'
scenario_en: When a neutral or negative review needs to be modified.
decision_en: On the 'Reviews Given to Others' page, find the corresponding transaction and click 'Modify Review'.

title: 修改评价流程第四步：买家修改评价内容并提交
scenario: 当买家需要修改对卖家的评价时，在点击“修改评价”后。
decision: 买家应在出现的页面上填写新的评价内容，然后点击“修改”按钮提交。系统将提示修改成功。
rationale: 此步骤是完成评价修改的必要操作，确保买家能够更新其对卖家的反馈。
source_doc: 电商客服标准话术和服务细节.docx
title_en: Review Modification Process Step Four: Buyer Modifies Review Content and Submits
scenario_en: When a buyer needs to modify a review for a seller, after clicking 'Modify Review'.
decision_en: The buyer should fill in the new review content on the displayed page and then click the 'Modify' button to submit. The system will prompt that the modification was successful.

title: 处理客户抱怨与不满的沟通策略
scenario: 当客户表达抱怨或不满时。
decision: 客服人员应首先稳定客户情绪，详细询问并记录问题状况，分析原因，并耐心细致地解答疑问，多用笑脸表情，让客户感受到真诚。
rationale: 安抚客户情绪是解决问题的第一步，通过详细沟通和真诚的态度，可以有效找出问题根源并建立客户信任，维护客户关系。
source_doc: 电商客服聊天话术，通用版.docx
title_en: Communication Strategy for Handling Customer Complaints and Dissatisfaction
scenario_en: When a customer expresses complaints or dissatisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should first calm the customer, inquire about and record the problem in detail, analyze the cause, and patiently and meticulously answer questions, using many smileys to convey sincerity.

title: 淘宝客服快捷回复技巧大全
scenario: 淘宝客服在日常工作中遇到客户咨询或刁难时。
decision: 使用预设的快捷回复模板来高效应对客户的常见问题，包括欢迎语、退换货政策、物流信息、价格协商、发货时间、会员制度等。
rationale: 掌握快捷回复技巧可以帮助客服快速、准确地处理客户咨询，节省宝贵时间，提高工作效率，并能更好地应对“刁难”客户。
source_doc: 看20岁美女客服 快捷回复 技巧大全——不看你会后悔的！.docx
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Quick Reply Skills Guide
scenario_en: Taobao customer service encounters customer inquiries or difficult situations in daily work.
decision_en: Use pre-set quick reply templates to efficiently address common customer questions, including greetings, return/exchange policies, logistics information, price negotiation, shipping times, and membership programs.

title: 客服快捷短语设计与维护指南
scenario: 在客服日常工作或大促活动期间，需要设计、使用和维护快捷回复以提高效率和客户体验。
decision: 客服团队应将快捷回复的设计与维护纳入日常管理工作，遵循发现问题、快捷设计、更新维护和分类设置的流程，并注意人性化和精简内容。
rationale: 快捷回复能显著减少客服重复工作量，提高工作效率。通过团队协作和持续优化，可以提升整体客服服务质量和客户满意度。
source_doc: 经验客服快捷短语设计心得.docx
title_en: Customer Service Quick Phrase Design and Maintenance Guide
scenario_en: During daily customer service work or major promotional events, quick replies need to be designed, used, and maintained to improve efficiency and customer experience.
decision_en: The customer service team should integrate the design and maintenance of quick replies into daily management, following a process of problem discovery, quick design, update and maintenance, and categorized setup, while ensuring humanization and concise content.

title: 订单催付注意事项与流程
scenario: 当客户拍下商品但未完成付款时，需要进行订单催付。
decision: 客服应在特定时间（11-12点，16-17点）通过电话、旺旺或短信进行催付。催付前需查看聊天记录，了解客户信息。催付时表达清晰，语速适中，避免生硬。若客户不便接听，应主动道歉并委婉收线。需询问未付款原因及付款时间。电话催付后，必须点击“提示付款”并旺旺留言，最后备注订单信息以避免重复催付。
rationale: 有效的订单催付可以减少客户流失，提高转化率，同时避免引起客户反感。通过了解客户情况和提供个性化服务，可以更好地促成交易。
source_doc: 订单催付，不是那么简单的事儿.docx
title_en: Order Payment Reminder: Precautions and Process
scenario_en: When a customer has placed an order but has not completed payment, a payment reminder is needed.
decision_en: Customer service should send payment reminders via phone, Wangwang, or SMS at specific times (11-12 AM, 4-5 PM). Before reminding, review chat records to understand customer information. During the reminder, speak clearly at a moderate pace, avoiding abruptness. If the customer is unavailable, apologize proactively and politely end the call. Inquire about the reason for non-payment and expected payment time. After a phone reminder, click 'Remind to Pay' and leave a Wangwang message, then note the order information to avoid duplicate reminders.

title: 客服沟通技巧：称呼、砍价、发货与赠品策略
scenario: 客服在日常与客户沟通时，包括售前、售中和售后环节。
decision: 客服应使用“您”而非“亲”；处理砍价时，可解释产品差异、引用公司定价、或通过赠送配件/包邮促成交易，对高价砍价可引导至其他促销商品；发货时避免承诺具体时间，并利用多客服自动导航语应对高峰期；不主动承诺赠送礼物，而是在包裹中制造惊喜。
rationale: 使用“您”更显真诚和尊重；灵活处理砍价能提高成交率；避免明确发货时间可减少售后纠纷；不主动承诺赠品，而是在实际收到时给予惊喜，能提升客户满意度和好评率。
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skills: Addressing, Bargaining, Shipping, and Gift Strategies
scenario_en: Customer service communicates with customers daily, including pre-sales, in-sales, and after-sales stages.
decision_en: Customer service should use '您' (you, formal) instead of '亲' (dear); when handling bargaining, explain product differences, cite company pricing, or facilitate the transaction by offering accessories/free shipping, and for high-price bargaining, guide to other promotional items; avoid promising specific shipping times and use multi-customer service auto-navigation for peak periods; do not proactively promise gifts, but create a surprise in the package.

title: 轻微瑕疵商品处理：协商买家自行解决并赔偿
scenario: 当商品存在轻微瑕疵或质量问题，例如服装纽扣脱落、接缝开线、轻微污渍等，且这些问题对买家影响不严重时。
decision: 售后人员应尽量与买家协商，建议买家自行解决问题，并承诺赔偿买家双倍的修理费用。对于真正有严重质量问题的商品，则应无条件退换货。
rationale: 避免因轻微问题导致高昂的换货运费成本，同时展现卖家负责任的态度，提高买家接受度。对于严重质量问题，则必须承担全部责任。
title_en: Handling Minor Defective Products: Negotiate Buyer Self-Resolution and Compensation
scenario_en: When a product has minor defects or quality issues, such as missing clothing buttons, open seams, slight stains, and these issues do not severely impact the buyer.
decision_en: After-sales personnel should try to negotiate with the buyer, suggesting the buyer resolve the issue themselves, and promise to compensate the buyer double the repair cost. For products with genuinely serious quality issues, unconditional returns or exchanges should be offered.

title: 关注福缘网赚，天天给你精彩内容，你值得收藏
scenario: This text is a promotional slogan or tagline.
decision: The user should be encouraged to follow '福缘网赚' for daily exciting content.
rationale: The text explicitly states that following '福缘网赚' will provide daily exciting content worth collecting.
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Follow Fuyuan Wangzhuan for Daily Exciting Content, Worth Collecting
scenario_en: This text is a promotional slogan or tagline.
decision_en: The user should be encouraged to follow '福缘网赚' for daily exciting content.

title: 处理客户砍价的策略与话术
scenario: 当客户在购买过程中提出议价请求时，尤其是在商品利润较低或无法进一步让利的情况下。
decision: 根据客户的砍价类型（试探型、允诺型、对比型、武断型、威逼利诱型、博取同情型）采取不同的应对策略和话术，旨在促成交易并提升客户满意度。
rationale: 砍价是普遍现象，尤其对于低价商品。直接拒绝或不耐烦会降低客户体验和转化率。通过灵活应对，可以在不牺牲利润的前提下，维护客户关系并增加销售机会。
source_doc: 越便宜客户越喜欢砍价，客服如何见招拆招.docx
title_en: Strategies and Scripts for Handling Customer Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer requests a price negotiation during the purchase process, especially when product profit margins are low or further discounts are not possible.
decision_en: Adopt different strategies and scripts based on the customer's bargaining type (exploratory, promising, comparative, assertive, threatening/enticing, sympathy-seeking) to facilitate the transaction and enhance customer satisfaction.

title: 处理淘宝客服议价问题的策略与话术
scenario: 当买家在淘宝客服咨询中提出议价要求时。
decision: 客服不应急于讨价还价，而是首先询问买家“您为什么会觉得贵呢？”，以了解其议价的真实原因。然后根据买家理由，给出公司规定、产品价值、客户平等或增加附加值等合理解释，并使用预设的议价话术进行回应。
rationale: 了解买家议价的根本原因（如认为不值、买过更便宜的、预算问题、同行更便宜）有助于客服针对性地解决问题，维护店铺利益，同时留住客户并促成交易。提供正当理由和良好话术能让买家理解并感到物超所值。
title_en: Strategies and Scripts for Handling Taobao Customer Service Price Negotiation Issues
scenario_en: When a buyer requests a price negotiation during a Taobao customer service inquiry.
decision_en: Customer service should not rush to bargain, but first ask the buyer, 'Why do you think it's expensive?' to understand the true reason for their negotiation. Then, based on the buyer's reason, provide reasonable explanations such as company policy, product value, customer equality, or added value, and respond using pre-set negotiation scripts.

title: 客服用语基本准则：态度、方法、称呼与规定
scenario: 客服与客户进行沟通时，需要遵循基本的沟通准则。
decision: 客服应保持礼貌但不过于亲密，为客户着想，使用“您”称呼客户。当无法满足客户要求时，第一句话需以“非常抱歉”开头。
rationale: 标准化管理能让员工快速上手，减少错误，并提高工作效率。遵循这些基本准则有助于提升客户服务质量和客户满意度。
source_doc: 高销量店铺客服标准用语分享.docx
title_en: Basic Guidelines for Customer Service Language: Attitude, Method, Address, and Regulations
scenario_en: Customer service needs to follow basic communication guidelines when interacting with customers.
decision_en: Customer service should remain polite but not overly familiar, consider the customer's perspective, and use '您' (you, formal) to address customers. When unable to meet a customer's request, the first sentence should begin with '非常抱歉' (I am very sorry).

title: 处理正常中差评：客服回复慢的应对策略与话术
scenario: 当买家因客服回复慢而给出中差评时。
decision: 首先以诚恳的态度向买家道歉，承认回复慢是由于咨询量大，并表示歉意。可以提出下次购买时给予优惠或小礼物作为补偿，以安抚买家情绪并鼓励其修改评价。
rationale: 通过道歉和提供补偿，可以有效缓解买家的不满情绪，增加其修改评价的意愿，同时也能吸引买家再次光顾，将负面评价转化为潜在的推广机会。
title_en: Handling Normal Neutral/Negative Reviews: Strategies and Scripts for Slow Customer Service Response
scenario_en: When a buyer gives a neutral or negative review due to slow customer service response.
decision_en: First, sincerely apologize to the buyer, admit that the slow response was due to a high volume of inquiries, and express regret. Offer a discount or a small gift for their next purchase as compensation to appease the buyer and encourage them to modify the review.

title: 正品/质量承诺及质保政策
scenario: 当顾客询问商品是否为正品、质量问题或质保政策时。
decision: 明确告知顾客京东所售商品均为正品行货，并承诺不销售翻新、二手、维修过或非正品产品。强调商品全新正品，支持任何渠道验货。同时，根据商品提供具体的质保年限，并承诺质保期内非人为损坏可联系处理。对于特定商品，如服装，可提及7天内质量问题包退换。
rationale: 通过明确的承诺和质保政策，增强顾客对商品质量和正品的信任，打消其购买疑虑，提升购物信心。
title_en: Authenticity/Quality Commitment and Warranty Policy
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product authenticity, quality issues, or warranty policy.
decision_en: Clearly inform the customer that all products sold by JD.com are genuine and new, and commit not to sell refurbished, used, repaired, or non-authentic products. Emphasize that products are brand new and authentic, supporting inspection through any channel. Additionally, provide specific warranty periods for products and commit to handling non-human damage within the warranty period. For specific items like apparel, mention a 7-day return/exchange policy for quality issues.

title: 店铺首回话术
scenario: 当顾客首次联系店铺时，客服应使用此话术进行回复。
decision: 客服应回复：“尊敬的新老顾客， 这里是xxxxx。专业的客服团队乐意为您效劳~”并提供快捷查看选项。
rationale: 提供标准化的欢迎语和便捷的查询方式，提升客户服务效率和体验。
title_en: Initial Store Greeting
scenario_en: When a customer first contacts the store, customer service should use this greeting.
decision_en: Customer service should reply: "Dear new and returning customers, this is xxxxx. Our professional customer service team is happy to assist you!" and provide quick viewing options.

title: 客户服务欢迎语和结束语示例
scenario: 当客户开始或结束与客服的对话时。
decision: 客服应使用预设的欢迎语和结束语，这些话术旨在表达友好、提供帮助并引导客户进行后续操作（如关注店铺、收藏商品、提供评价）。
rationale: 统一的欢迎语和结束语有助于提升客户服务体验，展现品牌专业性和亲和力，同时鼓励客户进行购买或互动。
title_en: Customer Service Welcome and Closing Remarks Examples
scenario_en: When a customer starts or ends a conversation with customer service.
decision_en: Customer service should use pre-set welcome and closing remarks designed to express friendliness, offer help, and guide customers to subsequent actions (e.g., follow the store, favorite products, provide feedback).

title: 主动服务意识话术：引导客户提问与提供协助
scenario: 当客户有疑问、犹豫不决、长时间未回复或未下单时，客服应主动介入。
decision: 客服应使用一系列主动服务话术，鼓励客户表达疑问、顾虑或需求，并提供协助，如解答疑问、推荐商品、告知优惠等。
rationale: 主动服务能提升客户体验，解决客户痛点，促进转化，并展现品牌的积极服务态度。
title_en: Proactive Service: Guiding Customer Questions and Offering Assistance
scenario_en: When a customer has questions, is hesitant, has not responded for a long time, or has not placed an order, customer service should proactively intervene.
decision_en: Customer service should use a series of proactive service phrases to encourage customers to express questions, concerns, or needs, and offer assistance, such as answering questions, recommending products, or informing about promotions.

title: 客服等待用语与致歉语
scenario: 当客服需要客户等待，或因咨询量大未能及时回复时。
decision: 使用预设的等待用语告知客户需要等待的原因（如查看聊天记录、核实信息、咨询量大），并表达歉意和感谢。在回复延迟后，应再次致歉并感谢客户的耐心等待。
rationale: 通过主动告知和致歉，可以缓解客户等待时的焦虑情绪，提升客户体验，并体现服务的专业性和人性化。
title_en: Customer Service Waiting and Apology Phrases
scenario_en: When customer service needs the customer to wait, or cannot reply promptly due to high inquiry volume.
decision_en: Use pre-set waiting phrases to inform the customer of the reason for the wait (e.g., checking chat history, verifying information, high inquiry volume), and express apology and gratitude. After a delayed response, apologize again and thank the customer for their patience.

title: 处理客户不满和提供安抚的通用话术
scenario: 当客户表达不满、遇到问题或购物体验不佳时，客服需要进行安抚。
decision: 客服应首先表达歉意，理解客户心情，并承诺会尽力解决问题。根据具体情况，可以提供解决方案（如补发、补偿、转接售后），或告知处理流程和等待时间。
rationale: 通过表达歉意和理解，可以缓解客户的负面情绪，建立信任，并为后续的问题解决创造良好沟通基础。
title_en: General Phrases for Handling Customer Dissatisfaction and Providing Reassurance
scenario_en: When a customer expresses dissatisfaction, encounters a problem, or has a poor shopping experience, customer service needs to provide reassurance.
decision_en: Customer service should first apologize, understand the customer's feelings, and promise to do their best to resolve the issue. Depending on the specific situation, solutions can be offered (e.g., re-shipment, compensation, transfer to after-sales service), or the processing procedure and waiting time can be communicated.

title: 客户赞美用语
scenario: 与客户沟通时，尤其是在客户表达购买意向、提供反馈或作为老客户时。
decision: 使用积极、赞美和感谢的语言来回应客户，例如称赞客户的眼光、感谢他们的支持或反馈，并表达提供服务的荣幸。
rationale: 通过赞美客户，可以提升客户满意度，建立良好的客户关系，并鼓励客户继续支持和信任品牌。
title_en: Customer Praise Phrases
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, especially when customers express purchase intent, provide feedback, or are returning customers.
decision_en: Use positive, complimentary, and grateful language to respond to customers, such as praising their discernment, thanking them for their support or feedback, and expressing the honor of providing service.

title: 邀评话术与京东平台邀好评禁令
scenario: 当客服需要引导客户对服务进行评价时，以及在京东平台运营中。
decision: 客服可以使用多种话术邀请客户评价服务，例如表达关心、感谢咨询或支持，并引导客户点击评价按钮。然而，在京东平台上，明确禁止邀请客户给出“好评”。
rationale: 提供多种邀评话术旨在提升服务质量并收集客户反馈，同时确保客户体验的积极性。京东平台禁止邀好评是为了维护评价的公正性和真实性。
title_en: Review Invitation Phrases and JD.com Good Review Ban
scenario_en: When customer service needs to guide customers to review the service, and in JD.com platform operations.
decision_en: Customer service can use various phrases to invite customers to review the service, such as expressing care, thanking them for their inquiry or support, and guiding them to click the review button. However, on the JD.com platform, inviting customers to give 'good reviews' is explicitly prohibited.

title: 如何回应客户对商品差评的担忧
scenario: 当客户对商品评价中的差评表示担忧或疑问时。
decision: 承认差评的普遍性，强调产品整体质量、售后服务、无理由退换货政策，并解释可能存在的恶意评价或特定问题（如气味、色差）的合理原因。
rationale: 通过提供多角度的解释和保障，旨在打消客户疑虑，增强其购买信心，并维护品牌形象。
title_en: How to Respond to Customer Concerns About Product Bad Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer expresses concern or questions about negative reviews in product evaluations.
decision_en: Acknowledge the prevalence of negative reviews, emphasize overall product quality, after-sales service, no-reason return policy, and explain reasonable causes for potential malicious reviews or specific issues (e.g., odor, color difference).

title: 产品推荐与促销话术
scenario: 当客户咨询产品或需要推荐时，客服应主动提供产品信息、促销活动和购买链接。
decision: 客服应使用预设的产品推荐话术，突出产品卖点、优惠活动（如优惠券、立减、赠品、秒杀价）和限时促销，并提供购买链接。
rationale: 通过积极的产品推荐和强调优惠，可以刺激客户购买欲望，提高转化率和客单价。
title_en: Product Recommendation and Promotion Phrases
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about products or needs recommendations, customer service should proactively provide product information, promotional activities, and purchase links.
decision_en: Customer service should use pre-set product recommendation phrases, highlighting product selling points, promotional offers (e.g., coupons, instant discounts, free gifts, flash sale prices), and limited-time promotions, and provide purchase links.

title: 催促未下单客户的话术
scenario: 当客户咨询了商品但尚未下单时，客服需要主动联系客户进行催单。
decision: 客服应使用多种话术，包括强调商品价值、优惠活动、库存紧张、发货速度、售后保障等，鼓励客户尽快下单。
rationale: 通过主动沟通和提供额外信息或优惠，可以解决客户的顾虑，促成订单转化，并提升客户满意度。
title_en: Phrases to Urge Customers Who Haven't Placed an Order
scenario_en: When a customer has inquired about a product but has not yet placed an order, customer service needs to proactively contact the customer to follow up on the order.
decision_en: Customer service should use various phrases, including emphasizing product value, promotional offers, limited stock, fast shipping, and after-sales guarantee, to encourage customers to place an order as soon as possible.

title: 大促特色开头语与优惠券信息
scenario: 当顾客进入店铺或咨询时，客服需要提供大促活动的欢迎语和优惠信息。
decision: 使用“欢迎光临***，有什么可以帮您~”作为开头语，并告知顾客付款前可领取的优惠券（299-20, 599-50, 999-100），以及跨店铺满减300-30，活动日期为4.1-4.7。叠加店铺券后可达300-50, 600-110, 999-190。
rationale: 通过提供明确的欢迎语和优惠信息，可以吸引顾客并鼓励其消费，同时告知活动时间和优惠力度，提升购物体验。
title_en: Major Promotion Opening Remarks and Coupon Information
scenario_en: When a customer enters the store or makes an inquiry, customer service needs to provide a welcome message for major promotions and discount information.
decision_en: Use "Welcome to ***, how can I help you?" as an opening remark, and inform customers about coupons available before payment (299-20, 599-50, 999-100), as well as cross-store discounts of 300-30, with activity dates from April 1st to April 7th. After stacking store coupons, discounts can reach 300-50, 600-110, 999-190.

title: 引导客户下单和加购的策略
scenario: 当客户在咨询商品或犹豫不决时，商家需要引导客户完成下单、加购或支付定金/尾款。
decision: 商家应强调活动的限时限量、优惠力度、性价比、价保政策，并提供便捷的购买方式（如优惠券、加购链接、支付尾款指引），同时营造紧迫感和稀缺性。
rationale: 通过强调优惠和稀缺性，可以促使客户尽快做出购买决策；提供价保和便捷服务可以打消客户顾虑，提升购买信心。
title_en: Strategies for Guiding Customers to Place Orders and Add to Cart
scenario_en: When customers are inquiring about products or are hesitant, merchants need to guide them to complete orders, add to cart, or pay deposits/final payments.
decision_en: Merchants should emphasize the limited-time and limited-quantity nature of activities, discount力度, cost-effectiveness, price protection policy, and provide convenient purchasing methods (e.g., coupons, add-to-cart links, final payment guidance), while creating a sense of urgency and scarcity.

title: 处理客户议价的销售话术与策略
scenario: 当客户对产品价格表示不满，要求降价或质疑价格时。
decision: 根据具体情况，可以解释产品价值、强调活动优惠、提供价保服务、拒绝议价并引导领取优惠券，或通过“请示领导”等策略性方式处理。
rationale: 旨在维护产品定价体系，同时通过强调产品质量、服务价值或提供有限优惠来满足客户的心理预期，促成交易。
title_en: Sales Phrases and Strategies for Handling Customer Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer expresses dissatisfaction with product price, requests a price reduction, or questions the price.
decision_en: Depending on the specific situation, explain product value, emphasize promotional offers, provide price protection services, refuse bargaining and guide customers to claim coupons, or handle strategically through methods like 'consulting with management'.

title: 处理客户关于价格、赠品、质量和色差的常见问题
scenario: 客户询问价格优惠、赠品、产品质量、价格差异、实体店对比或色差等问题时。
decision: 根据具体问题提供标准回复，例如解释价格策略、赠品发放机制、质量保障、不同颜色价格差异、线上线下活动差异或色差的正常范围。
rationale: 提供一致且专业的回复，以解决客户疑虑，维护品牌形象，并促进销售。
title_en: Handling Common Customer Questions About Price, Gifts, Quality, and Color Difference
scenario_en: When customers ask about price discounts, gifts, product quality, price differences, comparisons with physical stores, or color differences.
decision_en: Provide standard replies based on the specific question, such as explaining pricing strategies, gift distribution mechanisms, quality assurance, price differences for different colors, differences between online and offline activities, or the normal range of color differences.

title: 春节期间客服与发货政策（有客服，不发货）
scenario: 当春节期间店铺有客服值班但暂停发货时。
decision: 告知顾客本店在指定日期放假，期间有客服值班但只接单不发货。订单将在假期结束后陆续发出。提供客服值班时间，并请求顾客谅解。
rationale: 在春节期间保持客服在线以处理顾客咨询，但由于物流限制暂停发货，需提前告知顾客以管理预期。
title_en: Spring Festival Customer Service and Shipping Policy (Customer Service Available, No Shipping)
scenario_en: When customer service is on duty during the Spring Festival but shipping is suspended.
decision_en: Inform customers that the store is on holiday during specified dates, with customer service on duty to take orders but not ship. Orders will be dispatched sequentially after the holiday. Provide customer service hours and request customer understanding.

title: 疫情期间订单取消与挽留话术
scenario: 顾客因疫情影响（发货时效、包裹安全）主动取消订单，或商家因无法发货主动要求顾客取消订单。
decision: 根据具体情况，提供挽留话术，说明疫情影响，承诺及时处理。若挽留无效，同意取消订单并及时处理。若商家主动取消，需说明原因并提供补偿。
rationale: 在疫情特殊时期，需理解顾客担忧，提供透明信息，并灵活处理订单，以维护客户关系。
title_en: Order Cancellation and Retention Phrases During Epidemic
scenario_en: When a customer proactively cancels an order due to epidemic impact (shipping timeliness, package safety), or the merchant proactively asks the customer to cancel due to inability to ship.
decision_en: Depending on the specific situation, provide retention phrases, explain the impact of the epidemic, and promise timely processing. If retention is ineffective, agree to cancel the order and process it promptly. If the merchant proactively cancels, explain the reason and offer compensation.

title: 差评回复的价值、意义及内容撰写原则
scenario: 当店铺收到中差评时，需要进行回复。
decision: 差评回复应以降低负面影响、打消客户疑虑、获得后续买家信赖为目的。回复内容应描述差评成因、已采取措施、表现态度、承担责任、做出承诺，以向后来者展示真诚、专业和负责。
rationale: 差评回复是给后来者看的，好的回复能将危机转化为推广机会，带来更多曝光和销量，甚至胜过百个好评。
title_en: Value, Significance, and Principles of Writing Bad Review Replies
scenario_en: When the store receives a neutral or negative review, a reply is needed.
decision_en: Bad review replies should aim to reduce negative impact, alleviate customer concerns, and gain trust from subsequent buyers. The reply content should describe the cause of the bad review, measures taken, express attitude, take responsibility, and make commitments to show sincerity, professionalism, and responsibility to future customers.

title: 差评回复策略：如何将负面评价转化为销售机会
scenario: 当店铺收到顾客的差评时，需要进行回复。
decision: 差评回复应以真诚、专业、负责的态度，向后来者解释差评成因、已采取的措施、承担的责任和做出的承诺，以降低负面影响，打消疑虑，并获得后续买家的信赖。
rationale: 差评回复的真正价值在于其对后来者的影响。一个妥善处理的差评回复不仅能化解危机，还能为店铺带来更多的曝光和销量，将其转化为推广机会和危机公关的成功案例。
title_en: Bad Review Reply Strategy: How to Turn Negative Feedback into Sales Opportunities
scenario_en: When the store receives a negative review from a customer, a reply is needed.
decision_en: Bad review replies should be sincere, professional, and responsible, explaining the cause of the bad review, measures taken, responsibility assumed, and commitments made to future customers, to reduce negative impact, alleviate concerns, and gain trust from subsequent buyers.

title: 员工信息登记表
scenario: This chunk is a header and partial data from an employee information registration form.
decision: The document outlines fields for employee data including employment status, position, name, gender, typing speed, education, alma mater, major, years of service, household registration, date of birth, personal contact number, emergency contact number, start date, days employed, resignation date, and reason for resignation.
rationale: This information is essential for human resources management, record-keeping, and operational planning.
title_en: Employee Information Registration Form
scenario_en: This chunk is a header and partial data from an employee information registration form.
decision_en: The document outlines fields for employee data including employment status, position, name, gender, typing speed, education, alma mater, major, years of service, household registration, date of birth, personal contact number, emergency contact number, start date, days employed, resignation date, and reason for resignation.

title: 客服经理工作职责：绩效管理与数据分析
scenario: 客服经理日常工作职责中涉及绩效管理、数据分析和报告。
decision: 客服经理需负责制定和调整KPI绩效，实时跟进与监控客服每日绩效，进行人员绩效评定和面谈。同时，要对询单流失、下单未付款、不满意数据、订单差评、负面数据指标进行分析和监控，并每日复盘，确保服务数据达到优秀水平。
rationale: 通过系统的绩效管理和深入的数据分析，可以及时发现问题、优化流程、提升客服团队的整体服务质量和效率。
title_en: Customer Service Manager Responsibilities: Performance Management & Data Analysis
scenario_en: Customer Service Manager's daily responsibilities include performance management, data analysis, and reporting.
decision_en: The Customer Service Manager is responsible for setting and adjusting KPI performance, real-time tracking and monitoring of daily customer service performance, and conducting staff performance reviews and interviews. Concurrently, they must analyze and monitor inquiry loss, unpaid orders, dissatisfaction data, negative order reviews, and other negative data indicators, and conduct daily reviews to ensure service data reaches an excellent level.

title: 客服组长工作职责与交付物及时效要求
scenario: 客服组长日常工作管理中，需要明确各项任务的责任、要求、交付物和时效。
decision: 客服组长需根据KPI报表、咨询热点分析、运营日报、绩效跟进、不满意日报、业务对接、活动页面检查反馈、现场管理、业务指导、考勤管理、质检管理、周度工作和月度工作等项目，按时完成相应的工作要求并提交交付物。
rationale: 明确的职责和时效要求有助于提高客服团队的运营效率和管理质量，确保各项关键任务得到及时处理和反馈。
title_en: Customer Service Team Lead Responsibilities, Deliverables, and Timelines
scenario_en: In the daily work management of a Customer Service Team Lead, responsibilities, requirements, deliverables, and timelines for various tasks need to be clearly defined.
decision_en: The Customer Service Team Lead must complete corresponding work requirements and submit deliverables on time for items such as KPI reports, hot topic analysis, daily operational reports, performance tracking, daily dissatisfaction reports, business coordination, activity page inspection feedback, on-site management, business guidance, attendance management, quality inspection management, weekly work, and monthly work.

title: 客服绩效考核与薪资构成
scenario: 当需要计算客服的月度工资时，此规则适用。
decision: 客服工资由底薪和绩效工资两部分组成。底薪根据岗位级别确定，绩效工资根据绩效得分计算得出，绩效得分达到不同等级对应不同的绩效奖金。
rationale: 通过底薪保障基本收入，通过绩效工资激励客服提升服务质量、销售转化和工作配合度，以实现公司整体目标。
title_en: Customer Service Performance Appraisal and Salary Structure
scenario_en: This rule applies when calculating a customer service agent's monthly salary.
decision_en: Customer service salary consists of two parts: base salary and performance-based salary. Base salary is determined by position level, and performance-based salary is calculated based on performance scores, with different performance bonuses corresponding to different performance score levels.

title: 客服服务自检表：每日服务评级与关键指标
scenario: 客服人员需要每日评估其服务表现时
decision: 客服人员应使用此自检表记录每日的服务数据，并根据快速应答率、平均响应时间、慢响应量、满意度、答问比和回复率等指标进行服务等级自评。
rationale: 通过每日自检和上级评价，确保客服服务质量达到标准，并识别需要改进的领域。
title_en: Customer Service Self-Inspection Checklist: Daily Service Rating & Key Metrics
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to evaluate their daily service performance.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should use this self-inspection checklist to record daily service data and self-evaluate service levels based on indicators such as quick response rate, average response time, slow response volume, satisfaction, answer-to-question ratio, and reply rate.

title: 客服团队日报KPI数据概览
scenario: 当需要了解客服团队的日常运营表现时，可以查阅此KPI报表。
decision: 此报表提供了客服团队在咨询量、响应速度、回复率、销售额、转化率和满意度等方面的关键绩效指标。
rationale: 通过监控这些KPI，可以评估客服团队的效率和效果，并识别需要改进的领域。
title_en: Customer Service Team Daily KPI Data Overview
scenario_en: When needing to understand the daily operational performance of the customer service team, this KPI report can be consulted.
decision_en: This report provides key performance indicators for the customer service team in terms of inquiry volume, response speed, reply rate, sales, conversion rate, and satisfaction.

title: 不满意数据分析表结构
scenario: 当需要记录和分析顾客不满意数据时
decision: 使用包含序号、顾客id、咨询类型、咨询商品、评价类型、评价日期、接待客服、不满意原因、详细描述和改善措施等字段的表格结构进行记录。
rationale: 此结构旨在系统地收集和分析顾客不满意反馈，以便识别问题并制定改进措施。
title_en: Dissatisfaction Data Analysis Table Structure
scenario_en: When needing to record and analyze customer dissatisfaction data.
decision_en: Use a table structure with fields including serial number, customer ID, inquiry type, inquired product, evaluation type, evaluation date, service agent, reason for dissatisfaction, detailed description, and improvement measures for recording.

title: 中差评数据分析表结构
scenario: 需要分析顾客的中差评数据时
decision: 使用包含顾客ID、评价类型、评价内容、评价日期、商品名称、接待客服、中差评原因、具体描述和改善措施等字段的表格进行数据记录和分析。
rationale: 此结构旨在全面记录和分析顾客中差评的各项关键信息，以便识别问题根源并制定改进措施。
title_en: Neutral/Negative Review Data Analysis Table Structure
scenario_en: When needing to analyze customer's neutral or negative review data.
decision_en: Use a table with fields including Customer ID, Review Type, Review Content, Review Date, Product Name, Service Agent, Reason for Neutral/Negative Review, Specific Description, and Improvement Measures for data recording and analysis.

title: 广告法：商品宣传禁用词语与注意事项
scenario: 在商品的各类宣传（包括广告资料、商品详情描述等）中，需要确保内容符合广告法规定。
decision: 不得使用绝对性用语、借用国家机关名义、宣称质量免检、使用人民币图样（央行批准除外）、单独使用外文或中英文结合用词、使用“驰名商标”字样。同时，需注意专利、数据出处、不得贬低竞品、不得以新闻形式发布、不得乱评比、不得使用获奖证书、不得损害未成年人身心健康、不得未经授权使用人物形象照、不得出现反动色情暴力敏感话题、不得使用京东商城语境不符的词语、京东独家/首发需经批准、不得虚假夸大、模特肖像需授权、无商标使用权不得出现品牌LOGO、促销信息需一致、不得出现其他平台标识或侵权内容。特殊商品如食品、化妆品、药品及医疗器械有额外禁用词语。
rationale: 遵守《广告法》及相关法律法规，维护公平竞争的市场环境，保护消费者权益，确保宣传内容的真实性、准确性和合法性。
title_en: Advertising Law: Prohibited Words and Precautions in Product Promotion
scenario_en: When promoting products (including advertising materials, product descriptions, etc.), content must comply with advertising law regulations.
decision_en: Do not use absolute terms, borrow the name of state organs, claim quality exemption, use RMB patterns (unless approved by the central bank), use foreign languages alone or mixed Chinese and English terms, or use the term 'well-known trademark'. Additionally, pay attention to patents, data sources, do not disparage competitors, do not publish in news format, do not make arbitrary comparisons, do not use award certificates, do not harm the physical and mental health of minors, do not use unauthorized personal images, do not feature reactionary, pornographic, violent, or sensitive topics, do not use terms inconsistent with the JD.com context, JD exclusive/first launch requires approval, do not falsely exaggerate, model portraits require authorization, do not display brand logos without trademark usage rights, promotional information must be consistent, and do not display other platform logos or infringing content. Special products such as food, cosmetics, medicines, and medical devices have additional prohibited terms.

title: 客服排班表：2019年4月老员工与新员工班次安排及出勤统计
scenario: 本数据块展示了2019年4月份客服团队（包括老员工和新入职员工）的详细排班记录和出勤统计。
decision: 该排班表记录了每位客服员工在4月份每天的班次（早班、晚班、休息），以及月度的应出勤、实际出勤、加班、请假、迟到和出勤率等数据。
rationale: 此排班表用于管理和跟踪客服团队的工作时间、出勤情况和绩效，确保客户服务覆盖，并为薪资计算和绩效评估提供依据。
title_en: Customer Service Roster: April 2019 Old and New Employee Shifts and Attendance Statistics
scenario_en: This data block displays the detailed shift records and attendance statistics for the customer service team (including veteran and newly hired employees) for April 2019.
decision_en: The roster records each customer service employee's daily shifts (morning, evening, rest) for April, as well as monthly data for scheduled attendance, actual attendance, overtime, leave, tardiness, and attendance rate.

title: 员工咚咚接待账号管理
scenario: This document outlines the structure for managing employee customer service (咚咚) accounts.
decision: Maintain a detailed record for each customer service employee, including personal information, employment status, and account usage details.
rationale: To effectively manage customer service personnel and their associated communication accounts.
title_en: Employee Dongdong Customer Service Account Management
scenario_en: This document outlines the structure for managing employee customer service (咚咚) accounts.
decision_en: Maintain a detailed record for each customer service employee, including personal information, employment status, and account usage details.

title: 员工绩效管理表结构
scenario: 此文档块描述了员工绩效管理表的结构和包含的字段。
decision: 该表用于记录客服人员的在职状态、岗位、姓名以及每月绩效数据，并计算年均绩效。
rationale: 为了有效管理和评估客服团队的月度和年度绩效。
title_en: Employee Performance Management Table Structure
scenario_en: This document block describes the structure and fields included in the employee performance management table.
decision_en: This table is used to record customer service personnel's employment status, position, name, and monthly performance data, and to calculate annual average performance.

title: XX大促活动临时客服项目计划进度表
scenario: This document outlines the project plan for temporary customer service during a major promotional event (XX大促活动).
decision: The plan covers project confirmation, preparation, implementation, and conclusion, detailing tasks such as staffing, training, and performance incentives.
rationale: To ensure smooth operation and effective customer service support during high-demand promotional periods.
title_en: XX Major Promotion Event Temporary Customer Service Project Plan Schedule
scenario_en: This document outlines the project plan for temporary customer service during a major promotional event (XX大促活动).
decision_en: The plan covers project confirmation, preparation, implementation, and conclusion, detailing tasks such as staffing, training, and performance incentives.

title: 客服质检表关键评估指标
scenario: 当对客服服务质量进行评估和质检时，需要一套标准化的指标。
decision: 质检应涵盖服务礼仪、业务能力、转化销售和致命项等多个维度，并细化到具体行为，如首尾话术、礼貌用语、解答准确性、顾客安抚、备注登记、产品介绍、痛点挖掘、搭配销售、异议处理、态度问题、投诉预警、错误引导及信息泄露。
rationale: 通过多维度、细致的评估指标，可以全面衡量客服的服务质量，识别潜在问题，并促进客服团队的持续改进，以提升顾客满意度和公司利益。
title_en: Customer Service Quality Inspection Key Evaluation Metrics
scenario_en: When evaluating and quality inspecting customer service, a standardized set of metrics is required.
decision_en: Quality inspection should cover multiple dimensions such as service etiquette, business capability, conversion sales, and critical issues, and be detailed down to specific behaviors, such as opening/closing remarks, polite language, accuracy of answers, customer appeasement, remark registration, product introduction, pain point identification, cross-selling, objection handling, attitude issues, complaint warnings, incorrect guidance, and information leakage.

title: 京东平台优惠叠加规则：京券、东券与总价促销的叠加条件
scenario: 当消费者在京东平台购物时，需要了解不同类型的优惠券（京券、东券）和总价促销（满减、满赠、多买优惠）之间是否可以叠加使用。
decision: 京券和东券之间不可叠加使用。总价促销与京券或东券之间可以叠加使用。总价促销内部（如满减与满赠）不可叠加使用。
rationale: 京东平台设定了明确的优惠叠加规则，以管理促销活动的复杂性并确保优惠的有效性。
title_en: JD Platform Coupon Stacking Rules: Jing Coupons, Dong Coupons, and Total Price Promotions
scenario_en: When consumers shop on the JD platform, they need to understand whether different types of coupons (Jing Coupons, Dong Coupons) and total price promotions (full reduction, full gift, multi-buy discount) can be stacked.
decision_en: Jing Coupons and Dong Coupons cannot be stacked. Total price promotions can be stacked with either Jing Coupons or Dong Coupons. Total price promotions themselves (e.g., full reduction and full gift) cannot be stacked.

title: 客服服务基本原则
scenario: 在任何与顾客互动的场景下
decision: 客服人员应始终保持耐心与热情，耐心为顾客讲解，虚心接受用户的建议和批评。将顾客的事情视为自己的事情，并把顾客当作朋友。
rationale: 这些原则旨在塑造良好的个人和组织形象，提高顾客对品牌的美誉度，维护品牌形象，并最终提升公司业绩。
title_en: Basic Principles of Customer Service
scenario_en: In any scenario involving customer interaction.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should always maintain patience and enthusiasm, patiently explain to customers, and humbly accept user suggestions and criticisms. Treat customer issues as their own and treat customers as friends.

title: 发货时间补偿政策
scenario: 如果商品未能按承诺时间发货，即晚1天或晚2天发货。
decision: 晚1天发货补偿5元现金，晚2天发货补偿10元现金。
rationale: 通过提供现金补偿来安抚顾客，弥补因发货延迟造成的不便，鼓励顾客放心下单。
title_en: Shipping Delay Compensation Policy
scenario_en: If goods are not shipped by the promised time, i.e., 1 or 2 days late.
decision_en: A 5 RMB cash compensation for 1 day late shipping, and a 10 RMB cash compensation for 2 days late shipping.

title: 京东E卡使用范围与限制
scenario: 客户询问京东E卡的使用范围或限制时。
decision: 告知客户京东E卡是京东商城的单用途商业预付卡，仅能购买京东自营商品，并列出不能购买的商品类型。
rationale: 明确京东E卡的使用规则，避免客户误解和不必要的纠纷。
title_en: JD E-Card Usage Scope and Restrictions
scenario_en: When a customer asks about the usage scope or restrictions of a JD E-Card.
decision_en: Inform the customer that the JD E-Card is a single-purpose commercial prepaid card for JD.com, which can only be used to purchase JD self-operated products, and list the types of products that cannot be purchased.

title: 客服工资构成与绩效考核标准
scenario: 本政策适用于计算客服人员的月度工资和绩效奖金。
decision: 客服工资由底薪和绩效工资两部分组成。绩效工资通过绩效评分、服务质量系数和工作执配度系数计算得出。
rationale: 通过底薪保障基本收入，并通过绩效考核激励客服提升销售转化、服务质量和工作配合度。
title_en: Customer Service Salary Structure and Performance Appraisal Standards
scenario_en: This policy applies to calculating the monthly salary and performance bonus for customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service salary consists of two parts: base salary and performance-based salary. Performance-based salary is calculated using performance scores, service quality coefficient, and work execution coefficient.

title: 客服部岗位职级晋升方案及薪资结构
scenario: 当客服部员工需要了解不同职级（P1-P6/M2）的薪资结构、岗位能力要求及晋升基本条件时。
decision: 该方案详细列出了P1至P6/M2各职级的试用薪资、转正薪资、等级底薪、等级绩效及合计薪资范围，并明确了各职级在打字速度、学历、工具使用能力、社交能力、电商知识、专业技能、通用能力和管理能力方面的具体要求。
rationale: 提供清晰的职级晋升路径和薪资标准，旨在激励员工提升专业技能和综合能力，实现职业发展。
title_en: Customer Service Department Job Level Promotion Plan and Salary Structure
scenario_en: When customer service department employees need to understand the salary structure, job capability requirements, and basic promotion conditions for different job levels (P1-P6/M2).
decision_en: This plan details the probationary salary, regularized salary, base salary, performance salary, and total salary range for each job level from P1 to P6/M2, and specifies the requirements for each level in terms of typing speed, education, tool usage ability, social skills, e-commerce knowledge, professional skills, general abilities, and management abilities.

title: 京东商城敏感词库：政治敏感词汇列表
scenario: 当商品名称、描述或任何相关文本中包含政治敏感词汇时。
decision: 禁止使用以下政治敏感词汇：两会、十九大、总书记推荐、主席推荐、习总书记、王岐山、习总书记推荐、习主席推荐、习近平推荐、王岐山推荐、习主席、习媛惜衣、彭麻麻、彭丽媛、彭妈妈、毛泽东、全国第一、习近平、周恩来、邓小平、胡锦涛、温家宝、李克强、朱镕基、薄熙来、达赖、李洪志、毛主席、江泽民、法轮功、轮法功、法轮大法、反动派、焦裕禄、学潮、高层内斗、文革、红宝书、红卫兵、藏独、疆独、台独、天清体透干坤正、退党、西独、镇反、镇压、专制、自焚、共产党、中纪委、共产主义、日本鬼子、战斗民族、印度阿三、佛祖、上帝、真主、绿茶婊、权势狗、蛮夷、一国两制、八九、六四、中共、雪山狮子旗、国母、人民大会堂专用、国宴、国务院、中南海、天安门、国旗、国徽、国歌、奥林匹克、红十字。
rationale: 这些词汇被列为黑名单，以避免违反公司规范和政治敏感性。
title_en: JD.com Sensitive Word List: Political Sensitive Vocabulary
scenario_en: When product names, descriptions, or any related text contain politically sensitive vocabulary.
decision_en: The following politically sensitive words are prohibited: Two Sessions, 19th National Congress, General Secretary Recommended, Chairman Recommended, General Secretary Xi, Wang Qishan, General Secretary Xi Recommended, Chairman Xi Recommended, Xi Jinping Recommended, Wang Qishan Recommended, Chairman Xi, Xi Yuanxi Yi, Peng Mama, Peng Liyuan, Peng Mama, Mao Zedong, Number One in the Country, Xi Jinping, Zhou Enlai, Deng Xiaoping, Hu Jintao, Wen Jiabao, Li Keqiang, Zhu Rongji, Bo Xilai, Dalai, Li Hongzhi, Chairman Mao, Jiang Zemin, Falun Gong, Lun Fa Gong, Falun Dafa, Reactionaries, Jiao Yulu, Student Movement, High-level Infighting, Cultural Revolution, Little Red Book, Red Guards, Tibetan Independence, Xinjiang Independence, Taiwan Independence, Tian Qing Ti Tou Qian Kun Zheng, Quit the Party, West Independence, Suppression of Counterrevolutionaries, Suppression, Autocracy, Self-immolation, Communist Party, Central Commission for Discipline Inspection, Communism, Japanese Devils, Battle Nation, Indian A San, Buddha, God, Allah, Green Tea Bitch, Power Dog, Barbarians, One Country Two Systems, Eighty-Nine, June Fourth, CCP, Snow Lion Flag, Mother of the Nation, Great Hall of the People Exclusive, State Banquet, State Council, Zhongnanhai, Tiananmen, National Flag, National Emblem, National Anthem, Olympics, Red Cross.

title: 流失跟进表（催拍催付）- 字段定义
scenario: 当需要记录和跟进流失顾客的信息时，应使用此表。
decision: 该表用于记录顾客ID、咨询产品型号、流失原因、具体描述和售前客服负责人，以便进行催拍和催付的跟进。
rationale: 通过标准化记录流失顾客信息，可以更好地理解流失原因并进行有针对性的挽回操作。
title_en: Lost Customer Follow-up Form (Urge to Buy/Pay) - Field Definitions
scenario_en: When needing to record and follow up on information for lost customers.
decision_en: This form is used to record customer ID, inquired product model, reason for loss, specific description, and pre-sales customer service representative, to facilitate follow-up for urging purchases and payments.

title: 客服主管绩效考核方案：工资构成与考核标准
scenario: 当评估客服主管的月度绩效和计算其工资时。
decision: 客服主管的工资由底薪和绩效奖金组成。绩效奖金根据团队销售转化率和团队服务质量系数均值计算。
rationale: 此方案旨在通过明确的薪资结构和绩效指标，激励客服主管提升团队的销售转化率和服务质量。
title_en: Customer Service Supervisor Performance Appraisal Plan: Salary Structure and Assessment Standards
scenario_en: When evaluating the monthly performance of a customer service supervisor and calculating their salary.
decision_en: A customer service supervisor's salary consists of a base salary and performance bonus. The performance bonus is calculated based on the team's sales conversion rate and the average team service quality coefficient.

title: 新员工培训课程表
scenario: 新员工入职时
decision: 新员工需按照此课程表进行岗前培训，内容涵盖公司文化、规章制度、客服技能、平台规则及业务知识。
rationale: 确保新员工全面了解公司运营、客服要求及相关法律法规，为正式上岗做好准备。
title_en: New Employee Training Course Schedule
scenario_en: When new employees are onboarded.
decision_en: New employees must undergo pre-job training according to this course schedule, covering company culture, rules and regulations, customer service skills, platform rules, and business knowledge.

title: 客服一票否决项：与客户冲突、冷漠、拉黑、引导投诉及泄露公司机密
scenario: 客服在与客户沟通中出现严重违反服务规范的行为，包括但不限于言语冲突、态度冷漠、拉黑客户、引导客户升级投诉或泄露公司机密。
decision: 客服将因此行为被一票否决，质检分数为0分，并被认定为最终用户关键差错。
rationale: 这些行为严重损害公司品牌形象、客户关系及可能导致经济损失，是客服工作中绝对禁止的致命错误。
title_en: Customer Service Veto Items: Conflict with Customers, Indifference, Blacklisting, Guiding Complaints, and Leaking Company Secrets
scenario_en: Customer service personnel exhibit serious violations of service standards during communication with customers, including but not limited to verbal conflict, indifferent attitude, blacklisting customers, guiding customers to escalate complaints, or leaking company secrets.
decision_en: Customer service personnel will be vetoed for such behavior, resulting in a quality inspection score of 0 and being identified as a critical end-user error.

title: 商家客服辱骂、骚扰客户的违规案例
scenario: 当商家客服在与客户沟通时，出现辱骂、人身攻击、威胁、使用不文明语言或表现出不耐烦、嘲讽等恶劣态度。
decision: 平台对商家客服的此类行为进行严重违规处理，包括警告、扣除积分（如12分、25分）等处罚。
rationale: 维护平台服务质量和客户体验，禁止商家客服对客户进行骚扰和不文明言语攻击，确保健康的购物环境。
title_en: Merchant Customer Service Abusing or Harassing Customers: Violation Cases
scenario_en: When a merchant's customer service agent abuses, personally attacks, threatens, uses uncivilized language, or shows impatience, sarcasm, or other poor attitudes during communication with customers.
decision_en: The platform will severely penalize such behavior by merchant customer service, including warnings and point deductions (e.g., 12 points, 25 points).

title: 客户信息请求的礼貌用语规范
scenario: 当客服需要客户提供信息，或客户之前提供的信息不足以查询到所需数据时。
decision: 首次请求信息时，使用“麻烦您提供下您的*****（表情）”；当需要客户再次提供更详细信息时，使用“很抱歉您之前所提供的信息无法查询到相应数据，您是否可以告知更详细的信息呢（表情）”。
rationale: 通过使用礼貌和歉意的语言，可以提升客户体验，减少客户的不满，并鼓励客户配合提供所需信息。
title_en: Polite Language Standards for Customer Information Requests
scenario_en: When customer service needs customers to provide information, or previously provided information is insufficient to find the required data.
decision_en: For the first information request, use 'Please provide your ***** (emoji)'; when more detailed information is needed again, use 'We apologize that the information you previously provided could not retrieve the corresponding data. Could you please provide more detailed information (emoji)?'

title: 客服沟通结束语规范与禁忌
scenario: 在客服咨询即将结束时，或客户在下单后仍有其他咨询问题，或未下单再次进店咨询时。
decision: 结束咨询前需确认客户最终需求，并使用标准结束语。如果客户再次进店咨询，需重新发送结束语。同时，禁止使用不文明、冰冷生硬的回复，禁止强制结束对话，禁止泄露公司内部信息。
rationale: 确保客户服务流程的规范性，提升客户满意度，维护品牌形象，并避免因不当言语或操作引起客户不满或投诉。
title_en: Customer Service Closing Remarks: Standards and Prohibitions
scenario_en: When a customer service inquiry is about to end, or a customer has other questions after placing an order, or re-enters the store for consultation without placing an order.
decision_en: Before ending the consultation, confirm the customer's final needs and use standard closing remarks. If the customer re-enters the store for consultation, the closing remarks must be sent again. Additionally, uncivilized, cold, or stiff replies are prohibited, forced termination of conversations is prohibited, and disclosure of internal company information is prohibited.

title: 客服绩效指标：销售数据定义与来源
scenario: 需要了解客服绩效报表中各项销售数据的具体定义和计算方式时。
decision: 参考本SOP中“销售数据”类别下的字段定义，包括销售额、个人销售额占比、销售量、销售人数、销售订单数、询单人数和邮费总额。
rationale: 确保客服人员和管理层对绩效指标有统一的理解，以便准确评估客服表现。
title_en: Customer Service Performance Indicators: Sales Data Definitions and Sources
scenario_en: When needing to understand the specific definitions and calculation methods for various sales data in customer service performance reports.
decision_en: Refer to the field definitions under the 'Sales Data' category in this SOP, including sales amount, individual sales amount ratio, sales volume, number of sales personnel, number of sales orders, number of inquiry customers, and total postage.

title: 客服魔方字段大全-店铺维度
scenario: 需要了解店铺、客服或静默销售相关的各项数据指标定义和来源时。
decision: 查阅此文档以获取销售数据、顾客数据、客单价、转化率、流失数据、退款数据、中差评、满意率、工作量以及其他相关指标的详细定义和数据来源。
rationale: 提供统一、清晰的数据指标定义和来源，确保数据分析和报告的准确性和一致性。
title_en: Customer Service Cube Field Directory - Store Dimension
scenario_en: When needing to understand the definitions and sources of various data indicators related to store, customer service, or silent sales.
decision_en: Consult this document for detailed definitions and data sources for sales data, customer data, average transaction value, conversion rate, churn data, refund data, negative/neutral reviews, satisfaction rate, workload, and other relevant indicators.

title: 售前客服组长考核指标
scenario: 本文件概述了售前客服组长的月度考核标准和权重。
decision: 售前客服组长的考核分为“团队贡献”（40%）和“业绩指标”（60%）两大部分，具体包括人员沟通、团队统筹管理、知识产出、团队销售额、团队均响、团队UV价值和服务考核等细分项。
rationale: 通过设定明确的考核指标和权重，旨在全面评估售前客服组长在团队管理和业务产出方面的表现，以激励其提升团队效率和销售业绩。
title_en: Pre-sales Customer Service Team Leader Assessment Indicators
scenario_en: This document outlines the monthly assessment standards and weights for pre-sales customer service team leaders.
decision_en: The assessment for pre-sales customer service team leaders is divided into two main parts: 'Team Contribution' (40%) and 'Performance Indicators' (60%), specifically including personnel communication, team overall management, knowledge output, team sales amount, team average response, team UV value, and service assessment.

title: 大促客服部实施方案：筹备阶段目标计划与岗位安排
scenario: 在大促活动的筹备阶段，需要制定详细的目标计划和进行岗位安排。
decision: 制定项目分工、目标、绩效和激励方案，并确定人员分工、岗位职责、排班表和工位。
rationale: 确保大促活动有明确的指导方针、充足的人力资源和合理的激励机制，以应对高强度的客户服务需求。
title_en: Major Promotion Customer Service Department Implementation Plan: Preparation Phase Goals and Staffing
scenario_en: During the preparation phase of a major promotional event, a detailed goal plan and staffing arrangements need to be made.
decision_en: Develop project division of labor, goals, performance, and incentive plans, and determine personnel assignments, job responsibilities, shift schedules, and workstations.

title: 色卡高级必备
scenario: This chunk is a header indicating a section about advanced color cards.
decision: Navigate to the main directory or the 'Color Card - Advanced Colors' section for detailed information.
rationale: This entry serves as a navigational guide within the document structure.
title_en: Advanced Color Card Essentials
scenario_en: This chunk is a header indicating a section about advanced color cards.
decision_en: Navigate to the main directory or the 'Color Card - Advanced Colors' section for detailed information.

title: 客服工资组成与绩效考核标准
scenario: 当需要计算客服工资时，或对客服进行绩效考核时。
decision: 客服工资由底薪和绩效工资组成。绩效工资根据绩效评分、服务质量系数和团队意识指标系数计算得出。底薪根据岗位级别和入职年限确定。绩效评分、服务质量系数和团队意识指标系数均有详细的考核维度和算法。
rationale: 通过设定明确的底薪和绩效考核体系，旨在激励客服提升销售转化、服务质量和团队协作能力，从而提高整体服务水平和公司业绩。
title_en: Customer Service Salary Structure and Performance Appraisal Standards
scenario_en: When needing to calculate customer service salaries or conduct performance appraisals for customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service salary consists of a base salary and performance-based salary. Performance-based salary is calculated based on performance scores, service quality coefficients, and team awareness indicator coefficients. Base salary is determined by position level and years of service. Performance scores, service quality coefficients, and team awareness indicator coefficients all have detailed assessment dimensions and algorithms.

title: 重视解决类话术：客户服务中解决问题的沟通策略
scenario: 当客户提出问题、疑虑、建议或表达不满时，客服人员需要回应并承诺解决。
decision: 客服人员应使用积极、承诺解决、表达感谢和重视的语言，安抚客户情绪，并告知后续处理流程或承诺改进。
rationale: 通过积极回应和承诺解决，可以增强客户信任，提升客户满意度，并维护品牌形象。同时，收集客户反馈有助于内部改进。
title_en: Problem-Solving Communication Strategies: Emphasizing Resolution in Customer Service
scenario_en: When customers raise questions, concerns, suggestions, or express dissatisfaction, customer service personnel need to respond and commit to resolving them.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should use positive, solution-oriented language, express gratitude and importance, soothe customer emotions, and inform them of subsequent processing procedures or promise improvements.

title: 客户询问不明确时，引导客户提供商品链接或重新描述问题
scenario: 当客户的询问不明确，客服无法理解客户意图，或不清楚客户指的是哪款商品时。
decision: 客服应礼貌地要求客户提供商品链接、订单号，或重新清晰地描述问题，以便提供准确的帮助。
rationale: 确保客服能够准确理解客户需求，从而提供高效和相关的服务，避免误解和重复沟通。
title_en: When Customer Inquiries Are Unclear, Guide Customers to Provide Product Links or Re-describe the Problem
scenario_en: When a customer's inquiry is unclear, customer service cannot understand the customer's intent, or is unsure which product the customer is referring to.
decision_en: Customer service should politely ask the customer to provide a product link, order number, or clearly re-describe the problem to provide accurate assistance.

title: 京东退货、换货流程
scenario: 客户需要在京东平台进行商品退货或换货。
decision: 客户需点击“我的订单”确认收货，然后找到对应订单点击“申请返修、退换货”，选择要退货或换货的商品，并填写商品返回方式和退款方式后提交。务必检查商品型号与订单申请一致，并取出非本店铺物品。
rationale: 提供清晰的步骤指引，确保客户能顺利完成京东平台的退换货操作，同时避免因信息不符或混淆物品导致的问题。
title_en: JD.com Return and Exchange Process
scenario_en: A customer needs to return or exchange a product on the JD.com platform.
decision_en: The customer needs to click 'My Orders' to confirm receipt, then find the corresponding order and click 'Apply for Repair/Return/Exchange', select the product to return or exchange, and submit after filling in the product return method and refund method. Be sure to check that the product model matches the order application and remove any items not from this store.

title: 取消订单确认
scenario: 当用户尝试取消订单时，系统会弹出确认窗口。
decision: 点击【确定】以继续取消订单。
rationale: 确保用户明确意图，避免误操作。
title_en: Order Cancellation Confirmation
scenario_en: When a user attempts to cancel an order, a confirmation window will pop up.
decision_en: Click [Confirm] to proceed with canceling the order.

title: 退款处理时效：未发货订单与已发货订单的退款处理时间
scenario: 客户申请退款，根据订单是否已发货以及商品类型，需要告知客户退款处理的时效。
decision: 未发货订单（定制及特殊产品除外）在24小时内处理退款；已发货订单需在签收退回货品并检测无误后3-5天内处理退款。客服应告知客户会催促处理并请耐心等待。
rationale: 根据订单状态和商品处理流程，设定不同的退款处理时效，以确保客户了解预期等待时间。
title_en: Refund Processing Time: Unshipped and Shipped Orders
scenario_en: When a customer applies for a refund, the customer needs to be informed of the refund processing time based on whether the order has been shipped and the product type.
decision_en: Refunds for unshipped orders (excluding customized and special products) are processed within 24 hours; refunds for shipped orders are processed within 3-5 days after the returned goods are signed for and inspected. Customer service should inform the customer that processing will be expedited and ask for patience.

title: 拒绝客户不合理要求的沟通话术
scenario: 当客户提出无法满足的要求时，需要拒绝但同时安抚客户情绪。
decision: 首先表达理解和歉意，明确告知暂时无法满足，并承诺将情况反馈给上级。同时，感谢客户的反馈，并表达改进的意愿。
rationale: 通过表达理解和歉意，可以安抚客户情绪，避免直接拒绝带来的负面影响。承诺反馈和改进则体现了对客户的重视，维护了客户关系。
title_en: Communication Script for Refusing Unreasonable Customer Requests
scenario_en: When a customer makes an unreasonable request, it is necessary to refuse while also appeasing the customer's emotions.
decision_en: First, express understanding and apology, clearly state that the request cannot be met for now, and promise to escalate the situation to a supervisor. At the same time, thank the customer for their feedback and express a willingness to improve.

title: 电话接听流程与服务用语规范
scenario: 在接听客户电话、确认问题、提供解决方案及结束服务等各个环节
decision: 客服人员需遵循一系列规范，包括在3声内接听电话、使用礼貌称呼、倾听并确认用户问题、有序提供解决方案、征求等待意见、感谢等待、确认无其他问题、收集必要用户信息并说明原因，最后致以结束语。
rationale: 通过标准化和礼貌的服务流程，提升客户满意度，确保高效沟通，并为后续服务建立完整的客户信息。
title_en: Phone Answering Process and Service Language Standards
scenario_en: During all stages of answering customer calls, confirming issues, providing solutions, and ending service.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must follow a series of standards, including answering the phone within 3 rings, using polite greetings, listening and confirming user issues, providing solutions in an orderly manner, asking for consent to wait, thanking for waiting, confirming no other issues, collecting necessary user information and explaining the reason, and finally using a closing remark.

title: 处理客户情绪激动和滋扰电话的客服指南
scenario: 当客户情绪激动、抱怨或出现滋扰行为时，客服人员需要进行干预。
decision: 对于情绪激动的客户，客服应先行安抚，表达理解并承诺解决。对于滋扰电话，客服应礼貌提示三次，若无改善则可礼貌挂机。在任何情况下，都应避免使用粗言秽语。
rationale: 通过安抚情绪和提供解决方案，可以提升客户满意度。对于滋扰电话，设定明确的挂机流程可以保护客服人员并维护服务秩序。
title_en: Customer Service Guide for Handling Emotional and Harassing Calls
scenario_en: When a customer is emotional, complaining, or engaging in harassing behavior, customer service personnel need to intervene.
decision_en: For emotional customers, agents should first calm them, express understanding, and promise to resolve the issue. For harassing calls, agents should politely warn three times; if there's no improvement, they may politely hang up. In all cases, avoid using abusive language.

title: 电脑数码产品质保政策
scenario: 客户咨询电脑数码产品的退换货或保修政策时。
decision: 店铺出售的商品支持自签收起7天内无理由退货，15天内质量问题可换货。笔记本电脑整机免费保修一年，主要部件（主板、CPU、内存、显示屏、硬盘驱动器、键盘、电源适配器）免费保修两年。
rationale: 提供明确的退换货和保修期限，确保客户对产品质量和售后服务有清晰的预期。
title_en: Computer Digital Product Warranty Policy
scenario_en: Customer inquires about the return, exchange, or warranty policy for computer digital products.
decision_en: Products sold by the store support no-reason returns within 7 days of receipt and exchanges for quality issues within 15 days. Laptop computers have a one-year free warranty for the entire unit, and major components (motherboard, CPU, memory, display, hard drive, keyboard, power adapter) have a two-year free warranty.

title: 发货时间与快递选择
scenario: 客户询问发货时间或快递方式时。
decision: 正常情况发货后2-5天到达，早下单早收到。具体发货时间根据商品类型（如水冷主机、定制主机）和页面标注为准。默认使用顺丰或京东快递，特殊地区有指定快递。
rationale: 提供明确的发货时效预期和快递信息，帮助客户了解物流安排，并管理客户对收货时间的预期。
title_en: Shipping Time and Courier Selection
scenario_en: When a customer asks about shipping time or courier options.
decision_en: Under normal circumstances, delivery takes 2-5 days after shipment; earlier orders arrive sooner. Specific shipping times depend on the product type (e.g., liquid-cooled hosts, custom hosts) and page annotations. SF Express or JD Express are used by default, with designated couriers for special regions.

title: 主机购买及售后服务政策
scenario: 客户购买主机时，需要了解配送、赠品、收货、售后服务及价格等相关政策。
decision: 告知客户主机订单包邮，随主机赠送螺丝刀和鼠标垫（核显除外）。高端显卡单独打包，显示器与主机分开寄送。主机默认带电源线，不带显示器视频信号线。付款后48小时内发货。同时，推销199元3年上门维修服务和延保服务，并说明不保价政策。提供配置价格明细。
rationale: 明确告知客户购买主机的各项政策和注意事项，提供增值服务选项，以提升客户满意度和信任度。
title_en: Host Purchase and After-Sales Service Policy
scenario_en: When a customer purchases a host, they need to understand policies related to delivery, gifts, receipt, after-sales service, and pricing.
decision_en: Inform the customer that host orders include free shipping and come with a screwdriver and mouse pad (except for integrated graphics models). High-end graphics cards are packaged separately, and monitors are shipped separately from the host. Hosts come with a power cable by default but no monitor video signal cable. Orders ship within 48 hours of payment. Also, promote the 199 RMB 3-year on-site repair service and extended warranty service, and explain the no-price-protection policy. Provide a detailed configuration price list.

title: 投诉受理话术：感谢与承诺
scenario: 当客户提出投诉、意见或宝贵建议时。
decision: 对客户的投诉、意见或建议表示感谢，并承诺会尽快向上级部门反映或进行核实处理，并在规定时间内给出明确答复，或表示会不断改进工作。
rationale: 通过感谢客户的反馈和承诺后续处理，可以安抚客户情绪，展现公司对客户意见的重视，并建立客户信任。
title_en: Complaint Handling Script: Thanks and Commitment
scenario_en: When a customer makes a complaint, provides feedback, or offers valuable suggestions.
decision_en: Thank the customer for their complaint, feedback, or suggestion, and promise to escalate it to a supervisor or verify and process it as soon as possible, providing a clear response within the stipulated time, or stating a commitment to continuous improvement.

title: 客户表扬感谢回复话术
scenario: 当客户对客服的服务表示表扬或感谢时。
decision: 客服应表达感谢，并强调服务客户是职责所在，同时可以邀请客户继续咨询或购物。
rationale: 通过感谢客户的认可，并谦逊地表示这是职责所在，可以增强客户满意度，体现专业服务精神，并鼓励客户再次互动。
title_en: Customer Compliment/Thank You Reply Script
scenario_en: When a customer praises or thanks customer service.
decision_en: Customer service should express gratitude and emphasize that serving customers is their duty, while also inviting the customer to continue consulting or shopping.

title: 售后问题转接话术及售后服务时间
scenario: 当客户咨询的问题属于售后范畴，或售后客服不在工作时间时。
decision: 如果客户咨询售后问题，应使用标准转接话术将客户转接给售后客服。如果售后客服不在工作时间，应告知客户售后服务时间并建议客户在相应时间联系。
rationale: 确保客户问题得到专业处理，并管理客户对服务可用性的预期。
title_en: After-Sales Issue Transfer Script and Service Hours
scenario_en: When a customer's inquiry falls under after-sales scope, or after-sales customer service is not available during working hours.
decision_en: If the customer's inquiry is an after-sales issue, use the standard transfer script to transfer the customer to after-sales customer service. If after-sales customer service is not available, inform the customer of the after-sales service hours and suggest they contact during those times.

title: 非消费者咨询处理话术
scenario: 当非消费者（如商家、推广人员）通过顾客咨询窗口发送消息时。
decision: 告知对方这里是顾客咨询窗口，仅提供产品咨询服务，不提供其他服务，并感谢其理解与支持。
rationale: 明确服务范围，引导非消费者到正确的渠道，同时保持礼貌和专业。
title_en: Non-Consumer Inquiry Handling Script
scenario_en: When a non-consumer (e.g., merchant, promoter) sends a message through the customer inquiry window.
decision_en: Inform the sender that this is a customer inquiry window, providing product consultation services only, and no other services, and thank them for their understanding and support.

title: 商品或服务无法提供时的客户沟通话术
scenario: 当客户询问的商品、服务或安装支持暂时无法提供时。
decision: 向客户表达歉意，明确告知当前无法提供，并提供替代方案（如推荐其他款式、建议关注店铺更新、提供自助安装指导或实体店咨询）。
rationale: 通过清晰的沟通避免误解，同时提供积极的替代方案或未来期望，以维持客户满意度。
title_en: Customer Communication Script for Unavailable Products/Services
scenario_en: When a product, service, or installation support requested by the customer is temporarily unavailable.
decision_en: Apologize to the customer, clearly state that it is currently unavailable, and offer alternative solutions (e.g., recommend other styles, suggest following store updates, provide self-installation guidance, or advise consulting a physical store).

title: 京东平台商品正品承诺及售后服务
scenario: 当顾客对京东平台所售商品的质量、真伪、售后服务或退换货政策有疑问时。
decision: 告知顾客京东所售商品均为正品行货，并承诺不销售翻新、二手、维修过或非正品产品。提供具体的质保期限、退换货政策（如7天无理由退换、质量问题免费退换、3个月保修、3年免费换新等），并说明如何进行真伪验证和售后维修。
rationale: 通过明确的承诺和详细的政策说明，增强顾客对商品质量和购物体验的信心，减少疑虑，促进购买。
title_en: JD Platform Genuine Product Commitment and After-Sales Service
scenario_en: When a customer has questions about the quality, authenticity, after-sales service, or return/exchange policy of products sold on the JD platform.
decision_en: Inform the customer that all products sold on JD are genuine and new, and commit not to sell refurbished, used, repaired, or non-genuine products. Provide specific warranty periods, return/exchange policies (e.g., 7-day no-reason return/exchange, free return/exchange for quality issues, 3-month warranty, 3-year free replacement), and explain how to verify authenticity and obtain after-sales repair.

title: 客服服务流程：迎、问、荐、解、促、送六阶段标准
scenario: 客服与客户进行沟通的全流程，从欢迎语到送客关怀，以及中间的咨询、推荐、解惑和促单环节。
decision: 客服需遵循“迎、问、荐、解、促、送”六个服务流程阶段，每个阶段都有明确的规范和考核标准，如欢迎语需热情有特色，问询需挖掘客户需求，推荐需结合卖点和缘由，解惑需准确完整，促单需及时激活，送客需确认服务。
rationale: 确保客户服务质量，提升客户满意度，并通过规范化的流程和话术，提高销售转化率和问题解决效率。
title_en: Customer Service Process: Six-Stage Standard (Welcome, Inquire, Recommend, Resolve, Promote, Depart)
scenario_en: The entire customer communication process, from welcome to departure care, including consultation, recommendation, problem-solving, and order promotion.
decision_en: Customer service must follow the six service stages: 'Welcome, Inquire, Recommend, Resolve, Promote, Depart.' Each stage has clear guidelines and assessment standards, such as a warm and distinctive welcome, inquiry to uncover customer needs, recommendation based on selling points and reasons, accurate and complete problem resolution, timely order activation, and service confirmation upon departure.

title: 售后服务流程：迎、问、提、解、确、送
scenario: 客服在处理售后问题时，需要遵循一套完整的服务流程。
decision: 客服必须按照“迎、问、提、解、确、送”的顺序进行服务，确保每个环节都符合标准，例如开头语、了解核心问题、确认问题、提供方案选择、解决问题、确定方案以及结束语/满意度发送。
rationale: 通过标准化的服务流程，旨在提供最高服务体验，体现解决问题的态度，并希望一次性解决客户问题，提升客户满意度。
title_en: After-Sales Service Process: Welcome, Inquire, Propose, Resolve, Confirm, Depart
scenario_en: Customer service needs to follow a complete service process when handling after-sales issues.
decision_en: Customer service must follow the 'Welcome, Inquire, Propose, Resolve, Confirm, Depart' sequence to ensure each step meets standards, such as opening remarks, understanding the core issue, confirming the issue, offering solution options, resolving the issue, confirming the solution, and closing remarks/sending satisfaction survey.

title: 质检标准1-配套打分表
scenario: 客服服务质量评估
decision: 根据服务规范、服务礼仪、业务规范及能力、服务意识和致命项等多个维度对客服表现进行打分。
rationale: 通过多维度评估，确保客服提供全面、高质量的服务，并识别潜在的严重问题。
title_en: Quality Inspection Standard 1 - Scoring Sheet
scenario_en: Customer service quality assessment
decision_en: Score customer service performance based on multiple dimensions including service norms, service etiquette, business norms and capabilities, service awareness, and critical errors.

title: Customer Service Quality Inspection Form
scenario: To evaluate the performance of customer service representatives based on various criteria during pre-sales interactions.
decision: Customer service representatives are evaluated across four main categories: Service (30%), Sales (30%), Process (20%), and Product Knowledge (20%). Each sub-item within these categories is scored out of 100, with specific deductions for critical errors (致命项 0). The final score is a weighted average.
rationale: This structured evaluation ensures consistent quality control, identifies areas for improvement in service delivery, sales effectiveness, adherence to procedures, and product expertise, ultimately enhancing customer satisfaction and business performance.
title_en: Customer Service Quality Inspection Form
scenario_en: To evaluate the performance of customer service representatives based on various criteria during pre-sales interactions.
decision_en: Customer service representatives are evaluated across four main categories: Service (30%), Sales (30%), Process (20%), and Product Knowledge (20%). Each sub-item within these categories is scored out of 100, with specific deductions for critical errors (致命项 0). The final score is a weighted average.

title: 售前质检表评分标准
scenario: 对售前客服的服务质量进行评估时
decision: 根据服务流程、沟通规范、专业服务和加分项四个维度进行打分，总分为100分。具体分项包括：迎、问、荐、解、促、送、销售步骤、规范用语、标点表情、回复时效、没有错别字、分析原因及建议、风险告知、主动服务意识、转接规范、沟通技巧、图文结合、备注规范、客户满意度、差评处理、惊喜躲不开。
rationale: 通过细致的评分标准，全面评估客服在售前服务中的表现，确保服务质量和客户满意度。
title_en: Pre-Sales Quality Inspection Scoring Standards
scenario_en: When evaluating the service quality of pre-sales customer service.
decision_en: Score is based on four dimensions: service process, communication norms, professional service, and bonus points, with a total score of 100. Specific sub-items include: Welcome, Inquire, Recommend, Resolve, Promote, Depart, sales steps, standardized language, punctuation and emojis, response timeliness, no typos, analysis of reasons and suggestions, risk notification, proactive service awareness, transfer norms, communication skills, text-image combination, remark norms, customer satisfaction, negative review handling, and 'surprise cannot be avoided'.

title: 客服质检标准与评分细则
scenario: 对客服人员的服务质量进行评估和打分时
decision: 根据服务流程、沟通规范、专业服务、工作流程和加分项等多个维度进行综合评分，每个维度有对应的分值和满分标准。
rationale: 确保客服服务质量的标准化和持续改进，提升客户满意度。
title_en: Customer Service Quality Inspection Standards and Scoring Details
scenario_en: When evaluating and scoring the service quality of customer service personnel.
decision_en: Comprehensive scoring is based on multiple dimensions including service process, communication norms, professional service, workflow, and bonus points, with corresponding scores and full marks for each dimension.

title: 京东售前客服人员增补申请表职位说明与任职资格
scenario: 当需要增补京东售前客服人员时，此申请表用于明确职位的工作内容和任职资格要求。
decision: 申请增补的售前客服人员需熟知京东规则，通过“咚咚”工作台提供专业咨询，引导客户下单，并处理日常咨询、催单催付、工单及售后问题。任职资格要求包括年龄20-28岁，大专/本科或高中学历，1年以上电商客服经验，熟悉京东平台操作及高压线规则，具备销售能力，并能适应轮班制工作。
rationale: 明确职位职责和任职资格是为了确保招聘到符合京东平台运营和服务标准的合格客服人员，以提高客户满意度和销售转化率。
title_en: JD Pre-Sales Customer Service Staff Supplement Application Form: Job Description and Qualifications
scenario_en: When additional JD pre-sales customer service staff are needed, this application form clarifies the job responsibilities and qualification requirements.
decision_en: Supplemental pre-sales customer service staff must be familiar with JD rules, provide professional consultation via the 'Dongdong' workbench, guide customers to place orders, and handle daily inquiries, order/payment reminders, work orders, and after-sales issues. Qualification requirements include age 20-28, college/bachelor's degree or high school diploma, 1+ year e-commerce customer service experience, familiarity with JD platform operations and high-pressure rules, sales ability, and adaptability to shift work.

title: 退换货原因分析表结构
scenario: 需要分析退换货数据以识别趋势和改进措施时
decision: 使用包含顾客ID、订单信息、申请详情、商品名称、退换货原因、具体描述和改善措施等字段的表格进行数据记录和分析。
rationale: 通过结构化数据收集，可以系统地追踪和分析退换货的根本原因，从而制定有效的改善策略。
title_en: Return/Exchange Reason Analysis Table Structure
scenario_en: When needing to analyze return and exchange data to identify trends and improvement measures.
decision_en: Use a table with fields such as Customer ID, Order Information, Application Details, Product Name, Return/Exchange Reason, Specific Description, and Improvement Measures for data recording and analysis.

title: 好评解释（回评）话术集
scenario: 当客户给出好评时，商家需要进行回复。
decision: 使用预设的感谢话术，表达对客户的认可、支持和鼓励，并期待再次光临。
rationale: 通过积极、真诚的回复，维护良好的客户关系，提升客户满意度和忠诚度，同时鼓励客户再次购买。
title_en: Positive Review Explanation (Reply) Script Collection
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a positive review, the merchant needs to reply.
decision_en: Use pre-set thank-you scripts to express appreciation for the customer's recognition, support, and encouragement, and look forward to their next visit.

title: 处理客户对互联网广告的常见异议及推广优势
scenario: 当客户表示不需要互联网广告，或认为其不适合专业客户/渠道销售时。
decision: 针对客户的具体异议，强调互联网推广的优势，如拓宽销售渠道、提高知名度、精准定位潜在客户、高性价比等，并与传统广告进行比较。
rationale: 客户通常对网络广告不了解或存在误解，通过突出其定向性、效果可监控、投入回报高等特点，可以帮助客户认识到网络推广的价值。
title_en: Handling Common Customer Objections to Internet Advertising and Promoting Advantages
scenario_en: When a customer states they don't need internet advertising or believes it's unsuitable for professional clients/channel sales.
decision_en: Address specific customer objections by emphasizing the advantages of internet promotion, such as expanding sales channels, increasing brand awareness, precise targeting of potential customers, and high cost-effectiveness, and compare it with traditional advertising.

title: 处理客户议价的策略与话术
scenario: 当客户对产品价格提出异议、要求降价、包邮或赠送礼物时。
decision: 客服应理解客户心情，坚定维护公司定价策略，并提供合理的解释或替代方案，如强调产品价值、说明成本、统一售价政策、或在特定条件下提供小礼物而非直接降价。
rationale: 通过理解客户感受并提供专业解释，可以维护公司利润和品牌形象，同时避免不公平销售，并引导客户关注产品价值而非单纯价格。
source_doc: 28电商客服话术关于淘宝销售客服议价话术技巧.pdf
title_en: Strategies and Scripts for Handling Customer Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer objects to the product price, requests a discount, free shipping, or a gift.
decision_en: Customer service should understand the customer's feelings, firmly uphold the company's pricing strategy, and provide reasonable explanations or alternative solutions, such as emphasizing product value, explaining costs, unified pricing policy, or offering small gifts under specific conditions instead of direct price reductions.

title: 处理客户价格异议和讨价还价的策略
scenario: 当客户对产品价格提出异议，如认为“太贵了”、“能不能便宜些”、“别的地方更便宜”或“真的值那么多钱吗”时。
decision: 运用多种策略来应对价格异议，包括强调价值、分阶段讨价还价、比较法、拆散法、平均法、赞美法、得失法、底牌法、老实法、分析法、转向法、提醒法、投资法、反驳法和肯定法。
rationale: 通过有效沟通和策略性回应，可以证明价格的合理性，打消客户疑虑，并促成交易。
source_doc: 28电商客服话术关于淘宝销售客服议价话术技巧.pdf
title_en: Strategies for Handling Customer Price Objections and Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer objects to the product price, such as thinking it's 'too expensive,' asking 'can it be cheaper,' stating 'it's cheaper elsewhere,' or questioning 'is it really worth that much?'
decision_en: Employ various strategies to address price objections, including emphasizing value, phased bargaining, comparison, breakdown, averaging, flattery, gain/loss, bottom line, honesty, analysis, redirection, reminder, investment, rebuttal, and affirmation methods.

title: 康佳官方旗舰店客服统一话术：客服基本要求与知识
scenario: 客服在日常工作中与顾客互动时
decision: 客服需定位好角色，代表店铺和公司形象，成为产品和形象专家，了解顾客需求，引导话题，促成交易，并让顾客记住店铺特色，同时具备责任心和良好的态度。客服还需掌握产品属性、应用知识、与竞品的比较优势以及顾客消费心理常识。
rationale: 明确客服职责和所需知识是提供优质服务、提升顾客满意度和促进销售的基础。
source_doc: 28电商客服话术客服统一话术.docx
title_en: Konka Official Flagship Store Customer Service Standard Script: Basic Requirements and Knowledge
scenario_en: When customer service interacts with customers in daily work.
decision_en: Customer service needs to define their role, represent the store and company image, be product and image experts, understand customer needs, guide conversations, facilitate transactions, and ensure customers remember the store's unique features, while also possessing a sense of responsibility and a good attitude. Customer service also needs to master product attributes, application knowledge, comparative advantages with competitors, and common knowledge of customer psychology.

title: 订单催付基础技能与策略
scenario: 当顾客拍下商品但未完成付款时，客服需要进行催付。
decision: 客服应了解未付款原因（服务、支付、价格、产品等），并根据原因采取不同的催付策略，包括处理客观支付问题、解决主观疑虑、利用优惠和赠品吸引，并选择合适的催付时机和工具（旺旺、短信、电话）。
rationale: 有效的催付可以显著提高付款成功率，提升销售额，降低推广成本，并提升下单付款率。
title_en: Order Payment Reminder Basic Skills and Strategies
scenario_en: When a customer places an order but has not completed payment, customer service needs to send a payment reminder.
decision_en: Customer service should understand the reasons for non-payment (service, payment, price, product, etc.) and adopt different reminder strategies based on the reason, including addressing objective payment issues, resolving subjective concerns, using discounts and gifts to attract, and choosing appropriate timing and tools (Wangwang, SMS, phone) for reminders.

title: 电话催付参考话术模板
scenario: 当顾客在淘宝店铺拍下商品但尚未支付时，客服需要进行电话催付。
decision: 客服应主动联系顾客，提醒其支付，并告知未支付可能错过的优惠（如赠品），同时询问支付中是否有问题，并提供帮助。
rationale: 通过主动提醒和提供额外优惠，可以促使顾客尽快完成支付，提高订单转化率。
title_en: Phone Payment Reminder Script Template
scenario_en: When a customer has placed an order on a Taobao store but has not yet paid, customer service needs to make a phone call to remind them.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the customer, remind them to pay, inform them of potential missed offers (e.g., gifts), inquire if there are any payment issues, and offer assistance.

title: 客服专员KPI考核指标：咨询转化率、成交额转换率、退换货率
scenario: 评估客服专员的工作绩效时
decision: 客服专员的KPI考核应包括咨询转换率、成交额转换率、退货率、换货率和退款率。
rationale: 这些指标直接反映了客服人员对订单转化、销售额贡献以及客户满意度和售后问题的处理能力。
title_en: Customer Service Specialist KPI Metrics: Consultation Conversion Rate, Transaction Conversion Rate, Return/Exchange Rate
scenario_en: When evaluating the work performance of customer service specialists.
decision_en: KPI assessment for customer service specialists should include consultation conversion rate, transaction conversion rate, return rate, exchange rate, and refund rate.

title: 淘宝天猫运营团队绩效考核表模版
scenario: When evaluating the performance of Taobao Tmall operations team members, including website editors, customer service specialists, event specialists, and promotion/BD specialists.
decision: Use the provided template to assess performance across three main areas: Ability (20%), Attitude (30%), and Performance (50%), with specific metrics and weightings for each role.
rationale: To standardize performance evaluations and ensure fair and consistent assessment of different roles within the Taobao Tmall operations team.
source_doc: 淘宝天猫运营团队绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Taobao Tmall Operations Team Performance Appraisal Template
scenario_en: When evaluating the performance of Taobao Tmall operations team members, including website editors, customer service specialists, event specialists, and promotion/BD specialists.
decision_en: Use the provided template to assess performance across three main areas: Ability (20%), Attitude (30%), and Performance (50%), with specific metrics and weightings for each role.

title: 淘宝客服人员绩效考核表（2016年7月）
scenario: This document outlines the performance appraisal criteria for Taobao customer service personnel.
decision: Customer service personnel are evaluated based on both performance indicators (65% weight) and comprehensive qualities (35% weight).
rationale: To ensure customer service quality and efficiency, and to promote team growth and individual development.
source_doc: 淘宝客服人员绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Personnel Performance Appraisal Form (July 2016)
scenario_en: This document outlines the performance appraisal criteria for Taobao customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service personnel are evaluated based on both performance indicators (65% weight) and comprehensive qualities (35% weight).

title: 推广组绩效考核与奖金提成办法
scenario: 当需要对推广组成员进行绩效考核并计算其奖金和提成时。
decision: 推广组的薪酬由基本工资、奖金和提成构成。奖金根据绩效积分考核（满分100分）计算，提成则根据所辖店铺总销售额、所辖产品销售额和上新产品销售额的分阶提点计算。
rationale: 通过量化的KPI指标和分阶提成机制，激励推广组成员提升流量、优化推广表现、加强团队协作，并鼓励积极主动性和创新建议，以实现公司业绩目标。
source_doc: 淘宝推广组绩效考核方案.xls
title_en: Promotion Team Performance Appraisal and Bonus Commission Method
scenario_en: When it is necessary to conduct performance appraisals for promotion team members and calculate their bonuses and commissions.
decision_en: The promotion team's compensation consists of basic salary, bonuses, and commissions. Bonuses are calculated based on a performance score assessment (100 points maximum), while commissions are calculated based on a tiered percentage of the total sales of managed stores, sales of managed products, and sales of new products.

title: 淘宝文案绩效考核表：工作业绩、工作态度、团队合作、日常检查及加减分项
scenario: 当需要对淘宝文案人员进行绩效评估时。
decision: 根据工作业绩、工作态度、团队合作、日常检查四个主要部分以及加减分项进行综合评分，最终确定绩效等级和绩效工资。
rationale: 通过多维度考核，全面评估员工表现，激励优秀员工，并对不符合要求的行为进行惩罚，以提升整体工作质量和效率。
title_en: Taobao Copywriter Performance Appraisal Form: Work Performance, Work Attitude, Teamwork, Daily Checks, and Bonus/Penalty Items
scenario_en: When it is necessary to conduct a performance evaluation for Taobao copywriters.
decision_en: A comprehensive score is determined based on four main sections: work performance, work attitude, teamwork, daily checks, and bonus/penalty items, ultimately determining the performance level and performance-based salary.

title: 网店推广组绩效考核表：KPI指标与评分标准
scenario: 当对网店推广组员工进行绩效考核时，需要根据预设的KPI指标和评分标准进行评估。
decision: 根据流量IP数、付费流量比例、直通车平均点击、免费流量比例、直通车点击率、淘客流量比例、其他推广方式等工作指标，以及消费者搜索行为、软件工具应用、市场竞争研究、站内营销、站外营销、专业技能等工作表现，还有项目指标、团队协作指标、个人状态指标和附加分进行综合评分。
rationale: 通过量化和定性指标相结合的方式，全面评估推广人员的工作绩效，激励员工达成目标并持续改进。
title_en: Online Store Promotion Team Performance Appraisal Form: KPI Metrics and Scoring Standards
scenario_en: When conducting performance appraisals for online store promotion team employees, evaluation needs to be based on preset KPI metrics and scoring standards.
decision_en: Comprehensive scoring is based on work indicators such as IP traffic, paid traffic ratio, average click-through rate for Zhuanche, free traffic ratio, Zhuanche click-through rate, Taoke traffic ratio, and other promotion methods, as well as work performance in consumer search behavior, software tool application, market competition research, on-site marketing, off-site marketing, professional skills, and also project indicators, teamwork indicators, personal status indicators, and bonus points.

title: 网店部门运营经理绩效考核表 - 职责一：目标制定与计划
scenario: When evaluating the performance of an online store operations manager regarding goal setting and planning.
decision: The manager is responsible for setting quarterly goals, breaking them down into monthly, weekly, and daily plans, and proactively addressing potential issues like supply, capital turnover, and hardware facilities.
rationale: Effective goal setting and proactive planning are crucial for the successful operation and management of an online store.
source_doc: 网店部门运营经理绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Online Store Department Operations Manager Performance Appraisal Form - Responsibility One: Goal Setting and Planning
scenario_en: When evaluating the performance of an online store operations manager regarding goal setting and planning.
decision_en: The manager is responsible for setting quarterly goals, breaking them down into monthly, weekly, and daily plans, and proactively addressing potential issues like supply, capital turnover, and hardware facilities.

title: 网店日常维护与优化
scenario: 日常运营中，需要确保网店的正常运作和提升其市场表现。
decision: 进行网店的日常维护工作，并优化店铺及商品的排名。
rationale: 确保网店正常运作是基础，优化排名可以提高可见性和销售额。
source_doc: 网店部门运营经理绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Online Store Daily Maintenance and Optimization
scenario_en: In daily operations, it is necessary to ensure the normal functioning of the online store and improve its market performance.
decision_en: Perform daily maintenance of the online store and optimize store and product rankings.

title: 执行与配合公司营销活动及店铺促销方案策划
scenario: 当公司有相关营销活动或需要策划店铺促销方案时。
decision: 负责执行与配合公司相关营销活动，并策划店铺促销方案。
rationale: 确保公司营销策略的有效落地和店铺销售业绩的提升。
source_doc: 网店部门运营经理绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Execute and Coordinate Company Marketing Activities and Store Promotion Plan Development
