scenario_en: When the company has relevant marketing activities or needs to plan store promotion schemes.
decision_en: Responsible for executing and coordinating relevant company marketing activities, and planning store promotion schemes.

title: 收集市场和行业信息并提供应对方案
scenario: 当需要了解市场和行业动态时
decision: 负责收集市场和行业信息，并根据这些信息提供有效的应对方案。
rationale: 通过收集市场和行业信息，可以更好地理解外部环境，从而制定出更具竞争力和适应性的策略。
source_doc: 网店部门运营经理绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Collect Market and Industry Information and Provide Solutions
scenario_en: When it is necessary to understand market and industry trends.
decision_en: Responsible for collecting market and industry information and providing effective solutions based on this information.

title: 客户关系维护与投诉处理
scenario: 当需要维护客户关系、处理客户投诉及纠纷问题时。
decision: 负责处理客户投诉及纠纷问题，并维护客户关系，促进重复购买。这包括建立老顾客群、对不同级别顾客进行维护、分析客户关系处理问题并提出改善方法、对贵宾顾客进行回访、在营销活动或节日时向老顾客发送祝贺或通知，并统计老顾客同比增长数据。
rationale: 通过有效的客户关系维护和投诉处理，可以提升客户满意度，促进老客户的重复购买，从而提升店铺的整体经营效益。
source_doc: 网店部门运营经理绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Customer Relationship Management and Complaint Handling
scenario_en: When it is necessary to maintain customer relationships, handle customer complaints and disputes.
decision_en: Responsible for handling customer complaints and disputes, and maintaining customer relationships to promote repeat purchases. This includes establishing old customer groups, maintaining different levels of customers, analyzing customer relationship issues and proposing improvement methods, conducting follow-up visits with VIP customers, sending greetings or notifications to old customers during marketing activities or holidays, and statistically tracking year-on-year growth data for old customers.

title: 运营团队绩效考核模版
scenario: 本文件提供了运营团队不同岗位的绩效考核标准，包括能力、态度和业绩三个方面。
decision: 运营团队成员的绩效将根据其在能力、态度和业绩方面的表现进行评估，并根据不同岗位的具体指标和权重进行打分。
rationale: 通过设定明确的考核指标和权重，旨在客观评估员工表现，促进团队成员的职业发展和公司目标的实现。
source_doc: 网站运营各部门绩效考核表.xls
title_en: Operations Team Performance Appraisal Template
scenario_en: This document provides performance appraisal standards for different roles within the operations team, covering three aspects: ability, attitude, and performance.
decision_en: Operations team members' performance will be evaluated based on their performance in terms of ability, attitude, and results, and scored according to specific indicators and weightings for different roles.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服语言基本技巧
scenario: This document outlines fundamental communication techniques for customer service representatives.
decision: Customer service representatives should master the basic language skills presented in this guide.
rationale: To ensure effective and professional customer interactions.
title_en: Customer Service Basic Language Skills
scenario_en: This document outlines fundamental communication techniques for customer service representatives.
decision_en: Customer service representatives should master the basic language skills presented in this guide.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服服务意识与技巧
scenario: 在网店运营中，无论是售前还是售后，客服与顾客互动的所有环节。
decision: 客服应具备良好的服务意识，并在旺旺或电话回复中运用服务技巧，以提升店铺信誉和口碑。
rationale: 细节决定成败，店铺服务直接影响店铺的信誉和口碑，进而影响顾客咨询量和业务增长。
title_en: Customer Service Awareness and Skills
scenario_en: In online store operations, all aspects of customer interaction, whether pre-sales or after-sales.
decision_en: Customer service should possess good service awareness and apply service skills in Wangwang or phone replies to enhance store reputation and word-of-mouth.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户情绪：感同身受的表达方式
scenario: 当客户表达不满、生气、着急或感到委屈时，客服人员需要安抚客户情绪。
decision: 使用一系列表达方式来向客户传达理解和同情，例如“我能理解”、“我非常理解您的心情”、“换成是我我也会跟您一样的感受”等，并承诺会尽力解决问题。
rationale: 通过表达感同身受，可以有效缓解客户的负面情绪，建立信任，并为后续的问题解决创造积极的沟通氛围。
title_en: Handling Customer Emotions: Empathetic Expressions
scenario_en: When customers express dissatisfaction, anger, urgency, or feel wronged, customer service personnel need to soothe their emotions.
decision_en: Use a series of expressions to convey understanding and sympathy to the customer, such as 'I understand,' 'I deeply understand how you feel,' 'If it were me, I would feel the same way,' and promise to do their best to resolve the issue.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户负面情绪的同理心话术
scenario: 当客户表达出负面情绪，如着急、担心、生气、失望或感到不便时。
decision: 使用同理心话术来识别、确认并回应客户的情绪，例如“听得出来您很着急”、“我能体会您到很生气”、“如果是我，我也会很着急的”。
rationale: 通过表达同理心，可以安抚客户情绪，建立信任，并为解决问题创造积极的沟通氛围。
title_en: Empathy in handling customer negative emotions
scenario_en: When customers express negative emotions such as anxiety, worry, anger, disappointment, or inconvenience.
decision_en: Use empathetic language to identify, acknowledge, and respond to the customer's emotions, for example, "I hear you're very anxious," "I can understand you're angry," or "If it were me, I'd be very anxious too."

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 对资深客户表达重视和歉意
scenario: 当与资深客户沟通时，尤其是在出现服务失误或客户表达不满时。
decision: 通过提及客户的忠诚度（例如，成为客户的年限或长期支持）来表达重视，并对服务失误表示诚挚的歉意，承诺会将客户意见反映给相关部门进行改进。
rationale: 让资深客户感受到被重视和尊重，有助于维护客户关系，并展现公司对客户反馈的认真态度。
title_en: Expressing appreciation and apology to loyal customers
scenario_en: When communicating with loyal customers, especially when there are service errors or customer dissatisfaction.
decision_en: Express appreciation by mentioning the customer's loyalty (e.g., years as a customer or long-term support), offer a sincere apology for service errors, and promise to relay customer feedback to relevant departments for improvement.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 用“我”代替“您”的沟通技巧
scenario: 在与客户沟通时，客服人员需要表达疑问、纠正误解或提供建议。
decision: 客服人员应将以“您”开头的指责性或命令性语句，转换为以“我”开头或更委婉的表达方式，以避免冒犯客户。
rationale: 使用“我”或更委婉的表达方式，可以避免直接指责客户，从而减少客户的不满和误解，提升沟通效率和客户满意度。
title_en: Communication skill: Using 'I' instead of 'You'
scenario_en: When customer service needs to ask questions, correct misunderstandings, or offer suggestions to customers.
decision_en: Customer service should rephrase accusatory or imperative statements starting with "You" into phrases starting with "I" or more tactful expressions to avoid offending the customer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 从客户角度出发沟通以保护客户利益并确保忠诚客户权益
scenario: 与客户沟通时，需要解释某些操作或政策的原因。
decision: 在沟通中，应强调这些操作或政策是为了保护客户的利益，并确保像他们这样的忠诚客户的权益。
rationale: 通过站在客户角度解释，可以获得客户的理解和谅解，同时强化客户对品牌的忠诚度。
title_en: Customer-centric communication to protect customer interests and ensure loyal customer rights
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, it is necessary to explain the reasons for certain operations or policies.
decision_en: During communication, emphasize that these operations or policies are designed to protect customer interests and ensure the rights of loyal customers like them.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何使用甜言蜜语与客户沟通
scenario: 当客服需要对客户表达感谢、理解、歉意或认可时。
decision: 使用礼貌、感谢和理解的语言，例如“麻烦您了”、“非常感谢您的建议”、“谢谢您的理解和支持”、“这次给您添麻烦了”等。
rationale: 通过使用甜言蜜语，可以有效安抚客户情绪，表达对客户的尊重和重视，从而提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: How to use polite language with customers
scenario_en: When customer service needs to express gratitude, understanding, apology, or recognition to customers.
decision_en: Use polite, grateful, and understanding language, such as "Thank you for your trouble," "Thank you very much for your suggestion," "Thank you for your understanding and support," "I apologize for the inconvenience this time," etc.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户反馈感谢语及致歉语
scenario: 当客户对服务、店铺或产品提出反馈、建议、疑问或表达不满时。
decision: 根据客户的具体情况，使用感谢语表达对客户支持和监督的感激，或使用致歉语对客户产生的不满表示歉意，并承诺改进。
rationale: 通过积极回应客户反馈，表达感谢和歉意，可以提升客户满意度，维护品牌形象，并获取改进服务的宝贵信息。
title_en: Customer feedback: Thank you and apology messages
scenario_en: When customers provide feedback, suggestions, questions, or express dissatisfaction with the service, store, or product.
decision_en: Depending on the specific customer situation, use thank you messages to express gratitude for their support and oversight, or use apology messages to apologize for their dissatisfaction and promise improvement.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 拒绝的艺术：委婉拒绝客户请求的沟通技巧
scenario: 当客户提出无法满足的要求时，客服需要进行拒绝。
decision: 使用委婉、理解和尊重的语言拒绝客户，同时表达歉意、解释限制，并提供可能的替代方案或后续行动。
rationale: 在无法满足客户要求时，通过艺术性的拒绝可以维护客户关系，避免直接冲突，并展现专业和同理心。
title_en: The art of refusal: Tactfully declining customer requests
scenario_en: When a customer makes an unfulfillable request, customer service needs to decline it.
decision_en: Decline the customer's request using tactful, understanding, and respectful language, while also expressing apology, explaining limitations, and offering possible alternatives or next steps.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户对店铺活动、反馈及情绪的回复话术
scenario: 当客户询问店铺活动、提供反馈或表达不满情绪时。
decision: 根据客户的具体情况，使用预设话术进行回复，包括感谢关注、告知活动信息、感谢反馈、理解客户心情并寻求解决方案。
rationale: 通过标准化的话术，确保客服能够专业、一致地回应客户的各种询问和情绪，维护客户关系。
title_en: Handling customer inquiries about store activities, feedback, and emotional responses
scenario_en: When customers inquire about store activities, provide feedback, or express dissatisfaction.
decision_en: Respond using pre-set scripts based on the customer's specific situation, including thanking them for their attention, providing activity information, acknowledging feedback, understanding their feelings, and seeking solutions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何让客户“等”：等待客户时的沟通技巧
scenario: 当客服需要客户等待时，例如查询信息或处理请求。
decision: 在客户等待之前、之中和之后，使用礼貌的语言提醒、告知等待时长并表达感谢。
rationale: 通过主动沟通和表达歉意/感谢，可以提升客户体验，减少客户等待时的不满。
title_en: How to make customers 'wait': Communication skills while waiting for customers
scenario_en: When customer service needs the customer to wait, for example, to look up information or process a request.
decision_en: Before, during, and after the wait, use polite language to inform, state the waiting time, and express gratitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户反馈记录与安抚话术
scenario: 当客户提供具体情况、宝贵意见、反馈新品问题、指出工作人员失误或提出建议时。
decision: 客服应主动记录客户反馈，并使用安抚性话术，表达感谢、承诺核实处理、向上级反映或承担责任，以确保客户满意。
rationale: 及时记录客户反馈有助于问题解决和产品改进。安抚性话术能有效缓解客户情绪，提升客户满意度和信任度。
title_en: Customer feedback recording and soothing language
scenario_en: When customers provide specific situations, valuable opinions, report new product issues, point out staff errors, or offer suggestions.
decision_en: Customer service should actively record customer feedback and use soothing language, expressing gratitude, promising to verify and process, escalating to superiors, or taking responsibility to ensure customer satisfaction.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户不满、感谢及问题记录的沟通技巧
scenario: 当与客户陷入僵局、客户表示感谢、需要确认操作或安抚客户时。
decision: 根据具体情况，使用预设话术来引导对话、表达感谢、确认操作或安抚客户情绪。
rationale: 通过标准化的沟通话术，可以有效管理客户情绪，提升服务满意度，并确保关键信息被准确传达。
title_en: Communication skills for handling customer dissatisfaction, gratitude, and issue recording
scenario_en: When a conversation with a customer reaches an impasse, the customer expresses gratitude, an operation needs confirmation, or the customer needs to be appeased.
decision_en: Use pre-set scripts to guide the conversation, express gratitude, confirm operations, or soothe customer emotions, depending on the specific situation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 安抚客户情绪的沟通话术
scenario: 当客户情绪激动、表达不清或需要安抚时。
decision: 使用礼貌、耐心和积极的语言，表达理解、倾听和解决问题的意愿，并感谢客户的反馈。
rationale: 通过积极的沟通，可以有效安抚客户情绪，建立信任，并鼓励客户清晰表达问题，以便提供更好的帮助。
title_en: Soothing customer emotions: Communication scripts
scenario_en: When a customer is emotional, unclear, or needs to be appeased.
decision_en: Use polite, patient, and positive language to express understanding, listen, show willingness to solve problems, and thank the customer for their feedback.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语
scenario: 当演示文稿结束时。
decision: 以感谢观众的方式结束。
rationale: 这是演示文稿的标准礼仪。
title_en: Closing Remarks
scenario_en: When the presentation concludes.
decision_en: End by thanking the audience.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 淘宝规则
scenario: This chunk introduces the topic of Taobao rules.
decision: Understand that the following content will detail Taobao's policies and regulations.
rationale: This is a title slide indicating the subject matter of the presentation.
title_en: Taobao Rules
scenario_en: This chunk introduces the topic of Taobao rules.
decision_en: Understand that the following content will detail Taobao's policies and regulations.
