title: 目录
scenario: This chunk is a table of contents or a section header.
decision: It serves as an organizational element within the document.
rationale: This chunk indicates the structure of the document rather than providing actionable guidance.
title_en: Table of Contents
scenario_en: This chunk is a table of contents or a section header.
decision_en: It serves as an organizational element within the document.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 消费者保障服务项目概述
scenario: 当用户在淘宝平台提出并被接受消费者保障服务申请后，用户将根据协议和淘宝网公示规范选择参加相应的服务项目。
decision: 消费者保障服务目前包括先行赔付、商品如实描述、七天无理由退换货、假一赔三、闪电发货、数码与家电30天维修、第三方质检和虚假发货。
rationale: 这些服务旨在保障消费者权益，提升购物体验和平台信任度。
title_en: Overview of Consumer Protection Services
scenario_en: When a user on the Taobao platform submits and has a consumer protection service application accepted, the user will choose to participate in corresponding service items according to the agreement and Taobao's public norms.
decision_en: Consumer protection services currently include Advance Payment, Accurate Product Description, 7-Day No-Reason Return/Exchange, Triple Compensation for Fakes, Lightning Delivery, 30-Day Repair for Digital and Home Appliances, Third-Party Quality Inspection, and False Shipment.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 淘宝消费者保障服务：先行赔付与商品如实描述
scenario: 当淘宝买家与签订“消费者保障服务协议”的卖家交易后，若买家权益受损且直接要求卖家处理未果，或卖家未能履行商品如实描述承诺时。
decision: 买家有权向淘宝发起投诉并提出赔付申请。若淘宝判定申请成立，有权通知支付宝公司从卖家账户扣款赔付给买家。
rationale: 保障买家权益，确保交易公平性，并对未能履行承诺的卖家进行约束和处罚。
title_en: Taobao Consumer Protection Services: Advance Payment and Accurate Product Description
scenario_en: When a Taobao buyer transacts with a seller who has signed the "Consumer Protection Service Agreement," if the buyer's rights are infringed and direct requests to the seller are unsuccessful, or the seller fails to fulfill the accurate product description commitment.
decision_en: The buyer has the right to file a complaint with Taobao and apply for compensation. If Taobao determines the application is valid, it has the right to notify Alipay to deduct funds from the seller's account to compensate the buyer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 七天无理由退换货政策
scenario: 当淘宝网买家使用支付宝服务购买支持“七天无理由退换货”的商品，并在签收货物后7天内，因买家主观原因不愿完成本次交易时。
decision: 卖家有义务向买家提供退换货服务。若卖家未履行义务，买家有权向淘宝发起投诉并申请“七天无理由退换货”赔付。
rationale: 为保障买家权益，允许买家在一定时间内因主观原因退换货，促进交易公平。
title_en: 7-Day No-Reason Return/Exchange Policy
scenario_en: When a Taobao buyer uses Alipay to purchase goods that support "7-Day No-Reason Return/Exchange," and within 7 days after receiving the goods, the buyer subjectively decides not to complete the transaction.
decision_en: The seller is obligated to provide return/exchange services to the buyer. If the seller fails to fulfill this obligation, the buyer has the right to file a complaint with Taobao and apply for "7-Day No-Reason Return/Exchange" compensation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 虚拟商品“闪电发货”服务与数码家电30天维修政策
scenario: 当卖家承诺在1小时内发送虚拟商品（如游戏点卡、装备、游戏币、帐号、代练）或数码家电商品交易成功后30天内需要提供免费维修服务时。
decision: 对于虚拟商品，若卖家未能履行“闪电发货”承诺，需按《淘宝用户行为管理规则》中付款未发货的规定向买家赔偿。对于数码家电，卖家需无条件提供30天免费维修服务，否则买家可在15天内向淘宝投诉，并可能动用卖家保证金进行赔付。
rationale: 确保虚拟商品交易的及时性和数码家电商品的售后服务质量，保障买家权益。
title_en: Virtual Goods 'Lightning Delivery' Service and Digital Home Appliance 30-Day Repair Policy
scenario_en: When a seller promises to send virtual goods (such as game points cards, equipment, game currency, accounts, power leveling) within 1 hour, or when digital home appliance transactions require free repair service within 30 days after successful transaction.
decision_en: For virtual goods, if the seller fails to fulfill the "Lightning Delivery" promise, they must compensate the buyer according to the 'Payment without Shipment' rules in the "Taobao User Behavior Management Rules." For digital home appliances, the seller must unconditionally provide 30 days of free repair service; otherwise, the buyer can complain to Taobao within 15 days, and the seller's deposit may be used for compensation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 虚假发货定义及处理
scenario: 当卖家在淘宝上点击发货，但实际未发货或物流信息与买家收货信息不符时，即构成虚假发货。
decision: 淘宝会根据虚假发货的不同情况采取相应的处理方法，以避免买家因超时自动确认收货而造成钱款损失。
rationale: 保护买家权益，防止卖家虚假发货导致买家钱款损失。
title_en: Definition and Handling of False Shipment
scenario_en: When a seller clicks 'shipped' on Taobao but has not actually shipped the goods, or the logistics information does not match the buyer's receiving information, it constitutes false shipment.
decision_en: Taobao will take corresponding measures based on different false shipment situations to prevent buyers from losing money due to automatic confirmation of receipt after the timeout period.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 消费者保障卡：购物保障详情及售后权益查看
scenario: 当消费者需要了解淘宝集市卖家提供的购物保障服务及其售后权益时。
decision: 消费者可以通过宝贝详情页右侧的“掌柜档案”中点击“查看购物须知”，以明确该宝贝的售后保障详情。
rationale: 为了格式化展现淘宝集市卖家加入的消保服务，并细化部分类目的售后服务要求，方便消费者清晰了解其购物保障和售后权益。
title_en: Consumer Protection Card: Shopping Guarantee Details and After-sales Rights
scenario_en: When consumers need to understand the shopping guarantee services and after-sales rights provided by Taobao Marketplace sellers.
decision_en: Consumers can click "View Shopping Notice" in the "Shopkeeper's Profile" on the right side of the product details page to clarify the after-sales guarantee details for that product.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 购物须知与保障卡的关系及保障卡查看方式
scenario: 当买家在淘宝网（不包括天猫）拍下商品后，无论是否付款，系统都会生成一张购物保障卡。
decision: 购物须知中展现的内容会在保障卡中格式化展现，且保障范围内容可点击查看详情。买家可在“已买到的宝贝”中查看购物保障卡。
rationale: 为了向买家提供清晰的购物保障信息，并将购物须知内容以结构化形式呈现。
title_en: Relationship between Shopping Notice and Protection Card, and how to view the Protection Card
scenario_en: When a buyer places an order on Taobao (excluding Tmall), a shopping protection card is generated by the system, regardless of whether payment has been made.
decision_en: The content displayed in the Shopping Notice will be formatted and presented in the Protection Card, and the scope of protection can be clicked for details. Buyers can view the Shopping Protection Card in "Purchased Items".

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 保障卡条款灰色显示及用途
scenario: 当客户询问保障卡中某些保障条款为何显示为灰色，或询问保障卡的作用时。
decision: 如果保障条款显示为灰色，说明该条款已过保障期，客户可前往商品详情页的“购物保障”查看详细保障时间。保障卡用于买家向卖家要求售后服务，若卖家拒绝，买家可依据保障卡内容申请退款或投诉维权。
rationale: 明确告知客户保障卡条款状态的原因，并指导客户如何利用保障卡维护自身权益，确保售后服务的顺畅进行。
title_en: Protection Card Terms Grayed Out and Purpose
scenario_en: When a customer asks why certain protection terms on the Protection Card are grayed out, or asks about the purpose of the Protection Card.
decision_en: If a protection term is grayed out, it means the protection period has expired. Customers can go to the "Shopping Guarantee" section of the product details page to view the detailed guarantee period. The Protection Card is used by buyers to request after-sales service from sellers. If the seller refuses, the buyer can apply for a refund or file a complaint based on the content of the Protection Card.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 违规类型及扣分标准
scenario: 当商家发生违规行为时，根据违规类型进行扣分。
decision: 严重违规行为包括盗用他人账户、骗取他人财物、出售假冒商品（每次扣48分），假冒材质成份（每次扣12分），泄露他人信息（每次扣6分）。一般违规行为包括延迟发货、描述不符、违背承诺、恶意骚扰。投诉可在交易关闭后0-15天内发起。
rationale: 为了规范商家行为，维护平台交易秩序和用户权益。
title_en: Violation Types and Point Deduction Standards
scenario_en: When a merchant commits a violation, points are deducted based on the type of violation.
decision_en: Serious violations include misappropriating another's account, defrauding others of property, selling counterfeit goods (48 points per instance), misrepresenting material composition (12 points per instance), and disclosing others' information (6 points per instance). General violations include delayed shipping, inconsistent description, breach of promise, and malicious harassment. Complaints can be initiated within 0-15 days after the transaction is closed.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 天猫和C店延迟发货的定义与违约金赔付规则
scenario: 当商家未能在规定时间内发货，或未按约定时间发货时。
decision: 天猫商家需支付商品实际成交金额的30%（最高500元）作为违约金，以天猫积分形式支付。C店商家需支付商品实际成交金额的5%（最低1元，最高30元）作为违约金。如果C店商家在淘宝介入前未主动支付违约金，每次扣3分；若主动支付，则不扣分。
rationale: 确保买家购买权益不受损害，并对商家未按时发货的行为进行处罚。
title_en: Tmall and C-store Delayed Shipping Definition and Penalty Rules
scenario_en: When a merchant fails to ship within the specified time or fails to ship by the agreed time.
decision_en: Tmall merchants must pay 30% of the actual transaction amount (up to 500 yuan) as liquidated damages, paid in Tmall points. C-store merchants must pay 5% of the actual transaction amount (minimum 1 yuan, maximum 30 yuan) as liquidated damages. If a C-store merchant does not actively pay liquidated damages before Taobao intervenes, 3 points will be deducted per instance; if they pay actively, no points will be deducted.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 商品描述不符的处罚规定
scenario: 当买家收到的商品或经淘宝官方抽检的商品与卖家描述不符，且卖家未披露商品瑕疵、保质期、附带品等信息，妨害买家权益时。
decision: 根据描述不符的严重程度进行处罚：严重不符或导致无法正常使用的扣12分/次；影响正常使用的扣6分/次；未造成实质性影响的扣3分/次。
rationale: 确保卖家提供准确的商品信息，保护买家权益，维护平台交易的公平性。
title_en: Penalties for Product Description Inconsistencies
scenario_en: When the product received by the buyer or inspected by Taobao is inconsistent with the seller's description, and the seller has not disclosed product defects, shelf life, accessories, or other information, infringing on the buyer's rights.
decision_en: Penalties are imposed based on the severity of the inconsistency: 12 points/instance for severe inconsistency or rendering the product unusable; 6 points/instance for affecting normal use; 3 points/instance for no substantial impact.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 商家违背承诺行为及扣分标准
scenario: 当商家未按照承诺向买家提供服务，妨害买家权益时，将触发此规则。
decision: 商家违背以下任一承诺的，每次扣6分：拒绝承担退货退款售后责任；天猫商家拒绝提供发票；拒绝使用支付宝担保交易；引导买家在天猫以外网站交易；拒绝提供货到付款或信用卡付款服务；报名成功后拒绝参与官方活动。
rationale: 此规定旨在保障买家权益，规范商家行为，维护淘宝平台的交易秩序和商家信誉。
title_en: Merchant Breach of Promise and Point Deduction Standards
scenario_en: This rule is triggered when a merchant fails to provide services to the buyer as promised, infringing on the buyer's rights.
decision_en: Merchants who breach any of the following promises will have 6 points deducted per instance: refusing to bear after-sales responsibility for returns and refunds; Tmall merchants refusing to provide invoices; refusing to use Alipay secured transactions; guiding buyers to transact on websites other than Tmall; refusing to provide cash on delivery or credit card payment services; refusing to participate in official activities after successful registration.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 商家未履行承诺或恶意骚扰买家的处罚规定
scenario: 当商家对已付款订单的商品或服务有未履行的承诺，或者在交易中/交易后恶意骚扰买家时。
decision: 商家未履行承诺的，每次扣4分。商家恶意骚扰买家，维权成立的，每次扣12分；情节严重的，每次扣48分。
rationale: 确保商家履行对买家的承诺，并维护买家的服务满意权益，打击恶意骚扰行为。
title_en: Penalties for Merchant Failure to Fulfill Promises or Malicious Harassment
scenario_en: When a merchant fails to fulfill promises for paid orders or maliciously harasses buyers during or after a transaction.
decision_en: Merchants who fail to fulfill promises will have 4 points deducted per instance. Merchants who maliciously harass buyers, and the claim is upheld, will have 12 points deducted per instance; in severe cases, 48 points will be deducted per instance.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 诈骗问题参考回答
scenario: 客户询问关于发票、QQ销售或非网银汇款等诈骗相关问题时。
decision: 1. 发票：告知客户有发票，并询问开具类型（个人或公司）。2. QQ销售：告知公司不允许上班时使用QQ，且天猫只认旺旺聊天记录为交易证据，引导客户使用旺旺联系。3. 非网银汇款：告知只能通过支付宝购买，建议客户寻求朋友代付，以确保购物安全。
rationale: 这些回答旨在防范潜在的诈骗行为，保护客户的购物安全，并遵守公司的交易规范和平台规则。错误的回答将导致扣分和保证金罚款。
title_en: Fraud-Related Reference Answers
scenario_en: When customers ask fraud-related questions about invoices, QQ sales, or non-online banking remittances.
decision_en: 1. Invoices: Inform the customer that invoices are available and ask about the type (personal or company). 2. QQ Sales: Inform the customer that the company does not allow QQ use during working hours, and Tmall only recognizes Wangwang chat records as transaction evidence; guide the customer to use Wangwang for contact. 3. Non-online Banking Remittance: Inform the customer that purchases can only be made through Alipay, and suggest seeking a friend's代付 (proxy payment) to ensure shopping safety.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 偏远地区运费补差价政策
scenario: 当客户询问是否需要为新疆、内蒙古等偏远地区补快递费时。
decision: 告知客户大部分地区包邮，若快递无法送达，需按店铺要求补差价。
rationale: 确保运费政策的透明度，并避免因未按承诺范围补运费而受到处罚。
title_en: Remote Area Shipping Surcharge Policy
scenario_en: When customers ask if they need to pay extra shipping fees for remote areas like Xinjiang or Inner Mongolia.
decision_en: Inform the customer that most areas have free shipping, but if express delivery cannot reach, a surcharge may be required as per store policy.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 商城与C店的区别：入驻资质、店铺类型、服务费用、发票与交税
scenario: 当需要了解在不同电商平台（商城或C店）开店的资质要求、店铺类型、费用结构以及税务发票规定时。
decision: 商城要求品牌商或厂商/代理商提供企业营业执照和税务登记证明，收取平台服务费和交易服务费（5%），并需提供发票。C店仅需身份证证明，不收取任何费用，可不提供发票和交税。
rationale: 不同电商平台的运营模式和法律责任不同，导致其对商家有不同的入驻要求、费用结构和税务规定。
title_en: Differences Between Mall and C-Store: Entry Qualifications, Store Types, Service Fees, Invoices and Taxes
scenario_en: When needing to understand the qualification requirements, store types, fee structures, and tax invoice regulations for opening a store on different e-commerce platforms (Mall or C-store).
decision_en: Malls require brand owners or manufacturers/agents to provide business licenses and tax registration certificates, charge platform service fees and transaction service fees (5%), and must provide invoices. C-stores only require ID verification, do not charge any fees, and may not provide invoices or pay taxes.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 感谢语
scenario: 当客服人员需要结束对话或表达谢意时。
decision: 使用“谢谢！”来表达感谢。
rationale: 表达感谢是基本礼仪，有助于维护良好的客户关系。
title_en: Thank You Message
scenario_en: When customer service staff need to end a conversation or express gratitude.
decision_en: Use "Thank you!" to express gratitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售基础方法
scenario: This is a title slide for a presentation on sales methods.
decision: This slide introduces the topic of basic sales methods.
rationale: It serves as an introductory slide to a presentation by 沈汇慧.
title_en: Basic Sales Methods
scenario_en: This is a title slide for a presentation on sales methods.
decision_en: This slide introduces the topic of basic sales methods.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 淘宝客服销售技巧的重要性及基础知识
scenario: 当客服人员认为其工作仅限于打字聊天时。
decision: 客服人员应认识到淘宝客服工作不仅仅是聊天，销售技巧至关重要，目标是促成订单。
rationale: 有效的客服沟通应能转化为销售业绩，提升订单量。
title_en: Importance of Taobao Customer Service Sales Skills and Basic Knowledge
scenario_en: When customer service staff believe their job is limited to typing and chatting.
decision_en: Customer service staff should recognize that Taobao customer service work is more than just chatting; sales skills are crucial, and the goal is to close orders.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 当顾客犹豫不决时，使用“二选其一”技巧促成购买
scenario: 当顾客已经同意购买，但一再出现购买信号却又犹豫不决拿不定主意时。
decision: 客服人员应采用“二选其一”的问话技巧，例如询问顾客偏好的颜色或与家中环境搭配的颜色。
rationale: 通过提供两个选择，实际上是帮助顾客做出决定，促成购买。
title_en: Using the "Either/Or" Technique to Close a Sale When Customers are Hesitant
scenario_en: When a customer has agreed to purchase but repeatedly shows buying signals yet remains hesitant and indecisive.
decision_en: Customer service staff should use the "either/or" questioning technique, such as asking the customer about their preferred color or a color that matches their home environment.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 帮助顾客挑选商品以促成订单
scenario: 当顾客有意购买但犹豫不决，在产品颜色、规格、式样、发货日期等细节上反复挑选时。
decision: 客服应改变策略，暂时不谈订单问题，转而热情地帮助顾客挑选颜色、规格、式样和交货日期等具体细节。
rationale: 通过解决顾客在选择上的顾虑，可以促使顾客做出最终决定，从而落实订单。
title_en: Helping Customers Choose Products to Close Orders
scenario_en: When a customer is interested in buying but is hesitant, repeatedly choosing between product colors, specifications, styles, delivery dates, and other details.
decision_en: Customer service should change strategy, temporarily avoid discussing the order, and instead enthusiastically help the customer choose specific details like color, specifications, style, and delivery date.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 利用“怕买不到”心理促成订单
scenario: 当顾客对某款产品表现出兴趣或犹豫不决时，可以利用其“怕买不到”的心理。
decision: 告知顾客产品库存不足、短期内不再进货，或优惠活动即将结束，鼓励其尽快下单。
rationale: 人们通常对稀缺或即将失去的东西更渴望获得，利用这种心理可以有效促成交易。
title_en: Using the "Fear of Missing Out" Psychology to Close Orders
scenario_en: When a customer shows interest in a product or is hesitant, their "fear of missing out" psychology can be leveraged.
decision_en: Inform the customer that product stock is low, it will not be restocked soon, or a promotional offer is ending, encouraging them to place an order quickly.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 建议顾客先试用产品以建立信心
scenario: 当顾客对我们的产品缺乏信心，但又表现出购买意愿时。
decision: 建议顾客先购买少量产品回去试用。
rationale: 通过让顾客亲身体验产品，可以建立他们的信心，并可能促成未来的重复购买。此技巧也能帮助犹豫不决的顾客做出购买决定。
title_en: Suggesting Customers Try Products First to Build Confidence
scenario_en: When customers lack confidence in our products but show an intention to purchase.
decision_en: Suggest that customers purchase a small quantity of the product to try first.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 对犹豫不决的顾客使用“欲擒故纵”策略
scenario: 当顾客对产品有兴趣但优柔寡断，迟迟不作决定时。
decision: 客服人员可以故意表现出很忙碌的样子，例如要接待其他顾客或有其他事情要做，暂时无暇顾及该顾客。
rationale: 这种忙碌的举动有时会促使犹豫不决的顾客下定决心购买。
title_en: Using the "Playing Hard to Get" Strategy for Hesitant Customers
scenario_en: When a customer is interested in a product but is indecisive and delays making a decision.
decision_en: Customer service staff can deliberately appear busy, for example, by needing to attend to other customers or having other tasks to do, temporarily unable to focus on that customer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 当顾客询问无库存产品时，使用反问式回答促成订单
scenario: 当顾客询问某种产品，但该产品目前没有库存或特定款式时。
decision: 不要直接回答“没有”，而应使用反问句，提供现有替代品，并引导顾客选择。
rationale: 反问式回答可以避免直接拒绝顾客，并引导他们考虑现有选项，从而增加促成订单的可能性。
title_en: Using Rhetorical Questions to Close Orders When Customers Ask About Out-of-Stock Products
scenario_en: When a customer asks about a product that is currently out of stock or a specific style.
decision_en: Do not directly answer "no," but instead use a rhetorical question, offer existing alternatives, and guide the customer to choose.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 快速促成订单：直接要求顾客下单
scenario: 当尝试了多种销售技巧仍未能说服顾客下单时。
decision: 直接要求顾客签订单，使用直接且紧迫的语言促使顾客立即行动。
rationale: 在其他技巧无效时，直接要求可以打破顾客的犹豫，利用稀缺性和紧迫感促成交易。
title_en: Close the Order Quickly: Directly Ask the Customer to Place an Order
scenario_en: When various sales techniques have been tried but failed to persuade the customer to place an order.
decision_en: Directly ask the customer to sign the order, using direct and urgent language to prompt immediate action.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服沟通技巧：谦虚请教以化解僵局并促成订单
scenario: 当客服人员用尽所有方法仍无法说服顾客，且交易即将失败时。
decision: 客服人员应采取谦虚请教的态度，承认自己能力不足，并请求顾客指出改进之处。
rationale: 这种谦卑的姿态能满足顾客的虚荣心，消除对抗情绪，促使顾客提供指导甚至意外的订单。
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skill: Humbly Ask for Guidance to Break Stalemates and Close Orders
scenario_en: When a customer service representative has exhausted all methods to persuade a customer, and the transaction is about to fail.
decision_en: The customer service representative should adopt a humble and inquiring attitude, admit their shortcomings, and ask the customer to point out areas for improvement.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: End of Presentation Acknowledgment
scenario: This slide marks the conclusion of a presentation or training session.
decision: Acknowledge the audience and express gratitude for their attention.
rationale: It is standard professional courtesy to thank the audience at the end of a presentation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服销售招术
scenario: This is a title slide for a presentation on customer service sales techniques.
decision: This slide introduces the topic of customer service sales tactics.
rationale: It serves as an introductory slide to a presentation by Shen Huihui.
title_en: Customer Service Sales Tactics
scenario_en: This is a title slide for a presentation on customer service sales techniques.
decision_en: This slide introduces the topic of customer service sales tactics.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服如何提供贴心服务并留下深刻印象
scenario: 当客服思考如何为顾客提供服务时。
decision: 客服需要运用特定的技巧，以便给买家留下深刻印象，并促使他们再次购买。
rationale: 通过提供贴心服务和留下深刻印象，可以提升顾客忠诚度和复购率。
title_en: How Customer Service Can Provide Thoughtful Service and Leave a Lasting Impression
scenario_en: When customer service considers how to provide service to customers.
decision_en: Customer service needs to use specific techniques to leave a deep impression on buyers and encourage them to make repeat purchases.

title: 通过角色扮演和趣味对话提升客户满意度并促进口碑传播
scenario: 当客户进行在线购物时，他们期望购物过程轻松愉快，并希望获得独特的服务体验。
decision: 客服应扮演独特角色（如“仆人”或“臣子”），并使用趣味称谓（如“主人”或“皇上”）与客户互动，从而提供与众不同的服务。
rationale: 通过角色扮演和趣味对话，可以实现场景化营销，建立客户信任，给客户留下深刻印象，并促使他们推荐更多新客户。
title_en: Enhance Customer Satisfaction and Promote Word-of-Mouth Through Role-Playing and Fun Dialogue
scenario_en: When customers shop online, they expect an easy and pleasant shopping experience and unique service.
decision_en: Customer service should play unique roles (e.g., 'servant' or 'subject') and use fun titles (e.g., 'master' or 'emperor') to interact with customers, thereby providing distinctive service.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 当顾客不满时，使用“卖萌”式语言以获得谅解并拉近距离
scenario: 当顾客因产品或客服问题感到不满，并在沟通中表现出抱怨或急躁情绪时。
decision: 从接待顾客的第一句话开始，使用“萌”或非常规的客服话语，例如“微臣对皇上的赤胆忠心，日月可鉴”、“求皇上开恩”等。
rationale: 通过这种方式可以拉近与顾客的距离，使顾客产生好感，降低不满情绪，并能更轻松地处理售后问题，同时也能促进成交。
title_en: When Customers Are Dissatisfied, Use 'Cute' Language to Gain Understanding and Build Rapport
scenario_en: When customers are dissatisfied due to product or customer service issues, and express complaints or impatience during communication.
decision_en: From the very first greeting, use 'cute' or unconventional customer service language, such as 'My unwavering loyalty to Your Majesty is witnessed by the sun and moon,' or 'I beg Your Majesty for mercy.'

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 成为产品专家，自信解答顾客疑问
scenario: 顾客在选购产品时存在盲目性，不清楚哪种产品最适合他们。
decision: 客服人员必须牢牢掌握产品知识，成为顾客的产品专家，自信地为顾客提供优质服务，并耐心解答疑问。
rationale: 顾客期望从商家那里获得产品资讯和购买理由。熟练且自信的回答能提高顾客对客服的信任。
title_en: Become a Product Expert, Confidently Answer Customer Questions
scenario_en: Customers are often indecisive when choosing products and are unsure which product is best for them.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must firmly grasp product knowledge, become product experts for customers, confidently provide high-quality service, and patiently answer questions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 通过自信的产品介绍增强顾客信任并促进销售
scenario: 当顾客对产品质量感到焦虑或不信任产品品质时。
decision: 除了保持积极的态度，客服人员还需对产品表现出充分的自信，使用如“这是最值得购买的产品”、“您一定会满意的”、“您看我们的好评就知道了”等话术。
rationale: 客服人员对产品的自信能够传递给顾客，增强顾客对产品的信任感，从而促进销售并提升顾客满意度。
title_en: Build Customer Trust and Boost Sales Through Confident Product Introduction
scenario_en: When customers are anxious about product quality or distrust product quality.
decision_en: In addition to maintaining a positive attitude, customer service personnel need to show full confidence in the product, using phrases such as 'This is the most worthwhile product to buy,' 'You will definitely be satisfied,' and 'You can see from our positive reviews.'

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 在客户沟通中统一品牌属性，强化客户认知
scenario: 当客户对产品或品牌认知不足，或因负面评价产生质疑时。
decision: 在与客户沟通时，应尽可能表达统一的品牌属性，并不断强化品牌规模、生产能力、企业发展方向等信息，以增强客户对品牌的认知。
rationale: 客户更倾向于相信有强大企业背景的品牌，这能提升品牌的可信度。通过高度自我肯定的态度进行对话，能有效建立客户信任。
title_en: Unify Brand Attributes in Customer Communication to Strengthen Customer Recognition
scenario_en: When customers have insufficient knowledge of the product or brand, or raise doubts due to negative reviews.
decision_en: When communicating with customers, express consistent brand attributes as much as possible, and continuously reinforce information about brand scale, production capacity, and enterprise development direction to enhance customer recognition of the brand.

title: 利用顾客“占便宜”心理，通过强调品牌品质与合理促销提升购买转化
scenario: 当顾客认为产品不够低廉，或在咨询中表现出对价格的犹豫时。
decision: 在推荐产品时，首先强调品牌和品质，然后结合充分的促销和折扣理由，形成反差，以说服顾客其购买的产品物超所值。
rationale: 顾客并非只追求廉价，而是更享受“占便宜”的感觉。通过强调品牌价值和稀有折扣，可以激发顾客的购买冲动，满足其占便宜的心理。
title_en: Leverage Customer's Desire for a 'Bargain' by Emphasizing Brand Quality and Reasonable Promotions to Increase Purchase Conversion
scenario_en: When customers think the product is not cheap enough, or show hesitation about the price during consultation.
decision_en: When recommending products, first emphasize brand and quality, then combine with sufficient promotional and discount reasons to create a contrast, thereby convincing customers that their purchased product is excellent value for money.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 通过频繁沟通而非强行推销来引导顾客购买更多产品
scenario: 当客服希望引导顾客购买更多产品时，应避免直接推销。
decision: 客服应通过频繁、有效的沟通，如询问产品建议、嘘寒问暖、甚至陪伴顾客打发时间等方式，与顾客建立信任纽带，从而自然地引导其需求。
rationale: 顾客购买产品的本质是基于需求。通过建立信任和拉近距离，可以使顾客成为忠实粉丝，而非仅仅为了提升业绩而强行推销。
title_en: Guide Customers to Buy More Products Through Frequent Communication, Not Aggressive Sales
scenario_en: When customer service wants to guide customers to buy more products, direct selling should be avoided.
decision_en: Customer service should build a bond of trust with customers through frequent, effective communication, such as asking for product suggestions, showing care, or even accompanying customers to pass the time, thereby naturally guiding their needs.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 坦率面对产品缺陷以建立信任和促进销售
scenario: 当与顾客沟通产品时，尤其是在介绍产品特性时。
decision: 坦率地指出产品的某些缺陷，并解释这些缺陷的背景或我们如何做得更好，例如主动告知顾客产品材料和工艺的特点。
rationale: 世界上没有绝对完美的产品，真诚地指出产品缺陷能体现公司的诚信，拉近与顾客的距离，建立信任，并能提前解决潜在的售后问题。
title_en: Frankly Address Product Defects to Build Trust and Promote Sales
scenario_en: When communicating about products with customers, especially when introducing product features.
decision_en: Frankly point out certain defects of the product and explain the background of these defects or how we do better, for example, proactively informing customers about the characteristics of product materials and craftsmanship.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 通过独特称呼让顾客记住并推荐
scenario: 当客服与顾客进行沟通时，尤其是在行业普遍认为顾客是“一次性消费”且沟通也是一次性的背景下。
decision: 客服应采用“仆人”、“微臣”等独特称呼，以区别于其他普通店铺的客服，并将其作为客服文化的核心。
rationale: 这种独特的称呼方式能让顾客对客服留下深刻印象，产生感恩之情，从而促使他们主动推荐新顾客，打破“一次性消费”的观念。
title_en: Use Unique Titles to Make Customers Remember and Recommend
scenario_en: When customer service communicates with customers, especially in an industry where customers are generally considered 'one-time consumers' and communication is also one-time.
decision_en: Customer service should adopt unique titles such as 'servant' or 'subject' to differentiate from customer service in other ordinary stores, and make this a core part of the customer service culture.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 让顾客记住你，成为回头客和粉丝
scenario: 当客服与顾客沟通时，尤其是在顾客被视为“一次性消费”群体时。
decision: 在沟通中，要极力表达或让顾客感受到，顾客找到客服就能解决任何关于购物的问题。例如，强调“您有任何问题找我XX，我XX给您推荐的产品，您收到货有任何不满意，都可以找我XX给您解决哦！”并可主动加顾客为好友，如“亲，我加您为好友，这样方便您找到我哦！”
rationale: 让顾客记住客服，是顾客购物最大的安全保障，能增强顾客对产品的可信度，解决网购的未知感，并暗示真诚，而非一锤子买卖，从而将顾客转化为回头客或粉丝。
title_en: Make Customers Remember You, Become Repeat Customers and Fans
scenario_en: When customer service communicates with customers, especially when customers are considered 'one-time consumers'.
decision_en: In communication, strive to express or make customers feel that they can solve any shopping problems by finding customer service. For example, emphasize, 'If you have any questions, find me XX, and if you are not satisfied with the product I XX recommended, you can find me XX to solve it!' You can also proactively add customers as friends, such as 'Dear, I'll add you as a friend, so it's easier for you to find me!'

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 解决问题的过程比结果更能打动顾客
scenario: 当顾客在沟通中提出疑虑、质疑或不正确的建议时。
decision: 应以解决问题的态度面对顾客，尽力帮助顾客，并让顾客知道你正在努力解决问题。
rationale: 顾客在解决问题的过程中会感受到被重视和理解，从而产生谅解，并最终获得更好的协调结果。
title_en: The Process of Solving Problems Impresses Customers More Than the Result
scenario_en: When customers raise doubts, questions, or incorrect suggestions during communication.
decision_en: Approach customers with a problem-solving attitude, do your best to help them, and let them know you are actively working to resolve the issue.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 不要放弃每一笔生意：执着且聪明的客服
scenario: 当顾客咨询或下单后，客服误认为顾客已放弃购买意图而结束沟通时。
decision: 客服不应轻易放弃任何咨询顾客，而应在聊天中抓住顾客需求，找到切入点，循序渐进地引导顾客下单购买，并在适当的时机进行催付和跟进。
rationale: 每一位顾客都来之不易，客服应尽力促成购买。销售不只是简单的接待，持续跟进能增加交易机会，提升客服的自我价值和销售业绩。
title_en: Don't Give Up on Any Business: Persistent and Smart Customer Service
scenario_en: When customer service mistakenly believes a customer has given up on purchasing after consultation or placing an order, and ends the communication.
decision_en: Customer service should not easily give up on any inquiring customer, but should grasp customer needs in the chat, find an entry point, gradually guide the customer to place an order, and follow up and urge payment at appropriate times.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 感谢致辞
scenario: 当SOP或演示文稿结束时。
decision: 表达感谢。
rationale: 这是礼貌和专业的做法。
title_en: Acknowledgements
scenario_en: When the SOP or presentation concludes.
decision_en: Express gratitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何面对顾客讨价还价？
scenario: 当顾客试图讨价还价时。
decision: 本节将提供处理顾客讨价还价的指导。
rationale: 为客服人员提供一致的处理讨价还价情况的方法。
title_en: How to Deal with Customer Bargaining?
scenario_en: When customers try to bargain.
decision_en: This section will provide guidance on handling customer bargaining.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户议价的策略与技巧
scenario: 当客户在淘宝或天猫店铺咨询商品并试图议价时，尤其是在商品本身无法直接议价的情况下。
decision: 避免生硬拒绝或表现不耐烦，因为这会损害客户体验和转化率。应考虑使用下单立减、满减优惠券、组合套餐优惠等方式促成交易。如果商品无法议价，需要采用其他技巧来改善客户体验。
rationale: 每一个流量和询单都来之不易，如果在议价环节流失客户是巨大的损失。生硬拒绝会导致客户体验差，影响成交后的评价甚至引发售后问题。
title_en: Strategies and Techniques for Handling Customer Price Negotiation
scenario_en: When customers inquire about products on Taobao or Tmall stores and try to negotiate prices, especially when the product itself cannot be directly negotiated.
decision_en: Avoid blunt refusal or showing impatience, as this will harm customer experience and conversion rates. Consider using instant discounts, full-reduction coupons, bundled package offers, etc., to facilitate the transaction. If the product cannot be negotiated, other techniques need to be used to improve the customer experience.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 目录
scenario: This chunk is a table of contents entry.
decision: It indicates the structure of the document.
rationale: This is a navigational element, not a policy or rule.
title_en: Table of Contents
scenario_en: This chunk is a table of contents entry.
decision_en: It indicates the structure of the document.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对试探性议价客户并进行关联销售
scenario: 当客户使用“能不能便宜点？”或“给优惠点吧”等语言进行试探性议价时。
decision: 首先礼貌拒绝直接降价，然后趁机介绍套餐或店铺活动，引导客户购买其他附带产品以进行关联销售。如果无活动，则礼貌拒绝后观察客户反应。
rationale: 这类客户通常在礼貌拒绝后会主动付款，但我们的目标是不仅达成交易，还要留下好印象并提高客单价和店铺访问深度。
title_en: Handling Tentative Bargaining and Cross-selling
scenario_en: When a customer tentatively bargains using phrases like 'Can it be cheaper?' or 'Give me a discount.'
decision_en: Politely decline a direct price reduction, then seize the opportunity to introduce package deals or store promotions, guiding the customer to purchase other complementary products for cross-selling. If no promotions are available, politely decline and observe the customer's reaction.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户关于价格优惠的询问
scenario: 当客户询问是否有更多价格优惠或折扣时。
decision: 提供现有优惠信息，如立减、优惠券或套餐，并强调商品价格的实惠性。
rationale: 通过提供具体优惠信息和强调商品价值，可以满足客户对优惠的期望，同时避免不必要的议价。
title_en: Addressing Customer Inquiries about Price Discounts
scenario_en: When a customer asks if there are more price discounts or promotions.
decision_en: Provide information on existing offers, such as instant discounts, coupons, or packages, and emphasize the affordability of the product.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理“允诺型”客户的策略：强调价值与客户忠诚度
scenario: 当客户表示价格太贵，并承诺未来会再次购买或介绍朋友时（例如：“太贵了，第一次来你给我便宜点，我下次会再来买的，我帮你们多介绍朋友过来”）。
decision: 坚定地相信并传达我们的价格合理性、产品质量优势，并提及我们拥有大量老客户，以此来应对客户的议价。
rationale: 此类客户通常已下定决心购买，适当的应对能促成交易，同时维护品牌价值和定价策略。
title_en: Strategy for 'Promising' Customers: Emphasize Value and Loyalty
scenario_en: When a customer states the price is too high and promises future purchases or referrals (e.g., 'It's too expensive, give me a discount for my first time, I'll come back next time and bring more friends').
decision_en: Firmly believe in and communicate the reasonableness of our prices, the quality advantages of our products, and mention our large base of loyal customers to counter the customer's bargaining.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对客户觉得价格贵的参考话术
scenario: 当客户表示商品价格昂贵时。
decision: 客服应强调产品质量、性价比、老客户复购率，并与实体店价格进行对比，以打消客户疑虑。
rationale: 通过强调产品价值和优惠，可以增强客户对价格合理性的认同，并鼓励其成为回头客。
title_en: Responding to Customers Who Find Prices Expensive
scenario_en: When a customer states that the product price is expensive.
decision_en: Customer service should emphasize product quality, cost-effectiveness, repeat purchase rates by loyal customers, and compare prices with physical stores to alleviate customer concerns.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对客户比价砍价的策略
scenario: 当客户提出“XX家这样的东西都比你这个便宜，你便宜点吧？”进行比价砍价时。
decision: 引导客户关注产品的性价比和我们提供的服务，强调价格并非唯一的购买因素，以增加客户信任感并坚定其购买决心。
rationale: 客户在比价后仍选择咨询我们，表明他们更青睐我们的产品，但担心买贵。此时需通过强调价值而非单纯降价来消除其顾虑。
title_en: Strategy for Handling Customer Price Comparisons and Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer compares prices and bargains, stating, 'XX store sells similar items cheaper, can you lower your price?'
decision_en: Guide the customer to focus on the product's cost-effectiveness and the services we provide, emphasizing that price is not the only purchasing factor, to build customer trust and solidify their decision to buy.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户对产品真伪和质量的疑虑
scenario: 当客户询问我们产品是否为正品，并将其与竞争对手的产品进行比较时。
decision: 承认市场上有假冒伪劣产品，但强调我们产品的质量和完善的售后服务，避免直接评论竞争对手。
rationale: 通过承认市场乱象来建立信任，同时将焦点引回我们自身的优势，即产品质量和客户服务，以打消客户疑虑。
title_en: Addressing Customer Concerns about Product Authenticity and Quality
scenario_en: When a customer asks if our product is genuine and compares it with competitors' products.
decision_en: Acknowledge the existence of counterfeit products in the market, but emphasize the quality of our products and comprehensive after-sales service, avoiding direct comments on competitors.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对武断型客户：强调产品价值以处理价格异议
scenario: 当客户表现出武断的语言特征，例如直接表示“价格太贵”，但对其他方面满意时。
decision: 顺应客户的意图，并强调产品以当前价格购买的物有所值。
rationale: 这类客户可能只是想议价，通过强调价值可以有效应对其价格异议。
title_en: Handling Assertive Customers: Emphasize Product Value to Address Price Objections
scenario_en: When a customer exhibits assertive language, such as directly stating 'the price is too expensive,' but is satisfied with other aspects.
decision_en: Align with the customer's intent and emphasize the value for money of purchasing the product at its current price.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户对产品价格和质量的疑虑
scenario: 当客户对产品价格有疑虑，并可能因此质疑产品质量时。
decision: 认同客户对价格的关注，但引导他们思考产品使用期间的品质重要性，并表达对客户判断力的信任。
rationale: 通过认同客户的观点来建立共情，然后将焦点从初始价格转移到长期使用价值，以提升客户对产品品质的认知和接受度。
title_en: Addressing Customer Concerns about Product Price and Quality
scenario_en: When a customer has doubts about the product price and may consequently question product quality.
decision_en: Acknowledge the customer's concern about price, but guide them to consider the importance of quality during product use, and express trust in the customer's judgment.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对威逼利诱型客户的砍价策略
scenario: 当客户使用威胁或诱惑性语言（例如“就按我说的价格啦，卖的话我现在就拍，不卖我就算了”）进行砍价时。
decision: 客服人员应保持冷静，不被客户牵着走，并坚定自己的价格立场。
rationale: 大多数此类客户只是不想买贵吃亏。如果轻易让步，客户会认为价格仍有空间，从而降低对商家的信任感。
title_en: Strategy for Handling Threatening or Enticing Customers Who Bargain
scenario_en: When a customer uses threatening or enticing language (e.g., 'It's my price, if you sell it, I'll buy it now, otherwise I won't') to bargain.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should remain calm, not be led by the customer, and stand firm on their pricing.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户议价：小额与大额差价的应对策略
scenario: 当客户要求降价时，根据议价金额的大小采取不同的沟通策略。
decision: 如果议价金额小，可提议客户好评晒图后退还差价作为优惠。如果议价金额大，则强调产品品质和现有优惠活动，拒绝进一步降价。
rationale: 通过灵活的议价策略，既能满足部分客户的优惠需求，又能维护产品利润和品牌价值。
title_en: Handling Customer Bargaining: Strategies for Small vs. Large Price Differences
scenario_en: When a customer requests a price reduction, adopt different communication strategies based on the bargaining amount.
decision_en: If the bargaining amount is small, suggest a refund of the difference as a discount after the customer leaves a positive review and shares photos. If the bargaining amount is large, emphasize product quality and existing promotions, refusing further price reductions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对博取同情型客户的策略
scenario: 当客户试图通过诉说个人困境或请求同情来要求降价或特殊待遇时。
decision: 客服人员应表达理解，同时巧妙地回应自己的不易，以争取客户的理解和共情，而非直接拒绝或妥协。
rationale: 通过展现共情和分享自身困境，可以拉近与客户的距离，避免直接冲突，并引导客户理解商家也有其难处，从而减少不合理要求。
title_en: Strategy for Handling Sympathy-Seeking Customers
scenario_en: When a customer tries to request a price reduction or special treatment by recounting personal difficulties or appealing for sympathy.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should express understanding while subtly responding with their own difficulties to gain the customer's understanding and empathy, rather than directly refusing or compromising.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户以支付宝余额不足为借口议价的应对策略
scenario: 当客户声称支付宝余额不足，并以此为由要求以其提出的较低价格成交时。
decision: 建议客户寻求他人代付，或在不损害客户关系的前提下，适度施加压力以促成交易。
rationale: 此类借口真假难辨，但无论真实性如何，客服应坚持公司定价原则，同时积极寻找解决方案以促成交易。
title_en: Strategy for Customers Bargaining with Insufficient Alipay Balance as an Excuse
scenario_en: When a customer claims insufficient Alipay balance and uses this as a reason to demand a lower price.
decision_en: Suggest the customer seek payment from others, or, without harming customer relations, apply moderate pressure to facilitate the transaction.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户要求降价或无力支付时的应对策略
scenario: 当客户要求降价或表示目前无力支付时。
decision: 拒绝降价，但提供代付选项或告知客户订单在72小时内有效，并提醒库存有限。
rationale: 公司利润空间有限，无法提供额外折扣。提供灵活的支付方式和强调库存稀缺性可以促使客户尽快完成购买。
title_en: Strategy for Customers Requesting Price Reduction or Unable to Pay
scenario_en: When a customer requests a price reduction or states they are currently unable to pay.
decision_en: Refuse a price reduction, but offer a proxy payment option or inform the customer that the order is valid for 72 hours, and remind them of limited stock.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对死缠烂打型客户：客气请走，必要时沉默
scenario: 当客户表现出死缠烂打的语言特征，不屈不挠地长时间砍价，并且对各种应对方法都无效时。
decision: 对这类客户应客气地请走，必要时保持沉默。
rationale: 这类客户即使满足其要求也可能给出差评，导致血泪教训，流失并不可惜。
title_en: Handling Persistent Customers: Politely Dismiss, Silence if Necessary
scenario_en: When a customer exhibits persistent bargaining behavior, relentlessly negotiating for a long time, and various countermeasures are ineffective.
decision_en: Politely dismiss such customers, and remain silent if necessary.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理顾客未购买情况的参考话术
scenario: 当顾客浏览后未进行购买时，客服人员需要进行回应。
decision: 表达感谢，尊重顾客选择，并保持积极友好的态度，期待未来再次服务。
rationale: 即使顾客未购买，也要保持良好的客户关系和品牌形象，为未来的潜在交易打下基础。
title_en: Reference Script for Customers Who Did Not Purchase
scenario_en: When a customer browses but does not make a purchase, customer service needs to respond.
decision_en: Express gratitude, respect the customer's choice, and maintain a positive and friendly attitude, looking forward to serving them again in the future.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语
scenario: 当SOP文档结束时
decision: 表示感谢。
rationale: 这是SOP文档的结束语，通常用于礼貌性地结束演示或文档。
title_en: Closing Remarks
scenario_en: When the SOP document concludes.
decision_en: Express gratitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 售后处理技巧：学习力、执行力、战斗力
scenario: 本幻灯片作为售后处理技巧培训的开篇。
decision: 在售后处理中，应强调和培养学习力、执行力和战斗力。
rationale: 这些是提升售后服务质量和效率的关键能力。
title_en: After-Sales Handling Skills: Learning Ability, Execution, Combat Effectiveness
scenario_en: This slide serves as the opening for after-sales handling skills training.
decision_en: In after-sales handling, emphasize and cultivate learning ability, execution, and combat effectiveness.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服处理投诉的方法和技巧
scenario: 客服人员在处理售后问题和客户投诉时。
decision: 客服人员应了解、掌握并灵活运用多种消除异议的技巧。
rationale: 不同的方法和技巧适用于不同的顾客和产品，掌握多种技巧能使客服人员在处理售后问题时更加得心应手。
title_en: Customer Service Methods and Skills for Handling Complaints
scenario_en: When customer service personnel handle after-sales issues and customer complaints.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should understand, master, and flexibly apply various objection-handling techniques.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 目录
scenario: This chunk is a table of contents entry.
decision: This entry indicates a section or topic within the document.
rationale: Table of contents entries serve as navigational aids.
title_en: Table of Contents
scenario_en: This chunk is a table of contents entry.
decision_en: This entry indicates a section or topic within the document.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户抱怨与投诉：确认问题
scenario: 当客户提出抱怨或投诉时，客服人员需要首先确认问题的具体内容。
decision: 客服人员应仔细查看聊天记录，判断问题起因和关键因素，然后向客户复述问题以获得确认，并征求客户对解决方案的意见和要求。
rationale: 准确理解客户的问题是有效解决抱怨和投诉的前提，同时征求客户意见有助于找到双方都满意的解决方案。
title_en: Handling Customer Complaints: Confirming the Issue
scenario_en: When a customer raises a complaint, customer service personnel must first confirm the specific content of the issue.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should carefully review chat records, determine the cause and key factors of the problem, then repeat the problem to the customer for confirmation, and solicit the customer's opinions and requirements for a solution.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 分析顾客投诉问题：避免轻率结论与承诺，必要时寻求协助
scenario: 当客服人员面对顾客投诉问题，尤其是在不确定如何处理时。
decision: 在没有把握的情况下，不要轻易下结论、做判断或做出承诺。应与同事协商或向上级汇报，共同分析问题。同时，需评估问题的严重性及自身对问题的掌握程度，并考虑是否需要进一步了解。如果顾客提出的问题不合理或无依据，需要引导顾客认识到这一点，并了解顾客除经济补偿外的其他诉求。
rationale: 避免因轻率的判断和承诺导致后续处理困难或顾客不满，通过团队协作和上级指导可以更准确、有效地解决问题。全面了解问题和顾客需求有助于提供更完善的解决方案。
title_en: Analyze Customer Complaints: Avoid Hasty Conclusions and Commitments, Seek Assistance When Necessary
scenario_en: When customer service staff face customer complaints, especially when unsure how to handle them.
decision_en: Do not easily draw conclusions, make judgments, or make commitments when unsure. Consult with colleagues or report to a supervisor to jointly analyze the problem. At the same time, assess the severity of the problem and your understanding of it, and consider whether further information is needed. If the customer's complaint is unreasonable or unfounded, guide the customer to recognize this and understand their other demands beyond financial compensation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 与顾客协商处理问题时的考量与沟通技巧
scenario: 在与顾客协商解决售后问题时，尤其是在考虑提供补偿之前。
decision: 在协商前，需评估争议对口碑的影响、顾客要求的合理性以及店铺的过失程度。协商时，作为店铺代理人，需清晰表达，倾听客户意见并观察反应，抓住要点，妥善解决。
rationale: 通过全面考量和有效的沟通，旨在维护店铺声誉，公平处理问题，并提升客户满意度。
title_en: Considerations and Communication Skills When Negotiating with Customers
scenario_en: When negotiating with customers to resolve after-sales issues, especially before considering offering compensation.
decision_en: Before negotiating, assess the impact of the dispute on reputation, the reasonableness of the customer's demands, and the degree of fault of the store. During negotiation, as a store representative, express clearly, listen to customer opinions, observe reactions, grasp key points, and resolve issues appropriately.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理及落实处理方案
scenario: 当对客户投诉有了明确结论后。
decision: 将处理方式报告上级并征得上级同意后，明确直接地通知顾客，并跟进落实处理结果，直到顾客满意。
rationale: 确保处理方案得到批准，并有效传达给客户，同时保证问题得到彻底解决，提升客户满意度。
title_en: Handle and Implement Solutions
scenario_en: When a clear conclusion has been reached regarding a customer complaint.
decision_en: Report the handling method to your supervisor and obtain their approval, then clearly and directly inform the customer, and follow up on the implementation of the solution until the customer is satisfied.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 耐心倾听顾客抱怨以有效解决问题
scenario: 当顾客表达抱怨或不满时。
decision: 客服人员应耐心倾听顾客的抱怨，不轻易打断或批评顾客，而是鼓励他们充分表达不满。
rationale: 让顾客充分发泄不满后，他们会更容易接受解释和道歉，从而有助于问题的解决。
title_en: Listen Patiently to Customer Complaints for Effective Problem Resolution
scenario_en: When a customer expresses complaints or dissatisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service staff should listen patiently to customer complaints, without easily interrupting or criticizing the customer, but rather encouraging them to fully express their dissatisfaction.

title: 处理客户抱怨和投诉时保持良好态度
scenario: 当顾客对产品或服务不满意并提出抱怨或投诉时。
decision: 在处理顾客抱怨和投诉时，客服人员必须保持诚恳、礼貌和热情的态度。
rationale: 友好的态度可以降低顾客的抵触情绪，促使他们平复心绪，以便理智地协商解决问题，避免恶化与顾客的关系。
title_en: Maintain a Good Attitude When Handling Customer Complaints and Grievances
scenario_en: When a customer is dissatisfied with a product or service and makes a complaint or grievance.
decision_en: When handling customer complaints and grievances, customer service staff must maintain a sincere, polite, and enthusiastic attitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 快速处理客户投诉与抱怨
scenario: 当接到客户投诉或抱怨的信息时。
decision: 应立即联系客户了解具体内容，并尽快制定处理方案。无论结果如何，必须在承诺的时间内回复客户。
rationale: 快速响应能让客户感受到尊重，展现解决问题的诚意，及时阻止负面情绪蔓延，并将潜在损失降到最低。
title_en: Quickly Handle Customer Complaints and Grievances
scenario_en: When receiving information about a customer complaint or grievance.
decision_en: Immediately contact the customer to understand the specific details and formulate a solution as soon as possible. Regardless of the outcome, you must reply to the customer within the promised timeframe.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理顾客不满时保持得体语言
scenario: 当顾客表达不满，即使言语过激时，客服人员需要与其沟通。
decision: 客服人员应避免针锋相对，使用合情合理、得体大方的措辞，避免使用伤害顾客自尊的语言，并尽量用婉转的语言进行沟通。
rationale: 与顾客针锋相对或使用不当语言会恶化关系，导致顾客失望，不利于问题解决。
title_en: Maintain Appropriate Language When Handling Customer Dissatisfaction
scenario_en: When a customer expresses dissatisfaction, even with aggressive language, customer service staff need to communicate with them.
decision_en: Customer service staff should avoid being confrontational, use reasonable, appropriate, and dignified language, avoid language that harms customer self-esteem, and try to communicate in a tactful manner.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户抱怨或投诉后的补偿策略：物质与精神补偿并重，尽量多补偿
scenario: 当顾客因服务未达预期而抱怨或投诉时。
decision: 应尽量提供超出顾客预期的补偿，包括物质和精神两方面（如道歉），有时可同时进行。
rationale: 通过提供额外补偿，顾客会感受到我们的诚意，从而重建对我们的信心。
title_en: Compensation Strategy After Customer Complaint or Grievance: Material and Spiritual Compensation, Compensate Generously
scenario_en: When a customer complains or files a grievance because service did not meet expectations.
decision_en: Try to provide compensation that exceeds customer expectations, including both material and spiritual aspects (e.g., an apology), sometimes simultaneously.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理客户抱怨时提升自身层级以安抚客户情绪
scenario: 当客户提出抱怨或投诉时，他们希望自己的问题受到重视。
decision: 在处理客户投诉和抱怨时，如果条件允许，应尽可能提升自己的级别，例如自称是部门领导，或者由高层领导亲自处理或慰问。
rationale: 高层人员的介入能让客户感到问题受到重视，从而化解怨气和不满，更容易配合问题处理。
title_en: Elevate Your Level When Handling Customer Complaints to Appease Customer Emotions
scenario_en: When customers make a complaint or grievance, they want their issue to be taken seriously.
decision_en: When handling customer complaints and grievances, if conditions permit, elevate your level as much as possible, for example, by identifying yourself as a department head, or by having a senior leader personally handle or offer condolences.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理顾客投诉和抱怨时应提供多种解决方案
scenario: 当顾客提出投诉或抱怨时，客服人员需要解决问题。
decision: 客服人员应积极尝试多种解决问题的方法，而不仅仅限于道歉或物质补偿。
rationale: 提供多样化的解决方案能够更有效地解决问题，达到事半功倍的效果。
title_en: Provide Multiple Solutions When Handling Customer Complaints and Grievances
scenario_en: When a customer makes a complaint or grievance, customer service staff need to resolve the issue.
decision_en: Customer service staff should actively try various methods to solve problems, not just limited to apologies or material compensation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 平息顾客不满：让顾客发泄情绪并认真聆听
scenario: 当顾客表达不满或愤怒时。
decision: 让顾客充分发泄情绪，客服人员应保持沉默并仔细聆听，同时保持情感上的交流，避免让顾客觉得被敷衍。
rationale: 顾客的愤怒情绪需要释放，发泄后才能冷静下来。顾客的本意是表达情绪并寻求问题解决。认真聆听有助于理解问题并建立信任。
title_en: Appease Customer Dissatisfaction: Let Customers Vent and Listen Carefully
scenario_en: When a customer expresses dissatisfaction or anger.
decision_en: Allow the customer to fully vent their emotions. Customer service staff should remain silent and listen carefully, while maintaining emotional connection to avoid making the customer feel dismissed.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 充分道歉并理解顾客问题
scenario: 当顾客表达不满或抱怨时。
decision: 向顾客充分道歉，并让他们知道你已经了解了他们的问题。请顾客确认你对问题的理解是否正确。
rationale: 道歉不代表承认错误，而是为了解决问题并防止事态扩大。避免花费时间争论对错，因为这对商家和顾客都没有益处。
title_en: Apologize Fully and Understand Customer Issues
scenario_en: When a customer expresses dissatisfaction or complains.
decision_en: Apologize fully to the customer and let them know you understand their problem. Ask the customer to confirm if your understanding of the problem is correct.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 收集客户信息以发现投诉关键原因和真实需求
scenario: 当客户提出投诉或表达不满时，或者在任何需要了解客户需求的情况下。
decision: 主动收集客户信息，通过提问和倾听来了解实际情况、客户真正的需求以及投诉的关键原因。提问要适量且足够，并仔细倾听客户的回答。
rationale: 客户有时会遗漏重要信息或刻意隐瞒，完整的信息是解决问题和满足客户需求的基础，就像医生需要全面了解病情才能开出正确药方一样。
title_en: Collect Customer Information to Discover Key Complaint Reasons and True Needs
scenario_en: When a customer makes a complaint or expresses dissatisfaction, or in any situation where customer needs must be understood.
decision_en: Actively collect customer information by asking questions and listening to understand the actual situation, the customer's true needs, and the key reasons for the complaint. Ask an appropriate and sufficient number of questions, and listen carefully to the customer's answers.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 提出解决办法：多种策略应对顾客问题
scenario: 当顾客提出问题或表达不满时，客服人员需要提供有效的解决方案。
decision: 客服人员应提供多种解决办法，包括提供折扣（如优惠券、满减）、表达感谢以维护公司名誉，或以个人名义给予顾客关怀。
rationale: 提供具体的解决方案是解决顾客问题的根本，能够有效安抚顾客情绪，提升顾客满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Propose Solutions: Multiple Strategies to Address Customer Issues
scenario_en: When a customer raises an issue or expresses dissatisfaction, customer service staff need to provide effective solutions.
decision_en: Customer service staff should offer various solutions, including providing discounts (e.g., coupons, full reduction), expressing gratitude to maintain company reputation, or showing personal care to the customer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 解决投诉后询问顾客意见并迅速处理可接受的要求
scenario: 在提供解决方案后，需要了解顾客对解决方案的看法，并且顾客提出了可接受的要求时。
decision: 在提供解决方案后，应询问顾客的意见。如果顾客的要求合理且可接受，应迅速、愉快地完成。
rationale: 维护老顾客的利润远高于开发新顾客。彻底且令顾客满意地处理投诉是关键。
title_en: After Resolving a Complaint, Ask for Customer Feedback and Promptly Handle Acceptable Requests
scenario_en: After providing a solution, it is necessary to understand the customer's opinion on the solution, and when the customer makes an acceptable request.
decision_en: After providing a solution, ask for the customer's opinion. If the customer's request is reasonable and acceptable, complete it quickly and cheerfully.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理完售后问题后，对客户进行跟踪服务
scenario: 当客户的售后问题已经处理完毕后。
decision: 客服应主动电话联系客户，询问其对解决方案的满意度，并了解是否有需要修改方案的地方。
rationale: 跟踪服务能够维护老客户关系，提升客户忠诚度，并识别潜在的改进点。
title_en: Follow-up Service for Customers After After-Sales Issues Are Resolved
scenario_en: When a customer's after-sales issue has been resolved.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the customer by phone to inquire about their satisfaction with the solution and to understand if any modifications to the solution are needed.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理顾客投诉的原则
scenario: 当处理顾客投诉时。
decision: 不要人为地给顾客下判断，要换位思考站在客户的立场上看问题，并坚持让店铺赚钱、不赚不赔、少赔为赚的利益原则。
rationale: 顾客因为信赖才求助，他们只是因为有问题产生情绪，并非针对客服人员。同时，需要平衡顾客满意度和店铺利益。
title_en: Principles for Handling Customer Complaints
scenario_en: When handling customer complaints.
decision_en: Do not arbitrarily judge customers; empathize and view the problem from the customer's perspective, and adhere to the principle of making profit for the store, breaking even, or minimizing losses.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语
scenario: 当SOP或政策文档结束时。
decision: 表示感谢。
rationale: 这是文档的结束语，通常用于礼貌性地感谢读者。
title_en: Closing Remarks
scenario_en: When an SOP or policy document ends.
decision_en: Express gratitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理买家差评的策略与淘宝恶意评价维权指南
scenario: 当买家给出差评时，需要根据差评的具体原因（产品服务不满意、职业差评师、竞争对手恶意竞争）采取不同的应对策略。
decision: 首先判断差评类型，对于产品服务不满意的情况，应真诚道歉并主动承担责任，提供退换货并承担运费；对于恶意评价，则需根据淘宝规则发起维权；对于款式不满意但非质量问题，应友好协商，争取换货，但不承担非质量问题的运费。
rationale: 通过积极沟通和解决问题，可以化解客户不满，挽回客户信任，避免负面影响扩大，并有效应对恶意行为，维护店铺声誉和利益。
source_doc: 客服培训-15.中差评回复方法.docx
title_en: Strategies for Handling Buyer Negative Reviews and Taobao Malicious Review Protection Guide
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a negative review, different strategies should be adopted based on the specific reason for the review (dissatisfaction with product/service, professional negative reviewer, malicious competition from rivals).
decision_en: First, determine the type of negative review. For dissatisfaction with product/service, sincerely apologize and take responsibility, offer returns/exchanges and cover shipping costs. For malicious reviews, initiate protection according to Taobao rules. For dissatisfaction with style but not quality issues, negotiate amicably for an exchange, but do not cover shipping costs for non-quality issues.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理因客服服务态度差导致的中差评
scenario: 当客户因客服服务态度不好而给出中差评时。
decision: 卖家必须首先向客户致歉，站在买家立场思考问题，并提供补偿（如返现或免邮）以争取客户修改评价。
rationale: 客户是上帝，受气后作出冲动的行为在所难免。通过道歉和补偿，让买家体验到被重视和热情款待，留下好印象，从而解决差评问题。
source_doc: 客服培训-15.中差评回复方法.docx
title_en: Handling Negative Reviews Due to Poor Customer Service Attitude
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a neutral or negative review due to poor customer service attitude.
decision_en: The seller must first apologize to the customer, empathize with the buyer's perspective, and offer compensation (e.g., cashback or free shipping) to encourage the customer to revise their review.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理发货问题：错发、漏发、延迟发货的道歉与补偿
scenario: 当客户因错发、漏发或延迟发货而感到不满时。
decision: 首先诚恳道歉并承认是己方失误，然后根据具体情况提供补偿，如承担退货邮费、包邮重发、赠送小礼品或免邮费返现。
rationale: 承认错误并提供补偿能够平息客户怒气，挽回客户信任，并为后续业务打下良好基础。
source_doc: 客服培训-15.中差评回复方法.docx
title_en: Handling Shipping Issues: Apology and Compensation for Wrong, Missing, or Delayed Shipments
scenario_en: When a customer is dissatisfied due to a wrong, missing, or delayed shipment.
decision_en: Sincerely apologize and admit the error. Then, offer compensation based on the specific situation, such as covering return shipping fees, free reshipment, a small gift, or a shipping fee refund.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理商品描述不符（色差、尺寸）的客户投诉及解释话术
scenario: 当客户反馈收到的商品与描述不符，例如存在色差或尺寸问题时。
decision: 首先了解具体差异，然后提供专业解释，并提供退换货选项（邮费客户承担），或下次购物优惠。保持良好态度，使用专业话术。
rationale: 通过理解客户问题并提供解决方案，旨在安抚客户情绪，减少负面评价，并维护店铺声誉。
source_doc: 客服培训-15.中差评回复方法.docx
title_en: Handling Customer Complaints and Explanations for Product Description Discrepancies (Color Difference, Size)
scenario_en: When a customer reports that the received product does not match the description, for example, due to color difference or size issues.
decision_en: First, understand the specific discrepancy, then provide a professional explanation. Offer return/exchange options (customer bears shipping costs) or a discount on their next purchase. Maintain a positive attitude and use professional language.

title: 销售成交策略：应对客户常见异议的八种方法
scenario: 当销售人员在销售过程中遇到客户提出各种异议（如“我要考虑一下”、“太贵了”、“没有预算”等）时。
decision: 销售人员应运用询问法、假设法、直接法、比较法、拆散法、平均法、赞美法、讨好法、化小法、例证法、得失法、底牌法、诚实法、分析法、转向法、提醒法、前瞻法、攻心法、投资法、反驳法、肯定法、吹牛法、比心法、死磨法等多种策略来解除客户疑虑，促成交易。
rationale: 销售的本质是成交，客户的异议是成交的障碍。通过系统性的方法解决客户的“心中结”，能够有效推动销售进程，实现交易。
title_en: Sales Closing Strategies: Eight Methods to Address Common Customer Objections
scenario_en: When sales personnel encounter various customer objections during the sales process (e.g., 'I need to think about it,' 'It's too expensive,' 'No budget').
decision_en: Sales personnel should use various strategies such as inquiry, assumption, direct, comparison, breakdown, average, compliment, flattery, minimization, case study, gain/loss, bottom line, honesty, analysis, redirection, reminder, foresight, psychological, investment, rebuttal, affirmation, boasting, empathy, and persistence to resolve customer doubts and close the deal.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 淘宝中差评讲解
scenario: This chunk is a title slide for a presentation on Taobao moderate and negative reviews.
decision: This chunk serves as an introductory title and does not contain actionable instructions.
rationale: It's a high-level overview, likely followed by detailed content.
title_en: Taobao Moderate and Negative Reviews Explained
scenario_en: This chunk is a title slide for a presentation on Taobao moderate and negative reviews.
decision_en: This chunk serves as an introductory title and does not contain actionable instructions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理中差评：指导买家修改评价以维护好评率
scenario: 当买家给出中评，特别是新手买家，且愿意修改评价时。
decision: 卖家需要学会如何指导买家修改评价，以便能够清晰地教导买家操作。
rationale: 中评虽然不扣分，但会直接影响卖家的好评率。许多新手买家不知道如何修改评价，如果卖家不能有效指导，买家可能会放弃修改，导致中评无法撤销。
title_en: Handling Moderate/Negative Reviews: Guiding Buyers to Modify Reviews to Maintain a Good Rating
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a moderate review, especially a new buyer, and is willing to modify it.
decision_en: Sellers need to learn how to guide buyers to modify reviews so they can clearly instruct buyers on the process.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理一般中差评的沟通策略
scenario: 当买家给出一般性的中评或差评，例如“没有想象中好”或因心情原因时。
decision: 卖家应第一时间主动联系买家，加为好友，询问对商品的看法，并对买家的反馈表示理解和感谢，承诺改进。
rationale: 主动沟通可以了解买家真实想法，通过理解和积极回应，有机会化解负面情绪，甚至争取修改评价。
title_en: Communication Strategies for General Moderate/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a general moderate or negative review, such as 'not as good as expected' or due to mood.
decision_en: Sellers should proactively contact the buyer immediately, add them as a friend, ask for their opinion on the product, express understanding and gratitude for their feedback, and promise to improve.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理一般中差评的沟通策略
scenario: 当买家给出一般性的中差评，且对店主的服务态度表示认可时。
decision: 首先对买家的问题表示理解和认同，然后提出修改评价的请求，并承诺改进服务，同时表达希望与买家成为朋友的意愿。电话沟通时，保持愉悦的语气，先倾听并认同买家。
rationale: 通过认同买家、提供优质服务承诺和建立友好关系，可以有效促使买家修改评价，提升店铺信誉。
title_en: Communication Strategies for General Moderate/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a general moderate or negative review, but acknowledges the shop owner's service attitude.
decision_en: First, express understanding and agreement with the buyer's issue, then request a review modification and promise to improve service, while also expressing a desire to become friends with the buyer. When communicating by phone, maintain a pleasant tone, listen first, and agree with the buyer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理中差评：客服服务、快递问题、商品质量问题
scenario: 当客户给出中等或差评，且评价内容涉及客服服务不佳、快递严重延迟或商品质量问题时。
decision: 由专门的售后人员或店主（若无专门人员）主动回访买家。若有客服主管，则以主管身份添加买家为好友，并主动询问具体情况，如“您好！我是xx公司或者专卖售后主管，看到您给我们一个评价是针对我们客服服务的问题，我想和您了解一下状况？”
rationale: 主动联系并了解客户的具体不满，是解决问题、挽回客户关系、提升店铺声誉的关键步骤。
title_en: Handling Moderate/Negative Reviews: Customer Service, Delivery Issues, Product Quality Issues
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a moderate or negative review, and the content involves poor customer service, severe delivery delays, or product quality issues.
decision_en: A dedicated after-sales representative or the shop owner (if no dedicated personnel) should proactively follow up with the buyer. If there is a customer service supervisor, they should add the buyer as a friend in their capacity as supervisor and proactively inquire about the specific situation, e.g., 'Hello! I am the after-sales supervisor of XX company or specialty store. I saw your review regarding our customer service issue, and I would like to understand the situation with you?'

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理中等负面评价：服务、快递或质量问题
scenario: 当买家给出中等负面评价（如服务不好、快递严重问题、质量出现问题），并且主管出面解决时。
decision: 主管应首先代表客服道歉，并承诺及时解决问题，同时感谢买家的宝贵意见并表示会加以改进，以争取买家的理解和继续支持。
rationale: 通过主管的介入和真诚道歉，表达对买家的尊重和对问题的重视，能够有效缓解买家情绪，促使买家理解并原谅，从而维护客户关系。
title_en: Handling Moderate Negative Reviews: Service, Delivery, or Quality Issues
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a moderate negative review (e.g., poor service, severe delivery issues, quality problems), and a supervisor intervenes to resolve it.
decision_en: The supervisor should first apologize on behalf of customer service and promise to resolve the issue promptly. They should also thank the buyer for their valuable feedback and state that improvements will be made to gain the buyer's understanding and continued support.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理中等差评：服务、快递或质量问题导致的中差评
scenario: 当客户给出中等或差评，指出服务不好、快递问题严重或商品质量出现问题时。
decision: 首先感谢客户，然后请求客户修改评价，解释差评会打击客服工作信心，并承诺会改进服务。同时，强调店铺会持续提供优惠活动，感谢客户支持，但避免做出具体承诺。
rationale: 通过表达感谢、真诚沟通并及时解决问题，可以赢得客户的尊重和理解，从而促使客户修改评价。同时，避免过度承诺，以保持品牌信誉。
title_en: Handling Moderate Negative Reviews: Service, Delivery, or Quality Issues Leading to Moderate/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a moderate or negative review, pointing out poor service, severe delivery issues, or product quality problems.
decision_en: First, thank the customer, then request them to modify the review, explaining that negative reviews can discourage customer service staff, and promise to improve service. At the same time, emphasize that the store will continue to offer promotional activities and thank the customer for their support, but avoid making specific commitments.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理疑难中差评的策略
scenario: 当遇到包含质量、服务、快递、情绪或同行竞争等问题的中差评时。
decision: 首先保持冷静，仔细查看评价内容、交易时间、评价者ID注册时间及地点。解决方式包括通过旺旺沟通、电话沟通，或在无法解决时作出解释。
rationale: 通过冷静分析评价细节，可以更好地理解问题根源，并选择最有效的沟通方式来尝试解决问题或提供解释。
title_en: Strategies for Handling Difficult Moderate/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When encountering moderate or negative reviews involving quality, service, delivery, emotional issues, or competitor actions.
decision_en: First, remain calm and carefully check the review content, transaction time, reviewer ID registration time, and location. Solutions include communication via Wangwang, phone communication, or providing an explanation if unable to resolve.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 旺旺沟通解决客户问题：质量、服务和快递延误处理
scenario: 当客户通过旺旺提出质量问题、服务问题或快递延误问题时。
decision: 对于质量问题，若属店铺责任，提供换货或退货并承担来回运费，态度需诚恳。对于服务问题，立即认错并改进，感谢客户反馈。对于快递问题，解释原因，若属店铺责任及时处理，让客户感受到用心和负责。
rationale: 及时、诚恳地解决客户问题，并展现负责任的态度，能有效提升客户满意度，避免差评，甚至获得好评，对店铺的声誉和运营有积极帮助。
title_en: Resolving Customer Issues via Wangwang: Quality, Service, and Delivery Delay Handling
scenario_en: When a customer raises quality issues, service issues, or delivery delay issues via Wangwang.
decision_en: For quality issues, if it's the store's responsibility, offer exchange or return and cover round-trip shipping, with a sincere attitude. For service issues, immediately admit fault and improve, thanking the customer for feedback. For delivery issues, explain the reason; if it's the store's responsibility, handle it promptly to make the customer feel cared for and responsible.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理因买家心情不佳导致的中差评
scenario: 当买家因个人心情不佳加上对商品略有不满而给出中差评时，且商品、服务、物流等客观因素无明显问题。
decision: 不要在买家刚给出评价时立即联系，应等到第二天再联系。通过旺旺在线联系买家，先了解具体情况，然后提供解决方案和优质服务。如果买家在沟通中打出笑脸表情，则评价很可能被修改。
rationale: 买家心情不佳时立即沟通可能适得其反。等待一天可以给买家冷静的时间，第二天再沟通更容易解决问题。通过观察买家打字洞察情绪有助于有效沟通。
title_en: Handling Moderate/Negative Reviews Due to Buyer's Bad Mood
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a moderate or negative review due to a personal bad mood combined with slight dissatisfaction with the product, and there are no obvious objective issues with the product, service, or logistics.
decision_en: Do not contact the buyer immediately after they leave the review; wait until the next day. Contact the buyer online via Wangwang, first understand the specific situation, then provide solutions and excellent service. If the buyer uses a smiley face emoji during communication, the review is very likely to be modified.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 电话沟通技巧：保持积极情绪、微笑、倾听与提供解决方案
scenario: 在与客户进行电话沟通时，尤其是在处理客户问题或不满时。
decision: 在电话沟通中，客服人员应保持轻松愉快的心情和微笑，认真倾听客户问题不打断，并在客户说完后首先道歉，然后提供可行的解决方案和保证。
rationale: 积极的沟通方式能够有效缓解客户的负面情绪，建立信任，并促成更满意的结果。微笑服务能带来意想不到的积极效果。
title_en: Phone Communication Skills: Maintain Positive Emotion, Smile, Listen, and Provide Solutions
scenario_en: When communicating with customers by phone, especially when addressing customer issues or dissatisfaction.
decision_en: During phone communication, customer service personnel should maintain a relaxed and pleasant mood and a smile, listen carefully to customer issues without interruption, and after the customer finishes speaking, first apologize, then provide feasible solutions and assurances.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理同行恶意中差评的策略
scenario: 当收到来自同行（通常是竞争对手）的恶意中差评，且无法联系到对方进行沟通或对方不配合时。
decision: 首先检查自身产品、服务和发货流程是否存在问题。如果确认无误，则在评价解释中直接、坦诚地回应，说明情况。不要因此感到沮丧，并可从积极角度思考。
rationale: 恶意中差评通常难以修改，且同行会避免留下证据。因此，重点在于通过公开解释来维护自身声誉，并保持积极心态。80%的评价是针对产品和服务，所以自查是第一步。
title_en: Strategies for Handling Malicious Moderate/Negative Reviews from Competitors
scenario_en: When receiving malicious moderate or negative reviews from competitors, and unable to contact the other party for communication or if they are uncooperative.
decision_en: First, check your own products, services, and shipping process for any issues. If confirmed to be fine, respond directly and honestly in the review explanation, clarifying the situation. Do not get discouraged, and consider it from a positive perspective.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 解释疑难差评与同行问题
scenario: 当遇到同行提出的问题或难以解决的差评时。
decision: 需要作出解释，让其他买家了解情况。解释时要实事求是，有错则改，无错则解释清楚，但不要歪曲事实。
rationale: 通过解释可以澄清事实，避免误解，并展现卖家的诚信和解决问题的态度。同时，从不同角度看问题可以减轻负面情绪。
title_en: Explaining Difficult Negative Reviews and Competitor Issues
scenario_en: When encountering issues raised by competitors or difficult negative reviews.
decision_en: An explanation needs to be provided so that other buyers understand the situation. The explanation should be factual; correct mistakes if any, or clarify if there are none, but do not distort facts.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理疑难差评的电话沟通技巧
scenario: 当遇到难以处理的差评时，尤其是需要电话沟通解决时。
decision: 通过电话与买家沟通时，应尊重买家，态度诚恳，微笑并道歉。提出解决方案时，要让买家先提出要求，并及时肯定买家合理的话语。必要时，可以适当表达卖家的不易和心酸，以柔和的语气争取买家的理解。同时，客服人员应保持良好心态，将处理差评视为学习和成长的机会。
rationale: 电话沟通能更直接地表达诚意和情感，有助于化解买家的负面情绪。通过让买家提出要求并肯定其合理之处，可以增强买家的参与感和满意度。适当示弱和表达不易，能激发买家的同情心，从而更容易达成和解。将差评视为学习机会，有助于客服人员提升处理能力和心理素质。
title_en: Phone Communication Skills for Handling Difficult Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When encountering difficult negative reviews, especially when phone communication is needed for resolution.
decision_en: When communicating with buyers by phone, respect the buyer, be sincere, smile, and apologize. When proposing solutions, let the buyer state their demands first, and promptly affirm reasonable statements from the buyer. If necessary, you can appropriately express the seller's difficulties and hardships in a gentle tone to gain the buyer's understanding. At the same time, customer service personnel should maintain a good mindset and view handling negative reviews as an opportunity for learning and growth.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何修改网店中的中评/差评
scenario: 当买家希望修改其在网店中给出的中评或差评时。
decision: 买家需要登录“我的淘宝”进行操作。
rationale: 这是修改评价的官方入口和流程。
title_en: How to Modify Moderate/Negative Reviews in an Online Store
scenario_en: When a buyer wishes to modify a moderate or negative review they left in an online store.
decision_en: The buyer needs to log in to 'My Taobao' to perform the operation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 登录页面跳转
scenario: 用户点击“登录”按钮后。
decision: 系统会跳转到相应的登录页面。
rationale: 这是用户登录流程的标准步骤。
title_en: Login Page Redirection
scenario_en: After the user clicks the 'Login' button.
decision_en: The system will redirect to the corresponding login page.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何查看已买到的宝贝
scenario: 当用户需要查看他们已购买的商品时。
decision: 将鼠标悬停在“我的淘宝”上，然后点击“已买到的宝贝”。
rationale: 这是访问已购买商品列表的标准导航路径。
title_en: How to View Purchased Items
scenario_en: When a user needs to view items they have purchased.
decision_en: Hover over 'My Taobao' and then click 'Purchased Items'.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何找到并点击“评价管理”
scenario: 当用户需要找到并点击网页上的“评价管理”选项时。
decision: 用户需要将网页往下拉，然后找到“信用管理”部分，并点击其下方的“评价管理”链接。
rationale: 这是访问“评价管理”功能的具体操作路径。
title_en: How to find and click 'Rating Management'
scenario_en: When the user needs to find and click the 'Rating Management' option on the webpage.
decision_en: The user needs to scroll down the webpage, find the 'Credit Management' section, and click the 'Rating Management' link below it.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 进入“给他人的评价”页面
scenario: 当用户需要查看或编辑对其他用户的评价时。
decision: 指导用户将网页稍微向下滚动，找到并进入“给他人的评价”部分。
rationale: 这是导航到特定页面以执行评价管理操作的必要步骤。
title_en: Accessing 'Ratings Given to Others' Page
scenario_en: When the user needs to view or edit ratings given to other users.
decision_en: Guide the user to scroll down the page slightly, find, and enter the 'Ratings Given to Others' section.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 修改或删除评价的操作指引
scenario: 当用户想要修改或删除已发布的评价时。
decision: 用户可以点击“修改评价”来编辑评价内容，或者直接点击“删除评价”来移除评价。
rationale: 提供用户管理其评价的灵活性，允许他们更正或撤回不当内容。
title_en: Instructions for Modifying or Deleting Ratings
scenario_en: When the user wants to modify or delete a published rating.
decision_en: The user can click 'Modify Rating' to edit the rating content, or directly click 'Delete Rating' to remove the rating.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 修改评价流程
scenario: 当需要修改用户评价时。
decision: 点击“修改评价”后，在“评论”下方填写或不填写评语，然后点击“修改”按钮。
rationale: 此流程指导用户如何操作以修改已提交的评价。
title_en: Rating Modification Process
scenario_en: When a user rating needs to be modified.
decision_en: After clicking 'Modify Rating', fill in or leave blank the comment below 'Comment', then click the 'Modify' button.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 评价修改
scenario: 当客服人员需要处理客户的评价修改请求时。
decision: 资深客服人员应该清楚如何处理评价修改。
rationale: 评价修改是客服日常工作中常见的操作，资深客服应具备处理此项业务的经验。
title_en: Rating Modification
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to handle a customer's rating modification request.
decision_en: Senior customer service personnel should know how to handle rating modifications.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 删除和修改评价的方法及注意事项
scenario: 当用户需要删除或修改自己做出的评价时。
decision: 用户只能删除自己做出的评价。删除后，对方的信用评价中将不再显示该评价，但对方给出的评价仍会显示在用户的信用评价中。
rationale: 此规则旨在明确用户对其自身评价的控制权，同时维护评价系统的完整性和透明度，确保双方评价信息的独立性。
title_en: Methods and Considerations for Deleting and Modifying Ratings
scenario_en: When a user needs to delete or modify a rating they have made.
decision_en: Users can only delete ratings they have made. After deletion, the rating will no longer appear in the other party's credit rating, but the rating given by the other party will still appear in the user's credit rating.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 员工心态培训
scenario: This chunk introduces the topic of employee attitude training.
decision: Provide training to employees on their attitudes.
rationale: Employee attitude is a critical aspect of customer service and overall job performance.
title_en: Employee Attitude Training
scenario_en: This chunk introduces the topic of employee attitude training.
decision_en: Provide training to employees on their attitudes.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 塑造良好心态：工作心态调整指南
scenario: 当客服人员需要了解如何调整工作心态时。
decision: 客服人员应该塑造良好心态，因为心态会影响工作能力。
rationale: 良好的心态是有效工作的基础，直接影响服务质量和效率。
title_en: Cultivating a Positive Mindset: Work Attitude Adjustment Guide
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to understand how to adjust their work mindset.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should cultivate a positive mindset, as mindset affects work ability.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: Slide 3: Placeholder for Content
scenario: When a source chunk contains only a slide number or similar minimal content.
decision: Treat it as a placeholder and assign a low quality score.
rationale: This chunk provides no actionable information or specific guidance.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 塑造良好心态：影响个人、家庭、团队和组织
scenario: 在日常工作和生活中，需要认识到个人心态的重要性。
decision: 保持积极良好的心态。
rationale: 良好的心态不仅能促进个人成功，还能对家庭、团队和组织产生积极影响，而消极心态则会带来负面后果。
title_en: Cultivating a Positive Mindset: Impact on Individuals, Families, Teams, and Organizations
scenario_en: In daily work and life, it is important to recognize the importance of one's personal mindset.
decision_en: Maintain a positive and good mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 心理暗示与风险认知对行为决策的影响
scenario: 当员工或客户面对潜在风险时，其对风险的认知和心理状态会显著影响其行为决策。
decision: 在处理客户问题或内部决策时，应充分考虑信息透明度和心理暗示对行为的影响，以帮助建立积极心态和促进理性决策。
rationale: 人们在不确定和感知到威胁的环境中会表现出恐惧和犹豫，即使实际风险很低。清晰的信息和积极的心理引导可以帮助克服这种恐惧，促使更积极的行动。
title_en: Impact of Psychological Suggestion and Risk Perception on Behavioral Decisions
scenario_en: When employees or customers face potential risks, their perception of risk and psychological state significantly influence their behavioral decisions.
decision_en: When handling customer issues or internal decisions, fully consider the impact of information transparency and psychological suggestion on behavior to help build a positive mindset and promote rational decision-making.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 九大基本情绪及其对能力的影响
scenario: 当客服人员需要理解或识别客户情绪时，或在自我情绪管理时。
decision: 识别并理解九种基本情绪：惊奇、恐惧、愤怒、愉快、悲伤、轻蔑、厌恶、羞愧、兴趣。认识到心态会影响能力。
rationale: 理解基本情绪有助于更好地与客户沟通，并管理个人在工作中的表现，因为情绪状态直接影响处理问题的能力。
title_en: Nine Basic Emotions and Their Impact on Ability
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to understand or identify customer emotions, or when managing their own emotions.
decision_en: Identify and understand nine basic emotions: surprise, fear, anger, joy, sadness, contempt, disgust, shame, and interest. Recognize that mindset affects ability.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极心态对客服能力和情绪管理的影响
scenario: 当客服人员需要理解心态如何影响其工作表现和情绪时。
decision: 客服人员应培养积极的心态，因为这能带来向上的力量、喜悦和生气勃勃，并有助于保持沉着、冷静，从而缔造和谐。
rationale: 积极的心态能够直接提升个人能力、改善情绪状态，并促进与客户的和谐互动。
title_en: Impact of Positive Mindset on Customer Service Capability and Emotional Management
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to understand how mindset affects their work performance and emotions.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should cultivate a positive mindset, as this brings upward momentum, joy, and vitality, and helps maintain composure and calmness, thereby creating harmony.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 心态对工作能力和人际关系的影响
scenario: 当员工心情不佳时，这会如何影响他们的工作表现和团队协作。
decision: 负面情绪会导致员工不思进取、颓废、忧愁、悲观、失望和萎靡不振，并可能导致对他人发脾气、不愿配合工作，从而使人际关系紧张。
rationale: 心态直接影响个人的能力发挥和与他人的互动，负面心态会产生一系列连锁反应，损害工作效率和团队和谐。
title_en: Impact of Mindset on Work Ability and Interpersonal Relationships
scenario_en: When employees are in a bad mood, how this affects their work performance and team collaboration.
decision_en: Negative emotions can lead to employees being unmotivated, decadent, sorrowful, pessimistic, disappointed, and listless, and may lead to temper outbursts towards others and unwillingness to cooperate, thus straining interpersonal relationships.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: Slide 11 - Placeholder for Content
scenario: This chunk is a placeholder slide title without specific content.
decision: No specific action can be derived from this chunk as it lacks detailed information.
