domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何调整心态：心态十步法则
scenario: 当需要调整客服人员的心态时。
decision: 遵循“心态十步法则”来指导心态调整。
rationale: 提供一个结构化的方法来帮助客服人员管理和调整他们的工作心态。
title_en: How to Adjust Your Mindset: The Ten-Step Mindset Rule
scenario_en: When there is a need to adjust the mindset of customer service personnel.
decision_en: Follow the 'Ten-Step Mindset Rule' to guide mindset adjustment.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何调整心态：心态十步法则
scenario: 当需要调整个人心态或情绪时。
decision: 遵循“心态十步法则”来调整心态。
rationale: 此法则提供了一套结构化的方法来管理和改善个人情绪状态。
title_en: How to Adjust Your Mindset: The Ten-Step Mindset Rule
scenario_en: When there is a need to adjust one's personal mindset or emotions.
decision_en: Follow the 'Ten-Step Mindset Rule' to adjust your mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 心态十步法则：调整客服心态的方法
scenario: 当客服人员需要调整自己的工作心态时。
decision: 遵循“心态十步法则”来调整心态。
rationale: 提供一套结构化的方法来帮助客服人员管理和改善情绪，以更好地服务客户。
title_en: Ten-Step Mindset Rule: Methods for Adjusting Customer Service Mindset
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to adjust their work mindset.
decision_en: Follow the 'Ten-Step Mindset Rule' to adjust your mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 调整心态以提升生命质量
scenario: 当客服人员需要管理自己的情绪和心态时。
decision: 客服人员应专注于保持当下心情愉悦，因为这会累积成一整天的好心情，进而提升整体生命质量。
rationale: 积极的心态直接影响个人的生命质量和生活体验，有助于客服人员更好地应对工作挑战。
title_en: Adjusting Mindset to Improve Quality of Life
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to manage their emotions and mindset.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should focus on maintaining a pleasant mood in the present moment, as this will accumulate into a good mood throughout the day, thereby improving overall quality of life.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 活在当下：专注当前任务和互动
scenario: 当需要调整心态，专注于当前任务和人际互动时。
decision: 专注于当前正在做的事情，并重视当前与你互动的人。吃饭时就吃饭，睡觉时就睡觉。
rationale: “活在当下”的观点强调了当前时刻的重要性，有助于提升专注力和心理健康。
title_en: Living in the Present: Focusing on Current Tasks and Interactions
scenario_en: When there is a need to adjust one's mindset and focus on current tasks and interpersonal interactions.
decision_en: Focus on what you are currently doing and value the people you are currently interacting with. Eat when you eat, sleep when you sleep.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: Placeholder Content for Knowledge Base Entry
scenario: When a knowledge base entry is created from a source chunk that contains only placeholder text.
decision: The entry should reflect that the content is a placeholder and lacks specific actionable information.
rationale: To accurately represent the source material and indicate that no specific policy or rule can be extracted from generic placeholder text.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极心态：关注正面并立即行动
scenario: 在面对国家、企业或个人工作中的挑战和不足时。
decision: 应采取积极的心态，专注于好的、正确的方面并将其放大，同时第一时间投入到正确的行动中。
rationale: 积极的心态能够帮助人们看到事物改善的潜力，克服困难，并激发工作热情。第一时间投入能使困难显得渺小，并放大积极的方面。
title_en: Positive Mindset: Focus on the Positive and Act Immediately
scenario_en: When facing challenges and shortcomings in national, corporate, or personal work.
decision_en: Adopt a positive mindset, focus on and amplify the good and correct aspects, and immediately engage in correct actions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 主动心态：在竞争中占据优势并创造个人机会
scenario: 在竞争激烈的工作环境中，当没有明确指示或职位空缺时。
decision: 主动行动，做恰当的事情，即使没有人明确告知。积极争取机会，锻炼自己。
rationale: 主动性是占据优势地位的关键，能为个人增加锻炼和实现价值的机会。被动等待指示会导致落后并错失良机。
title_en: Proactive Mindset: Gaining an Edge and Creating Opportunities
scenario_en: In a highly competitive work environment, when there are no clear instructions or job openings.
decision_en: Act proactively and do what is appropriate, even if not explicitly told. Actively seek opportunities and develop yourself.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 双赢心态处理企业、商家、消费者关系
scenario: 在处理企业与企业、企业与商家、企业与消费者之间的关系时。
decision: 必须站在双赢的心态上去处理所有相关方之间的关系，不能为了自身利益损害企业利益，也不能破坏企业与商家、企业与消费者之间的双赢规则。
rationale: 商业规则是“杀头的事情有人干，但亏本的买卖没人作”。企业是利润中心，若企业无利益，则个人也无利益。任何一方利益受损，合作关系将无法维持。
title_en: Win-Win Mindset for Enterprise, Merchant, and Consumer Relationships
scenario_en: When managing relationships between enterprises, between enterprises and merchants, and between enterprises and consumers.
decision_en: All relationships with stakeholders must be handled with a win-win mindset. Do not harm enterprise interests for personal gain, and do not disrupt the win-win rules between the enterprise and merchants, or the enterprise and consumers.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售人员应包容客户和同事的差异
scenario: 作为销售人员，在与各种经销商和消费者互动时，以及与同事协作时。
decision: 销售人员应学会包容他人的不同喜好、需求和做事风格，接纳并包容差异。
rationale: 我们是为客户提供服务的，满足客户需求是核心目标，这要求我们具备包容的心态和同理心。
title_en: Salespeople Should Be Inclusive of Customer and Colleague Differences
scenario_en: As a salesperson, when interacting with various distributors and consumers, and when collaborating with colleagues.
decision_en: Salespeople should learn to be inclusive of others' different preferences, needs, and working styles, accepting and embracing differences.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 自信：行动与销售成功的源动力
scenario: 当客服人员或销售人员在与客户互动、推荐产品或执行日常工作时。
decision: 客服人员和销售人员应保持高度自信，相信公司、产品、自身能力、同事以及未来。
rationale: 自信是行动的源动力，能促使员工积极主动地推荐优质产品，满足消费者需求，并克服犹豫不决，从而提升销售业绩和工作效率。
title_en: Confidence: The Driving Force for Action and Sales Success
scenario_en: When customer service or sales personnel interact with customers, recommend products, or perform daily tasks.
decision_en: Customer service and sales personnel should maintain high confidence, believing in the company, products, their own abilities, colleagues, and the future.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 行动是最有说服力的
scenario: 在任何需要证明自身价值、关怀客户或实现目标的情境中。
decision: 通过实际行动来证明自己的存在、价值，关怀客户并完成目标。
rationale: 美丽的雄辩不如真实的行动，如果计划和目标停留在纸上，将无法执行和实现。
title_en: Action is the Most Persuasive
scenario_en: In any situation requiring proof of self-worth, customer care, or goal achievement.
decision_en: Prove your existence and value, care for customers, and achieve goals through actual actions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 保持学习心态以应对日益激烈的竞争
scenario: 在日益激烈的市场竞争环境中，个人和企业需要不断提升自身实力和能力。
decision: 应保持学习的心态，将学习视为一种生活方式，并向同事、上级、客户和竞争对手学习。
rationale: 不学习就无法提高和创新，导致竞争力落后。学习是个人和企业在21世纪取得成功的关键竞争力。
title_en: Maintain a Learning Mindset to Cope with Increasing Competition
scenario_en: In an increasingly competitive market environment, individuals and enterprises need to continuously improve their strength and capabilities.
decision_en: Maintain a learning mindset, viewing learning as a lifestyle, and learn from colleagues, superiors, customers, and competitors.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 像老板一样思考和行动
scenario: 当员工在日常工作中需要指导其工作心态时。
decision: 员工应以企业主的视角思考和行动，关注企业成长和费用，将企业事务视为己任。
rationale: 具备老板心态的员工会主动承担责任，识别并执行对企业有利的行为，从而获得认可和职业发展。反之，则会导致不负责任和职业停滞。
title_en: Think and Act Like an Owner
scenario_en: When employees need guidance on their work mindset in daily tasks.
decision_en: Employees should think and act from the perspective of a business owner, focusing on enterprise growth and expenses, and treating company matters as their own responsibility.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 全力以赴的心态：为生存而战与尽力而为的区别
scenario: 当面对挑战或需要完成任务时，员工应采取何种心态。
decision: 员工应以“全力以赴”的心态投入工作，而非仅仅“尽力而为”。
rationale: “全力以赴”意味着为了生存或达成关键目标而付出一切努力，这种心态能带来超越预期的结果；而“尽力而为”可能仅限于完成任务，缺乏更深层次的驱动力。
title_en: All-Out Effort Mindset: The Difference Between Fighting for Survival and Doing Your Best
scenario_en: When facing challenges or needing to complete tasks, what mindset should employees adopt.
decision_en: Employees should approach work with an 'all-out effort' mindset, rather than just 'doing their best'.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 团队合作精神与欣赏长处
scenario: 在日常工作和团队协作中，尤其作为企业管理者，需要培养和展现合作精神。
decision: 应学习狼的团队合作精神，注重团队协作，并欣赏团队成员的优点。同时，将竞争对手视为帮助自己发现弱点的贵人，并心存感激。
rationale: 团队合作能够发挥集体的力量，弥补个体不足。欣赏他人长处有助于团队融合。感谢对手则能促进自我提升和成长。
title_en: Teamwork Spirit and Appreciating Strengths
scenario_en: In daily work and team collaboration, especially as an enterprise manager, it is necessary to cultivate and demonstrate a spirit of cooperation.
decision_en: Learn the wolf's team cooperation spirit, focus on teamwork, and appreciate the strengths of team members. At the same time, view competitors as valuable people who help discover weaknesses, and be grateful.

title: 保持创新心态，紧跟时代发展
scenario: 在竞争激烈且快速变化的商业环境中，员工需要保持敏锐的市场洞察力。
decision: 员工应持续关注新闻、广告及反映社会和市场情况的节目，避免与社会脱节，并向成功者学习。
rationale: 世界唯一不变的就是变化，只有不断创新和学习，才能适应市场，保持竞争力。
title_en: Maintain an Innovative Mindset, Keep Up with the Times
scenario_en: In a competitive and rapidly changing business environment, employees need to maintain keen market insight.
decision_en: Employees should continuously follow news, advertisements, and programs reflecting social and market conditions to avoid being out of touch with society, and learn from successful individuals.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 感恩的心态：表达感激与行动
scenario: 在公司内部、团队协作以及个人事业发展中，需要培养和展现积极的感恩心态。
decision: 要多讲感恩的话，并在日常行动中体现感恩之情。这包括感谢公司提供的机会、感谢引荐人、感谢父母、感谢上级、感谢其他团队，甚至感谢批评者。
rationale: 感恩的心态有助于营造和谐的营销环境，带来奋斗中的快乐和成功时的喜悦。通过言行表达感恩，能促进团队合作，维护公司形象，并激励个人成长。
title_en: Gratitude Mindset: Expressing Thanks and Taking Action
scenario_en: Within the company, in team collaboration, and in personal career development, it is necessary to cultivate and demonstrate a positive mindset of gratitude.
decision_en: Speak words of gratitude often and demonstrate gratitude in daily actions. This includes thanking the company for opportunities, thanking referrers, parents, superiors, other teams, and even critics.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语
scenario: 当演示或培训结束时。
decision: 以感谢语结束。
rationale: 表示礼貌和对观众的尊重。
title_en: Closing Remarks
scenario_en: When a presentation or training session concludes.
decision_en: End with words of thanks.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 培训师职业生涯规划步骤与原则
scenario: 当培训师需要规划其职业生涯时。
decision: 应遵循“以始为终”的原则，并按确定目标、做SWOT分析、制定行动计划、养成习惯的步骤进行。
rationale: “以始为终”的原则有助于明确方向，而SWOT分析和行动计划则提供了实现目标的具体路径，养成习惯是持续发展的基础。
title_en: Trainer Career Planning Steps and Principles
scenario_en: When a trainer needs to plan their career.
decision_en: Follow the principle of 'begin with the end in mind' and proceed with the steps of setting goals, conducting a SWOT analysis, developing an action plan, and forming habits.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 缓解新手上路时的紧张情绪
scenario: 当客服人员，特别是新手，在面对客户服务时感到紧张和不安。
decision: 识别并理解导致紧张的常见原因，例如缺乏准备、经验不足、害怕失败或渴望表现出色。
rationale: 理解紧张情绪的根源是有效缓解和管理这些情绪的第一步，有助于客服人员更好地应对工作挑战。
title_en: Alleviating Nervousness for Newcomers
scenario_en: When customer service personnel, especially newcomers, feel nervous and uneasy when facing customer service.
decision_en: Identify and understand common causes of nervousness, such as lack of preparation, inexperience, fear of failure, or desire to perform well.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 缓解紧张情绪的适得其反工具与有效策略
scenario: 当演讲者或培训师感到紧张时，尤其是在新手上路的情况下。
decision: 避免使用纸张、水杯、镭射笔等可能适得其反的工具。应充分准备，获得学员支持，保证充足睡眠，并使用良好专业的开场白。在辅助器材使用上，多与支持者眼神交流，并与学员互动。
rationale: 某些工具在紧张时可能分散注意力或显得不专业，而充分准备、休息和积极互动能有效缓解紧张情绪并建立良好氛围。
title_en: Counterproductive Tools and Effective Strategies for Relieving Nervousness
scenario_en: When a speaker or trainer feels nervous, especially when starting out.
decision_en: Avoid using potentially counterproductive tools such as paper, water cups, or laser pointers. Instead, prepare thoroughly, gain audience support, ensure adequate sleep, and use a good, professional opening. When using auxiliary equipment, make eye contact with supporters and interact with the audience.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何表现出自信：投入、忘我、控制身体、回忆最佳表现
scenario: 当需要表现出自信时，例如在与客户沟通或进行演示时。
decision: 应投入、忘我，控制身体姿态，并回忆自己做得最好的部分以增强自信。
rationale: 这些行为和心理策略有助于提升个人自信，避免表现出不雅姿势、没有精神或不恰当的肢体语言。
title_en: How to Show Confidence: Engagement, Selflessness, Body Control, Recalling Best Performance
scenario_en: When needing to demonstrate confidence, such as during customer communication or a presentation.
decision_en: Engage, be selfless, control body posture, and recall your best performances to boost confidence.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 有效开场白的目的
scenario: 当需要进行一次有效的沟通开场时，例如在培训或客户服务互动中。
decision: 开场白应旨在暖场、建立亲和力、进行个人简介、营造氛围并引发对方兴趣。
rationale: 有效的开场白能够为后续的沟通奠定良好基础，帮助建立连接并吸引听众注意力。
title_en: Purpose of an Effective Opening
scenario_en: When needing to make an effective communication opening, such as in training or customer service interactions.
decision_en: The opening should aim to warm up the audience, build rapport, introduce oneself, set the atmosphere, and pique the other party's interest.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 成功开场白3要素及有效开场方法
scenario: 当需要进行一次有效的开场白时，例如在培训或演讲中。
decision: 应考虑培训师自身风格、课程内容和学员状况，并可采用引文法、提问法、利益法、故事法、数据法、案例法、游戏法等多种方法。
rationale: 有效的开场白能够吸引听众注意力，为后续内容铺垫，并根据具体情境和受众调整方法能达到最佳效果。
title_en: 3 Elements of a Successful Opening and Effective Opening Methods
scenario_en: When an effective opening is needed, such as in a training session or speech.
decision_en: Consider the trainer's style, course content, and student status. Methods like quotes, questions, benefits, stories, data, case studies, and games can be used.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 避免在开场时犯的错误
scenario: 在任何培训或演讲的开场阶段，讲师需要建立良好的第一印象并有效引导听众。
decision: 讲师应避免过于高调、表示未准备、替课、挑战学员、过度讨好、照稿宣读、忽视学员感受、缺乏激情、过度自我展示、过于娱乐化或暖场时间过长等行为。
rationale: 这些行为会迅速损害讲师的专业形象和可信度，影响学员的参与度和学习效果。
title_en: Avoiding Opening Mistakes
scenario_en: During the opening phase of any training or presentation, the instructor needs to make a good first impression and effectively guide the audience.
decision_en: Instructors should avoid being overly high-profile, appearing unprepared, substituting for another instructor, challenging students, being overly ingratiating, reading from a script, ignoring student feelings, lacking passion, excessive self-promotion, being overly entertaining, or having too long of an icebreaker.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 新手上路：有效的开场和结尾
scenario: 在进行自我介绍或任何演示之前，需要准备有效的开场和结尾。
decision: 在自我介绍前，应准备好前三问。同时，关注有效的开场和结尾。
rationale: 有效的开场和结尾能够吸引听众注意力并留下深刻印象。
title_en: Newbie Guide: Effective Openings and Closings
scenario_en: Before giving a self-introduction or any presentation, effective openings and closings need to be prepared.
decision_en: Before self-introduction, prepare the first three questions. Also, focus on effective openings and closings.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何做自我介绍：有效的开场和结尾
scenario: 当需要进行自我介绍时，尤其对于新手。
decision: 应注重有效的开场和结尾。
rationale: 有效的开场和结尾能给听众留下深刻印象，提升自我介绍的效果。
title_en: How to Introduce Yourself: Effective Openings and Closings
scenario_en: When a self-introduction is needed, especially for newcomers.
decision_en: Focus on effective openings and closings.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 培训课程结尾的作用
scenario: 在培训课程结束时，需要明确结尾的目的和作用。
decision: 培训课程的结尾应梳理学员思路、重申重点以加强记忆、了解学员反应并解疑答惑、激励学员行为改变、引入下次课程以及进行培训需求调查。
rationale: 有效的课程结尾能够巩固学习效果，促进学员理解和应用，并为未来的培训提供反馈和方向。
title_en: Purpose of Training Course Closings
scenario_en: At the end of a training course, the purpose and function of the closing need to be clarified.
decision_en: The closing of a training course should organize students' thoughts, reiterate key points to strengthen memory, understand student reactions and answer questions, motivate students to change behavior, introduce the next course, and conduct a training needs survey.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 有效的开场和结尾：结尾的方法
scenario: 当需要为演示或沟通环节设计结尾时。
decision: 可以采用首尾呼应、要点回顾、总结提炼、引经据典、小组竞赛、活动调查、故事结尾或引导号召等方法。
rationale: 这些方法旨在有效结束沟通，加深听众印象，或促使听众采取行动。
title_en: Effective Openings and Closings: Closing Methods
scenario_en: When designing a closing for a presentation or communication session.
decision_en: Methods include echoing the beginning, reviewing key points, summarizing, quoting classics, group competitions, activity surveys, story endings, or guiding calls to action.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对不合作学员：一言不发的内向或有情绪学员
scenario: 当学员性格内向、有情绪或因其他原因一言不发，表现出不合作时。
decision: 客服应适当引导，给予学员鼓励和信心，同时给予重视和关注，并适时赞赏鼓励。
rationale: 通过积极的引导、鼓励和关注，可以帮助学员克服内向或情绪问题，建立信心，从而促进其参与和合作。
title_en: Dealing with Uncooperative Students: Silent Introverted or Emotional Students
scenario_en: When students are introverted, emotional, or silent for other reasons, showing uncooperative behavior.
decision_en: Customer service should guide appropriately, give students encouragement and confidence, show importance and attention, and praise and encourage them at the right time.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对滔滔不绝的学员：认可观点并适时打断
scenario: 当遇到一位表达欲强、滔滔不绝的学员时。
decision: 首先要清楚并认可其观点，然后在适当的时机进行打断，并使用封闭式问题引导其回答。
rationale: 认可学员观点能体现尊重，适时打断和封闭式问题有助于控制讨论方向，确保课堂效率。
title_en: Dealing with Talkative Students: Acknowledge Views and Interrupt Appropriately
scenario_en: When encountering a student who is eager to express themselves and talks incessantly.
decision_en: First, understand and acknowledge their viewpoint, then interrupt at an appropriate time, and use closed-ended questions to guide their answer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对窃窃私语学员的策略
scenario: 当培训师在课堂上遇到有学员窃窃私语，影响课堂秩序时。
decision: 培训师可以采用整体性提问、针对性提问、直接对说话者提问（注意措辞）、或运用声技、身技、眼技、口技等多种方式进行提醒和引导。
rationale: 通过多种非直接或直接的沟通技巧，旨在不让学员失面子的前提下，有效管理课堂纪律，确保教学顺利进行。
title_en: Strategies for Dealing with Whispering Students
scenario_en: When a trainer encounters students whispering in class, affecting classroom order.
decision_en: The trainer can use general questions, targeted questions, direct questions to the speaker (with careful wording), or various techniques such as voice, body language, eye contact, and verbal cues to remind and guide them.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理课堂上争论不休的学员
scenario: 当课堂上有学员对某个观点争论不休，不服从多数意见时。
decision: 首先肯定双方观点，对新颖的给予肯定，对不可取的赞赏其积极性和态度。然后请全体学员举手表决，对不服气的一方给予安抚，并说明可以结束后继续讨论。
rationale: 通过肯定双方观点来尊重学员的参与，通过举手表决来达成共识，并通过安抚和后续讨论的承诺来缓解不满情绪，维持课堂秩序。
title_en: Handling Students Arguing in Class
scenario_en: When students in class argue incessantly about a point and do not conform to the majority opinion.
decision_en: First, affirm both viewpoints, praise novel ones, and commend the positive attitude of less viable ones. Then, ask all students to vote by a show of hands, appease the dissatisfied party, and explain that discussions can continue after class.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 应对不合作学员的沟通策略
scenario: 当学员表现出离题或自以为是的行为时，客服人员需要采取特定的沟通策略。
decision: 对于离题的学员，先肯定其发言，再进行纠正和引导。对于自以为是的学员，则需要同时给予肯定和适度的纠正。
rationale: 通过肯定学员的发言，可以建立积极的沟通氛围，减少学员的抵触情绪，从而更容易引导其回到正轨或接受建议。
title_en: Communication Strategies for Uncooperative Students
scenario_en: When students exhibit off-topic or self-important behavior, customer service personnel need to adopt specific communication strategies.
decision_en: For off-topic students, first affirm their发言, then correct and guide them. For self-important students, provide both affirmation and appropriate correction.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理学员无法回答的问题
scenario: 当学员提出问题，而培训师无法直接回答时。
decision: 可以采用“踢球法”将问题抛给其他学员；“照镜法”将问题抛回给提问者；“切西瓜法”暂缓回答并转移注意力；或“讨论法”引导集体讨论。
rationale: 这些方法旨在有效管理课堂互动，鼓励学员参与，并在培训师知识范围之外时提供解决方案。
title_en: Handling Unanswerable Student Questions
scenario_en: When a student asks a question that the trainer cannot directly answer.
decision_en: Methods include 'kicking the ball' to other students; 'mirroring' the question back to the asker; 'slicing the watermelon' to defer the answer and shift attention; or 'discussion method' to guide group discussion.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 内部讲师的成长
scenario: This section introduces the topic of growth for internal trainers.
decision: Focus on the development and growth of internal trainers within the organization.
rationale: To ensure continuous improvement and effectiveness of the internal training program.
title_en: Growth of Internal Trainers
scenario_en: This section introduces the topic of growth for internal trainers.
decision_en: Focus on the development and growth of internal trainers within the organization.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何引发学员积极性：新鲜、热点、参与性话题的选择与运用
scenario: 当内部讲师需要提升学员的积极性和参与度时。
decision: 选择新鲜、热点且能引发学员参与的话题。新鲜话题要出人意料且确保最新，最终需回归主题；热点话题要能影响全面并考虑学员关注点；参与性话题最好没有标准答案，并对每个参与者给予积极鼓励。
rationale: 通过选择有吸引力且互动性强的话题，可以有效激发学员的兴趣和积极性，提升培训效果。
title_en: How to Engage Students: Selecting and Using Fresh, Trending, and Participatory Topics
scenario_en: When internal instructors need to boost student engagement and participation.
decision_en: Choose fresh, trending, and participatory topics. Fresh topics should be unexpected and current, ultimately returning to the main theme; trending topics should have broad impact and consider student interests; participatory topics ideally have no standard answer, and every participant should be actively encouraged.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何引发学员积极性：熟悉、争论、翻新话题的关键点
scenario: 当内部讲师需要引发学员的积极性时。
decision: 讲师应选择学员熟悉的话题，同时紧扣主题和内容；对于争论的话题，要确保与主题和内容紧密相关；对于翻新的话题，则需要有独到的见解。
rationale: 通过选择不同类型的话题并运用相应的策略，可以有效激发学员的参与度和学习兴趣。
title_en: How to Engage Students: Key Points for Familiar, Debatable, and Refreshed Topics
scenario_en: When internal instructors need to engage students.
decision_en: Instructors should choose topics familiar to students, while staying close to the theme and content; for debatable topics, ensure they are closely related to the theme and content; for refreshed topics, unique insights are required.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何激励学员：内部讲师的成长与激励
scenario: 当需要激励内部讲师或学员时。
decision: 通过荣誉、数据、目标、奖惩、参与和竞争等多种方式来激励学员和内部讲师。
rationale: 多维度激励机制能有效提升学员参与度和讲师积极性，促进内部讲师的成长。
title_en: How to Motivate Students: Growth and Motivation for Internal Trainers
scenario_en: When there is a need to motivate internal trainers or students.
decision_en: Motivate students and internal trainers through various methods such as honor, data, goals, rewards and punishments, participation, and competition.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何控制培训时间
scenario: 当内部讲师需要有效管理培训课程时间时。
decision: 讲师应充分准备，明确重点和次要内容，分解目标分段控制，分模块控制时间，并调整授课方式，例如减少分享人数或时间，或改变分享方式。
rationale: 通过这些方法，可以更有效地利用培训时间，确保关键信息被传达，并提高培训效率。
title_en: How to Control Training Time
scenario_en: When internal instructors need to effectively manage training course time.
decision_en: Instructors should be fully prepared, clarify key and secondary content, break down goals for segmented control, control time by module, and adjust teaching methods, such as reducing the number or time of shares, or changing sharing methods.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何应对资深学员：借力公司与学员，激发学习动机
scenario: 当内部讲师面对比自己资深的学员时，需要有效管理课堂并激发学员的学习积极性。
decision: 讲师应利用公司的资源（如高层讲话）和学员自身的经验（如分组交流、案例分析）来细化需求、了解学员情况并激励他们。
rationale: 通过多方面借力，可以有效提升资深学员的学习动机和参与度，弥补讲师在经验上的相对不足。
title_en: How to Deal with Senior Students: Leverage Company and Students, Inspire Learning Motivation
scenario_en: When an internal instructor faces students more senior than themselves, they need to effectively manage the classroom and inspire students' learning motivation.
decision_en: Instructors should utilize company resources (e.g., senior management speeches) and students' own experiences (e.g., group discussions, case studies) to refine needs, understand student situations, and motivate them.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 提升专业度的途径
scenario: When seeking to enhance professional skills and knowledge as an internal instructor or customer service agent.
decision: Utilize methods such as benchmarking, PDCA cycle, frontline shadowing, daily learning, online courses, learning from customers, expanding work scope, gaining experience through practice, self-reflection, and specialized research.
rationale: These diverse approaches contribute to continuous professional development and specialization.
title_en: Ways to Improve Professionalism
scenario_en: When seeking to enhance professional skills and knowledge as an internal instructor or customer service agent.
decision_en: Utilize methods such as benchmarking, PDCA cycle, frontline shadowing, daily learning, online courses, learning from customers, expanding work scope, gaining experience through practice, self-reflection, and specialized research.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 提升专业度的关键：多做、多学、超越期望、帮助他人
scenario: 当员工希望提升自己的专业能力和职业发展时。
decision: 员工应该多做多学，超越老板的期望和工作要求，并积极帮助他人。
rationale: 通过实践、学习、超出预期和互助，可以促进个人成长和专业技能的提升。
title_en: Keys to Professional Development: Do More, Learn More, Exceed Expectations, Help Others
scenario_en: When employees want to improve their professional abilities and career development.
decision_en: Employees should do and learn more, exceed their boss's expectations and job requirements, and actively help others.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 课程开发
scenario: This chunk is a high-level heading from a course material.
decision: No specific action is detailed in this chunk.
rationale: This chunk serves as a section title, indicating the topic of 'Course Development' within a larger 'Transformation' theme.
title_en: Course Development
scenario_en: This chunk is a high-level heading from a course material.
decision_en: No specific action is detailed in this chunk.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 问题树课程开发模式
scenario: 当需要为企业解决问题并开发相关课程时，可以采用问题树课程开发模式。
decision: 问题树课程开发模式是一种用树形图结合分析、改善的方法和工具来解决企业问题的课程开发模型。其开发步骤包括需求问题诊断和调研、重点提炼与汇总、以及课程开发与编制。
rationale: 该模式旨在通过结构化的方法，系统地识别、分析并解决企业面临的问题，从而开发出有针对性的课程。
title_en: Problem Tree Course Development Model
scenario_en: When needing to solve problems for an enterprise and develop relevant courses, the problem tree course development model can be adopted.
decision_en: The problem tree course development model is a course development model that uses a tree diagram combined with analysis and improvement methods and tools to solve enterprise problems. Its development steps include demand problem diagnosis and research, key refinement and summary, and course development and compilation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 培训需求诊断的四种访谈方式及其优缺点
scenario: 当需要诊断培训需求时，可以采用现场访谈、问卷调查、电话访谈或网络访谈这四种方式。
decision: 根据具体情况选择合适的访谈方式。现场访谈直接但耗时，问卷调查范围广但真实性可能差，电话访谈和网络访谈快捷但样本可能较小且真实性有待考证。
rationale: 不同的访谈方式各有其“利”与“弊”，理解这些特点有助于选择最有效的诊断方法。
title_en: Four Interview Methods for Training Needs Diagnosis and Their Pros and Cons
scenario_en: When diagnosing training needs, four methods can be used: in-person interviews, questionnaires, phone interviews, or online interviews.
decision_en: Choose the appropriate interview method based on the specific situation. In-person interviews are direct but time-consuming; questionnaires have a wide reach but may lack authenticity; phone and online interviews are quick but may have small sample sizes and questionable authenticity.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 识别培训需求的方法
scenario: 当需要识别内部讲师的培训需求时。
decision: 可以采用面谈沟通法、行为观察法、数据分析法、问卷调查法、小组讨论法、测试评估法或自我分析法来识别培训需求。
rationale: 这些方法是识别培训需求的常用且有效的方式，有助于了解现状与要求之间的差距。
title_en: Methods for Identifying Training Needs
scenario_en: When needing to identify the training needs of internal trainers.
decision_en: Training needs can be identified using methods such as face-to-face communication, behavioral observation, data analysis, questionnaires, group discussions, test evaluations, or self-analysis.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 课程开发前5问：内部讲师培训课程设计要点
scenario: 在开发内部讲师培训课程之前
decision: 需要考虑五个核心问题：培训背景、培训学员、培训目标、培训内容和培训方式。
rationale: 这些问题是课程设计的基础，确保培训的有效性和针对性。
title_en: 5 Questions Before Course Development: Key Design Points for Internal Trainer Training Courses
scenario_en: Before developing internal trainer training courses
decision_en: Five core questions need to be considered: training background, trainees, training objectives, training content, and training methods.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 如何找出培训需求问题关键
scenario: When identifying key training needs and problems.
decision: Utilize methods such as stratification, fishbone diagrams, and the 'peeling the onion' technique to determine the core issues.
rationale: These methods help in systematically breaking down and analyzing problems to identify their root causes and key aspects.
title_en: How to Identify Key Training Needs
scenario_en: When identifying key training needs and problems.
decision_en: Utilize methods such as stratification, fishbone diagrams, and the 'peeling the onion' technique to determine the core issues.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 课前调查问卷的设计要求及作用
scenario: 在设计内部讲师培训的课前调查问卷时
decision: 问卷应旨在了解学员基础、起点，确定适合的表达方式和授课方式，明确学员痛点以对症下药，澄清概念，确定授课重点，并提炼相关案例。
rationale: 通过课前问卷可以全面了解学员需求和背景，从而优化课程设计和教学方法，提高培训效果。
title_en: Design Requirements and Role of Pre-Course Questionnaires
scenario_en: When designing a pre-course questionnaire for internal trainer training
decision_en: The questionnaire should aim to understand trainees' foundation and starting point, determine suitable expression and teaching methods, identify trainee pain points for targeted solutions, clarify concepts, define teaching重點 (key points), and extract relevant case studies.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 问卷设计原则与组成
scenario: 当需要设计一份问卷时
decision: 问卷应包含标题、前言、主体和结束语。设计时需遵循通俗易懂、简洁明了、便于填写和方便统计的原则，并运用针对性、逻辑性和避谎性的提问技巧。
rationale: 清晰的问卷结构和合理的设计原则有助于提高问卷的有效性和数据收集的效率。
title_en: Questionnaire Design Principles and Components
scenario_en: When needing to design a questionnaire
decision_en: A questionnaire should include a title, introduction, main body, and conclusion. When designing, follow principles of being easy to understand, concise, easy to fill out, and convenient for statistics, and use questioning techniques that are targeted, logical, and avoid deception.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 课程设计与案例提炼方法
scenario: 本节描述了内部讲师在设计课程和提炼案例时可以采用的方法和来源。
decision: 在课程设计中，可以直接运用调查问卷的开放问题，设计场景与实例，并进行提炼升华。案例来源包括问卷、企业内部、生活、个人经历、书籍、网络、影视、同行交流和视频学习。
rationale: 通过多样化的案例来源和提炼方法，可以丰富课程内容，使其更具说服力和实用性，从而提升内部讲师的教学效果。
title_en: Course Design and Case Study Extraction Methods
scenario_en: This section describes methods and sources that internal trainers can use when designing courses and extracting case studies.
decision_en: In course design, open-ended questions from questionnaires can be directly used, scenarios and examples can be designed, and then refined and elevated. Case study sources include questionnaires, internal company data, daily life, personal experiences, books, the internet, film and television, peer exchanges, and video learning.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 课程内容编排的工作流程
scenario: 当需要编排课程内容时，应遵循特定的工作流程。
decision: 课程内容的编排应按照市场和产品类型进行，并遵循从浅到深、从易到难的知识系统编排原则。
rationale: 这种编排方式有助于学员逐步掌握知识，提高学习效率和效果。
title_en: Course Content Arrangement Workflow
scenario_en: When needing to arrange course content, a specific workflow should be followed.
decision_en: Course content arrangement should be based on market and product types, and follow the principle of knowledge system arrangement from shallow to deep, and from easy to difficult.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 内部讲师授课方式选择
scenario: 本内容适用于内部讲师在选择授课方式时。
decision: 内部讲师可以选择演讲/演说法、案例分析法、小组讨论法、示范法、角色扮演法、竞赛法或体验式培训法等多种授课方式。
rationale: 提供多种授课方式选择，以适应不同的培训内容和学习目标，促进内部讲师的成长和培训效果。
title_en: Internal Trainer Teaching Method Selection
scenario_en: This content is applicable to internal trainers when selecting teaching methods.
decision_en: Internal trainers can choose from various teaching methods such as lecture/presentation, case study analysis, group discussion, demonstration, role-playing, competition, or experiential training.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 职业培训师之旅
scenario: This chunk is a title slide indicating the start of a section on professional development.
decision: This section introduces the journey of becoming a professional trainer.
rationale: It serves as an introductory slide for a new module or topic within the training material.
title_en: Journey of a Professional Trainer
scenario_en: This chunk is a title slide indicating the start of a section on professional development.
decision_en: This section introduces the journey of becoming a professional trainer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 内部培训师与职业培训师的区别及职业化路径
scenario: 当需要理解内部培训师和职业培训师的角色差异，并规划个人职业发展时。
decision: 内部培训师在熟悉的企业环境中，内容较全面，挑战在于不同领域课程开发，关键技能是人际关系和授课技能。职业培训师在陌生企业环境，内容较专业，挑战在于自我营销，关键技能是需求诊断、课程开发和授课技能。要实现职业化，需规划路线、审视能力、积累经验。
rationale: 明确两类培训师的特点有助于个人定位和能力发展，从而更好地规划职业生涯。
title_en: Differences Between Internal and Professional Trainers and Professional Development Path
scenario_en: When needing to understand the role differences between internal and professional trainers and plan personal career development.
decision_en: Internal trainers operate in a familiar corporate environment, with comprehensive content, challenges in developing courses across different fields, and key skills in interpersonal relations and teaching. Professional trainers operate in unfamiliar corporate environments, with specialized content, challenges in self-marketing, and key skills in needs diagnosis, course development, and teaching. To achieve professionalization, one needs to plan a route, assess capabilities, and accumulate experience.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 培训师的成长线路：自我认识与修炼
scenario: 本内容适用于希望成为职业培训师或提升培训师能力的人员。
decision: 培训师应通过SWOT分析进行自我认识，明确自身定位，并持续修炼专业知识、技能、责任感、职业道德、销售与自我营销技巧、心理承受度以及行业必备技能。
rationale: 明确的自我定位和持续的能力提升是成为一名优秀职业培训师的基础。
title_en: Trainer Growth Path: Self-Awareness and Cultivation
scenario_en: This content is suitable for individuals who wish to become professional trainers or enhance their trainer capabilities.
decision_en: Trainers should conduct a SWOT analysis for self-awareness, clarify their positioning, and continuously cultivate professional knowledge, skills, sense of responsibility, professional ethics, sales and self-marketing techniques, psychological resilience, and essential industry skills.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语与感谢
scenario: 当文档或演示文稿结束时。
decision: 以祝愿成功和感谢的方式结束。
rationale: 这是标准的礼仪性结束语，表达对听众的良好祝愿和对他们时间的感谢。
title_en: Conclusion and Thanks
scenario_en: When a document or presentation concludes.
decision_en: Conclude with wishes for success and gratitude.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服与客服主管职责概述
scenario: 此内容为2018年关于客服和客服主管职责的概述性介绍。
decision: 此条目不包含具体的决策或规则，仅为主题介绍。
rationale: 作为知识库的起始点，需要记录文档的标题和年份。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Overview of Customer Service and Customer Service Supervisor Responsibilities
scenario_en: This content is a general introduction to the responsibilities of customer service and customer service supervisors in 2018.
decision_en: This entry does not contain specific decisions or rules, only an introduction to the topic.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 金牌客服团队的绩效、晋升与双十一大促准备
scenario: 本内容概述了金牌客服团队建设的关键要素，包括绩效管理、职业晋升以及大型促销活动前的准备工作。
decision: 客服团队应关注绩效考核、建立明确的晋升路径，并为如双十一等大型促销活动做好充分准备。
rationale: 这些是打造高效、专业金牌客服团队的基础，旨在提升客户满意度和应对业务高峰。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Elite Customer Service Team: Performance, Promotion, and Double Eleven Preparation
scenario_en: This content outlines key elements for building an elite customer service team, including performance management, career progression, and preparation for major promotional events.
decision_en: Customer service teams should focus on performance appraisal, establish clear promotion paths, and thoroughly prepare for major promotional events like Double Eleven.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 金牌客服的沟通技巧：提升客户购物体验与处理过失
scenario: 当客服与客户沟通时，旨在提供良好的购物体验或处理公司过失时。
decision: 客服应思考使用何种语言和方式，才能有效提升客户的购物体验，并获得客户对公司过失的谅解。
rationale: 有效的沟通是金牌客服的关键，它直接影响客户满意度和对品牌的忠诚度。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Elite Customer Service Communication Skills: Enhancing Customer Shopping Experience and Handling Mistakes
scenario_en: When customer service communicates with customers, aiming to provide a good shopping experience or address company mistakes.
decision_en: Customer service should consider what language and methods to use to effectively enhance the customer's shopping experience and gain customer understanding for company mistakes.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 售前客服接待七步曲：快速响应与高效成交
scenario: 当顾客通过手淘购物，购物时间短、浏览耐心低、决策速度快时，售前客服需要高效接待。
decision: 客服必须在最短的时间内提供顾客所需信息，留住顾客并促成交易，遵循“售前客服接待七步曲”流程。
rationale: 手淘购物行为的改变要求客服必须快速响应，高效引导，以适应顾客的购物习惯并提高成交率。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Seven Steps for Pre-Sales Customer Service Reception: Quick Response and Efficient Transactions
scenario_en: When customers shop on Taobao, with short shopping times, low browsing patience, and quick decision-making, pre-sales customer service needs efficient reception.
decision_en: Customer service must provide customers with the required information in the shortest possible time, retain customers, and facilitate transactions, following the 'Seven Steps for Pre-Sales Customer Service Reception' process.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户分析：识别客户属性、需求和偏好
scenario: 在进行客户分析时，需要全面了解客户信息。
decision: 分析客户的职业、性别、年龄、个性、地区等基本属性，以及淘气值、消费金额、下单时间、消费频率、回购情况、分享传播等行为偏好。同时，要深入理解客户的需求，包括他们在什么环境下使用产品以及他们可能存在的疑虑。
rationale: 全面了解客户是谁、他们需要什么以及他们的偏好，有助于更好地服务客户并优化产品或服务。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Analysis: Identifying Customer Attributes, Needs, and Preferences
scenario_en: When conducting customer analysis, it is necessary to comprehensively understand customer information.
decision_en: Analyze basic customer attributes such as occupation, gender, age, personality, and region, as well as behavioral preferences like Taobao activity score, spending amount, order time, purchase frequency, repurchase status, and sharing/spreading. Simultaneously, deeply understand customer needs, including the environment in which they use products and any potential concerns they may have.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 探测需求技巧：普通客服与优秀客服的对比
scenario: 当买家表达购买意向并寻求推荐时，客服需要了解买家的具体需求。
decision: 普通客服直接发送链接，而优秀客服会通过提问（如年龄、风格、面料、款式要求）来深入了解买家需求，然后进行精准推荐。
rationale: 通过主动提问和深入了解买家需求，可以提供更符合买家偏好的产品，从而提高客户满意度和购买转化率。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Demand Probing Skills: Ordinary vs. Excellent Customer Service
scenario_en: When a buyer expresses purchase intent and seeks recommendations, customer service needs to understand the buyer's specific needs.
decision_en: An ordinary customer service agent directly sends links, while an excellent agent asks questions (e.g., age, style, fabric, design requirements) to deeply understand the buyer's needs, then provides precise recommendations.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 探测需求技巧：通过提问了解客户肤质和需求
scenario: 当买家询问哪款面膜好用时，客服需要推荐合适的产品。
decision: 优秀客服会通过提问了解买家的肤质和想改善的问题，例如“请问亲亲的肤质是什么样的？想改善皮肤的什么问题呢？”。然后根据买家的具体情况（如对精油过敏、晒黑、皮肤油）推荐针对性的产品（如茶爽冰膜）。
rationale: 直接推荐产品可能不符合买家需求，导致推荐失败。通过提问探测需求，可以更精准地匹配产品，提高推荐成功率和客户满意度。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Demand Probing Skills: Understanding Skin Type and Needs Through Questions
scenario_en: When a buyer asks which face mask is good, customer service needs to recommend a suitable product.
decision_en: An excellent customer service agent asks questions to understand the buyer's skin type and desired improvements, such as 'What is your skin type? What skin problems would you like to improve?' Then, based on the buyer's specific situation (e.g., allergic to essential oils, sunburned, oily skin), they recommend targeted products (e.g., Tea Refreshing Ice Mask).

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 刺激动机，迂回议价促单
scenario: 当需要刺激买家转化并促成订单时。
decision: 通过价格刺激、情感共鸣、价值放大、有条件让步、搭配优惠、条件吸引、紧迫感和消费引导等方式，激发买家内在动机，解决异议。
rationale: 通过多方面策略刺激买家动机，可以有效促成订单转化。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Stimulate Motivation, Indirect Bargaining to Close Deals
scenario_en: When needing to stimulate buyer conversion and close orders.
decision_en: Inspire buyers' intrinsic motivation and resolve objections through price incentives, emotional resonance, value amplification, conditional concessions, bundled offers, attractive conditions, urgency, and consumption guidance.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 案例一：推荐合适商品 - 客户送礼场景下的商品推荐
scenario: 客户询问送礼商品推荐，明确了收礼人（新生儿女孩）和送礼目的。
decision: 客服推荐了单一商品，并强调了商品质量、独家代理、新生儿必需品和通用性。
rationale: 案例中客服未能与客户在情感上产生共鸣，客户关注送礼的“面子”和“性价比”，而客服仅强调了产品本身的优势，导致客户不满意并表示会去实体店查看。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Case Study 1: Recommending Suitable Products - Gift Scenario
scenario_en: A customer asks for gift recommendations, specifying the recipient (newborn girl) and the purpose of the gift.
decision_en: Customer service recommended a single product, emphasizing its quality, exclusive agency, necessity for newborns, and versatility.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客户尺码或颜色缺货时的销售引导与疑虑处理
scenario: 当客户询问的商品颜色或尺码缺货时，或客户对尺码选择有疑虑时。
decision: 客服应主动推荐相似款，并引导客户关注版型和颜色，同时提供尺码选择建议，并强调退换货政策和运费险，以促成购买。对于客户对尺码的疑虑，应直接提供专业建议，而非辩解。
rationale: 通过主动推荐和解决客户疑虑，可以挽留潜在客户，提高转化率。直接解决客户核心问题比辩解更有效。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Sales Guidance and Doubt Resolution for Out-of-Stock Sizes/Colors or Size Concerns
scenario_en: When a customer's requested product color or size is out of stock, or the customer has doubts about size selection.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively recommend similar styles, guide customers to consider fit and color, provide size selection advice, and emphasize return/exchange policies and shipping insurance to encourage purchase. For size concerns, provide professional advice directly instead of debating.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 处理买家对价格的疑虑并挽留客户
scenario: 当买家表示“再看看”或“去别家对比下”，暗示对价格有疑虑时。
decision: 客服应主动提问，找出买家真实疑虑，并强调产品的性价比、服务优势（如7天无理由退换），同时保持热情和专业，邀请客户再次咨询并收藏店铺。
rationale: 通过主动沟通，可以了解客户的真实顾虑，并针对性地解决异议，通过强调产品质量、服务保障和性价比，增加客户的信任感和购买意愿，同时通过热情和专业加深客户印象，促成未来的交易。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Addressing Buyer Price Concerns and Retaining Customers
scenario_en: When a buyer says 'I'll look around' or 'I'll compare with other stores,' implying price concerns.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively ask questions to uncover the buyer's true concerns, emphasize product value for money and service advantages (e.g., 7-day no-reason return), maintain enthusiasm and professionalism, and invite the customer to inquire again and favorite the store.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 售前销售技巧：挖掘需求、传递优势、引导下单与实时催付
scenario: 在售前与客户沟通时，为了提升销售转化率和客户满意度。
decision: 客服应挖掘客户信息以精准需求，积极传递产品优势并有效包装，主动引导客户下单刺激消费，并实时催付以提升转化。
rationale: 通过系统化的售前销售技巧，可以更好地理解客户需求，突出产品价值，促成交易并提高销售效率。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Pre-sales Skills: Demand Discovery, Advantage Communication, Order Guidance & Real-time Payment Nudging
scenario_en: When communicating with customers pre-sales to improve sales conversion and customer satisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service should discover customer information for precise needs, actively communicate and effectively package product advantages, proactively guide customers to place orders to stimulate consumption, and nudge for real-time payment to boost conversion.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 售后维护与沟通要点
scenario: This section introduces key points for after-sales maintenance and communication.
decision: Focus on the key aspects of after-sales service and customer communication.
rationale: To ensure effective and satisfactory customer interactions post-purchase.
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: After-sales Maintenance and Communication Key Points
scenario_en: This section introduces key points for after-sales maintenance and communication.
decision_en: Focus on the key aspects of after-sales service and customer communication.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 常见售后问题分类
scenario: 当客户提出售后问题时，需要对问题进行分类。
decision: 售后问题可分为产品问题、买家原因、快递问题、客服问题、仓储问题。
rationale: 对售后问题进行分类有助于更高效地处理和解决问题。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Common After-sales Problem Categories
scenario_en: When a customer raises an after-sales issue, the issue needs to be categorized.
decision_en: After-sales problems can be categorized into product issues, buyer reasons, shipping issues, customer service issues, and warehousing issues.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服话术：问候、转接、催促安抚与议价策略
scenario: 当客服与买家进行沟通时，涉及问候、转接、催促安抚或议价等不同情境。
decision: 客服应使用个性化问候语并告知优惠；转接时需致歉并说明专业售后能有效解决；安抚买家时需换位思考，告知发货安排并优先处理；议价时应强调产品品质和服务，并告知活动优惠，避免使用生硬的拒绝词。
rationale: 个性化问候和优惠信息能创造差异化并吸引买家；平滑的转接能避免加重售后纠纷；换位思考和明确的解决方案能有效安抚买家；强调品质和服务及活动优惠能有效应对议价，同时维护品牌形象。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Scripts: Greetings, Transfers, Urging/Comforting & Bargaining Strategies
scenario_en: When customer service communicates with buyers, involving different scenarios such as greetings, transfers, urging/comforting, or bargaining.
decision_en: Customer service should use personalized greetings and inform about discounts; when transferring, apologize and explain that professional after-sales can effectively resolve the issue; when comforting buyers, empathize, inform about shipping arrangements, and prioritize handling; when bargaining, emphasize product quality and service, and inform about promotional offers, avoiding blunt rejections.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服主管的四项核心职责：培训、报表、检查、优化
scenario: 客服主管日常管理和运营客服团队时。
decision: 客服主管应专注于搭建内部培训体系、分析各类报表、检查工作流程和话术执行情况，并持续优化话术和售前售后流程。
rationale: 通过这四项核心工作，可以确保客服团队的专业能力、工作效率和服务质量，从而提升客户满意度和业务绩效。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Four Core Responsibilities of a Customer Service Supervisor: Training, Reporting, Inspection, Optimization
scenario_en: When a customer service supervisor manages and operates the customer service team daily.
decision_en: The customer service supervisor should focus on building an internal training system, analyzing various reports, inspecting work processes and script execution, and continuously optimizing scripts and pre-sales/after-sales processes.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服团队绩效与晋升机制的重要性
scenario: 在构建精简高效的客服团队时
decision: 合理的绩效考核和晋升机制是至关重要的。
rationale: 绩效考核和晋升机制是打造精简高效客服团队的关键因素。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Importance of Customer Service Team Performance and Promotion Mechanism
scenario_en: When building a lean and efficient customer service team.
decision_en: A reasonable performance appraisal and promotion mechanism are crucial.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服团队目标与奖罚机制
scenario: 本政策适用于客服团队的绩效管理和奖罚机制。
decision: 客服团队的目标是提升团队业绩和服务质量，并通过店铺管理和人员管理来实施奖罚。售后客服的目标是高效处理售后问题和减少投诉差评，奖罚基于有效解决量、好评、客户投诉和处理不当。
rationale: 通过明确目标和奖罚机制，激励客服团队提升服务质量和工作效率，从而提高客户满意度和减少负面反馈。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Team Goals and Reward/Penalty Mechanism
scenario_en: This policy applies to the performance management and reward/penalty mechanism for the customer service team.
decision_en: The customer service team's goal is to improve team performance and service quality, implementing rewards and penalties through store management and personnel management. After-sales customer service aims to efficiently handle after-sales issues and reduce complaints/negative reviews, with rewards/penalties based on effective resolution volume, positive reviews, customer complaints, and improper handling.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服绩效考核：执行力、考勤管理与团队协作
scenario: 本规则适用于客服人员的日常工作表现评估，涵盖执行力、考勤和团队协作三个方面。
decision: 客服人员需遵守公司规章制度，按时按质完成工作任务，服从上级安排。考勤方面，需遵守上下班时间，并确保在线时长。团队协作方面，需与同事良好配合，清晰交接工作。
rationale: 通过明确的绩效考核标准，确保客服团队高效运作，提升服务质量，并维护公司规章制度的严肃性。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Performance Appraisal: Execution, Attendance Management & Team Collaboration
scenario_en: This rule applies to the daily work performance evaluation of customer service personnel, covering execution, attendance, and team collaboration.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must comply with company rules and regulations, complete work tasks on time and with quality, and obey superior arrangements. For attendance, they must adhere to work hours and ensure online duration. For team collaboration, they must cooperate well with colleagues and clearly hand over work.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 售前客服业务能力考核明细与评分标准
scenario: 评估售前客服的业务能力和绩效表现时。
decision: 根据询单转化率、客单价、旺旺回复率、平均响应时间、销售量等指标，按照预设的评分标准进行考核。
rationale: 通过量化指标考核客服的销售引导、关联销售、响应速度和客户服务效率，以提升整体业务能力和客户满意度。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Pre-sales Customer Service Business Capability Assessment Details and Scoring Standards
scenario_en: When evaluating the business capability and performance of pre-sales customer service.
decision_en: Assess based on indicators such as inquiry conversion rate, average order value, Wangwang reply rate, average response time, and sales volume, according to preset scoring standards.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服绩效等级与提成比率
scenario: 当客服人员的月度绩效得分确定后，需要计算其提成和销售额奖励时。
decision: 根据绩效得分将客服分为四个等级（四级、三级、二级、一级），并对应不同的岗位工作提成（20-24元/分）和订单提成比率（0.5-1元/单）。此外，四级客服若月销售额超出所有被考核售前客服的平均值，每超出1000元奖励20元，但月销售额未达5万元的客服无此奖励。
rationale: 通过绩效等级和梯度提成比例，激励客服提高服务质量和销售业绩。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Performance Levels and Commission Rates
scenario_en: When a customer service agent's monthly performance score is determined, and their commission and sales bonus need to be calculated.
decision_en: Customer service agents are divided into four levels (Level 4, Level 3, Level 2, Level 1) based on performance scores, corresponding to different position commissions (20-24 yuan/point) and order commission rates (0.5-1 yuan/order). Additionally, if a Level 4 agent's monthly sales exceed the average of all assessed pre-sales agents, they receive a 20 yuan bonus for every 1000 yuan exceeded, but agents with monthly sales below 50,000 yuan are not eligible for this bonus.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服绩效考核：执行力与违规行为扣分标准
scenario: 客服在日常工作中出现不遵守公司规章制度、服务态度不佳、业务知识不熟练、未与客户约定清楚等行为时。
decision: 根据违规行为的性质和严重程度，每次扣除相应的绩效分数，从2分到4分不等。严重违规可能导致开除。
rationale: 确保客服团队遵守公司规定，提供高质量服务，避免因客服失误导致客户投诉、退款、换货及店铺损失。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Performance Appraisal: Execution and Violation Deduction Standards
scenario_en: When customer service agents exhibit behaviors such as not complying with company rules, poor service attitude, unfamiliarity with business knowledge, or failure to clearly agree with customers during daily work.
decision_en: Deduct corresponding performance points, ranging from 2 to 4 points per instance, based on the nature and severity of the violation. Serious violations may lead to dismissal.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服绩效与薪酬计算方法
scenario: 计算客服人员的月度薪酬，包括基础工资、售后提成和绩效扣款。
decision: 客服薪酬由基础工资、售后提成和绩效扣款组成。基础工资根据绩效得分和客服等级确定。售后提成来自售前客服总销售额的1.5%奖金池，扣除差评、中评罚款及安抚金额后，平均分配给售后客服。因查件不及时或反馈错误导致的差评，需从查件客服工资中扣除80元/条。中差评条数计算的是前一个月的总量。
rationale: 通过绩效得分、差评扣款和奖金池提成，激励客服提升服务质量，并对服务失误进行惩罚，确保薪酬与工作表现挂钩。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Performance and Salary Calculation Method
scenario_en: Calculating the monthly salary of customer service personnel, including base salary, after-sales commission, and performance deductions.
decision_en: Customer service salary consists of base salary, after-sales commission, and performance deductions. Base salary is determined by performance score and customer service level. After-sales commission comes from a 1.5% bonus pool of the total sales of pre-sales customer service, which is distributed equally among after-sales customer service after deducting penalties for negative/neutral reviews and comfort payments. Negative reviews caused by untimely checks or incorrect feedback will result in an 80 yuan/item deduction from the checking agent's salary. The number of neutral/negative reviews is calculated based on the total from the previous month.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服违规处罚机制
scenario: 客服在特定时间段内未能遵守在线人数要求、无故挂起、错误引导客户导致差评，或在大促期间未能保持在线或拒绝加班。
decision: 根据违规类型进行罚款或按旷工处理。具体包括：午餐时间在线人数不足罚款30元/人；早班客服无故挂起罚款20元/次（两次警告后扣钱）；售前/售后客服错误引导导致差评罚款100元/条；大促期间无法联系或不能加班按旷工处理。
rationale: 确保客服团队的服务质量和响应效率，尤其是在高峰时段和重要活动期间，避免因客服失职导致客户不满和公司损失。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Violation Penalty Mechanism
scenario_en: When customer service fails to meet online staffing requirements, goes offline without reason, misguides customers leading to negative reviews, or fails to stay online or refuses overtime during major promotions within a specific timeframe.
decision_en: Penalize or treat as absenteeism based on the type of violation. Specifically: insufficient online staff during lunch incurs a 30 yuan/person fine; early shift customer service going offline without reason incurs a 20 yuan/instance fine (after two warnings, deductions apply); pre-sales/after-sales customer service misguiding customers leading to negative reviews incurs a 100 yuan/item fine; being unreachable or refusing overtime during major promotions is treated as absenteeism.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 公司奖励机制
scenario: 当客服人员满足特定绩效标准或服务年限时。
decision: 公司将根据客服类型（售前/售后）和绩效表现（如连续三个月达到四级标准、客户满意度高、成功率高、培养新员工等）提供年终奖、公司福利待遇、带薪休假或工龄工资。
rationale: 通过奖励机制激励员工提升服务质量和工作效率，并认可长期服务和对公司有贡献的员工。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Company Reward Mechanism
scenario_en: When customer service personnel meet specific performance standards or service tenure.
decision_en: The company will provide year-end bonuses, company benefits, paid leave, or seniority pay based on customer service type (pre-sales/after-sales) and performance (e.g., consistently achieving Level 4 standards for three consecutive months, high customer satisfaction, high success rate, training new employees).

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服职业发展路径
scenario: 当客服人员寻求职业发展路径时。
decision: 客服人员可以沿着专家线条（客服专员→客服专家→资深客服）、管理线条（助理级→经理级→资深经理级）发展，或转岗至运营、数据分析、知识库管理、培训管理、产品经理等职位。
rationale: 提供清晰的职业发展路径，以激励客服人员并留住人才，同时为公司内部其他职能部门输送人才。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Career Development Path
scenario_en: When customer service personnel seek career development paths.
decision_en: Customer service personnel can develop along the specialist track (Customer Service Representative → Customer Service Specialist → Senior Customer Service Specialist), the management track (Assistant Level → Manager Level → Senior Manager Level), or transfer to positions such as operations, data analysis, knowledge base management, training management, or product manager.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 双十一大促前的准备
scenario: 在双十一大促活动开始之前。
decision: 需要进行充分的准备工作。
rationale: 确保大促活动顺利进行，提高效率和客户满意度。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Double Eleven Promotion Preparation
scenario_en: Before the Double Eleven mega-promotion begins.
decision_en: Thorough preparation is required.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服团队作战准备
scenario: This is a high-level heading indicating preparation for customer service team operations.
decision: The customer service team needs to be prepared for operations.
rationale: Preparation is essential for effective team performance.
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Customer Service Team Operations Preparation
scenario_en: This is a high-level heading indicating preparation for customer service team operations.
decision_en: The customer service team needs to be prepared for operations.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 双十一客服需求量估算方法
scenario: 在双十一大促期间，需要估算满足客户服务需求并节约成本所需的客服人数。
decision: 根据预估销售额、客单价、订单咨询率、单位顾客对话条数和平均响应时长，通过公式计算日均咨询量、单位客户服务时长和每日每位客服接待量，最终得出所需客服人数。不足部分可通过公司其他部门顶岗、外包客服或高校学生补充。
rationale: 精确估算客服需求有助于在满足客户服务质量的同时，优化人力成本，避免资源浪费或服务不足。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Double Eleven Customer Service Demand Estimation Method
scenario_en: During the Double Eleven mega-promotion, it is necessary to estimate the number of customer service personnel required to meet customer service demand and save costs.
decision_en: Calculate the average daily consultation volume, unit customer service duration, and daily reception volume per customer service agent using estimated sales, average transaction value, order inquiry rate, number of conversation messages per customer, and average response time. This will determine the required number of customer service personnel. Any shortfall can be supplemented by staff from other company departments, outsourced customer service, or college students.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售团队和客服团队的优秀个人及团队奖励机制
scenario: 当评估销售人员和团队表现时，以及在多店模式下进行团队PK时。
decision: 对销售额前三名、各单项指标（催付、转化率、客单价、接待人数）第一名、以及“勤劳小蜜蜂”和“最佳销售能手”等个人进行奖励。对保持金牌售后、DSR不下降或提升的售后和客服团队，以及多店模式小组PK中的最佳销售团队进行奖励。
rationale: 通过设立个人和团队奖项，激励员工提升销售业绩、服务质量和工作效率，从而提升整体客户满意度和公司收益。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Sales and Customer Service Team Individual and Team Incentive Mechanisms
scenario_en: When evaluating sales personnel and team performance, and when conducting team competitions in a multi-store model.
decision_en: Reward individuals for top three sales, first place in individual metrics (payment催付, conversion rate, average transaction value, number of customers served), and titles like 'Diligent Little Bee' and 'Best Sales Expert'. Reward after-sales and customer service teams that maintain Gold After-sales status, or improve/maintain DSR scores, as well as the best sales team in multi-store group competitions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语
scenario: 当SOP或政策文档结束时。
decision: 表示文档的结束。
rationale: 提供清晰的文档结构，表明内容已完结。
source_doc: 张大奕前客服主管分享.pptx
title_en: Concluding Remarks
scenario_en: When an SOP or policy document ends.
decision_en: Indicates the end of the document.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 新入职员工心态培训
scenario: This document outlines psychological training for new employees.
decision: Provide psychological training to new employees.
rationale: To support new employees' mental well-being and integration.
title_en: New Employee Mindset Training
scenario_en: This document outlines psychological training for new employees.
decision_en: Provide psychological training to new employees.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 明确工作目的与心态调整对成功的重要性
scenario: 当员工对工作目的感到困惑或心态不佳时
decision: 员工需要反思“为谁工作”的问题，并调整好自己的工作心态。
rationale: 未能明确工作目的和调整心态可能导致无法成功。
title_en: Importance of Clear Work Purpose and Mindset Adjustment for Success
scenario_en: When employees are confused about their work purpose or have a poor mindset.
decision_en: Employees need to reflect on 'who they work for' and adjust their work mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 工作理念：能力、努力与未来薪资
scenario: 当员工思考工作的意义、价值以及个人职业发展时。
decision: 员工应认识到能力的重要性远超金钱，并持续努力工作，无论当前薪资或老板如何，因为工作是为了未来的薪资和个人发展。
rationale: 强调能力是不可剥夺的财富，持续的努力是实现未来职业目标和提升生活质量的基础。
title_en: Work Philosophy: Ability, Effort, and Future Salary
scenario_en: When employees consider the meaning of work, its value, and personal career development.
decision_en: Employees should recognize that ability is far more important than money, and should continue to work hard, regardless of current salary or boss, because work is for future salary and personal development.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 工作态度：无论环境如何，都应认真负责
scenario: 无论员工身处何种工作环境，或面对何种工作性质。
decision: 员工应始终保持认真负责的工作态度，避免投机取巧或因缺乏监督而偷懒。
rationale: 认真工作是职业素养的体现，不应受外部环境或个人短期目标影响。
title_en: Work Attitude: Be Conscientious and Responsible, Regardless of Environment
scenario_en: Regardless of the work environment or nature of the work an employee is in.
decision_en: Employees should always maintain a conscientious and responsible work attitude, avoiding opportunism or laziness due to lack of supervision.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 敬业：完美的工作态度
scenario: 在日常工作中，员工需要理解并实践公司倡导的职业态度。
decision: 员工应以敬业的态度对待工作，认识到小事积累成大事，并致力于把简单和平凡的事情做好。避免抱怨，并保持对公司的忠诚。
rationale: 这些原则旨在培养员工的职业素养，提升工作效率和团队凝聚力，从而促进个人成长和公司发展。
title_en: Dedication: The Perfect Work Attitude
scenario_en: In daily work, employees need to understand and practice the professional attitude advocated by the company.
decision_en: Employees should approach work with dedication, recognizing that small things accumulate into big achievements, and commit to doing simple and ordinary tasks well. Avoid complaining and maintain loyalty to the company.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 珍惜工作机会与尽职尽责
scenario: 当员工思考自己的工作机会和职业发展时。
decision: 员工应尽职尽责地做好目前所做的工作，并珍惜现有机会，而非抱怨缺少机会。
rationale: 通过尽职尽责的工作，员工可以在现有岗位上找到价值和发展机会，就像“钻石就在你家后院”的案例所示。抱怨缺少机会是浮躁的表现。
title_en: Cherish Work Opportunities and Be Conscientious
scenario_en: When employees consider their work opportunities and career development.
decision_en: Employees should conscientiously perform their current work and cherish existing opportunities, rather than complaining about a lack of opportunities.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极主动的工作心态对职业成功的重要性
scenario: 本段描述了员工在工作能力和工作态度两个维度上的表现，以及这两种表现如何影响其职业成功。
decision: 鼓励员工培养积极主动的工作态度，即使遇到困难也能主动寻求帮助，以确保任务及时高质量完成。
rationale: 积极主动的工作态度是区分平庸员工和优秀员工的关键因素，它能显著提升工作效率和成果，从而促进职业成功。
title_en: Importance of Proactive Work Mindset for Career Success
scenario_en: This section describes employee performance across two dimensions: work ability and work attitude, and how these two aspects influence career success.
decision_en: Encourage employees to cultivate a proactive work attitude, actively seeking help even when facing difficulties, to ensure tasks are completed promptly and with high quality.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极主动：关注影响圈而非关注圈
scenario: 当客服人员面对问题或挑战时，需要调整心态以更有效地处理情况。
decision: 客服人员应采取积极主动的心态，将精力集中在自己能够通过行动影响和改变的事情上（影响圈），而不是仅仅关注无法改变的事情（关注圈）。
rationale: 积极主动的心态能够引导客服人员采取建设性行为，从而带来更好的结果和成就，提升解决问题的效率和个人效能。
title_en: Proactivity: Focus on the Circle of Influence, Not the Circle of Concern
scenario_en: When customer service personnel face problems or challenges, they need to adjust their mindset to handle situations more effectively.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should adopt a proactive mindset, focusing their energy on things they can influence and change through action (circle of influence), rather than just focusing on things they cannot change (circle of concern).

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 责任意识：责任的含义与构成
scenario: 当员工需要理解和实践责任意识时。
decision: 员工应理解责任包含两部分：份内应做好的事情（如履行职责、完成任务）以及未做好工作时应承担的不利后果或强制性义务（如担负责任、承担后果）。
rationale: 明确责任的含义有助于员工建立正确的责任意识，从而更好地履行职责并承担相应的后果。
title_en: Sense of Responsibility: Meaning and Components of Responsibility
scenario_en: When employees need to understand and practice a sense of responsibility.
decision_en: Employees should understand that responsibility includes two parts: what should be done as part of one's duties (e.g., fulfilling responsibilities, completing tasks) and the adverse consequences or mandatory obligations to be borne when work is not done well (e.g., taking responsibility, bearing consequences).

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——责任意识：避免“为什么”的提问
scenario: 当员工在工作中遇到困难、挑战或感到不满时，应避免使用“为什么”句式提问。
decision: 员工应将关注点从抱怨和寻找外部原因转移到主动思考“我该如何”解决问题和提供更优质的服务。
rationale: 避免“为什么”的提问有助于培养员工的责任意识和积极主动解决问题的能力，而不是将责任推卸给他人或外部环境。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Sense of Responsibility: Avoid 'Why' Questions
scenario_en: When employees encounter difficulties, challenges, or dissatisfaction at work, they should avoid using 'why' questions.
decision_en: Employees should shift their focus from complaining and finding external reasons to actively thinking 'how can I' solve the problem and provide better service.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——责任意识：主动出击，建立信任
scenario: 在日常工作和客户互动中，需要展现积极主动和负责任的态度。
decision: 客服人员应主动思考如何建立信任、利用现有资源取得成绩，而不是被动等待或抱怨资源不足、制度不完善。
rationale: 主动出击和承担责任是建立信任和取得成功的关键，避免被动等待和抱怨，以积极心态解决问题。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Sense of Responsibility: Take Initiative, Build Trust
scenario_en: In daily work and customer interactions, it is necessary to demonstrate a proactive and responsible attitude.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should proactively think about how to build trust and leverage existing resources to achieve results, rather than passively waiting or complaining about insufficient resources or imperfect systems.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 主动承担责任，不推诿
scenario: 当团队成员面对问题或项目进展不顺时。
decision: 主动思考“我如何尽自己的力量推动这项计划？”或“我怎么做才能提高团队的工作效率？”，而不是追究“谁的失误”或“谁该为此事负责”。
rationale: 强调个人主动性和责任感，以推动项目进展和提高团队效率，而非互相指责。
title_en: Proactively Take Responsibility, Don't Pass the Buck
scenario_en: When team members face problems or project setbacks.
decision_en: Actively think 'How can I do my part to advance this plan?' or 'What can I do to improve team efficiency?', rather than focusing on 'Whose mistake was it?' or 'Who is responsible for this?'.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——责任意识：责任意识一二三原则
scenario: 当客服人员需要培养和运用责任意识时。
decision: 客服人员应遵循“一个主题、二个选择、三个知道原则”来培养责任意识。具体来说，要专注于责任意识这一个主题，在提问时选择“好问题”而非“错问题”，并且在提问时避免使用“为什么”、“什么时候”和“谁”这三个词。
rationale: 这些原则旨在引导客服人员以更积极、更负责任的方式思考和解决问题，避免推卸责任或陷入无效的追问。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Sense of Responsibility: Responsibility Awareness 1-2-3 Principles
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to cultivate and apply a sense of responsibility.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should follow the 'One Theme, Two Choices, Three Knows Principle' to cultivate a sense of responsibility. Specifically, focus on the theme of responsibility awareness, choose 'good questions' over 'wrong questions' when asking, and avoid using the words 'why', 'when', and 'who' when asking questions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——感恩
scenario: 在日常工作和人际交往中，需要培养积极心态时。
decision: 在工作中要常怀感恩之心，感恩父母、同事、朋友、领导和对手。
rationale: 感恩之心有助于建立积极的工作态度和人际关系，促进个人成长。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Gratitude
scenario_en: When needing to cultivate a positive mindset in daily work and interpersonal interactions.
decision_en: Always maintain a grateful heart at work, being thankful for parents, colleagues, friends, leaders, and even competitors.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 新生代员工的必备心态与优势
scenario: 本部分描述了新生代员工应具备的六种必备心态以及他们的优势。
decision: 新生代员工应具备强烈的好奇心、创新意识、敢于尝试和拼搏的精神、敏捷的思维、快速学习能力和良好的教育背景。他们富有激情、肯干、有上进心、敢于挑战权威、独立性强、有责任感且具备团队合作精神。
rationale: 这些心态和优势有助于新生代员工在快速变化的环境中脱颖而出，适应并推动创新。
title_en: Essential Mindset and Advantages of New-Generation Employees
scenario_en: This section describes the six essential mindsets and advantages new-generation employees should possess.
decision_en: New-generation employees should possess strong curiosity, innovation awareness, a spirit of daring to try and strive, agile thinking, rapid learning ability, and a good educational background. They are passionate, willing to work hard, ambitious, dare to challenge authority, highly independent, responsible, and have a team spirit.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 新生代员工常见缺点及必备心态：自我认知与学习
scenario: 本内容描述了新生代员工在工作中可能表现出的常见缺点，以及作为管理者或同事在理解这些行为时应考虑的背景。
decision: 在与新生代员工互动时，应认识到他们可能存在的“过分自我、不懂感恩、目无尊长、人性骄横、孤僻、工作情绪不稳定、依赖成性、缺乏工作独立性、大手大脚、不爱惜财物、缺乏成本意识、推诿责任、无时间观念、追求物质享受、工作精神缺失”等缺点。
rationale: 理解这些常见缺点有助于更好地管理和指导新生代员工，并引导他们培养“自我认知与学习”等必备心态，以提升工作表现和职业素养。
title_en: Common Shortcomings and Essential Mindsets of New-Generation Employees: Self-Awareness and Learning
scenario_en: This content describes common shortcomings that new-generation employees may exhibit at work, and the context that managers or colleagues should consider when understanding these behaviors.
decision_en: When interacting with new-generation employees, recognize their potential shortcomings such as being 'overly self-centered, ungrateful, disrespectful to elders, arrogant, reclusive, unstable work emotions, overly dependent, lacking work independence, extravagant, not valuing property, lacking cost awareness, shirking responsibility, lacking time management, pursuing material pleasures, and lacking work ethic'.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 职业生涯选择：跳槽成功与职业竞争力提升
scenario: 在考虑职业生涯选择和跳槽时。
decision: 应将跳槽视为职业竞争力的提升，而非单纯的加薪手段。需要明确职位差距并迅速弥补，适应新的管理模式和工作方式，并持续积累专业经验和技能。
rationale: 成功的跳槽不仅仅是薪资的增长，更重要的是职业含金量的提升和职业竞争力的增强。盲目跳槽可能导致专业经验和技能积累中断。
title_en: Career Choices: Successful Job Hopping and Enhanced Career Competitiveness
scenario_en: When considering career choices and job changes.
decision_en: Job hopping should be viewed as an enhancement of career competitiveness, not merely a means to increase salary. It is necessary to clearly identify and quickly bridge skill gaps, adapt to new management models and work methods, and continuously accumulate professional experience and skills.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 学习常见误区：不重视知识学习、阅读少、思路单一
scenario: 当客服人员在进行自我认知与学习时，需要避免常见的学习误区。
decision: 客服人员应避免不重视知识学习、很少阅读各种书目以及不动脑筋只有一种思路的误区。
rationale: 这些是阻碍自我认知与学习的常见误区，需要客服人员加以警惕和改进。
title_en: Common Learning Pitfalls: Neglecting Knowledge, Limited Reading, Single-Mindedness
scenario_en: When customer service personnel are engaged in self-awareness and learning, they need to avoid common learning pitfalls.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should avoid the pitfalls of neglecting knowledge learning, rarely reading various books, and having only one way of thinking without critical thought.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极心态对职业发展的重要性
scenario: 在日常工作中，员工对待工作的态度和心态。
decision: 员工应以积极、热忱和负责任的态度对待工作，将自己定位为主人翁而非打工者。
rationale: 积极的心态和高目标设定是决定个人职业高度和成就大小的关键因素。以老板心态工作，有助于个人成长和职业晋升。
title_en: Importance of a Positive Mindset for Career Development
scenario_en: Employee attitude and mindset towards work in daily operations.
decision_en: Employees should approach work with a positive, enthusiastic, and responsible attitude, positioning themselves as owners rather than mere employees.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——角色定位：经营者替身
scenario: 当员工在工作中需要明确自己的角色定位时，尤其是在代表公司或执行高层意志时。
decision: 员工应将自己定位为“经营者替身”，代表公司，并从经营者的角度思考问题，以实现公司目标。
rationale: 这种角色定位有助于员工理解并体现经营者的意志，从而高效地完成任务，并与同事建立良好的合作关系。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Role Positioning: Operator's Proxy
scenario_en: When employees need to clarify their role positioning at work, especially when representing the company or executing senior management's will.
decision_en: Employees should position themselves as an 'operator's proxy,' representing the company and thinking from the operator's perspective to achieve company goals.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 空杯心态：持续学习与自我更新
scenario: 当需要保持个人知识和能力与时俱进，或面对新知识和挑战时。
decision: 应保持“空杯心态”，即随时清空过时的知识和能力，为新信息和技能腾出空间。
rationale: 只有永不自满，持续学习和进步，才能保持身心活力，并使人生不断渐入佳境。
title_en: Empty Cup Mindset: Continuous Learning and Self-Renewal
scenario_en: When needing to keep personal knowledge and abilities up-to-date, or facing new knowledge and challenges.
decision_en: Maintain an 'empty cup mindset,' which means constantly clearing out outdated knowledge and abilities to make space for new information and skills.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——空杯心态
scenario: 当客服人员需要培养积极的学习和工作态度时。
decision: 客服人员应保持“空杯心态”，即虚心学习，不断确立人生目标并为之奋斗，相信最终会成功。
rationale: “空杯心态”有助于客服人员持续学习和成长，从而更好地服务客户并实现个人职业发展。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Empty Cup Mindset
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to cultivate a positive learning and working attitude.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should maintain an 'empty cup mindset,' meaning to learn humbly, continuously establish life goals and strive for them, believing that success will ultimately be achieved.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 职场心态：主动“空杯”促进个人发展
scenario: 在职场中面对学习、成长和变化时，员工应采取何种心态。
decision: 鼓励员工保持“空杯心态”，尤其是主动“空杯”，以促进个人最大最快的发展。
rationale: 主动“空杯”能带来最快最大的发展；被动“空杯”发展受限；拒绝“空杯”则会导致停滞或被淘汰。
title_en: Workplace Mindset: Proactively 'Emptying the Cup' for Personal Development
scenario_en: What mindset employees should adopt when facing learning, growth, and change in the workplace.
decision_en: Encourage employees to maintain an 'empty cup mindset,' especially proactively 'emptying the cup,' to foster their greatest and fastest personal development.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——空杯心态：开放、放下、重生
scenario: 在面对新的可能性、需要发展或告别过去时。
decision: 保持开放的心态，放下妨碍发展的旧有观念，并准备好重生以迎接更美好的未来。
rationale: 开放的心态能带来新的思路和机会；放下旧有才能迈向未来；告别过去是为了更好的未来。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Empty Cup Mindset: Openness, Letting Go, Rebirth
scenario_en: When facing new possibilities, needing to develop, or letting go of the past.
decision_en: Maintain an open mind, let go of old ideas that hinder development, and be ready for rebirth to embrace a better future.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——空杯心态
scenario: 当客服人员需要提升自我，避免自满，并以开放的心态面对新的学习和挑战时。
decision: 客服人员应保持“空杯心态”，即倒空过去的优秀、高见、成功和失败，以便接受新的知识和可能性。
rationale: 通过倒空过去的经验，客服人员可以避免偏见，获得更大的成功，并有机会改写未来的结果，从而实现持续的自我提升。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Empty Cup Mindset
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to improve themselves, avoid complacency, and approach new learning and challenges with an open mind.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should maintain an 'empty cup mindset,' which means emptying past achievements, insights, successes, and failures to accept new knowledge and possibilities.

title: 必备的6种心态——空杯心态：放下
scenario: 当客服人员需要以开放的心态面对新的学习、挑战或客户情况时。
decision: 客服人员应放下过去的思想、学识、成功或失败，将自己视为新人，持续学习和尝试。
rationale: 通过放下过往，客服人员能以更开放、更积极的心态去学习新知识、适应新环境，从而更好地服务客户。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Empty Cup Mindset: Letting Go
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to approach new learning, challenges, or customer situations with an open mind.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should let go of past thoughts, knowledge, successes, or failures, view themselves as newcomers, and continuously learn and try.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 必备的6种心态——空杯心态：打开与倒空
scenario: 在面对新知识、新挑战或需要自我提升时，客服人员应采纳“空杯心态”。
decision: 客服人员应打开心胸和大脑，以新奇的眼光观察，用博大的心感知，并以勇气和信念尝试和努力。同时，要倒空固执和自以为是的看法，以便超越自我。
rationale: 通过“打开”可以发现全新的世界和可能性；通过“倒空”可以放下旧有的束缚，从而实现超越和个人成长，获得更美妙的体验。
title_en: 6 Essential Mindsets - Empty Cup Mindset: Opening and Emptying
scenario_en: When facing new knowledge, new challenges, or needing self-improvement, customer service personnel should adopt an 'empty cup mindset'.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should open their minds and hearts, observe with fresh eyes, perceive with a broad heart, and try and strive with courage and conviction. At the same time, they must empty stubborn and self-righteous views to surpass themselves.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 工作心态：带着感恩的心态
scenario: 在日常工作中，尤其是在与客户互动时。
decision: 员工应以感恩的心态进行工作。
rationale: 感恩的心态有助于提升服务质量和客户满意度，是公司品牌文化的一部分。
title_en: Work Mindset: With a Grateful Heart
scenario_en: In daily work, especially when interacting with customers.
decision_en: Employees should work with a grateful mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售心态培训
scenario: This chunk is a title slide for a sales mindset training.
decision: This slide indicates the start of a training session focused on sales mindset.
rationale: It's a title slide, setting the context for the following content.
title_en: Sales Mindset Training
scenario_en: This chunk is a title slide for a sales mindset training.
decision_en: This slide indicates the start of a training session focused on sales mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售人员心态概述及不良心态对业绩的影响
scenario: 本内容概述了销售人员应具备的心态以及可能腐蚀业绩的不良心态。
decision: 销售人员需要理解“为谁工作”的问题，并识别和避免不良心态，以提升业绩。
rationale: 正确的心态是销售成功的基石，不良心态会直接影响销售表现和业绩。
title_en: Overview of Sales Personnel Mindset and Impact of Negative Mindset on Performance
scenario_en: This content outlines the mindset sales personnel should possess and negative mindsets that can erode performance.
decision_en: Sales personnel need to understand 'who they work for' and identify and avoid negative mindsets to improve performance.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 心态的定义
scenario: 本部分旨在介绍心态的基本概念。
decision: 理解心态的构成要素和重要性。
rationale: 为后续关于客户服务中情绪管理和沟通技巧的讨论奠定基础。
title_en: Definition of Mindset
scenario_en: This section aims to introduce the basic concept of mindset.
decision_en: Understand the constituent elements and importance of mindset.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 心态的定义
scenario: 理解“心态”这一概念时
decision: 心态是人的心理状态，泛指人们对事物的看法和认识，是内心的想法和思维习惯的状态，也是人对事物所反映出来的态度。
rationale: 明确“心态”的定义有助于理解其在客户服务中的重要性。
title_en: Definition of Mindset
scenario_en: When understanding the concept of 'mindset'
decision_en: Mindset is a person's psychological state, generally referring to people's views and perceptions of things, the state of inner thoughts and thinking habits, and the attitude reflected by a person towards things.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 马斯洛关于心态、态度、习惯、性格与命运的关联
scenario: 当思考个人成长、客户服务心态或团队建设时
decision: 认识到心态是所有后续改变的起点，积极的心态能带来积极的连锁反应，最终影响命运。
rationale: 此原则强调了内在心理状态（心）对外部行为和结果（态度、习惯、性格、命运）的深远影响。
title_en: Maslow's Connection Between Mindset, Attitude, Habits, Character, and Destiny
scenario_en: When considering personal growth, customer service mindset, or team building
decision_en: Recognize that mindset is the starting point for all subsequent changes, and a positive mindset can lead to a positive chain reaction, ultimately influencing destiny.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 因果关系
scenario: This chunk is a title slide indicating a topic to be discussed.
decision: This slide introduces the concept of 'causality' or 'cause and effect'.
rationale: This is a high-level topic introduction, likely preceding detailed rules or cases related to cause and effect within customer service scenarios.
title_en: Causality
scenario_en: This chunk is a title slide indicating a topic to be discussed.
decision_en: This slide introduces the concept of 'causality' or 'cause and effect'.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极心态：竭尽全力，用心努力，避免过度压力
scenario: 在日常工作和销售过程中，员工需要保持积极的心态。
decision: 员工应竭尽全力努力，用尽各种方式进行推销，并用心工作。同时，避免给自己施加过大的压力。
rationale: 积极的心态和不懈的努力最终会带来成功，而过度的压力可能适得其反。
title_en: Positive Mindset: Strive, Work Diligently, Avoid Excessive Stress
scenario_en: Employees need to maintain a positive mindset in daily work and sales processes.
decision_en: Employees should strive their best, use various methods to promote, and work diligently. At the same time, avoid putting too much pressure on themselves.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售人员10大心态 - 第一部分
scenario: This section introduces the first part of the 'Top 10 Mindsets for Salespeople'.
decision: The content for the 'Top 10 Mindsets for Salespeople - Part 1' needs to be added.
rationale: This is a placeholder indicating that specific content related to sales mindsets is expected to be provided here.
title_en: Top 10 Mindsets for Salespeople - Part 1
scenario_en: This section introduces the first part of the 'Top 10 Mindsets for Salespeople'.
decision_en: The content for the 'Top 10 Mindsets for Salespeople - Part 1' needs to be added.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 积极心态：关注改变与排除困难，而非阴暗与困难
scenario: 在面对国家或企业中存在的优点和缺点时，以及在日常工作中遇到挑战时。
decision: 应首先具备积极的心态，关注好的、正确的方面并立即投入，同时着重于改变阴暗面和排除困难。
rationale: 积极的心态能使自己充满奋斗的阳光和力量，并能感染身边的人，从而促进问题的解决和整体氛围的提升。
title_en: Positive Mindset: Focus on Change and Overcoming Difficulties, Not Negativity
scenario_en: When facing strengths and weaknesses within the country or company, and when encountering challenges in daily work.
decision_en: One should first adopt a positive mindset, focus on the good and correct aspects, and immediately engage, while emphasizing changing negative aspects and overcoming difficulties.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 主动的心态：营造和谐销售环境与增加个人机会
scenario: 在与客户互动或日常工作中，需要建立信任、消除隔阂并提升个人价值时。
decision: 应保持主动的心态，尤其要主动展现亲切的笑容，并积极寻找和把握锻炼与实现自我价值的机会。
rationale: 笑容是传达爱意、消除隔阂、建立信任、去除悲伤和不安、打破僵局、消除自卑感、增进活力的捷径，是销售的敲门砖。主动行为能为个人增加锻炼和实现价值的机会。
title_en: Proactive Mindset: Create Harmonious Sales Environment & Increase Personal Opportunities
scenario_en: When interacting with customers or in daily work, and there is a need to build trust, eliminate barriers, and enhance personal value.
decision_en: Maintain a proactive mindset, especially by actively showing a friendly smile, and actively seeking and seizing opportunities to develop and realize self-worth.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 空杯心态：持续学习与融入团队
scenario: 在团队中工作，特别是对于有经验的员工或主管，面对新的环境、同事或方法时。
decision: 应保持“空杯心态”，主动学习和吸收团队中正确、优秀的方法和经验，将自己融入团队，并视自己为新人。
rationale: 即使个人经验丰富，面对新的企业、工作、客户和同事，仍需保持谦逊，承认人无完人，通过学习和融入来弥补相对较弱的地方，从而丰富自己。
title_en: Empty Cup Mindset: Continuous Learning & Team Integration
scenario_en: Working in a team, especially for experienced employees or supervisors, when facing new environments, colleagues, or methods.
decision_en: Maintain an 'empty cup mindset,' actively learn and absorb correct and excellent methods and experiences from the team, integrate into the team, and view oneself as a newcomer.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 双赢心态：维护企业、商家与消费者之间互利共赢的关系
scenario: 在处理与企业、商家和消费者之间的所有关系时，客服人员应秉持双赢心态。
decision: 客服人员不能为了自身利益损害企业利益，也不能破坏企业与消费者之间的双赢规则。必须确保所有相关方都能获得利益，以维持合作关系。
rationale: 企业是一个利润中心，若企业无利可图，员工也无法获得利益。同时，商业合作的基础是互利共赢，任何一方利益受损都会导致合作终止。
title_en: Win-Win Mindset: Maintain Mutually Beneficial Relationships Among Company, Merchants, and Consumers
scenario_en: Customer service personnel should uphold a win-win mindset when dealing with all relationships among the company, merchants, and consumers.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must not harm the company's interests for their own benefit, nor disrupt the win-win rules between the company and consumers. It is essential to ensure that all relevant parties benefit to maintain cooperative relationships.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 包容的心态：接受客户和同事的差异
scenario: 作为销售人员，在与各种经销商、零售店、消费者以及同事互动时，会遇到不同的喜好、需求和做事风格。
decision: 应学会包容他人的不同喜好、挑剔以及同事的不同做事风格。
rationale: 作为服务提供者，我们的目标是满足客户需求，这要求我们具备包容心。同时，包容同事有助于团队协作。
title_en: Inclusive Mindset: Accept Differences in Customers and Colleagues
