scenario_en: As a salesperson, when interacting with various distributors, retail stores, consumers, and colleagues, one will encounter different preferences, needs, and working styles.
decision_en: Learn to be inclusive of others' different preferences, pickiness, and colleagues' different working styles.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 第六心态:自信的心态
scenario: 在所有与客户互动、产品介绍和团队协作的场景中，员工都应展现出自信。
decision: 员工应对自己服务的企业、产品、自身能力、同事以及未来充满自信。
rationale: 自信是一切行动的源动力，缺乏自信会导致行动力不足、犹豫不决，甚至无法有效说服客户。相信自己和产品能为消费者提供价值。
title_en: Sixth Mindset: Confident Mindset
scenario_en: Employees should demonstrate confidence in all customer interactions, product presentations, and team collaboration scenarios.
decision_en: Employees should be confident in the company they serve, their products, their own abilities, their colleagues, and the future.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 给予的心态：先给予，后索取，付出终有回报
scenario: 在与客户互动或处理任何业务关系时，应秉持“给予的心态”。
decision: 在期望获得回报或索取之前，首先要学会付出和给予，因为给予是永恒的，且不会受到拒绝，反而会得到感激。
rationale: 给予是建立积极关系的基础，它能带来感激并最终获得回报，因为付出与得到成正比。
title_en: Giving Mindset: Give First, Then Receive; Effort Will Be Rewarded
scenario_en: When interacting with customers or handling any business relationship, adopt a 'giving mindset'.
decision_en: Before expecting returns or asking, first learn to give and contribute, because giving is eternal and will not be rejected; instead, it will be met with gratitude.

title: 行动的心态：通过实际行动实现目标并关怀客户
scenario: 在日常工作和客户服务中，需要实现目标、证明价值并关怀客户时。
decision: 应采取实际行动来完成目标，而非仅停留在计划层面。通过行动证明自身价值，并真正关怀客户。
rationale: 行动是最有说服力的，能将计划转化为现实，实现目标，并有效证明自身存在和价值。同时，行动是真正关怀客户的体现。
title_en: Action Mindset: Achieve Goals and Care for Customers Through Action
scenario_en: In daily work and customer service, when there is a need to achieve goals, prove value, and care for customers.
decision_en: Take practical action to achieve goals, rather than just staying at the planning level. Prove self-worth through action and genuinely care for customers.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 学习的心态：持续学习是个人与企业竞争力的核心
scenario: 在竞争日益激烈的市场环境中，个人和企业需要保持竞争力。
decision: 员工应保持学习的心态，将学习视为一种生活方式，并从同事、上级、客户和竞争对手那里学习。
rationale: 持续学习是提高个人能力、促进创新、避免武器落后的关键，也是个人和企业在21世纪取得成功的核心竞争力。
title_en: Learning Mindset: Continuous Learning is Core to Personal and Business Competitiveness
scenario_en: In an increasingly competitive market environment, individuals and businesses need to remain competitive.
decision_en: Employees should maintain a learning mindset, view learning as a way of life, and learn from colleagues, superiors, customers, and competitors.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 以老板心态思考与行动
scenario: 员工在日常工作中，需要明确自己的职责和对公司的贡献。
decision: 员工应具备老板的心态，将公司事务视为己任，主动思考企业成长和费用控制，并采取相应的行动。
rationale: 具备老板心态能促使员工从更高层面思考问题，从而实现个人成长和进步，避免被公司乃至社会淘汰。反之，得过且过的心态会导致不负责任，阻碍个人发展。
title_en: Think and Act with an Owner's Mindset
scenario_en: Employees need to clarify their responsibilities and contributions to the company in their daily work.
decision_en: Employees should adopt an owner's mindset, treat company matters as their own responsibility, proactively consider business growth and cost control, and take corresponding actions.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售人员心态：超越问题，达到更高境界
scenario: 当销售人员在工作中遇到困难、挑战或负面情绪时。
decision: 销售人员不应抗拒或试图消灭问题，而应寻求提升自己的方法，以超越问题和困难。
rationale: 通过提升心灵高度，可以摆脱问题的困扰，看到更广阔、积极的局面。
title_en: Salesperson Mindset: Transcend Problems, Reach a Higher Level
scenario_en: When salespeople encounter difficulties, challenges, or negative emotions at work.
decision_en: Salespeople should not resist or try to eliminate problems, but rather seek ways to improve themselves to transcend problems and difficulties.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 明确工作对象
scenario: 在开始任何工作或任务之前
decision: 需要明确“我在为谁工作？”
rationale: 理解工作对象是有效执行任务的基础，有助于聚焦目标和产出。
title_en: Clarify Work Object
scenario_en: Before starting any work or task
decision_en: Need to clarify 'Who am I working for?'

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 工作目的与个人价值
scenario: 当员工思考工作的意义和为谁工作时。
decision: 认识到工作最终是为了实现个人价值和成长，而非仅仅为公司或老板。
rationale: 通过强调个人价值，可以激发员工的内在动力和归属感，提升工作积极性。
title_en: Work Purpose and Personal Value
scenario_en: When employees consider the meaning of work and who they are working for.
decision_en: Recognize that work is ultimately for achieving personal value and growth, not just for the company or the boss.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 工作动机与个人发展
scenario: 当思考工作的目的和个人发展时。
decision: 认识到工作是谋生、提升物质生活、提升社会阶层和实现人生理想的途径。
rationale: 工作不仅是生存的需要，更是个人成长和实现抱负的关键手段。
title_en: Work Motivation and Personal Development
scenario_en: When considering the purpose of work and personal development.
decision_en: Recognize that work is a means to make a living, improve material life, elevate social status, and achieve life ideals.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 员工归属感与自我驱动
scenario: 当员工思考“我在为谁工作？”时。
decision: 员工应被引导认识到他们是为自己工作。
rationale: 通过强调“我为自己工作”，可以增强员工的自我驱动力和归属感，从而提升工作积极性。
title_en: Employee Belonging and Self-Drive
scenario_en: When employees ask 'Who am I working for?'
decision_en: Employees should be guided to realize they are working for themselves.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 腐蚀业绩的不良心态
scenario: This section introduces the topic of negative mindsets that can impact performance.
decision: The content of this section will focus on identifying and addressing detrimental attitudes.
rationale: Understanding and managing negative mindsets is crucial for improving overall performance and customer service.
title_en: Negative Mindsets that Corrode Performance
scenario_en: This section introduces the topic of negative mindsets that can impact performance.
decision_en: The content of this section will focus on identifying and addressing detrimental attitudes.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 腐蚀业绩的不良心态
scenario: 当客服人员在工作中遇到可能影响其绩效和情绪的负面心态时。
decision: 识别并避免可能腐蚀业绩的不良心态。
rationale: 不良心态会直接影响客服人员的工作表现和客户服务质量，进而损害整体业绩。
title_en: Negative Mindsets that Corrode Performance
scenario_en: When customer service personnel encounter negative mindsets in their work that may affect their performance and emotions.
decision_en: Identify and avoid negative mindsets that can corrode performance.

title: 改变心态而非环境以提升业绩
scenario: 当员工因外部因素（如客户反馈）而感到沮丧或考虑改变工作环境时。
decision: 鼓励员工反思并改变自身的工作方式或心态，而非仅仅寻求外部环境的改变。
rationale: 问题的根源往往在于自身，不改变自身就无法从根本上解决问题，无论环境如何变化。
title_en: Change Mindset, Not Environment, to Improve Performance
scenario_en: When employees feel frustrated due to external factors (e.g., customer feedback) or consider changing their work environment.
decision_en: Encourage employees to reflect on and change their own work methods or mindset, rather than just seeking changes in the external environment.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 识别并摒弃影响销售业绩的消极心态
scenario: 当销售业绩不佳时，需要分析其根本原因。
decision: 应识别并摒弃销售人员内心深处的消极心态，而不是将业绩不佳归咎于外部因素。
rationale: 消极心态是侵蚀业绩的“蛀虫”，即使外部条件有利，也无法取得卓越业绩。
title_en: Identify and Discard Negative Mindsets Affecting Sales Performance
scenario_en: When sales performance is poor, the root causes need to be analyzed.
decision_en: Identify and discard negative mindsets deep within sales personnel, rather than blaming poor performance on external factors.

title: 销售人员不良心态及其对业绩的负面影响
scenario: 当销售人员出现负面心态时，例如害怕拒绝、满足现状、抱怨、过于谦卑、看轻他人、害怕竞争或拖延工作。
decision: 识别并避免这些不良心态，因为它们会侵蚀销售业绩。
rationale: 这些心态会导致销售人员退缩、不思进取、不反思自身问题、失去客户尊重、产生负面工作态度，并最终导致业绩下滑。
title_en: Negative Sales Mindsets and Their Impact on Performance
scenario_en: When sales personnel exhibit negative mindsets, such as fear of rejection, complacency, complaining, excessive humility, looking down on others, fear of competition, or procrastination.
decision_en: Identify and avoid these negative mindsets, as they erode sales performance.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 结束语
scenario: 当SOP或演示文稿结束时。
decision: 以感谢语结束。
rationale: 表示礼貌和专业。
title_en: Closing Remarks
scenario_en: When an SOP or presentation concludes.
decision_en: End with a thank you.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 新员工入职客服培训课程安排
scenario: 新员工入职客服岗位时。
decision: 新员工将接受为期七天的培训，内容涵盖公司文化、规章制度、岗位职责、平台规则、产品品牌知识、客服服务意识、工作工具使用、日常工作流程、销售技巧、售后处理以及绩效数据解读，最终目标是实现独立上机操作。
rationale: 通过系统化的培训，确保新员工全面了解公司和岗位要求，掌握必要的技能和知识，以便能够独立、高效地完成客服工作。
title_en: New Employee Customer Service Training Schedule
scenario_en: When new employees join the customer service team.
decision_en: New employees will undergo a seven-day training covering company culture, rules and regulations, job responsibilities, platform rules, product brand knowledge, customer service awareness, work tool usage, daily work processes, sales techniques, after-sales handling, and performance data interpretation, with the ultimate goal of independent operation.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 员工培训与考核档案参考模板
scenario: 此模板用于记录和管理员工的培训与考核信息。
decision: 使用此表格记录员工的姓名、性别、年龄、岗位、在职状态、各项考试成绩（包括补考）、以及违纪记录等信息。
rationale: 建立全面的员工培训与考核档案有助于跟踪员工的学习进展、评估其绩效，并为后续的人力资源决策提供数据支持。
title_en: Employee Training and Assessment Record Template
scenario_en: This template is used to record and manage employee training and assessment information.
decision_en: Use this form to record employee name, gender, age, position, employment status, various test scores (including retakes), and disciplinary records.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 免责声明：材料使用须知与平台规则参照
scenario: 在使用本材料进行店铺运营前。
decision: 商家需根据自身店铺的实际需求重新整合材料，不可直接使用。同时，对于涉及平台规则的部分，必须参照各平台最新的内容。
rationale: 本材料仅供分享，不作商业用途，且为避免因使用旧信息导致受罚或影响店铺经营，商家需自行核实并更新相关平台规则。
title_en: Disclaimer: Material Usage and Platform Rules Reference
scenario_en: Before using this material for store operations.
decision_en: Merchants must re-integrate the material according to their store's actual needs and cannot use it directly. Additionally, for sections involving platform rules, the latest content from each platform must be referenced.

title: 关联销售的重要性与技巧
scenario: 当客服需要提升销售额、转化率或降低推广成本时。
decision: 通过关联销售，主动向顾客推荐相关产品，以增加顾客的购买意愿和客单价。
rationale: 关联销售能够提升客单价、转化率，降低推广成本，并有助于测试新产品，从而实现深层次的多面引导。
title_en: Importance and Techniques of Associated Sales
scenario_en: When customer service needs to increase sales, conversion rates, or reduce promotion costs.
decision_en: Through associated sales, proactively recommend related products to customers to increase their purchase intent and average transaction value.

title: 客服售前准备：产品知识要素与店铺活动介绍
scenario: 客服在进行售前服务时，需要充分准备以提高服务质量和销售效率。
decision: 客服应熟练掌握产品知识，包括品类、结构、风格、人群、品牌属性（规格、材质、成分、配比、特性、颜色）、特性卖点、产品搭配和包装。同时，需熟悉店铺的各类活动，包括活动类型（店内、店外、淘宝、类目活动）和活动要素（时间、对象、形式、产品、设置内容）。
rationale: 全面的产品知识有助于客服准确介绍产品，解答客户疑问，提升客户信任度。熟悉店铺活动能帮助客服有效引导客户参与促销，提高客单价和转化率。
title_en: Customer Service Pre-sales Preparation: Product Knowledge and Store Activity Introduction
scenario_en: Customer service needs to be fully prepared for pre-sales service to improve service quality and sales efficiency.
decision_en: Customer service should be proficient in product knowledge, including category, structure, style, target audience, brand attributes (specifications, materials, ingredients, ratios, characteristics, colors), key selling points, product pairings, and packaging. They also need to be familiar with various store activities, including activity types (in-store, external, Taobao, category activities) and activity elements (time, target audience, format, products, setup content).

title: 客服行为标准：客户至上，用心服务
scenario: 在日常客户服务工作中，与客户互动时。
decision: 以微笑面对客户，积极主动解决问题，换位思考，有效沟通，不冷漠不推诿，争取客户和公司双赢。
rationale: 通过积极主动的服务和有效的沟通，提升客户满意度，同时维护公司利益和形象。
title_en: Customer Service Behavior Standards: Customer First, Dedicated Service
scenario_en: When interacting with customers in daily customer service work.
decision_en: Face customers with a smile, actively solve problems, empathize, communicate effectively, avoid indifference or shirking responsibility, and strive for a win-win for both customer and company.

title: 售后服务在电商交易中的意义与常见问题处理
scenario: 买家购买商品发货后，需要进行一系列销售服务，包括物流跟踪、产品答疑、购物纠纷解决等。
decision: 售后服务是交易的最后过程，也是再销售的开始，其意义在于提升顾客购物满意度、提升品牌形象、整合信息并提升企业整体水平。
rationale: 良好的售后服务能够增强客户忠诚度，促进重复购买，并为企业提供宝贵的用户反馈。
title_en: Significance of After-Sales Service in E-commerce and Common Problem Handling
scenario_en: After a buyer purchases and an item is shipped, a series of sales services are required, including logistics tracking, product inquiries, and shopping dispute resolution.
decision_en: After-sales service is the final stage of a transaction and the beginning of repeat sales. Its significance lies in enhancing customer shopping satisfaction, improving brand image, integrating information, and elevating the overall company standard.

title: 产品问题反馈与维权纠纷处理流程
scenario: 当顾客反馈产品问题、漏发错发、服务差、物流慢、描述不符等情况，或发生维权纠纷时。
decision: 将顾客反馈的问题整理分类，并反馈到对应的部门（如采购部、仓储部、客服部、运营部）。对于维权纠纷，需调查事实，并根据情况与买家协商解决方案，必要时可申请小二介入。
rationale: 通过将问题反馈给对应部门，可以促进内部改进，提升产品和服务质量。及时有效地处理维权纠纷，能维护客户关系，降低负面影响。
title_en: Product Issue Feedback and Rights Protection Dispute Resolution Process
scenario_en: When customers report product issues, missing/incorrect shipments, poor service, slow logistics, description discrepancies, or when rights protection disputes occur.
decision_en: Categorize customer feedback and forward it to the corresponding departments (e.g., purchasing, warehousing, customer service, operations). For rights protection disputes, investigate the facts and negotiate solutions with the buyer as appropriate; if necessary, apply for Taobao staff intervention.

title: 评价解释操作与时间点
scenario: 当需要对买家评价进行解释时。
decision: 评价作出后的15天内，卖家可以通过“卖家中心”——“交易管理”——“评价管理”进行评价解释。
rationale: 在规定时间内进行解释，可以有效管理店铺声誉并与买家沟通。
title_en: Review Explanation Operation and Timing
scenario_en: When an explanation for a buyer's review is needed.
decision_en: Within 15 days of the review being made, sellers can provide an explanation via 'Seller Center' — 'Transaction Management' — 'Review Management'.

title: 客户接待沟通的基本原则：态度热情，不直接否定客户，主动沟通服务
scenario: 在与客户进行沟通和接待时，客服人员需要遵循一系列基本原则。
decision: 客服人员应保持热情态度，避免直接否定客户，并主动与客户沟通和提供服务。具体包括多用语气词、礼貌用语，回复内容字数多于客户，以肯定方式表达否定，并主动寻找话题和引导客户。
rationale: 这些原则旨在拉近与客户的距离，避免冲突，提升客户满意度，并最终促成交易。
title_en: Basic Principles of Customer Reception and Communication: Enthusiastic Attitude, No Direct Negation, Proactive Service
scenario_en: Customer service personnel need to follow a series of basic principles when communicating with and receiving customers.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should maintain an enthusiastic attitude, avoid directly negating customers, and proactively communicate and provide service. This includes using more interjections and polite language, replying with more words than the customer, expressing negation in an affirmative way, and proactively finding topics and guiding customers.

title: 客服沟通基本原则：产品推荐与促成订单
scenario: 客服在与客户沟通时，需要介绍和推荐产品，并最终促成订单。
decision: 客服应根据客户喜好和需求推荐产品，运用FAB原则（特点、优势、利益）进行介绍，并有条理地回答客户疑问，强调产品强项，主动打消客户疑虑，同时通过增加紧迫感和暗示引导来促进成单。
rationale: 有效的沟通和产品推荐能更好地满足客户需求，提升客户满意度，并提高订单转化率。
title_en: Customer Service Communication Principles: Product Recommendation and Order Conversion
scenario_en: When customer service communicates with customers, they need to introduce and recommend products, ultimately leading to order conversion.
decision_en: Customer service should recommend products based on customer preferences and needs, use the FAB principle (Features, Advantages, Benefits) for introduction, answer customer questions systematically, emphasize product strengths, proactively address customer concerns, and promote conversion by creating urgency and suggestive guidance.

title: 客服基础技能系列教程概述
scenario: 本教程旨在为淘宝客服提供基础技能培训。
decision: 客服人员需熟悉交易流程、遵守规则规范并掌握工具软件。
rationale: 掌握这些基础技能是成为一名合格淘宝客服的前提，能有效处理客户问题并提升服务质量。
title_en: Overview of Basic Customer Service Skills Tutorial Series
scenario_en: This tutorial aims to provide basic skills training for Taobao customer service.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to be familiar with transaction processes, adhere to rules and regulations, and master tool software.

title: 举证规范：可接受的沟通和物流证据类型
scenario: 当需要收集和提供证据以支持交易纠纷或客户服务请求时。
decision: 可接受的证据包括旺旺聊天记录、QQ聊天记录、手机短信、电话录音、影像视频、沟通证据、产品证据、物流证据和资质证据。
rationale: 熟悉交易流程和掌握各类证据的收集是客服处理问题的基础，确保能够有效解决纠纷。
title_en: Evidence Standards: Acceptable Communication and Logistics Evidence Types
scenario_en: When evidence needs to be collected and provided to support transaction disputes or customer service requests.
decision_en: Acceptable evidence includes Wangwang chat records, QQ chat records, mobile text messages, phone recordings, video footage, communication evidence, product evidence, logistics evidence, and qualification evidence.

title: 老客户维护和营销：定义、分类、管理与关怀策略
scenario: 本教程旨在提供淘宝客服关于老客户维护和营销的基础技能，涵盖老客户的定义、重要性、分类管理、维护工具与方法以及营销策略。
decision: 客服应理解老客户的定义（有过一次以上成功交易的买家），认识其在提升回头率、客单价、DSR和流量价值方面的重要性，并学习如何对老客户进行分类管理、运用关怀工具和方法进行维护，以及实施主动和互动营销。
rationale: 有效的老客户管理和营销是提升店铺业绩和客户忠诚度的关键，通过精细化运营可以提高客户生命周期价值。
title_en: Old Customer Maintenance and Marketing: Definition, Classification, Management, and Care Strategies
scenario_en: This tutorial aims to provide Taobao customer service with basic skills for old customer maintenance and marketing, covering the definition, importance, classified management, maintenance tools and methods, and marketing strategies for old customers.
decision_en: Customer service should understand the definition of old customers (buyers with more than one successful transaction), recognize their importance in improving repurchase rates, average transaction value, DSR, and traffic value, and learn how to classify and manage old customers, use care tools and methods for maintenance, and implement proactive and interactive marketing.

title: Cracked Mug Damage Resolution
scenario: Customers report receiving a mug with a crack, typically on the rim, rendering the item unusable. The emotional state ranges from calm requests to high-intensity threats of legal action or public exposure.
decision: IF a customer reports a mug arrived with a crack, THEN issue a full refund of the item's cost ($24.00) and explicitly state that the damaged item does not need to be returned. IF the customer expresses extreme anger, threatens legal action, or mentions consumer protection agencies, THEN escalate to a human agent immediately.
rationale:
A cracked mug, especially on the rim, is fundamentally unusable and poses a safety risk. A full refund without requiring return minimizes customer effort and frustration, preventing further negative sentiment. For highly escalated cases, human intervention is necessary to de-escalate and manage potential legal or reputational risks.

Edge cases to watch:
- Cases involving extreme customer anger or threats (e.g., legal action, consumer protection agency, media exposure) should be escalated to a human, as the automated refund alone may not suffice to resolve the emotional component or mitigate risk.

title: 处理客户情绪：理解与共情
scenario: 当客户表达负面情绪时，例如愤怒、沮丧或失望。
decision: 客服人员应首先理解客户的情绪，并表达共情，让客户感受到被倾听和理解。
rationale: 理解和共情是建立信任和有效解决问题的第一步，有助于平息客户的负面情绪。
title_en: Handling Customer Emotions: Understanding and Empathy
scenario_en: When customers express negative emotions, such as anger, frustration, or disappointment.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should first understand the customer's emotions and express empathy, making the customer feel heard and understood.

title: 淘宝客服基础技能系列教程：关联销售
scenario: This document introduces a tutorial series on basic customer service skills for Taobao.
decision: The content focuses on '关联销售' (associated sales) as part of the basic skills.
rationale: This is an introductory page for a training module developed by Yi Meimei for Taobao University.
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Basic Skills Tutorial Series: Associated Sales
scenario_en: This document introduces a tutorial series on basic customer service skills for Taobao.
decision_en: The content focuses on '关联销售' (associated sales) as part of the basic skills.

title: 关联销售的重要性、四步曲与技巧
scenario: This section introduces the concept of 'associated sales' (关联销售) within the context of Taobao University.
decision: The content outlines the importance, a four-step process, and techniques related to associated sales.
rationale: This chunk serves as a table of contents or an introductory overview for a larger topic on associated sales.
title_en: Importance, Four Steps, and Techniques of Associated Sales
scenario_en: This section introduces the concept of 'associated sales' (关联销售) within the context of Taobao University.
decision_en: The content outlines the importance, a four-step process, and techniques related to associated sales.

title: 关联销售的重要性及定义
scenario: 本节介绍关联销售的概念及其在业务中的重要性。
decision: 理解关联销售的定义和其对业务增长的潜在影响。
rationale: 关联销售是提升客户价值和销售额的关键策略。
title_en: Importance and Definition of Associated Sales
scenario_en: This section introduces the concept of associated sales and its importance in business.
decision_en: Understand the definition of associated sales and its potential impact on business growth.

title: 关联销售的定义与重要性
scenario: 当需要理解或实施关联销售策略时。
decision: 关联销售是一种基于互利互惠的营销方式，通过寻找产品、品牌等营销要素之间的关联性，实现深层次的多面引导。
rationale: 关联销售旨在增加顾客的购买意愿，并通过主动推销来提升销售业绩。
title_en: Definition and Importance of Associated Sales
scenario_en: When needing to understand or implement associated sales strategies.
decision_en: Associated sales is a mutually beneficial marketing method that achieves deep, multi-faceted guidance by finding associations between marketing elements such as products and brands.

title: 关联销售的重要性
scenario: 在考虑提升客单价、转化率、降低推广成本或测试产品时。
decision: 应重视并实施关联销售策略。
rationale: 关联销售可以有效提升客单价和转化率，同时降低推广成本，并有助于产品测试。
title_en: Importance of Associated Sales
scenario_en: When considering increasing average transaction value, conversion rates, reducing promotion costs, or testing products.
decision_en: Associated sales strategies should be valued and implemented.

title: 关联销售的重要性及业绩数据分析
scenario: 在评估销售业绩和制定销售策略时
decision: 关联销售对于提升咨询转化率、客件数和整体业绩排名至关重要。应重视并分析关联销售数据以优化销售策略。
rationale: 数据显示，关联销售与咨询转化率、客件数和业绩排名之间存在正相关性，是提升销售效率和总销售额的关键因素。
title_en: Importance of Associated Sales and Performance Data Analysis
scenario_en: When evaluating sales performance and formulating sales strategies.
decision_en: Associated sales are crucial for improving inquiry conversion rates, number of items per customer, and overall performance ranking. Associated sales data should be valued and analyzed to optimize sales strategies.

title: 关联销售的四步曲
scenario: This outlines the four-step process for implementing associated sales strategies.
decision: The process involves four key steps: '关联模型' (Association Model), '推荐策划' (Recommendation Planning), '接触点投递' (Touchpoint Delivery), and '反馈优化' (Feedback Optimization).
rationale: This structured approach ensures a comprehensive and iterative process for optimizing associated sales, from initial model creation to continuous improvement based on feedback.
title_en: The Four Steps of Associated Sales
scenario_en: This outlines the four-step process for implementing associated sales strategies.
decision_en: The process involves four key steps: 'Association Model', 'Recommendation Planning', 'Touchpoint Delivery', and 'Feedback Optimization'.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：激发兴趣、推荐、投递、优化
scenario: 当需要通过关联销售来激发用户兴趣并提升销售效果时。
decision: 遵循关联销售的四个步骤：识别用户兴趣点、进行推荐策划、选择合适的接触点进行投递、并根据反馈进行优化。
rationale: 通过系统化的关联销售模型，可以更有效地理解用户需求，提升推荐的精准度，并持续改进销售策略。
title_en: The Four Steps of Associated Sales: Inspire Interest, Recommend, Deliver, Optimize
scenario_en: When needing to inspire user interest and improve sales effectiveness through associated sales.
decision_en: Follow the four steps of associated sales: identify user interest points, plan recommendations, select appropriate touchpoints for delivery, and optimize based on feedback.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：商品-商品与顾客-顾客关联模型
scenario: 在淘宝平台进行关联销售时，需要考虑如何建立有效的关联形式。
decision: 应关注商品与商品之间的关联以及顾客与顾客之间的关联模型，以激发顾客兴趣。
rationale: 通过理解顾客对不同关联形式的兴趣点，可以更有效地设计关联销售策略，提升销售效果。
title_en: The Four Steps of Associated Sales: Product-Product and Customer-Customer Association Models
scenario_en: When conducting associated sales on the Taobao platform, it is necessary to consider how to establish effective association forms.
decision_en: Focus on association models between products and between customers to stimulate customer interest.

title: 淘宝关联销售模型概述
scenario: 当需要理解淘宝关联销售的基本构成时。
decision: 淘宝的关联销售模型主要包括商品与商品的关联以及顾客与顾客的关联。
rationale: 这是淘宝关联销售策略的基础框架，旨在通过不同维度的数据关联来促进销售。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Associated Sales Model
scenario_en: When needing to understand the basic components of Taobao associated sales.
decision_en: Taobao's associated sales model primarily includes associations between products and between customers.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：鼓动宣传、价值认同、顾客关联、给予回报
scenario: 当进行关联销售时，需要遵循一套结构化的步骤来最大化效果。
decision: 关联销售应包括四个步骤：鼓动宣传、价值认同、顾客与顾客相关联、以及给予回报。
rationale: 这些步骤构成了一个完整的关联销售模型，旨在建立顾客忠诚度和促进销售。
title_en: The Four Steps of Associated Sales: Promotion, Value Recognition, Customer Association, Reward
scenario_en: When conducting associated sales, a structured set of steps should be followed to maximize effectiveness.
decision_en: Associated sales should include four steps: promotion, value recognition, customer-to-customer association, and providing rewards.

title: 淘宝关联销售：同类商品推荐策略
scenario: 在淘宝平台上进行商品销售时，需要提升商品的曝光率和销售量。
decision: 通过关联销售模型，将同类商品进行关联展示，例如推荐加绒加厚保暖裤子时，同时展示其他款式或品牌的加绒裤子。
rationale: 关联销售能够利用顾客对某一类商品的兴趣，推荐更多相似或互补的商品，从而增加顾客的购买可能性和客单价。
title_en: Taobao Associated Sales: Similar Product Recommendation Strategy
scenario_en: When selling products on the Taobao platform and needing to increase product exposure and sales volume.
decision_en: Through the associated sales model, display similar products together, for example, when recommending fleece-lined thick warm pants, also display other styles or brands of fleece-lined pants.

title: 关联销售策略：商品与商品关联的延展式模型
scenario: 当需要通过商品关联来促进销售时，特别是功能性商品之间的关联。
decision: 采用“商品与商品相关联”的“延展式”关联销售模型，例如推荐VB+VC给吸烟者，或VB+葡萄籽素用于护肤抗敏。
rationale: 通过将具有互补或协同功能的商品进行搭配销售，可以满足顾客的特定需求，提升客单价和销售额。例如，吸烟会消耗VC，因此VB+VC是烟民的必备套餐；VB和葡萄籽素在护肤方面有协同作用。
title_en: Associated Sales Strategy: Extended Model of Product-Product Association
scenario_en: When needing to promote sales through product association, especially between functional products.
decision_en: Adopt an 'extended' associated sales model of 'product-to-product association', for example, recommending VB+VC to smokers, or VB+grape seed extract for skincare and anti-allergy.

title: 超值套餐推荐：商品关联销售策略
scenario: 当需要向顾客推荐超值商品组合时
decision: 通过将互补商品组合成套餐，并提供折扣价（如“立减”），以吸引顾客购买。
rationale: 关联销售能提高客单价和销售额，同时为顾客提供更优惠的购买选择。
title_en: Value Package Recommendation: Product Associated Sales Strategy
scenario_en: When needing to recommend value-for-money product combinations to customers.
decision_en: Combine complementary products into packages and offer discounted prices (e.g., 'instant discount') to attract customers to purchase.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：热销式关联
scenario: 当需要进行关联销售时，可以考虑采用热销式关联模型。
decision: 将爆款商品之间进行关联销售。
rationale: 通过将热销商品相互关联，可以利用其高流量和关注度，促进其他关联商品的销售。
title_en: The Four Steps of Associated Sales: Hot-Selling Association
scenario_en: When needing to conduct associated sales, consider using the hot-selling association model.
decision_en: Conduct associated sales between popular products.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：爆款商品间的潜在式关联
scenario: 当需要通过关联销售提升商品曝光和销售时
decision: 利用爆款商品之间的潜在式关联进行商品推荐。
rationale: 通过关联销售可以引导顾客浏览更多商品，从而增加销售机会。
title_en: The Four Steps of Associated Sales: Potential Association Between Bestselling Products
scenario_en: When needing to increase product exposure and sales through associated sales.
decision_en: Utilize the potential association between bestselling products for product recommendations.

title: 关联销售的四步曲
scenario: This section introduces the 'Four Steps of Associated Sales' model within the Taobao University curriculum.
decision: The content outlines a structured approach to implementing associated sales strategies.
rationale: To provide a framework for understanding and applying associated sales techniques.

title: 商品包装、产地、附件变更声明及官方标配与可选套餐
scenario: 当厂家未及时通知商品包装、产地、附件等信息变更时，或客户对收到的实物与图片不符有疑问时。
decision: 商城无法确保您所收到的实物与图片完全一致，但承诺所售商品均为行货正品，且发布时与市场同类商品同步。客户应监督并谅解未及时更新的情况。
rationale: 厂家可能在未及时通知的情况下更改商品包装、产地、附件等，导致图片与实物不符。商城承诺正品行货，并希望客户理解更新延迟。
title_en: Product Packaging, Origin, Accessory Change Statement, Official Standard Configuration, and Optional Packages
scenario_en: When manufacturers fail to promptly notify changes in product packaging, origin, accessories, etc., or when customers have questions about discrepancies between the received item and the image.
decision_en: The mall cannot guarantee that the actual item you receive will be exactly consistent with the image, but it promises that all sold products are genuine and are synchronized with similar products on the market at the time of release. Customers should supervise and understand situations where updates are not timely.

scenario: 在进行关联销售时，需要遵循一定的步骤来有效促进销售。

title: 关联销售的四步曲：通过追加销售实现包邮
scenario: 当顾客的订单金额接近包邮门槛（例如差1元）时，客服可以主动推荐额外商品。
decision: 客服应提醒顾客当前订单金额，并建议顾客加购小件商品以达到包邮条件。
rationale: 通过主动推荐，可以提高客单价，同时满足顾客对包邮的需求，提升购物体验。
title_en: Four Steps of Associated Sales: Achieving Free Shipping Through Upselling
scenario_en: When a customer's order amount is close to the free shipping threshold (e.g., 1 yuan short), customer service can proactively recommend additional items.
decision_en: Customer service should remind the customer of the current order amount and suggest adding small items to meet the free shipping condition.

title: 激发顾客兴趣点的最佳时机与关联销售四步曲
scenario: 当需要激发顾客兴趣点并进行关联销售时
decision: 通过“关联销售的四步曲”在“接触点投递”时激发顾客兴趣点。
rationale: 在适当的接触点进行关联销售可以有效激发顾客兴趣，提升销售。
title_en: Optimal Timing to Stimulate Customer Interest and Four Steps of Associated Sales
scenario_en: When needing to stimulate customer interest and conduct associated sales
decision_en: Stimulate customer interest at the 'touchpoint delivery' through the 'four steps of associated sales'.

title: 处理客户关于24小时发货承诺的询问
scenario: 客户询问为何订单未在承诺的24小时内发货。
decision: 首先核实客户付款时间，然后告知预计发货时间，并解释发货流程。同时，可以提供相关商品（如内衣）的退换货政策和保养信息。
rationale: 及时响应客户的疑问，提供准确的发货信息，并主动提供额外有用的信息，以提升客户满意度。
title_en: Handling Customer Inquiries Regarding 24-Hour Shipping Promise
scenario_en: A customer asks why their order has not shipped within the promised 24 hours.
decision_en: First, verify the customer's payment time, then inform them of the estimated shipping time and explain the shipping process. Additionally, provide return/exchange policies and care information for related products (e.g., underwear).

title: 关联销售不成功案例：客户明确拒绝后的持续推销
scenario: 客户在购买后被客服要求好评，并被询问是否需要购买其他款式。客户明确表示“没有了”和“不需要”后，客服仍继续推销其他商品。
decision: 客服在客户明确拒绝后不应继续进行关联销售，而应尊重客户意愿并结束对话。
rationale: 持续推销在客户明确拒绝后会造成客户反感，影响购物体验和品牌形象。
title_en: Unsuccessful Associated Sales Case: Continued Promotion After Customer Refusal
scenario_en: After a purchase, a customer service agent asks for a positive review and inquires if the customer wants to buy other styles. After the customer explicitly says 'no more' and 'no need', the agent continues to promote other products.
decision_en: Customer service should not continue with associated sales after a customer explicitly refuses, but should respect the customer's wishes and end the conversation.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：反馈优化
scenario: 在进行关联销售时，需要评估其有效性并持续改进。
decision: 关联销售需要不断改进和优化，其中一个关键步骤是“反馈优化”。
rationale: 为了确保关联销售策略的有效性并适应市场变化，持续的反馈和优化是必要的。
title_en: Four Steps of Associated Sales: Feedback Optimization
scenario_en: When conducting associated sales, it is necessary to evaluate their effectiveness and continuously improve.
decision_en: Associated sales require continuous improvement and optimization, with 'feedback optimization' being a key step.

title: 关联销售的四步曲
scenario: This section introduces a four-step process for 'associated sales' within the Taobao context.
decision: The document outlines a 'four-step symphony' for associated sales, which includes 'feedback optimization'.
rationale: This is a methodological principle for sales strategy, likely aimed at improving sales performance through related product recommendations and continuous improvement.
title_en: Four Steps of Associated Sales
scenario_en: This section introduces a four-step process for 'associated sales' within the Taobao context.
decision_en: The document outlines a 'four-step symphony' for associated sales, which includes 'feedback optimization'.

title: 售前客服自动回复与商品咨询处理
scenario: 当顾客发起对话时，售前客服Judy的自动回复包含店铺促销信息，随后顾客咨询特定商品的价格。
decision: 客服自动回复应包含欢迎语、工号、店铺当前促销活动（如优惠券、换购、特价款），并提醒顾客使用购物车。对于顾客的商品价格咨询，客服需准确回复。
rationale: 自动回复旨在提高效率，告知顾客最新优惠，引导购物。准确回复商品价格是售前客服的基本职责。
title_en: Pre-sales Customer Service Auto-reply and Product Inquiry Handling
scenario_en: When a customer initiates a conversation, pre-sales customer service Judy's auto-reply includes store promotion information, and then the customer inquires about the price of a specific product.
decision_en: The customer service auto-reply should include a welcome message, agent ID, current store promotions (e.g., coupons, redemption offers, special prices), and remind the customer to use the shopping cart. For customer product price inquiries, the agent must reply accurately.

title: 客户拒绝优惠后的服务流程与评价引导
scenario: 当客户认为商品价格过高，拒绝现有折扣优惠并表示要离开时。
decision: 客服应礼貌回应客户的离开意向，并主动询问是否还有其他问题。在客户确认无其他问题后，进行服务反馈优化，感谢客户支持，并引导客户对服务进行评价。
rationale: 即使客户未购买，也要保持积极的服务态度，通过询问其他需求和引导评价来提升客户满意度和品牌形象，为未来的购买机会打下基础。
title_en: Service Process and Review Guidance After Customer Rejects Offer
scenario_en: When a customer finds the product price too high, rejects existing discounts, and indicates they want to leave.
decision_en: Customer service should politely acknowledge the customer's intention to leave, and proactively ask if there are any other questions. After the customer confirms no other issues, optimize service feedback, thank the customer for their support, and guide them to rate the service.

title: 淘宝艾格官方旗舰店售前客服欢迎语
scenario: 当客户进入淘宝艾格官方旗舰店并与售前客服互动时。
decision: 售前客服应使用标准欢迎语：“欢迎光临艾格官方旗舰店,我是售前客服(工号JMHZ0400),很高兴为您服务”。
rationale: 提供一致且专业的客户服务体验，明确客服身份。
title_en: Taobao Etam Official Flagship Store Pre-sales Customer Service Welcome Message
scenario_en: When a customer enters the Taobao Etam Official Flagship Store and interacts with pre-sales customer service.
decision_en: Pre-sales customer service should use the standard welcome message: 'Welcome to Etam Official Flagship Store, I am pre-sales customer service (ID JMHZ0400), happy to serve you'.

title: 春装新品发布与开春礼遇活动
scenario: 当顾客询问春装新品或开春礼遇活动时，或在进行关联销售铺垫时。
decision: 告知顾客春装新品限时2件包邮，以及开春礼遇全场折上折，3件折上再享8.5折的优惠。
rationale: 明确告知顾客当前进行的促销活动，以吸引顾客消费并为后续的关联销售做铺垫。
title_en: Spring New Arrivals and Early Spring Courtesy Event
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about spring new arrivals or the early spring courtesy event, or when setting the stage for associated sales.
decision_en: Inform the customer that spring new arrivals have a limited-time offer of free shipping on 2 items, and the early spring courtesy event offers an additional discount on top of existing discounts, with 3 items receiving an extra 15% off.

title: 识别顾客购买意图并进行关联销售
scenario: 当顾客询问特定商品尺码，表明其已有明确购买意图时。
decision: 客服应识别出顾客的购买意图，并准备进行关联销售。
rationale: 顾客询问尺码是购买意图的强烈信号，此时是进行关联销售的最佳时机。
title_en: Identifying Customer Purchase Intent and Conducting Associated Sales
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about a specific product size, indicating a clear purchase intent.
decision_en: Customer service should identify the customer's purchase intent and prepare to conduct associated sales.

title: 关联销售的四步曲：案例分析
scenario: 客服在顾客确认购买一件商品后，主动询问顾客是否需要查看其他产品，并提及当前有活动。
decision: 客服主动推荐与已选商品搭配的其他商品，并再次强调活动信息。
rationale: 通过关联销售，增加顾客的购买意愿和订单价值。
title_en: Four Steps of Associated Sales: Case Study
scenario_en: After a customer confirms the purchase of one item, customer service proactively asks if the customer would like to view other products and mentions current promotions.
decision_en: Customer service proactively recommends other products that pair with the selected item and re-emphasizes promotion information.

title: 推荐不成功后立即推荐替代产品以促成关联销售
scenario: 当客户对推荐的商品不满意时，例如因颜色、款式等个人偏好原因。
decision: 客服应立即推荐其他替代产品，并突出替代产品的优点，以满足客户需求并促成销售。
rationale: 及时提供替代方案可以挽留客户，避免客户流失，并通过满足客户的潜在需求来完成关联销售。
title_en: Immediately Recommend Alternative Products for Associated Sales After Unsuccessful Recommendation
scenario_en: When a customer is not satisfied with a recommended product, for example, due to personal preferences like color or style.
decision_en: Customer service should immediately recommend other alternative products, highlighting their advantages to meet customer needs and facilitate a sale.

title: 通过关联销售和优惠券提升客户购买量和满意度
scenario: 当客户已选择部分商品，且有进一步购买潜力时，或客户对已选商品表示满意并寻求额外优惠时。
decision: 通过提供组合优惠（如“三件85折”）鼓励客户增加购买数量。当客户寻求额外优惠时，提供店铺优惠券以促进二次销售，并设定使用期限。
rationale: 通过关联销售和限时优惠券，可以有效刺激客户的购买欲望，提高客单价，并为未来的销售奠定基础，同时提升客户满意度。
title_en: Increasing Customer Purchase Volume and Satisfaction Through Associated Sales and Coupons
scenario_en: When a customer has selected some items and has further purchase potential, or when a customer expresses satisfaction with selected items and seeks additional discounts.
decision_en: Encourage customers to increase purchase quantity by offering bundle discounts (e.g., '3 items for 15% off'). When customers seek additional discounts, provide store coupons to promote repeat sales and set an expiration date.

title: 关联销售的技巧
scenario: When considering product selection and timing for sales strategies.
decision: Focus on '最佳时机' (optimal timing) and '产品选择' (product selection) to achieve '最优效果' (optimal results) in '关联销售' (associated sales).
rationale: These elements are crucial for effective associated sales, as highlighted by '淘宝大学' (Taobao University).
title_en: Associated Sales Techniques
scenario_en: When considering product selection and timing for sales strategies.
decision_en: Focus on 'optimal timing' and 'product selection' to achieve 'optimal results' in 'associated sales'.

title: 关联销售的技巧与时机
scenario: 当顾客静默下单后或已确定购买意向时，客服应考虑进行关联销售。
decision: 静默下单后应尽快联系顾客进行推荐；顾客确定购买意向并在拍产品前适时推荐。推荐时应选择热销爆款、高咨询量、经典款式或长期售卖的利润款，并推荐互补产品或优势套餐，避免推荐可替代产品。
rationale: 越早联系顾客，推荐成功率越高。在顾客购买意向明确时进行推荐，成功率最高。选择合适的产品和推荐策略可以有效提升关联销售的成功率和客单价。
title_en: Cross-selling Techniques and Timing
scenario_en: When a customer places a silent order or has a confirmed purchase intention, customer service should consider cross-selling.
decision_en: Contact the customer as soon as possible after a silent order to make recommendations; recommend products appropriately before the customer places an order, once their purchase intention is confirmed. When recommending, choose best-selling, highly inquired, classic, or long-term profitable items. Recommend complementary products or advantageous packages, and avoid recommending substitutable products.

title: 客服目的：提升转化率、客单价和回头率
scenario: 客服团队在日常工作中，需要明确其核心目标。
decision: 客服工作的目的在于提高访客的购买转化率，增加已购买客户的客单价，并提升客户的重复购买率。
rationale: 这些目标是衡量客服团队对业务增长贡献的关键指标，直接影响公司的营收和客户生命周期价值。
title_en: Customer Service Objectives: Improve Conversion Rate, Average Order Value, and Repurchase Rate
scenario_en: The customer service team needs to clarify its core objectives in daily work.
decision_en: The purpose of customer service is to increase visitor purchase conversion rates, increase the average order value for existing customers, and improve customer repurchase rates.

title: 客服目标达成的途径：产品介绍、店铺活动和沟通服务
scenario: 客服在与客户互动时，为了达成目标。
decision: 客服应通过介绍产品、推广店铺活动和提供优质沟通服务来达成目标。
rationale: 这些是提升客户满意度和促进销售的关键途径。
title_en: Achieving Customer Service Goals: Product Introduction, Store Activities, and Communication Service
scenario_en: When customer service interacts with customers to achieve goals.
decision_en: Customer service should achieve goals by introducing products, promoting store activities, and providing quality communication services.

title: 售前准备：产品、店铺与服务准备
scenario: 在进行任何销售活动之前，需要完成售前准备。
decision: 售前准备包括三个主要方面：产品准备、店铺准备和服务准备。
rationale: 充分的售前准备是确保销售顺利进行和提供优质客户服务的基础。
title_en: Pre-sales Preparation: Product, Store, and Service Readiness
scenario_en: Pre-sales preparation must be completed before any sales activity.
decision_en: Pre-sales preparation includes three main aspects: product preparation, store preparation, and service preparation.

title: 产品准备：熟记产品手册
scenario: 在进行产品准备时
decision: 客服人员应熟记产品手册中的所有产品知识要素。
rationale: 熟练掌握产品知识是提供优质客户服务的基础。
title_en: Product Preparation: Memorize Product Manual
scenario_en: When preparing products.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should memorize all product knowledge elements in the product manual.

title: 客服产品知识要素
scenario: 客服人员需要掌握产品知识时。
decision: 客服人员应全面了解产品的品类、品牌、结构、属性、特性、风格、卖点和目标人群。
rationale: 掌握全面的产品知识是客服工作的目的，有助于更好地服务客户。
title_en: Customer Service Product Knowledge Elements
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to master product knowledge.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should have a comprehensive understanding of the product's category, brand, structure, attributes, characteristics, style, selling points, and target audience.

title: 品牌列表与Levi's品牌介绍
scenario: 需要了解公司代理的品牌列表或Levi's品牌的详细介绍时
decision: 参考提供的品牌列表，并使用Levi's的官方品牌介绍来描述其历史、风格和全球影响力。
rationale: 提供准确的品牌信息和官方品牌介绍有助于统一对外沟通口径，确保品牌形象的一致性。
title_en: Brand List and Levi's Brand Introduction
scenario_en: When needing to know the list of brands represented by the company or a detailed introduction to the Levi's brand.
decision_en: Refer to the provided brand list and use Levi's official brand introduction to describe its history, style, and global influence.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性分类
scenario: 当需要了解或分类公司销售的产品时，例如鞋包配饰、运动户外、数码、珠宝手表等大类及其子类。
decision: 参考提供的产品知识要素，了解不同品牌属性下的具体产品分类，如女鞋、男鞋、配饰、女包、男包、旅行箱包等。
rationale: 此分类有助于客服人员快速识别产品类型，理解产品范围，并为客户提供更精准的咨询服务。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attribute Classification
scenario_en: When needing to understand or classify products sold by the company, such as major categories like shoes, bags, accessories, sports & outdoors, digital, jewelry & watches, and their subcategories.
decision_en: Refer to the provided product knowledge elements to understand specific product classifications under different brand attributes, such as women's shoes, men's shoes, accessories, women's bags, men's bags, luggage, etc.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性分类
scenario: 当需要理解或描述产品的品牌属性时。
decision: 应根据长度、纯度、容量、等级、重量、大小等规格对产品进行分类和描述。
rationale: 通过标准化分类，可以清晰地定义和区分不同产品，便于内部管理和客户沟通。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attribute Classification
scenario_en: When needing to understand or describe the brand attributes of a product.
decision_en: Products should be classified and described according to specifications such as length, purity, capacity, grade, weight, and size.

title: 产品规格区分标准
scenario: 当需要区分或描述产品规格时。
decision: 产品规格可以根据大小、码数、罩杯或手寸来区分。
rationale: 为了标准化产品描述和管理，需要明确的规格区分方法。
title_en: Product Specification Differentiation Standards
scenario_en: When needing to differentiate or describe product specifications.
decision_en: Product specifications can be differentiated by size, number, cup size, or finger size.

title: 产品尺码信息与测量误差
scenario: 当客户询问产品尺码信息或对尺码有疑问时，以及需要了解尺码测量标准和潜在误差时。
decision: 提供详细的尺码表（如均码的肩宽、胸围、腰围、下摆、衣长、袖长），并告知客户尺码为平铺测量，存在1cm~3cm的正常误差。同时，提醒客户注意拍摄环境可能导致的微小色差，并明确配送的腰带、鞋、项链等为拍摄饰品，不赠送。
rationale: 确保客户对产品尺码有清晰的理解，管理客户对尺码误差和产品外观（色差、赠品）的预期，减少因信息不对称导致的纠纷。
title_en: Product Size Information and Measurement Error
scenario_en: When customers inquire about product size information or have questions about sizing, and when needing to understand size measurement standards and potential errors.
decision_en: Provide a detailed size chart (e.g., for one-size-fits-all: shoulder width, bust, waist, hem, length, sleeve length), and inform customers that sizes are measured flat and there is a normal error of 1cm~3cm. Also, remind customers of potential slight color differences due to shooting environment, and clarify that belts, shoes, necklaces, etc., shown are for photography purposes and are not included as gifts.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性与规格
scenario: 当需要了解或描述产品的基础知识时，特别是关于其品牌属性和规格。
decision: 应明确产品的品牌属性，并详细说明其规格，例如重量单位（公斤/KG，克/G）。
rationale: 清晰的产品知识是有效沟通和产品管理的基础。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attributes and Specifications
scenario_en: When needing to understand or describe basic product knowledge, especially regarding its brand attributes and specifications.
decision_en: The product's brand attributes should be clearly defined, and its specifications, such as weight units (kilograms/KG, grams/G), should be detailed.

title: 钻石净度等级标准：GIA与中国国家标准对比
scenario: 当需要评估或解释钻石的净度等级时，无论是根据美国宝石学院（GIA）标准还是中国国家标准。
decision: 参考GIA的FL到I3等级或中国国家标准的镜下无暇到重瑕疵P3等级，根据10倍放大镜下瑕疵的可见程度和性质来判断钻石净度。
rationale: 提供统一的钻石净度评估标准，确保产品质量描述的准确性和一致性。
title_en: Diamond Clarity Grading Standards: GIA vs. China National Standard
scenario_en: When needing to evaluate or explain diamond clarity grades, whether according to GIA standards or China National Standards.
decision_en: Refer to GIA's FL to I3 grades or China National Standards' Flawless under 10x magnification to P3 (Heavy Imperfections) grades, judging diamond clarity based on the visibility and nature of inclusions under 10x magnification.

title: 翡翠A货、B货、C货的定义与区分
scenario: 当需要了解或向客户解释翡翠产品的品牌属性和真伪时。
decision: 翡翠A货是未经任何人工处理的天然翡翠，代表天然真货，与品质无关。翡翠B货是经过酸洗、充胶处理的天然劣质翡翠。翡翠C货是在B货基础上添加染料的翡翠。B货和C货均视为假货。
rationale: 明确区分不同类型的翡翠有助于确保产品知识的准确性，并正确识别和传达产品的真实属性。
title_en: Jadeite A, B, and C Goods: Definitions and Distinctions
scenario_en: When needing to understand or explain the brand attributes and authenticity of jadeite products to customers.
decision_en: Jadeite A-goods are natural jadeite without any artificial treatment, representing genuine natural goods, unrelated to quality. Jadeite B-goods are natural inferior jadeite treated with acid washing and resin filling. Jadeite C-goods are B-goods with added dye. Both B-goods and C-goods are considered fakes.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性与规格容量
scenario: 当需要了解或描述产品的基础知识时，特别是关于其品牌属性和规格容量。
decision: 应明确产品的品牌属性，并详细说明其规格容量，例如以升（L）或毫升（ML）为单位。
rationale: 清晰的产品知识是有效沟通和客户服务的基础。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attributes and Specification Capacity
scenario_en: When needing to understand or describe basic product knowledge, especially regarding its brand attributes and specification capacity.
decision_en: The product's brand attributes should be clearly defined, and its specification capacity, for example, in liters (L) or milliliters (ML), should be detailed.

title: 贵金属纯度规格：金与银的纯度等级
scenario: 当需要了解或解释黄金和白银产品的纯度规格时。
rationale: 这些是行业内通用的贵金属纯度标准和表现形式，用于区分和标识不同纯度的产品。
title_en: Precious Metal Purity Specifications: Gold and Silver Purity Grades
scenario_en: When needing to understand or explain the purity specifications of gold and silver products.
decision_en: Gold purity is divided into 9999.9 (Wan Zu Jin), 999.9 (Qian Zu Jin), and 99.9 (Zu Jin). Silver purity is divided into 999, 990, and 925.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性与产品准备
scenario: 当需要了解产品的基础信息时。
decision: 应关注产品的品牌属性，特别是规格（如长度），并了解产品准备的相关信息。
rationale: 了解这些基本要素是有效管理和沟通产品信息的关键。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attributes and Product Preparation
scenario_en: When basic product information is needed.
decision_en: Focus on the product's brand attributes, especially specifications (e.g., length), and understand product preparation information.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性
scenario: 当需要了解或描述产品的基本信息时。
decision: 应涵盖产品的品牌属性，包括材质、成分、配比、特性和颜色等关键要素。
rationale: 全面了解产品知识是提供准确客户服务的基础。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attributes
scenario_en: When basic product information needs to be understood or described.
decision_en: Cover the product's brand attributes, including key elements such as material, ingredients, proportion, characteristics, and color.

title: 产品核心成分：纳米活性金、沙棘果萃取物、小分子胶原蛋白的功效
scenario: 当客户询问产品成分及其具体功效时，或需要向客户介绍产品卖点时。
decision: 向客户介绍纳米活性金具有保湿亮肤、延缓衰老、导入、抗氧化、长效保湿、消炎提亮、加强皮肤抵抗力与防护功能；沙棘果萃取物具有美白滋养、修复再生、抗衰老、淡斑、修复受损肌肤的功效；小分子胶原蛋白具有保湿抗皱、弹力紧致、滋养、修复、预防皱纹、缩小毛孔的功效。
rationale: 这些成分是产品的核心卖点，了解其功效有助于客服准确回答客户疑问，并有效推广产品。
title_en: Core Product Ingredients: Efficacy of Nano Active Gold, Sea Buckthorn Extract, and Small Molecule Collagen
scenario_en: When customers ask about product ingredients and their specific effects, or when introducing product selling points to customers.
decision_en: Inform customers that Nano Active Gold moisturizes and brightens skin, delays aging, aids absorption, provides antioxidant benefits, offers long-lasting hydration, reduces inflammation, brightens skin, and strengthens skin resistance and protection. Sea Buckthorn Extract whitens, nourishes, repairs, regenerates, anti-ages, fades spots, and repairs damaged skin. Small Molecule Collagen moisturizes, reduces wrinkles, enhances elasticity and firmness, nourishes, repairs, prevents wrinkles, and minimizes pores.

title: 莫代尔纤维产品知识与品牌属性
scenario: 当需要向客户介绍产品材质及其优点时，特别是涉及莫代尔成分的产品。
decision: 强调莫代尔是天然、对人体无害且环保的材料。说明其结合了天然纤维的质感和合成纤维的实用性，具有棉的柔软、丝的光泽、麻的滑爽，并且吸水透气性优于棉。
rationale: 提供详细的产品材质信息，突出莫代尔的天然、环保和舒适特性，以增强客户对产品的信任和满意度。
title_en: Modal Fiber Product Knowledge and Brand Attributes
scenario_en: When introducing product materials and their advantages to customers, especially for products containing Modal.
decision_en: Emphasize that Modal is a natural, harmless, and environmentally friendly material. Explain that it combines the texture of natural fibers with the practicality of synthetic fibers, offering the softness of cotton, the luster of silk, the smoothness of linen, and superior water absorption and breathability compared to cotton.

title: 产品知识要素：Levi's女式格纹短袖衬衫产品信息
scenario: 当需要查询Levi's女式格纹短袖衬衫的产品信息时。
decision: 该产品名称为Levi's李维斯 女式格纹短袖衬衫，货号68298-0001，原价RMB199，面料100%纯棉。
rationale: 提供具体产品信息以便客户查询和销售。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Levi's Women's Plaid Short-Sleeve Shirt Product Information
scenario_en: When needing to query product information for Levi's Women's Plaid Short-Sleeve Shirt.
decision_en: The product name is Levi's Women's Plaid Short-Sleeve Shirt, item number 68298-0001, original price RMB199, fabric 100% cotton.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性与宝贝指标
scenario: 当需要了解或描述产品的品牌属性和各项宝贝指标时。
decision: 参考产品知识要素中列出的品牌属性（材质、特性）和宝贝指标（弹力、厚薄、柔软、版型、长度、洗涤、透视指数）进行描述。
rationale: 确保对产品有全面、标准化的理解和描述，便于内部沟通和客户服务。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attributes and Item Metrics
scenario_en: When needing to understand or describe a product's brand attributes and various item metrics.
decision_en: Refer to the brand attributes (material, characteristics) and item metrics (elasticity, thickness, softness, fit, length, washing, transparency index) listed in the product knowledge elements for description.

title: 德国风暴伞产品特性与耐用性
scenario: 当客户询问德国风暴伞的产品特性、材质或耐用性时。
decision: 向客户介绍德国风暴伞的十大功能，包括加绒加厚、超保暖、不缩水、防风、超柔软、透气、最佳耐用性、不起球、耐撕裂、抗穿刺性。并强调其75公斤悬吊压力测试的耐用性。
rationale: 提供详细的产品知识，以展示产品的卓越品质和耐用性，增强客户信任。
title_en: German Storm Umbrella Product Features and Durability
scenario_en: When customers ask about the German Storm Umbrella's product features, material, or durability.
decision_en: Introduce the German Storm Umbrella's ten features: fleece-lined and thickened, ultra-warm, shrink-resistant, windproof, ultra-soft, breathable, optimal durability, anti-pilling, tear-resistant, and puncture-resistant. Emphasize its durability with a 75kg suspension pressure test.

title: 产品知识要素：品牌属性与产品准备
scenario: 当需要了解产品的基础知识要素时。
decision: 应关注产品的品牌属性，包括材质和颜色，并确保产品已准备就绪。
rationale: 了解产品的基本属性是提供客户服务和进行产品管理的基础。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Brand Attributes and Product Preparation
scenario_en: When needing to understand basic product knowledge elements.
decision_en: Focus on the product's brand attributes, including material and color, and ensure the product is ready.

title: 产品版型风格分类
scenario: 当需要对产品版型进行分类和描述时。
decision: 产品版型可分为宽松、紧身、合身、修身。长度可分为超短、短款、常规、中长、长款。
rationale: 为了标准化产品描述和风格定位。
title_en: Product Fit Style Classification
scenario_en: When needing to classify and describe product fits.
decision_en: Product fits can be classified as loose, tight, regular, or slim. Lengths can be classified as ultra-short, short, regular, mid-length, or long.

title: A型服装风格特征与人群
scenario: 当描述或识别A型服装风格时。
decision: A型服装的基本特征是不收腰宽下摆或收腰宽下摆，上衣肩部和衣摆通常宽松肥大，服饰以收紧腰阔摆口为特征。
rationale: A型服装风格传达稳重、安定且充满青春活力的特点，有助于定义产品风格和目标人群。
title_en: A-line Apparel Style Characteristics and Target Audience
scenario_en: When describing or identifying A-line apparel style.
decision_en: The basic characteristics of A-line apparel are an uncinched wide hem or a cinched wide hem. Tops typically have loose shoulders and hems, and garments are characterized by a cinched waist and wide flare.

title: 产品知识要素：服装风格人群分类
scenario: 当需要理解或描述服装产品的风格特征时。
decision: 根据服装的廓形特征，将其归类为“H型”或“X型”。H型服装以宽肩、扩摆、束腰或上下肥大中间收紧为特征。X型服装则强调窈窕、优美、自然，能体现女性线条美。
rationale: 通过对服装廓形的分类，可以更清晰地定义和沟通产品的风格，有助于产品准备和市场定位。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Apparel Style Audience Classification
scenario_en: When needing to understand or describe the style characteristics of apparel products.
decision_en: Based on the silhouette characteristics of the apparel, classify it as 'H-type' or 'X-type'. H-type apparel is characterized by wide shoulders, flared hems, cinched waists, or loose top and bottom with a cinched middle. X-type apparel emphasizes slenderness, elegance, and naturalness, highlighting feminine curves.

title: 产品知识要素：服装风格人群分类
scenario: 当需要了解或描述服装产品的风格特征时。
decision: 根据服装的款式特点将其归类为“型”或“T型”风格人群。
rationale: 明确的风格分类有助于产品描述和目标客户定位。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Apparel Style Audience Classification
scenario_en: When needing to understand or describe the style characteristics of apparel products.
decision_en: Classify apparel based on its style features into 'type' or 'T-type' style audiences.

title: 产品知识要素：风格人群 - 型与V型
scenario: 当需要了解产品风格与目标人群特征时。
decision: 了解“型”风格通常具有夸张肩部，多用于男装，体现男性魅力；“V型”风格则具有活泼潇洒的特点。
rationale: 这些是产品设计中常见的风格分类，有助于理解不同产品所针对的消费者群体及其特点。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Style Audience - Type and V-type
scenario_en: When needing to understand product style and target audience characteristics.
decision_en: Understand that 'type' style typically features exaggerated shoulders, often used in menswear to embody masculine charm; 'V-type' style is characterized by being lively and dashing.

title: 产品知识要素：风格人群 - O型
scenario: 当描述或识别O型风格的服饰时。
decision: O型服饰具有夸张柔和的造型特点。
rationale: 这是产品知识中对O型风格人群服饰特征的定义。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Style Audience - O-type
scenario_en: When describing or identifying O-type apparel.
decision_en: O-type apparel features exaggerated and soft styling characteristics.

title: 头层牛皮与二层牛皮的产品特性
scenario: 当需要了解或向客户介绍产品材料特性时。
decision: 头层牛皮具有又密又薄的纤维层，而二层牛皮则有疏松的纤维组织。
rationale: 区分不同皮革的特性有助于理解产品质量和用途。
title_en: Product Characteristics of Top-Grain Leather and Split Leather
scenario_en: When needing to understand or introduce product material characteristics to customers.
decision_en: Top-grain leather has a dense and thin fiber layer, while split leather has a loose fiber structure.

title: 产品知识要素：特性卖点与产品利益
scenario: 当需要理解或传达产品信息时，特别是其核心价值和吸引力。
decision: 关注产品的特性卖点和能为客户带来的利益。
rationale: 理解产品的特性卖点和产品利益是有效沟通产品价值的基础。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Feature Selling Points and Product Benefits
scenario_en: When needing to understand or communicate product information, especially its core value and appeal.
decision_en: Focus on the product's feature selling points and the benefits it can bring to customers.

title: 产品搭配与组合特惠价
scenario: 当顾客对产品搭配使用效果或组合优惠感兴趣时。
decision: 推荐1+1搭配使用，并强调其效果提升3倍。同时，提供组合特惠价以吸引顾客。
rationale: 通过产品搭配使用可以提升效果，增加产品吸引力。组合特惠价能刺激购买，提高客单价。
title_en: Product Pairing and Combination Special Offer
scenario_en: When customers are interested in the effect of product pairing or combination discounts.
decision_en: Recommend 1+1 pairing for a 3x improved effect. Additionally, offer a combination special price to attract customers.

title: 产品包装特性与签收注意事项
scenario: 当客户收到Mbox产品时，需要了解产品包装的特性以及签收时的注意事项。
decision: 客户应在确认商品完好无损后签收，并注意产品包装具有防潮、防压特性，且需小心轻放。
rationale: 确保客户收到完好无损的商品，并告知客户产品包装的设计特点，以避免运输过程中的损坏。
title_en: Product Packaging Characteristics and Signing Precautions
scenario_en: When customers receive an Mbox product and need to understand the product packaging characteristics and precautions when signing for delivery.
decision_en: Customers should sign for the goods only after confirming they are intact. Note that the product packaging is moisture-proof and pressure-resistant, and should be handled with care.

title: 产品知识要素：品类结构
scenario: 当需要了解或管理产品品类结构时。
decision: 产品品类结构包括热销款、上新款、利润款、服饰、大清仓、清仓大特卖和清仓款。
rationale: 明确产品品类结构有助于库存管理和销售策略制定。
title_en: Product Knowledge Elements: Category Structure
scenario_en: When needing to understand or manage product category structure.
decision_en: Product category structure includes hot sellers, new arrivals, profit items, apparel, big clearance, clearance sale, and clearance items.

title: 产品手册内容：品牌、图片、品名、款式、尺码、颜色、面料/材质、数量、售价、备注
scenario: 客服人员需要熟悉公司产品信息时。
decision: 客服人员应熟悉产品手册中关于品牌、图片、品名、款式、尺码、颜色、面料/材质、数量、售价和备注等所有信息。
rationale: 熟悉产品信息是提供准确客户服务的基础。
title_en: Product Manual Content: Brand, Images, Product Name, Style, Size, Color, Fabric/Material, Quantity, Price, Remarks
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to be familiar with company product information.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should be familiar with all information in the product manual regarding brand, images, product name, style, size, color, fabric/material, quantity, price, and remarks.

title: 店铺准备与物流ERP查询操作
scenario: This section outlines general operational areas related to store preparation and logistics ERP query operations.
decision: The content indicates a need to understand and manage store readiness and how to perform queries within the logistics ERP system.
rationale: These are fundamental operational areas for efficient store management and logistics handling.
title_en: Store Preparation and Logistics ERP Query Operations
scenario_en: This section outlines general operational areas related to store preparation and logistics ERP query operations.
decision_en: The content indicates a need to understand and manage store readiness and how to perform queries within the logistics ERP system.

title: 活动介绍与店铺准备
scenario: 当需要了解活动类型、话术、要素以及店铺如何准备时。
decision: 本节内容概述了活动的介绍、类型、话术、要素以及店铺应进行的准备工作。
rationale: 为客服人员提供活动相关的基础信息和准备指南，确保活动顺利进行。
title_en: Activity Introduction and Store Preparation
scenario_en: When needing to understand activity types, scripts, elements, and how a store should prepare.
decision_en: This section outlines the introduction, types, scripts, elements of activities, and the preparations a store should make.

title: 活动类型分类
scenario: 当需要对店铺进行的活动进行分类时。
decision: 活动类型可分为类目活动、店内活动、淘宝活动和店外活动。
rationale: 对活动进行分类有助于更好地组织和管理店铺的营销策略。
title_en: Activity Type Classification
scenario_en: When needing to classify activities conducted by the store.
decision_en: Activity types can be classified into category activities, in-store activities, Taobao activities, and external activities.

title: 店内活动：新品特惠感恩季买一送一优惠券活动
scenario: 当顾客购买本店新品分类内的商品时，可以参与“买一送一”优惠券活动。
decision: 顾客购买多少件新品，即可获赠等量的优惠券。
rationale: 此活动旨在通过“买一送一”的优惠形式，吸引顾客购买新品，提升新品销量和顾客参与度。
title_en: In-Store Activity: New Product Special Offer, Buy One Get One Free Coupon Event
scenario_en: When customers purchase items from the store's new product category, they can participate in the 'Buy One Get One Free' coupon event.
decision_en: Customers will receive an equal number of coupons to the number of new products purchased.

title: 活动类型：店外活动介绍
scenario: 本节介绍不同类型的店外活动。
decision: 店外活动包括聚划算、天天特价、类目活动、年底大促和Taobao活动。
rationale: 此信息用于分类和理解不同营销活动的范围。
title_en: Activity Type: Introduction to External Activities
scenario_en: This section introduces different types of external activities.
decision_en: External activities include Juhuasuan, Tiantian Tejia, category activities, year-end sales, and Taobao activities.

title: 淘宝聚划算活动类型及保障介绍
scenario: 当客户咨询淘宝聚划算活动类型或价格保障时。
decision: 向客户介绍聚划算包含的活动类型，如今日团购、品牌团、整点聚、聚名品、聚家装等，并说明“30天最低价”保障，即30天内若低于参团价出售，卖家承诺5倍差价赔偿。
rationale: 提供详细的活动信息和价格保障，以增强客户信任和购买意愿。
title_en: Taobao Juhuasuan Activity Types and Guarantee Introduction
scenario_en: When customers inquire about Taobao Juhuasuan activity types or price guarantees.
decision_en: Introduce customers to the types of activities included in Juhuasuan, such as Today's Group Buy, Brand Group, Hourly Deals, Jumingpin, Jujiazhuang, etc., and explain the '30-day lowest price' guarantee, meaning if sold below the group price within 30 days, the seller promises 5 times the price difference as compensation.

title: 夏季新品特惠与品牌团购促销活动
scenario: 当客户询问夏季新品特惠、品牌团购或其他促销活动时。
decision: 告知客户夏季新品最低1.5折起，全场包邮；VICTORIACROSS品牌最低1.6折起，全场包邮；odm品牌最低2折起，全场包邮；日丰、LIEBOR、adidas等品牌在5.16家装大促期间最低3折起，全场包邮。
rationale: 提供具体的折扣信息和包邮政策，以吸引顾客并促进销售。
title_en: Summer New Product Specials and Brand Group Buy Promotions
scenario_en: When customers ask about summer new product specials, brand group buys, or other promotional activities.
decision_en: Inform customers that summer new products start from 1.5% off, with free shipping store-wide; VICTORIACROSS brand starts from 1.6% off, with free shipping store-wide; odm brand starts from 2% off, with free shipping store-wide; brands like RIFENG, LIEBOR, adidas, etc., start from 3% off during the 5.16 home improvement sale, with free shipping store-wide.

title: 淘宝天天特价活动介绍与商品展示
scenario: 当需要了解淘宝天天特价活动的类型、商品分类和促销形式时。
decision: 淘宝天天特价是一个淘宝活动，提供10元包邮、优品特卖等促销，商品涵盖时尚女装、母婴儿童、数码家电等多个品类，并有实时热卖商品展示。
rationale: 此页面旨在介绍淘宝天天特价活动的概况，包括其活动类型、主要促销点、商品分类以及实时促销商品，帮助用户快速了解平台内容。
title_en: Taobao Tiantian Tejia Activity Introduction and Product Display
scenario_en: When needing to understand the types, product categories, and promotional forms of Taobao Tiantian Tejia activities.
decision_en: Taobao Tiantian Tejia is a Taobao activity offering promotions like 10 yuan with free shipping and premium product sales. Products cover various categories such as fashion women's wear, maternal and child products, digital home appliances, and feature real-time hot-selling product displays.

title: 淘宝双11预售活动介绍及商品品类上线时间
scenario: 客户咨询淘宝双11预售活动详情或商品上线时间
decision: 告知客户淘宝双11预售活动分波进行，第一波活动内容包括付定金锁定商品、付尾款享底价、送红包及全场包邮。不同商品品类有不同的预售上线日期。
rationale: 提供活动概览和关键日期，帮助客户了解预售机制和规划购物。
title_en: Taobao Double 11 Pre-sale Activity Introduction and Product Category Launch Times
scenario_en: Customer inquires about Taobao Double 11 pre-sale activity details or product launch times.
decision_en: Inform customers that the Taobao Double 11 pre-sale activity is conducted in waves. The first wave includes paying a deposit to lock in products, paying the final balance for the lowest price, receiving red envelopes, and free shipping store-wide. Different product categories have different pre-sale launch dates.

title: 淘宝运动至多市场类目活动介绍
scenario: This section introduces the 'Taobao Sports Market' category activity.
decision: Understand the scope and focus of the 'Taobao Sports Market' category activity, which includes various sports like running, basketball, swimming, and cycling, and related products and themes.
rationale: This information provides an overview of a specific promotional activity on Taobao, outlining its type, main categories, and featured themes, which is essential for planning and participation.
title_en: Taobao Sports Market Category Activity Introduction
scenario_en: This section introduces the 'Taobao Sports Market' category activity.
decision_en: Understand the scope and focus of the 'Taobao Sports Market' category activity, which includes various sports like running, basketball, swimming, and cycling, and related products and themes.

title: 活动介绍：活动要素
scenario: 当需要介绍一项活动时
decision: 应明确活动的产品、时间、形式、对象和店铺准备。
rationale: 这些是活动介绍的基本要素，确保信息完整。
title_en: Activity Introduction: Activity Elements
scenario_en: When needing to introduce an activity.
decision_en: The activity's product, time, format, target audience, and store preparations should be clearly defined.

title: 春装第2季新品发布活动介绍
scenario: 店铺为庆祝两周年及荣升两皇冠，于2013年3月13日举办春装第2季新品发布活动。
decision: 活动期间，全场十余款商品享受30%的折扣，并提供包邮服务。促销商品数量有限，售完即止，每天上午10点开始抢购。
rationale: 通过限时折扣和包邮服务，庆祝店铺里程碑并吸引顾客购买新品，同时营造稀缺感和紧迫感。
title_en: Spring Collection Season 2 New Product Launch Activity Introduction
scenario_en: To celebrate its second anniversary and promotion to two crowns, the store held a Spring Collection Season 2 new product launch activity on March 13, 2013.
decision_en: During the activity, over ten items store-wide enjoy a 30% discount and free shipping. Promotional items are limited and available while supplies last, with搶購 (flash sales) starting at 10 AM daily.

title: 店铺促销活动与优惠政策
scenario: 当顾客在店铺购物时，可以享受多种促销和优惠。
decision: 店铺提供多项优惠，包括满额包邮、收藏店铺赠品、购物满额赠礼、好评返现、分享送礼、老顾客优惠以及介绍新顾客折扣。
rationale: 通过多样化的促销活动和优惠政策，吸引新顾客，回馈老顾客，并鼓励顾客进行分享和好评，以提升销售额和顾客忠诚度。
title_en: Store Promotions and Discount Policies
scenario_en: When customers shop at the store, they can enjoy various promotions and discounts.
decision_en: The store offers multiple discounts, including free shipping on qualifying orders, gifts for favoriting the store, gifts for purchases over a certain amount, cashback for positive reviews, gifts for sharing, discounts for returning customers, and discounts for referring new customers.

title: 春夏大促活动免运费规则
scenario: 当顾客在“玩美春夏送春夏大促”活动期间（2013年2月19日—2013年12月31日）下单时。
decision: 单笔订单金额满138元即可享受免运费服务，不设上限。默认使用申通快递，若申通无法送达则改发邮政小包速递。
rationale: 此为促销活动的一部分，旨在通过免运费吸引顾客消费，提高订单量。
customer_facing_name: 玩美春夏送春夏大促免运费活动
title_en: Spring/Summer Sale Free Shipping Rules
scenario_en: When customers place an order during the 'Playful Spring/Summer Big Sale' activity period (February 19, 2013 - December 31, 2013).
decision_en: Single orders over 138 yuan qualify for free shipping, with no upper limit. STO Express is the default courier; if STO cannot deliver, it will be sent via postal small package express.

title: 活动设置内容
scenario: 当需要设置店铺活动时
decision: 店铺活动内容包括搭配宝、满就送/满就减、搭配套餐、限时折扣、优惠券红包、店铺VIP/淘宝VIP。
rationale: 这些是店铺活动设置的常见要素，旨在提供多种促销和会员福利。
title_en: Activity Setup Content
scenario_en: When needing to set up store activities.
decision_en: Store activity content includes '搭配宝' (pairing treasures), '满就送/满就减' (spend and get/spend and save), '搭配套餐' (bundle packages), '限时折扣' (limited-time discounts), '优惠券红包' (coupon red packets), and '店铺VIP/淘宝VIP' (store VIP/Taobao VIP).

title: 店铺促销活动规则：满减、满送及免运费政策
scenario: 当顾客在店铺进行单笔订单消费时，系统将根据订单金额自动匹配相应的促销优惠。
decision: 单笔订单满100元减10元。单笔订单满300元减10元，并免运费（不免邮地区除外）。单笔订单满500元送“红玛瑙手珠”并免运费（不免邮地区除外），且可在购物车换购商品。老顾客介绍新顾客成交后可获赠礼物。所有优惠不累计赠送，赠送物品不可折现。
rationale: 通过设置不同门槛的满减、满送和免运费优惠，旨在刺激顾客消费，提高客单价和顾客忠诚度。
title_en: Store Promotion Rules: Spend & Save, Spend & Get, and Free Shipping Policy
scenario_en: When customers make a single order purchase in the store, the system will automatically apply corresponding promotional offers based on the order amount.
decision_en: Single orders over 100 yuan get a 10 yuan discount. Single orders over 300 yuan get a 10 yuan discount and free shipping (excluding non-free shipping regions). Single orders over 500 yuan receive a 'Red Agate Hand Bead' and free shipping (excluding non-free shipping regions), and can exchange items in the shopping cart. Returning customers who refer new customers will receive a gift upon successful transaction. All offers are not cumulative, and gifted items cannot be exchanged for cash.

title: 活动设置内容 - 搭配套餐,搭配宝
scenario: When setting up promotional activities involving product bundles or recommended pairings.
decision: The activity content should be configured to include '搭配套餐' (bundle packages) and '搭配宝' (pairing treasures).
rationale: This allows for the creation of discounted sets, such as '套装价' (set price), which offers savings compared to purchasing items individually, as demonstrated by the '节省' (save) amount.
title_en: Activity Setup Content - Bundle Packages, Pairing Treasures
scenario_en: When setting up promotional activities involving product bundles or recommended pairings.
decision_en: The activity content should be configured to include '搭配套餐' (bundle packages) and '搭配宝' (pairing treasures).

title: 店铺VIP积分规则与使用
scenario: 客户在店铺内进行消费、推荐新客户、签到或收藏店铺时，以及在购物时希望使用积分抵扣现金或兑换物品时。
decision: 客户消费1元可获赠1积分；推荐1个新客户成交可获100积分；签到送1分；收藏本店送2分。每1积分等同于0.01元。购物满百元可使用100积分抵用现金5元。积分也可在积分兑换区兑换物品。
rationale: 通过积分系统激励客户进行购买、推荐和互动，提升客户忠诚度和复购率。
title_en: Store VIP Points Rules and Usage
scenario_en: When customers make purchases, refer new customers, check in, or favorite the store, and when they wish to use points to deduct cash or redeem items during shopping.
decision_en: Customers earn 1 point for every 1 yuan spent; 100 points for each new customer referred who completes a transaction; 1 point for checking in; 2 points for favoriting the store. Each point is equivalent to 0.01 yuan. For purchases over 100 yuan, 100 points can be used to deduct 5 yuan. Points can also be redeemed for items in the points exchange area.

title: 淘宝VIP会员等级折扣与特权商品购买规则
scenario: 当淘宝VIP会员购买特权商品时，系统会根据其会员等级提供相应的折扣。
decision: 会员等级越高，享受的折扣越低。例如，V1-V3会员享受的折扣高于V4-V5会员，V6会员享受的折扣最低。
rationale: 此规则旨在奖励高等级会员，提升用户忠诚度，并鼓励用户提升会员等级以获得更优惠的价格。
title_en: Taobao VIP Membership Level Discounts and Privilege Product Purchase Rules
scenario_en: When Taobao VIP members purchase privilege products, the system will provide corresponding discounts based on their membership level.
decision_en: The higher the membership level, the lower the discount. For example, V1-V3 members receive a higher discount than V4-V5 members, and V6 members receive the lowest discount.

title: 活动设置内容——限时折扣商品展示
scenario: 当商品参与限时折扣促销活动时，其在商品详情页面的展示方式。
decision: 商品会显示原价、促销价格、促销类型（如“限时促销”或“包邮送礼”）、物流运费信息、30天售出数量、评价、宝贝类型、浏览次数、支付方式以及库存和购买数量选项。
rationale: 此展示方式旨在清晰地向顾客传达商品的促销信息、价格优势、销售情况和购买选项，以促进购买决策。
title_en: Activity Setup Content - Limited-Time Discount Product Display
scenario_en: When a product participates in a limited-time discount promotion, its display method on the product detail page.
decision_en: The product will display the original price, promotional price, promotion type (e.g., 'Limited-Time Promotion' or 'Free Shipping with Gift'), logistics shipping information, quantity sold in 30 days, reviews, product type, views, payment methods, and inventory and purchase quantity options.

title: 优惠券红包活动介绍
scenario: 当店铺需要设置优惠券红包活动时
decision: 活动内容可设置为优惠券或宝贝券，并提供免费链接领取。示例品牌包括乔丹、ST&SAT、OSA、PEACEBIRD等，优惠券面额从5元到100元不等，并设置不同的使用条件。
rationale: 通过设置不同品牌和面额的优惠券，可以吸引新老用户进店，促进消费。
title_en: Coupon and Red Packet Activity Introduction
scenario_en: When a store needs to set up coupon and red packet activities.
decision_en: Activity content can be set as coupons or product vouchers, with free links for领取. Example brands include Jordan, ST&SAT, OSA, PEACEBIRD, etc., with coupon values ranging from 5 to 100 yuan, and different usage conditions.

title: 活动期间店铺客服话术准备
scenario: 在活动期间，店铺需要准备好各种客服话术。
decision: 准备好关于好评、售后问题、发货、问候、物流以及关联指定等方面的客服话术。
rationale: 确保在活动期间能够高效、一致地回应客户的各种咨询，提升客户满意度。
title_en: Customer Service Script Preparation During Activities
scenario_en: During an activity, the store needs to prepare various customer service scripts.
decision_en: Prepare customer service scripts for positive reviews, after-sales issues, shipping, greetings, logistics, and associated assignments.

title: TUCANO产品促销活动介绍
scenario: 当客户询问TUCANO产品的促销活动时。
decision: 告知客户TUCANO产品原价149.00元，参加天天特价活动后价格为45.00元，并由卖家承担从江苏南京至辽宁沈阳的运费。
rationale: 提供具体的促销信息和运费政策，以吸引顾客并促成购买。
title_en: TUCANO Product Promotion Activity Introduction
scenario_en: When a customer asks about TUCANO product promotions.
decision_en: Inform the customer that the original price of TUCANO products is 149.00 yuan, and after participating in the daily special offer, the price is 45.00 yuan, with the seller covering shipping costs from Nanjing, Jiangsu to Shenyang, Liaoning.

title: 活动话术与店铺准备
scenario: 当需要了解活动介绍、话术提升技巧、售后、物流和产品话术以及店铺准备时。
decision: 本节内容概述了活动话术、提升技巧、售后话术、物流话术和产品话术，并提及了店铺准备。
rationale: 提供了一个目录或概览，以便用户了解后续章节将涵盖的主题。
title_en: Activity Scripts and Store Preparation
scenario_en: When needing to understand activity introductions, script improvement techniques, after-sales, logistics, product scripts, and store preparation.
decision_en: This section outlines activity scripts, improvement techniques, after-sales scripts, logistics scripts, and product scripts, and mentions store preparation.

title: 物流查询方法与时效：顺丰与合作物流公司
scenario: 客户需要查询物流信息或了解发货及配送时效时。
decision: 对于下午4点前下单的商品，当日发货；下午4点后下单的商品，次日发货。顺丰同省同城一日达，省外2-3日达。合作物流公司（如申通）同省2-3日达，省外3-5日达。
rationale: 明确发货和配送时效，以便客户了解订单状态和预期收货时间，提升客户满意度。
title_en: Logistics Inquiry Methods and Timeliness: SF Express and Partner Logistics Companies
scenario_en: Customers need to inquire about logistics information or understand shipping and delivery timeliness.
decision_en: Orders placed before 4 PM will be shipped the same day; orders placed after 4 PM will be shipped the next day. SF Express offers same-day delivery within the same city/province, and 2-3 day delivery for inter-province. Partner logistics companies (e.g., STO Express) offer 2-3 day delivery within the same province, and 3-5 day delivery for inter-province.

title: 物流查询与指定快递规则
scenario: 客户需要查询物流信息、指定快递公司或修改物流信息时。
decision: 客户可联系客服查询物流进度。指定快递需在下单时备注，支持申通、中通、宅急送。EMS需在选择快递时直接选择。已付款订单修改物流需退款重下，未付款订单直接关闭重下。默认使用申通快递，如无法送达则安排其他可达快递。
rationale: 确保订单能顺利送达，并为客户提供一定的快递选择灵活性，同时规范操作流程以提高效率。
title_en: Logistics Inquiry and Designated Courier Rules
scenario_en: Customers need to inquire about logistics information, designate a courier company, or modify logistics information.
decision_en: Customers can contact customer service to check logistics progress. Designated couriers must be noted when placing an order; STO Express, ZTO Express, and Zhaijisong are supported. EMS must be selected directly when choosing a courier. For paid orders, modifying logistics requires a refund and re-order; for unpaid orders, simply close and re-order. STO Express is used by default; if undeliverable, other available couriers will be arranged.

title: 申通快递物流查询方法及运单号格式
scenario: 当需要查询申通快递的物流状态时。
decision: 可以通过申通快递官网（95543/400889）或物流查询整合网站进行查询。申通快递单号是12位数字，以1-9开头。
rationale: 提供明确的查询渠道和运单号格式说明，方便用户追踪包裹。
title_en: STO Express Logistics Inquiry Method and Waybill Number Format
scenario_en: When needing to check the logistics status of STO Express.
decision_en: You can inquire through the STO Express official website (95543/400889) or integrated logistics inquiry websites. STO Express waybill numbers are 12-digit numbers starting with 1-9.

title: 顺丰快递运费标准及特殊情况处理
scenario: 当顾客需要查询物流费用或选择快递服务时
decision: 本店默认使用顺丰快递，并根据目的地和重量收取相应的运费。对于沈阳同城以外的地区，续重费用按每0.5kg计算。如果顾客不接受顺丰快递，可选择圆通、汇通、申通，需详询店主。特殊情况运费以实际收费为准。
rationale: 提供明确的运费标准和备选快递方案，以满足不同顾客的需求并确保运费计算的准确性。
title_en: SF Express Shipping Fee Standards and Special Case Handling
scenario_en: When customers need to inquire about shipping fees or choose a courier service.
decision_en: Our store defaults to SF Express, and shipping fees are charged based on destination and weight. For areas outside Shenyang city, additional weight is calculated per 0.5kg. If customers do not accept SF Express, YTO, Huitong, or STO Express can be chosen, requiring detailed inquiry with the store owner. Shipping fees for special cases are subject to actual charges.

title: 查询商品仓储情况及相关信息
scenario: 当需要查询特定商品的仓储情况、价格、运费、销量、评价等详细信息时。
decision: 通过商品详情页面查看，例如“楞严咒”商品显示价格298元，运费12-20元，30天售出1件，库存10件。也可以在店铺后台查看商品列表，获取库存、总销量、发布时间等信息。
rationale: 提供详细的商品信息有助于客户服务人员回答客户咨询，并进行库存管理和销售分析。
title_en: Inquiring About Product Storage and Related Information
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about specific product storage conditions, price, shipping fees, sales, reviews, and other detailed information.
decision_en: View through the product details page. For example, the 'Lengyan Mantra' product shows a price of 298 yuan, shipping fees of 12-20 yuan, 1 item sold in 30 days, and 10 items in stock. You can also view the product list in the store backend to get information such as inventory, total sales, and release date.

title: 仓储查询方法与订单流程概述
scenario: 当需要了解或查询仓储管理中的订单处理流程时。
decision: 遵循ERP软件的订单流程，包括预订单、财务确认、订单打印、出库验货、发货确认、派工汇总分拣、手工建单、发货在途等步骤，并涉及API、es、esAPI、订单审核、代销发货、网店蜘蛛、委外发货等环节。
rationale: 此流程概述了从订单生成到发货完成的整个仓储管理和物流操作的关键步骤，确保订单的准确处理和及时发货。
title_en: Warehouse Inquiry Methods and Order Process Overview
scenario_en: When needing to understand or inquire about the order processing flow in warehouse management.
decision_en: Follow the ERP software's order process, including pre-order, financial confirmation, order printing, outbound inspection, shipping confirmation, work assignment and sorting, manual order creation, in-transit shipping, etc., and involving API, ES, ESAPI, order review, consignment shipping, online store spider, outsourced shipping, and other steps.

title: ERP系统仓储查询操作指南
scenario: 当需要查询仓储信息或创建新订单时，可以使用ERP系统进行操作。
decision: 通过ERP系统，选择“库存[K]”或“新建订单”功能，然后填写相关信息，如店铺、仓库、业务员、客户信息和货品详情，以查询库存或创建订单。
rationale: ERP系统是管理库存和订单的核心工具，提供标准化的操作流程以确保数据准确性和业务效率。
title_en: ERP System Warehouse Inquiry Operation Guide
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about warehouse information or create new orders, the ERP system can be used.
decision_en: Through the ERP system, select 'Inventory [K]' or 'New Order' function, then fill in relevant information such as store, warehouse, salesperson, customer information, and product details to inquire about inventory or create an order.

title: ERP系统订单抓取日志查询方法
scenario: 当需要查询ERP系统中的订单抓取日志时。
decision: 通过ERP系统中的“订单处理”菜单，选择“自动抓单”功能，即可查看抓单日志。
rationale: 抓单日志记录了系统自动抓取订单的详细过程和结果，包括抓取时间、订单状态（如等待买家付款、买家已付款、淘宝关闭的订单等）以及写入数据库的数量，有助于了解订单处理的自动化情况。
title_en: ERP System Order Fetch Log Inquiry Method
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about order fetching logs in the ERP system.
decision_en: Through the 'Order Processing' menu in the ERP system, select the 'Automatic Order Fetch' function to view the order fetching log.

title: ERP系统仓储订单查询方法
scenario: 当需要查询ERP系统中的仓储订单信息时。
decision: 通过ERP系统，进入“订单处理”模块，选择“审单”，然后可以根据原始单号、交易时间、当前状态、订单状态、客户ID、客户名称、省份、区县等条件进行模糊查询或筛选。
rationale: ERP系统提供详细的订单处理和查询功能，便于追踪订单状态和客户信息。
title_en: ERP System Warehouse Order Inquiry Method
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about warehouse order information in the ERP system.
decision_en: Through the ERP system, enter the 'Order Processing' module, select 'Order Review', then you can perform fuzzy searches or filter by conditions such as original order number, transaction time, current status, order status, customer ID, customer name, province, district, etc.

title: ERP系统订单处理中的仓储查询方法
scenario: 当需要查询或处理ERP系统中的订单，特别是涉及仓储和发货状态时。
decision: 通过ERP系统的“订单处理”->“审单”功能，利用订单编号、客户网名、收货人、地区等信息进行模糊查询和筛选，以查看订单详情、处理天数、货款、发货方式等。
rationale: ERP系统提供了一个集中的平台来管理和查询所有订单相关信息，确保订单处理的效率和准确性。
title_en: ERP System Warehouse Inquiry Method in Order Processing
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about or process orders in the ERP system, especially those involving warehouse and shipping status.
decision_en: Use the 'Order Processing' -> 'Order Review' function in the ERP system, utilizing information such as order number, customer online name, consignee, region, etc., for fuzzy search and filtering to view order details, processing days, payment, shipping method, etc.

title: ERP系统中的仓储查询与订单处理方法
scenario: 当需要查询仓储信息或处理订单时，例如审单、订单拆分、修改或合并订单。
decision: 通过ERP系统中的“订单处理—审单”模块进行操作。可以查看订单详情，包括商品编号、品名、规格、数量、单价、金额等信息，并进行订单的拆分、修改、合并等操作。
rationale: ERP系统提供了一个集中的平台来管理订单和库存，确保订单处理的准确性和效率。
title_en: ERP System Warehouse Inquiry and Order Processing Methods
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about warehouse information or process orders, such as reviewing, splitting, modifying, or merging orders.
decision_en: Operate through the 'Order Processing - Order Review' module in the ERP system. You can view order details, including product number, name, specification, quantity, unit price, amount, etc., and perform operations such as splitting, modifying, and merging orders.

title: ERP系统库存查询操作指南
scenario: 当需要查询商品库存信息时，包括库存量、不良品、零售价、批发价、销售订购、待发货、采购计划、采购在途和退货在途等详细数据。
decision: 通过ERP系统进行库存查询。具体操作路径为：业务导航 -> 总库存。可按品名、品牌、货品编号进行筛选查询，系统将显示各项库存数据。
rationale: ERP系统是管理和追踪所有商品库存的核心工具，提供实时准确的库存数据，支持销售、采购和物流决策。
title_en: ERP System Inventory Inquiry Operation Guide
scenario_en: When needing to inquire about product inventory information, including stock quantity, defective products, retail price, wholesale price, sales orders, pending shipments, purchase plans, in-transit purchases, and in-transit returns.
