scenario: 当客户在犹豫是否下单时，客服应采取措施增加其下单的紧迫感。
decision: 客服可以通过强调活动即将结束、早发货早享受、或提供立即下单的优惠等方式，促使客户尽快完成订单。
rationale: 通过制造紧迫感，可以有效缩短客户的决策时间，提高订单转化率。
title_en: Increase Urgency to Place Order for Completion
scenario_en: When a customer is hesitant to place an order, customer service should take measures to increase their sense of urgency.
decision_en: Customer service can encourage customers to complete their orders as soon as possible by emphasizing that the promotion is ending soon, that early shipping means early enjoyment, or by offering immediate order discounts.

title: 促成订单：叶酸胶囊的适用人群沟通技巧
scenario: 当买家询问叶酸胶囊的适用人群时，客服需要进行有效沟通以促成订单。
decision: 客服应强调产品适用人群广泛，并以孕妇可食用说明其高安全性，同时提及其他人群（如痛经女性）的使用效果，以拓宽买家认知并增强购买意愿。
rationale: 通过强调产品的广泛适用性和高安全性，可以打消买家疑虑，同时通过具体案例（痛经女性）展示产品额外益处，从而提升产品吸引力并促成销售。
title_en: Order Completion: Folic Acid Capsule Target Audience Communication Skills
scenario_en: When a buyer asks about the target audience for folic acid capsules, customer service needs to communicate effectively to complete the order.
decision_en: Customer service should emphasize the product's wide applicability, use pregnant women's eligibility to illustrate its high safety, and mention the effects for other groups (e.g., women with dysmenorrhea) to broaden buyer awareness and enhance purchase intent.

title: 客服沟通的基本原则：促成订单与对话
scenario: 在与客户进行产品咨询和销售对话时，客服人员需要引导对话并促成订单。
decision: 客服应主动提供专业知识，如营养师角色，并引导客户提问，同时收集必要信息以提供个性化建议。
rationale: 通过展现专业性和主动性，可以建立客户信任，有效回答客户疑问，并最终促成订单。
title_en: Basic Principles of Customer Service Communication: Order Completion and Dialogue
scenario_en: When engaging in product consultation and sales dialogue with customers, customer service personnel need to guide the conversation and facilitate order completion.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively provide professional knowledge, acting as a nutritionist, and guide customers to ask questions, while also collecting necessary information to provide personalized advice.

title: 利用专业知识和缘分促成订单并提供包邮优惠
scenario: 当买家认可客服的专业性并表达好感时，客服可以利用这种积极互动来促成订单。
decision: 客服应回应买家的赞扬，强调双方的“缘分”，并主动提供包邮等优惠，同时承诺未来的支持和咨询服务。
rationale: 通过建立个人连接和提供额外优惠，可以增强买家的购买意愿和忠诚度，促成首次购买并为未来的复购打下基础。
title_en: Utilize Professional Knowledge and Rapport to Complete Orders and Offer Free Shipping
scenario_en: When a buyer recognizes the professionalism of customer service and expresses goodwill, customer service can leverage this positive interaction to complete an order.
decision_en: Customer service should respond to the buyer's praise, emphasize their 'rapport,' and proactively offer free shipping and other discounts, while also promising future support and consultation services.

title: 客服接待沟通的基本原则与流程方法
scenario: 当客服需要与客户进行沟通时
decision: 客服应遵循基本的沟通原则，并按照既定的流程和方法进行客户接待和沟通。
rationale: 确保沟通的有效性和一致性，提升客户满意度。
title_en: Basic Principles and Process Methods for Customer Service Communication
scenario_en: When customer service needs to communicate with customers.
decision_en: Customer service should follow basic communication principles and adhere to established processes and methods for customer reception and communication.

title: 感谢语
scenario: 当需要向客户或合作伙伴表达感谢时。
decision: 使用“Thanks”或“淘宝大学”作为感谢语。
rationale: 这是文件末尾的感谢语，表示对阅读者的感谢。
title_en: Thank You Message
scenario_en: When needing to express gratitude to customers or partners.
decision_en: Use 'Thanks' or 'Taobao University' as the thank you message.

title: 客户服务代表的沟通原则
scenario: 在与客户进行任何形式的沟通时，客户服务代表应遵循特定的沟通原则。
decision: 客户服务代表应保持积极、尊重、清晰和专业的态度，并确保所有沟通都是准确和及时的。
rationale: 这些原则有助于建立客户信任，提升品牌形象，并确保客户获得一致且高质量的服务体验。
title_en: Customer Service Representative Communication Principles
scenario_en: When communicating with customers in any form, customer service representatives should adhere to specific communication principles.
decision_en: Customer service representatives should maintain a positive, respectful, clear, and professional attitude, and ensure all communication is accurate and timely.

title: 淘宝客服基础技能系列教程
scenario: This document serves as an introductory guide for new Taobao customer service representatives.
decision: This document outlines the fundamental skills required for Taobao customer service.
rationale: To provide foundational training for customer service staff.
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Basic Skills Series Tutorial
scenario_en: This document serves as an introductory guide for new Taobao customer service representatives.
decision_en: This document outlines the fundamental skills required for Taobao customer service.

title: 客服基础：熟悉、掌握、遵守交易流程、工具软件、规则规范
scenario: 客服人员进行日常工作时
decision: 客服人员需要熟悉交易流程、掌握工具软件并遵守规则规范。
rationale: 这是客服工作的基本要求，确保服务质量和效率。
title_en: Customer Service Basics: Familiarity, Mastery, and Adherence to Transaction Processes, Tools, and Regulations
scenario_en: When customer service personnel perform daily tasks.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to be familiar with transaction processes, master tool software, and comply with rules and regulations.

title: 熟悉交易流程
scenario: 作为客服人员，需要理解并掌握电商平台的基本交易流程。
decision: 客服人员应熟悉买家和卖家的购物流程、付款方式、订单流程以及退换货流程。
rationale: 全面了解交易流程是有效解决客户问题和提供支持的基础。
title_en: Familiarity with Transaction Processes
scenario_en: As a customer service representative, it is necessary to understand and master the basic transaction processes of e-commerce platforms.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should be familiar with buyer and seller shopping processes, payment methods, order processes, and return/exchange processes.

title: 支付宝担保交易买家付款流程与支付方式选择
scenario: 买家在淘宝购物使用支付宝进行付款时，遇到账户余额不足或需要选择支付方式的情况。
decision: 买家可以选择充值支付宝账户余额，或使用储蓄卡、信用卡、消费卡等其他支付方式。如果自己无法付款，可以选择找朋友代付。有银行卡但无网银可选择快捷支付，有银行卡且有网银可选择网上银行支付。
rationale: 提供多种支付方式和代付选项，旨在确保买家能够顺利完成交易，即使在账户余额不足或不便自行支付的情况下也能找到解决方案。
title_en: Alipay Secured Transaction Buyer Payment Process and Payment Method Selection
scenario_en: When a buyer shops on Taobao and uses Alipay for payment, encountering insufficient account balance or needing to select a payment method.
decision_en: Buyers can choose to top up their Alipay account balance, or use other payment methods such as debit cards, credit cards, or consumer cards. If they cannot pay themselves, they can ask a friend to pay on their behalf. If they have a bank card but no online banking, they can choose quick payment; if they have a bank card and online banking, they can choose online banking payment.

title: 买家购物流程概述
scenario: 当需要了解淘宝买家购物的基本流程时。
decision: 买家购物流程包括挑选商品、下单、付款、收货和评价。
rationale: 熟悉交易流程是理解淘宝购物的基础。
title_en: Overview of Buyer Shopping Process
scenario_en: When needing to understand the basic shopping process for Taobao buyers.
decision_en: The buyer shopping process includes selecting goods, placing an order, making payment, receiving goods, and leaving a review.

title: 淘宝网买家付款方式
scenario: 当买家在淘宝网购物时，需要了解可用的付款方式。
decision: 淘宝网提供支付宝快捷支付和网银付款两种主要方式。
rationale: 提供多种支付方式是为了方便买家完成交易。
title_en: Taobao Buyer Payment Methods
scenario_en: When buyers shop on Taobao, they need to know the available payment methods.
decision_en: Taobao offers two main methods: Alipay Quick Pay and online banking payment.

title: 确认订单信息
scenario: 在处理任何客户请求或查询之前
decision: 首先确认订单信息。
rationale: 确保所有后续操作都基于准确的订单数据。
title_en: Confirm Order Information
scenario_en: Before processing any customer request or inquiry.
decision_en: First, confirm the order information.

title: 付款到支付宝
scenario: 客户进行支付时
decision: 引导客户将款项支付到支付宝账户。
rationale: 支付宝是公司官方且安全的收款渠道。
title_en: Payment to Alipay
scenario_en: When the customer is making a payment.
decision_en: Guide the customer to pay to their Alipay account.

title: 付款成功后的交易流程与保障
scenario: 客户完成付款后，系统会显示付款成功页面。
decision: 告知客户付款已成功，款项由支付宝担保，在确认收货前不会支付给卖家，并提示客户等待收货。
rationale: 确保客户了解付款状态和资金安全保障，减少对交易流程的疑虑。
title_en: Transaction Process and Guarantee After Successful Payment
scenario_en: After the customer completes payment, the system displays a payment successful page.
decision_en: Inform the customer that payment was successful, funds are guaranteed by Alipay and will not be released to the seller until receipt is confirmed, and advise the customer to await delivery.

title: 买家付款方式
scenario: 当买家需要了解或选择付款方式时。
decision: 向买家提供多种付款方式选项，包括余额支付、支付宝、银行卡、找人代付、快捷支付、网上银行、信用卡、货到付款以及优惠类支付（红包、优惠券、积分、信用支付）。
rationale: 提供多样化的支付方式可以满足不同买家的需求，提升购物体验和交易便利性。
title_en: Buyer Payment Methods
scenario_en: When a buyer needs to understand or select payment methods.
decision_en: Provide the buyer with various payment options, including balance payment, Alipay, bank card, pay by a friend, quick pay, online banking, credit card, cash on delivery, and promotional payments (red packets, coupons, points, credit payment).

title: 淘宝卖家订单流程概述
scenario: 当卖家需要了解淘宝订单处理的整体流程时。
decision: 熟悉淘宝平台上的订单交易流程，包括订单生成、关联推荐、核对催付、打包发货、交易确认和评价。
rationale: 了解并掌握订单处理流程是卖家有效管理店铺和完成交易的基础。
title_en: Taobao Seller Order Process Overview
scenario_en: When a seller needs to understand the overall Taobao order processing flow.
decision_en: Familiarize yourself with the order transaction process on the Taobao platform, including order generation, associated recommendations, payment reminders, packaging and shipping, transaction confirmation, and evaluation.

title: 淘宝卖家订单流程概述
scenario: 当卖家需要了解淘宝订单从买家付款到交易完成的整体流程时。
decision: 淘宝卖家订单流程包括：等待买家付款、等待卖家发货、卖家发货、交易成功、退换货和评价。
rationale: 熟悉交易流程是卖家有效管理订单和提供客户服务的基础。
title_en: Taobao Seller Order Process Overview
scenario_en: When a seller needs to understand the overall Taobao order process from buyer payment to transaction completion.
decision_en: The Taobao seller order process includes: awaiting buyer payment, awaiting seller shipment, seller shipment, transaction successful, returns/exchanges, and evaluation.

title: 淘宝卖家订单流程概述
scenario: 当卖家处理淘宝订单时。
decision: 卖家需要遵循等待买家付款、修改价格/邮费、网上发货、等待买家收货、交易成功或处理退款/退货的流程。
rationale: 熟悉交易流程是卖家有效管理订单和提供良好客户服务的关键。
title_en: Taobao Seller Order Process Overview
scenario_en: When a seller is processing Taobao orders.
decision_en: Sellers need to follow the process of awaiting buyer payment, modifying price/postage, online shipping, awaiting buyer receipt, transaction successful, or handling refunds/returns.

title: 淘宝订单备忘信息使用规范
scenario: 当卖家在淘宝后台操作订单并需要添加备忘信息时。
decision: 备忘信息仅供卖家自己可见，不应包含个人敏感信息，且淘宝系统不会修改这些备忘。
rationale: 保护用户隐私和数据安全，防止信息泄露和欺诈。
title_en: Taobao Order Memo Information Usage Guidelines
scenario_en: When a seller operates orders in the Taobao backend and needs to add memo information.
decision_en: Memo information is only visible to the seller, should not contain sensitive personal information, and will not be modified by the Taobao system.

title: 淘宝卖家后台“已卖出的宝贝”页面功能概述
scenario: 当卖家登录淘宝后台，进入“我的淘宝”下的“已卖出的宝贝”页面时。
decision: 此页面提供查看已售出商品、管理订单、进行评价、处理交易纠纷等功能，并提供搜索和批量操作选项。
rationale: 该页面是卖家管理已完成或进行中交易的核心入口，旨在帮助卖家高效处理订单和售后事宜。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Seller Backend 'Sold Items' Page Functions
scenario_en: When a seller logs into the Taobao backend and navigates to the 'Sold Items' page under 'My Taobao'.
decision_en: This page provides functions such as viewing sold items, managing orders, making evaluations, handling transaction disputes, and offers search and batch operation options.

title: 淘宝退款、维权流程解说：退换货流程概述
scenario: 当消费者需要了解淘宝退款和维权的基本流程时。
decision: 该流程图概述了退款、退换货以及在遇到问题时如何发起维权的基本步骤，包括与卖家协商和请求小二介入。
rationale: 提供清晰的流程指引，帮助消费者理解和执行退款及维权操作，保障其权益。
title_en: Taobao Refund and Rights Protection Process Explanation: Returns/Exchanges Overview
scenario_en: When consumers need to understand the basic process for Taobao refunds and rights protection.
decision_en: This flowchart outlines the basic steps for refunds, returns/exchanges, and how to initiate rights protection when encountering issues, including negotiating with the seller and requesting intervention from a Taobao agent.

title: 卖家版旺旺使用：插件功能辅助软件
scenario: This section introduces the use of auxiliary software for the seller version of Wangwang.
decision: Understand and utilize the plugin features and auxiliary software available for the seller version of Wangwang.
rationale: To enhance the functionality and efficiency of the Wangwang platform for sellers.
title_en: Wangwang Seller Version Usage: Plugin Auxiliary Software
scenario_en: This section introduces the use of auxiliary software for the seller version of Wangwang.
decision_en: Understand and utilize the plugin features and auxiliary software available for the seller version of Wangwang.

title: 淘宝旺旺卖家版功能概述
scenario: 当卖家需要了解淘宝旺旺卖家版的主要功能时。
decision: 淘宝旺旺卖家版提供聊天、群组、交易焦点、系统设置和按钮功能。
rationale: 此概述旨在帮助卖家掌握旺旺工具软件的基本功能。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Wangwang Seller Version Functions
scenario_en: When a seller needs to understand the main functions of the Taobao Wangwang seller version.
decision_en: The Taobao Wangwang seller version provides chat, group, transaction focus, system settings, and button functions.

title: 阿里旺旺卖家版登录状态设置
scenario: 当卖家登录阿里旺旺2012卖家版时，需要设置其在线状态。
decision: 卖家可以根据自己的实际情况选择“我有空”、“忙碌中”、“不在电脑旁”、“接听电话中”、“外出就餐”、“稍候”或“隐身”等状态。
rationale: 设置正确的在线状态有助于买家了解卖家的可沟通性，提高沟通效率和客户服务体验。
title_en: Aliwangwang Seller Version Login Status Settings
scenario_en: When a seller logs into Aliwangwang 2012 Seller Version and needs to set their online status.
decision_en: Sellers can choose statuses such as 'Available', 'Busy', 'Away from computer', 'On a call', 'Out for meal', 'Be right back', or 'Invisible' based on their actual situation.

title: 淘宝旺旺卖家版界面功能概述
scenario: 当卖家使用淘宝旺旺2012卖家版时。
decision: 了解旺旺卖家版的主要界面元素和功能，包括好友列表、最近联系人、群组、系统菜单、个性签名设置、消息记录、系统设置等。
rationale: 熟悉旺旺卖家版界面有助于卖家高效地进行客户沟通、管理联系人、查找信息和调整软件设置，是日常运营的基础。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Wangwang Seller Version Interface Functions
scenario_en: When a seller uses Taobao Wangwang 2012 Seller Version.
decision_en: Understand the main interface elements and functions of the Wangwang seller version, including friend list, recent contacts, groups, system menu, personalized signature settings, message history, and system settings.

title: 淘宝旺旺卖家版个性签名设置
scenario: 当卖家使用淘宝旺旺与客户沟通时，需要设置个性签名。
decision: 卖家可以在淘宝旺旺的系统设置中，找到“个性签名设置”，并配置轮播签名，例如“满百减30包邮，三天内另购产品终身八折”或“金玫瑰付款成功即得10元优惠券”。
rationale: 个性签名可以用于宣传促销信息和优惠活动，提升客户购买意愿和忠诚度。
title_en: Taobao Wangwang Seller Version Personalized Signature Settings
scenario_en: When a seller uses Taobao Wangwang to communicate with customers and needs to set a personalized signature.
decision_en: Sellers can find 'Personalized Signature Settings' in Taobao Wangwang's system settings and configure rotating signatures, such as 'Free shipping on orders over 100, 20% off all other products purchased within three days for life' or 'Receive a 10 yuan coupon immediately upon successful payment for Golden Rose'.

title: 淘宝卖家版旺旺快捷键设置
scenario: 当卖家使用淘宝卖家版旺旺进行日常操作时，可以通过设置快捷键来提高效率。
decision: 用户可以自定义或使用默认的全局快捷键和工作台快捷键，例如Ctrl+F搜索联系人，Ctrl+F1打开E客服后台，Ctrl+H打开历史聊天记录等。
rationale: 通过快捷键操作可以显著提升工作效率，减少鼠标点击次数，优化用户体验。
title_en: Taobao Wangwang Seller Version Shortcut Key Settings
scenario_en: When a seller uses Taobao Wangwang Seller Version for daily operations, they can set shortcut keys to improve efficiency.
decision_en: Users can customize or use default global and workbench shortcut keys, such as Ctrl+F to search contacts, Ctrl+F1 to open the E-customer service backend, and Ctrl+H to open chat history.

title: 淘宝旺旺防骚扰设置
scenario: 当卖家希望管理或限制陌生人添加好友、接收消息或请求时。
decision: 卖家可以使用淘宝旺旺的系统设置，包括基本设置、骚扰消息设置、聊天设置、个性设置和安全设置，来过滤骚扰信息、设置好友验证方式、禁止接收语音视频请求或远程协助请求。
rationale: 这些设置旨在帮助卖家减少不必要的干扰，提高沟通效率，并增强账户安全性。
title_en: Taobao Wangwang Anti-Harassment Settings
scenario_en: When a seller wants to manage or restrict strangers from adding friends, receiving messages, or requests.
decision_en: Sellers can use Taobao Wangwang's system settings, including basic settings, harassment message settings, chat settings, personalized settings, and security settings, to filter harassment information, set friend verification methods, and prohibit receiving voice/video calls or remote assistance requests.

title: 旺旺客服工作台自动提醒设置
scenario: 当客服使用旺旺工作台模式时，需要设置客户等待或未回复的提醒机制。
decision: 启用客服工作台模式，并勾选“客户等待30秒后提醒我”；设置“客户10分钟未回复时自动关闭聊天窗口”。
rationale: 通过自动提醒和自动关闭聊天窗口功能，可以提高客服响应效率，避免遗漏客户消息，并优化工作台管理。
title_en: Wangwang Customer Service Workbench Automatic Reminder Settings
scenario_en: When customer service uses Wangwang workbench mode, they need to set up reminder mechanisms for waiting or unanswered customers.
decision_en: Enable customer service workbench mode and check 'Remind me after customer waits for 30 seconds'; set 'Automatically close chat window if customer does not reply for 10 minutes'.

title: 淘宝旺旺聊天设置：群发、贴图与窗口合并
scenario: 当客服人员使用淘宝旺旺进行客户沟通时，需要配置聊天功能以优化工作效率和消息管理。
decision: 客服人员可以设置只接收好友的群发消息，不接收贴图（包括群聊和多人聊天），并选择是否合并多个聊天窗口。此外，还可以配置发送即时消息的快捷键（Enter或Ctrl+Enter）。
rationale: 这些设置旨在帮助客服人员过滤不必要的信息，保持聊天界面的整洁，并根据个人习惯提高消息发送效率，从而更专注于与客户的有效沟通。
title_en: Taobao Wangwang Chat Settings: Group Send, Stickers, and Window Merging
scenario_en: When customer service personnel use Taobao Wangwang for customer communication, they need to configure chat functions to optimize work efficiency and message management.
decision_en: Customer service personnel can set to only receive group messages from friends, not receive stickers (including group chats and multi-person chats), and choose whether to merge multiple chat windows. Additionally, they can configure shortcut keys for sending instant messages (Enter or Ctrl+Enter).

title: 淘宝卖家版旺旺客服工作台界面介绍
scenario: 当客服人员需要了解淘宝卖家版旺旺的工作台界面布局和功能时。
decision: 该页面展示了淘宝卖家版旺旺客服工作台的概览，包括联系人列表、消息区、状态区以及一些基本功能入口。
rationale: 熟悉客服工作台界面是有效使用旺旺进行客户沟通的基础。
title_en: Introduction to Taobao Wangwang Seller Version Customer Service Workbench Interface
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to understand the layout and functions of the Taobao Wangwang seller version workbench interface.
decision_en: This page provides an overview of the Taobao Wangwang seller version customer service workbench, including the contact list, message area, status area, and entry points for some basic functions.

title: 淘宝旺旺聊天功能界面介绍
scenario: 当卖家需要了解淘宝旺旺聊天功能界面时
decision: 此页面展示了淘宝旺旺卖家版聊天功能的用户界面，包括最近联系人列表、联系人姓名和最近的聊天时间。
rationale: 提供对淘宝旺旺聊天工具基本界面的视觉参考，帮助卖家熟悉操作环境。
title_en: Introduction to Taobao Wangwang Chat Function Interface
scenario_en: When a seller needs to understand the Taobao Wangwang chat function interface.
decision_en: This page displays the user interface of the Taobao Wangwang seller version chat function, including the list of recent contacts, contact names, and recent chat times.

title: 客服工作台与聊天功能概述
scenario: 当客服人员使用淘宝旺旺工作台时
decision: 客服人员应熟悉客服工作台的布局和聊天功能，包括查找好友、查看最近联系人、会员焦点信息以及聊天窗口区。
rationale: 熟悉工作台界面和聊天功能是有效进行客户沟通的基础。
title_en: Customer Service Workbench and Chat Features Overview
scenario_en: When customer service personnel use the Taobao Wangwang workbench.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should be familiar with the layout and chat functions of the customer service workbench, including finding friends, viewing recent contacts, member focus information, and the chat window area.

title: 淘宝卖家版旺旺使用：会员与订单焦点信息
scenario: 当卖家使用旺旺与买家沟通时，需要快速了解买家历史信息和当前订单状态。
decision: 利用旺旺的“会员焦点”和“订单焦点”功能，查看买家的基本信息（如注册时间、上次登录、交易额、好评率）和当前订单详情。
rationale: 通过掌握买家的历史交易数据和行为模式，卖家可以更好地评估买家信誉，提供个性化服务，并高效处理订单相关问题。
title_en: Taobao Seller Wangwang Usage: Member and Order Focus Information
scenario_en: When sellers use Wangwang to communicate with buyers and need to quickly understand buyer history and current order status.
decision_en: Utilize Wangwang's 'Member Focus' and 'Order Focus' features to view buyer basic information (e.g., registration time, last login, transaction amount, positive feedback rate) and current order details.

title: 淘宝卖家版旺旺群组功能使用
scenario: 用户需要了解如何使用淘宝卖家版旺旺的群组功能。
decision: 双击进入群聊天，并可查找好友和网站内容。
rationale: 提供淘宝卖家版旺旺群组功能的基本操作指南，方便用户进行沟通和信息查找。
title_en: Taobao Seller Wangwang Group Function Usage
scenario_en: Users need to understand how to use the group function in Taobao Seller Wangwang.
decision_en: Double-click to enter group chat, and you can find friends and website content.

title: 信用支付服务介绍与卖家收益
scenario: 当卖家考虑开通信用支付服务时，或需要了解其功能和优势时。
decision: 信用支付是阿里集团联合金融机构推出的创新信用服务，旨在提高手机购物支付成功率并降低支付门槛。卖家开通信用支付后，可以提升宝贝付款成功率，从而增加店铺营收。
rationale: 该服务通过提供创新的信用支付方式，解决了手机购物支付成功率低和支付门槛高的问题，直接促进了交易完成和卖家收入增长。
title_en: Credit Payment Service Introduction and Seller Benefits
scenario_en: When sellers are considering enabling credit payment services, or need to understand their features and advantages.
decision_en: Credit Payment is an innovative credit service launched by Alibaba Group in conjunction with financial institutions, designed to increase mobile shopping payment success rates and lower payment thresholds. After sellers enable credit payment, they can improve the payment success rate of their products, thereby increasing store revenue.

title: 淘宝卖家中心功能概览
scenario: 当卖家需要了解淘宝卖家中心提供的各项功能时。
decision: 淘宝卖家中心提供发布宝贝、淘宝助理、数据中心、卖家培训、售中宝贝、店铺管理、我的收藏、支付宝、网店版、安全中心、商家服务、量子恒道、图片空间、卖家版旺旺使用等功能。
rationale: 此部分内容旨在概述淘宝卖家中心的主要功能模块，帮助卖家掌握工具软件。
title_en: Taobao Seller Center Function Overview
scenario_en: When sellers need to understand the various functions provided by the Taobao Seller Center.
decision_en: The Taobao Seller Center provides functions such as publishing products, Taobao Assistant, data center, seller training, in-sale products, store management, my favorites, Alipay, online store version, security center, merchant services, Quantum Analytics, image space, and seller version Wangwang usage.

title: 阿里旺旺2012卖家版：顶部快速启动区与应用盒子功能
scenario: 当卖家使用阿里旺旺2012卖家版时，需要快速访问常用功能或管理应用。
decision: 卖家可以通过“顶部快速启动区”和“应用盒子”来添加、删除和调整快捷栏图标，以定制自己的操作界面。
rationale: 提供个性化的快速访问工具，提高卖家操作效率和便利性。
title_en: Aliwangwang 2012 Seller Version: Top Quick Launch Area and Application Box Features
scenario_en: When sellers use Aliwangwang 2012 Seller Version and need to quickly access common functions or manage applications.
decision_en: Sellers can use the 'Top Quick Launch Area' and 'Application Box' to add, delete, and adjust shortcut bar icons to customize their operating interface.

title: 淘宝客户、仓储、交易操作及工具软件掌握
scenario: 本内容概述了淘宝平台运营中的主要操作类别。
decision: 需要掌握客户类操作、仓储类操作、交易类操作，并熟练使用相关工具软件及插件功能。
rationale: 这些是淘宝平台运营的基础组成部分，掌握它们是有效管理和执行各项业务的关键。
title_en: Mastering Taobao Customer, Warehousing, Transaction Operations and Tools
scenario_en: This content outlines the main operational categories in Taobao platform operations.
decision_en: It is necessary to master customer-related operations, warehousing-related operations, transaction-related operations, and proficiently use relevant tool software and plugin functions.

title: 客户服务工具软件掌握：活动告知与优惠提示
scenario: 当客服人员需要向客户提供消费信息时，例如活动告知或优惠提示。
decision: 客服人员应掌握并利用工具软件进行活动告知和优惠提示。
rationale: 掌握工具软件能有效传达消费信息，提升客户服务效率和客户满意度。
title_en: Customer Service Tool Software Mastery: Activity Notifications and Discount Prompts
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to provide customers with consumption information, such as activity notifications or discount prompts.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should master and utilize tool software for activity notifications and discount prompts.

title: 淘宝后台买家消费记录与评价内容查询
scenario: 当需要查询买家的消费记录和商品评价内容时
decision: 通过淘宝后台的插件功能，可以获取买家的消费记录，包括购买的商品、价格、卖家类型（商城/非商城）以及评价内容，并可筛选全部、好评、中评、差评。
rationale: 此功能提供标准精确的买家消费和评价信息，有助于客服了解买家历史行为和对商品的反馈。
title_en: Taobao Backend Buyer Consumption Records and Review Content Query
scenario_en: When needing to query buyer consumption records and product review content.
decision_en: Through the plugin function in the Taobao backend, you can obtain buyer consumption records, including purchased products, prices, seller type (mall/non-mall), and review content, and can filter by all, positive, neutral, or negative reviews.

title: 淘宝金牌客服助手功能概览
scenario: 客服人员使用淘宝金牌客服助手处理订单和客户咨询时。
decision: 金牌客服助手提供批量备注、批量免运费、物流联想、订单状态筛选、客户消费记录查看、物流派送范围查询、快速插旗备注、一键核对物流信息以及自主营销等功能。
rationale: 这些功能旨在提高客服工作效率，优化客户服务体验，并辅助客服进行销售和订单管理。
title_en: Taobao Gold Customer Service Assistant Function Overview
scenario_en: Customer service personnel use Taobao Gold Customer Service Assistant to process orders and customer inquiries.
decision_en: The Gold Customer Service Assistant provides functions such as batch remarks, batch free shipping, logistics association, order status filtering, customer consumption record viewing, logistics delivery range inquiry, quick flag remarks, one-click logistics information verification, and independent marketing.

title: 客服助手插件功能：仓储类操作与宝贝快速查询
scenario: 客服人员需要快速查询宝贝信息或进行仓储相关操作时。
decision: 使用金牌客服助手插件的“仓储类操作”功能进行通知、刷新查询和订单设置，并通过“快速查询宝贝”功能查询宝贝名称、单价、库存，并可点击图片发送宝贝链接或发送宝贝知识。
rationale: 此功能旨在提高客服工作效率，方便客服人员快速获取和分享宝贝信息，并管理仓储相关事宜。
title_en: Customer Service Assistant Plugin Functions: Warehousing Operations and Quick Product Query
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to quickly query product information or perform warehousing-related operations.
decision_en: Use the 'Warehousing Operations' function of the Gold Customer Service Assistant plugin for notifications, refresh queries, and order settings, and use the 'Quick Product Query' function to query product names, unit prices, and inventory, and can click on images to send product links or product knowledge.

title: 淘宝ERP软件流程概述
scenario: 描述淘宝卖家处理订单的ERP软件流程。
decision: 该流程包括买家下单、审单员判断好单/问题单、配货员配货、打单员批量打印快递单/发货单/配货单，并由验货员辅助软件进行变动处理、清货处理、单补发、采购统计和页面扫单。
rationale: 此流程旨在标准化和优化淘宝卖家的订单处理和发货过程，提高效率并减少错误。
title_en: Taobao ERP Software Process Overview
scenario_en: Describes the ERP software process for Taobao sellers handling orders.
decision_en: The process includes buyer placing an order, reviewer determining good/problem orders, picker picking goods, printer batch printing express/delivery/picking lists, and inspector assisting software with change processing, inventory clearing, single reissues, procurement statistics, and page scanning.

title: ERP软件流程：多店铺订单统一管理
scenario: 当卖家需要管理多个淘宝店铺的订单、商品和库存时。
decision: 使用ERP软件可以实现多店铺同时管理，统一收取订单，并支持宝贝和库存的数据共享。
rationale: 此举旨在帮助卖家节省处理订单的时间，优化内部管理流程，从而轻松管理多个店铺。
title_en: ERP Software Process: Unified Management of Multiple Store Orders
scenario_en: When sellers need to manage orders, products, and inventory for multiple Taobao stores.
decision_en: Using ERP software allows for simultaneous management of multiple stores, unified order collection, and supports data sharing for products and inventory.

title: 淘宝ERP软件流程：订单管理与发货效率提升
scenario: 当淘宝卖家需要管理订单、提高发货效率并减少发货错误时。
decision: 使用淘宝ERP辅助软件，通过订单自动下载更新、合并、审核、发货、备注、退货、换货、补发货等流程，实现订单的全面管理和高效处理。
rationale: 该软件旨在彻底解决错发、漏发、多发等发货问题，并通过自动化和批量处理功能全面提高发货效率，避免丢单和出错。
title_en: Taobao ERP Software Process: Order Management and Shipping Efficiency Improvement
scenario_en: When Taobao sellers need to manage orders, improve shipping efficiency, and reduce shipping errors.
decision_en: Use Taobao ERP auxiliary software to achieve comprehensive order management and efficient processing through processes such as automatic order download and update, merging, auditing, shipping, remarks, returns, exchanges, and reissues.

title: 淘宝大学：实时掌握库存情况与超卖预防
scenario: 商家需要有效管理商品库存，避免超卖并及时备货。
decision: 通过库存实时同步、自动锁库存和设置库存警戒值来掌握库存情况。
rationale: 实时同步和自动锁库存可以彻底告别超卖现象，而库存警戒值有助于商家提前备货和管理低库存商品。
title_en: Taobao University: Real-time Inventory Monitoring and Overselling Prevention
scenario_en: Merchants need to effectively manage product inventory, prevent overselling, and replenish stock in a timely manner.
decision_en: Monitor inventory status through real-time inventory synchronization, automatic inventory locking, and setting inventory alert thresholds.

title: 批量处理单据高效配货发货
scenario: When managing order fulfillment on Taobao, especially for bulk orders.
decision: Utilize custom document templates and printing diversion features to efficiently process documents, manage picking, and dispatch goods.
rationale: Custom templates streamline document creation, and print diversion simplifies the printing process, ensuring clarity on which documents (express, shipping, picking) have been printed.
title_en: Batch Processing Documents for Efficient Picking and Shipping
scenario_en: When managing order fulfillment on Taobao, especially for bulk orders.
decision_en: Utilize custom document templates and printing diversion features to efficiently process documents, manage picking, and dispatch goods.

title: 使用辅助软件自动处理淘宝退换货流程
scenario: 在淘宝网店管理中，当客户提出退货或换货请求时。
decision: 应利用辅助软件（如ERP软件）来自动化处理退换货流程，包括生成入库单等。
rationale: 自动化处理可以简化网店管理中的退换货操作，提高效率，并有助于获得客户好评。
title_en: Automating Taobao Return and Exchange Process with Auxiliary Software
scenario_en: In Taobao online store management, when customers initiate return or exchange requests.
decision_en: Auxiliary software (such as ERP software) should be used to automate the return and exchange process, including generating inbound receipts.

title: ERP软件流程与报表概览
scenario: 当需要全面了解公司运营情况，包括商品、库存、订单、仓储物流和售后管理时。
decision: 使用ERP辅助软件，通过各项报表（如销售日报表、热卖宝贝排行、店铺销售汇总等）来掌握公司运营情况。
rationale: ERP软件提供集成化的管理流程和详细的报表功能，有助于管理者一览无余地全面掌握公司运营情况，从而做出更好的决策。
title_en: ERP Software Process and Report Overview
scenario_en: When a comprehensive understanding of company operations is needed, including products, inventory, orders, warehousing logistics, and after-sales management.
decision_en: Use ERP auxiliary software to understand company operations through various reports (e.g., daily sales reports, best-selling product rankings, store sales summaries).

title: 查看流水账记录的各项收支款
scenario: 当需要查看月底各项收支款项时，可以使用流水账功能。
decision: 通过“流水账”功能，可以实时记录和查看各种收支款项，包括采购应付款、销售应收款、采购应退款和销售应退款。
rationale: 流水账功能提供清晰的收支概览，帮助用户一目了然地掌握财务状况。
title_en: Viewing Account Statement Records of Income and Expenses
scenario_en: When needing to view various income and expense items at the end of the month, the account statement function can be used.
decision_en: Through the 'Account Statement' function, various income and expense items can be recorded and viewed in real-time, including accounts payable for purchases, accounts receivable for sales, accounts refundable for purchases, and accounts refundable for sales.

title: 交易安全与消费者保障规则概述
scenario: 本节概述了淘宝大学关于交易安全和消费者保障的核心规则。
decision: 本节旨在介绍淘宝平台在交易安全、消费者保障、违背承诺以及举证规范方面的基本原则和高压线。
rationale: 确保平台交易的公平性、安全性和消费者权益，同时明确商家行为规范和举证要求。
title_en: Transaction Security and Consumer Protection Rules Overview
scenario_en: This section outlines the core rules of Taobao University regarding transaction security and consumer protection.
decision_en: This section aims to introduce the basic principles and red lines of the Taobao platform concerning transaction security, consumer protection, breach of promise, and evidence submission norms.

title: 淘宝密码安全防范规定
scenario: This document outlines general guidelines for password security on Taobao.
decision: Users should be familiar with transaction processes and understand network traps to ensure transaction security.
rationale: To protect user accounts and transactions from security threats and fraud.
title_en: Taobao Password Security Guidelines
scenario_en: This document outlines general guidelines for password security on Taobao.
decision_en: Users should be familiar with transaction processes and understand network traps to ensure transaction security.

title: 识别并防范数字证书诈骗
scenario: 当用户收到声称是数字证书申请的短信验证码，但自己并未申请时。
decision: 不要输入或提供收到的验证码给任何人。立即意识到这可能是诈骗。
rationale: 诈骗分子会诱导用户输入验证码，从而获取用户的数字证书，进而控制用户的账户资金。
title_en: Identify and Prevent Digital Certificate Scams
scenario_en: When a user receives an SMS verification code for a digital certificate application they did not initiate.
decision_en: Do not enter or provide the received verification code to anyone. Immediately recognize this as a potential scam.

title: 淘宝平台各类密码及其用途
scenario: 当用户需要了解或使用淘宝、支付宝及网银相关功能时，需要区分不同密码的用途。
decision: 淘宝平台涉及多种密码，包括淘宝登录密码（用于登录、编辑、设置）、支付宝登录密码（用于登录、查询、设置）、支付宝支付密码（用于支付、退款）、网银相关密码（用于登录、付款）以及注册邮箱密码（用于找回相关密码）。
rationale: 区分不同密码的种类和用途，有助于保障交易安全和账户安全，并确保用户能正确执行各项操作。
title_en: Taobao Platform Password Types and Uses
scenario_en: When users need to understand or use Taobao, Alipay, and online banking related functions, they need to differentiate the uses of various passwords.
decision_en: The Taobao platform involves multiple passwords, including Taobao login password (for login, editing, settings), Alipay login password (for login, inquiries, settings), Alipay payment password (for payments, refunds), online banking related passwords (for login, payments), and registered email password (for retrieving related passwords).

title: 密码设置原则：安全与易记
scenario: 当用户需要设置淘宝账户密码时。
decision: 密码应同时满足安全性和易于记忆的原则。
rationale: 为了保护账户安全，同时方便用户管理和使用。
title_en: Password Setting Principles: Secure and Memorable
scenario_en: When a user needs to set a Taobao account password.
decision_en: Passwords should be both secure and easy to remember.

title: 淘宝交易安全：密码设置的禁止事项
scenario: 用户在淘宝平台设置密码时，为了保障交易安全。
decision: 禁止将密码设置为与会员名、联系方式（电话、传真、手机、邮编、邮箱、姓名、单位、住址）相同或包含这些信息，也禁止设置为简单的规则排列（如abcdef、123456、666666）。
rationale: 这些密码设置方式极易被猜测或破解，会严重威胁用户的账户和交易安全。
title_en: Taobao Transaction Security: Password Setting Prohibitions
scenario_en: When users set passwords on the Taobao platform to ensure transaction security.
decision_en: It is prohibited to set passwords that are identical to or contain the member name, contact information (phone, fax, mobile, zip code, email, name, company, address), or simple sequential patterns (e.g., abcdef, 123456, 666666).

title: 淘宝账户密码安全设置与管理
scenario: 当用户需要设置或管理淘宝账户密码时，以及在日常使用中保护账户安全时。
decision: 用户应设置安全密码，使用复制+粘贴方式输入密码以防木马跟踪，定期更改密码并记录，为不同账户设置不同密码，且不要轻易向他人提供相关证明材料。
rationale: 这些措施旨在最大程度地保护账户密码安全，防止账户被盗用或信息泄露，从而保障交易安全。
title_en: Taobao Account Password Security Settings and Management
scenario_en: When users need to set or manage their Taobao account password, and protect account security in daily use.
decision_en: Users should set secure passwords, use copy+paste to enter passwords to prevent Trojan tracking, regularly change and record passwords, set different passwords for different accounts, and not easily provide relevant verification materials to others.

title: 识别并避免不明链接和钓鱼网站
scenario: 当客户在聊天中提供不明链接，或遇到可疑网站时。
decision: 警惕不明链接，特别是那些看起来像淘宝但域名不符的链接，因为它们可能是钓鱼网站。
rationale: 不明链接和钓鱼网站可能导致账户信息泄露或财产损失，识别并避免这些风险是交易安全的关键。
title_en: Identify and Avoid Unknown Links and Phishing Websites
scenario_en: When a customer provides an unknown link in chat, or encounters a suspicious website.
decision_en: Be wary of unknown links, especially those that look like Taobao but have mismatched domains, as they may be phishing websites.

title: 识别不安全链接和钓鱼网站
scenario: 当用户在聊天中或通过外部链接收到商品信息时。
decision: 警惕没有安全标识的链接，尤其是来自非官方或不熟悉的网站链接，例如个人博客或论坛。
rationale: 不安全的链接可能导致用户访问钓鱼网站，从而泄露个人信息或造成财产损失。
title_en: Identify Insecure Links and Phishing Websites
scenario_en: When a user receives product information in chat or via an external link.
decision_en: Be wary of links without security indicators, especially those from unofficial or unfamiliar websites, such as personal blogs or forums.

title: 淘宝交易安全防范规定
scenario: 用户在淘宝进行交易时，需要防范潜在的安全风险。
decision: 用户应定期查毒、熟悉交易流程、不使用变态下载、不观看在线视频、不上危险网站、不点击危险链接。
rationale: 这些措施旨在保护用户的交易安全，避免病毒感染、信息泄露和欺诈行为。
title_en: Taobao Transaction Security Prevention Regulations
scenario_en: Users need to guard against potential security risks when conducting transactions on Taobao.
decision_en: Users should regularly scan for viruses, be familiar with transaction processes, avoid abnormal downloads, refrain from watching online videos, avoid dangerous websites, and not click on dangerous links.

title: 淘宝消费者保障规则概述
scenario: 当需要了解淘宝平台为消费者提供的基本保障服务时。
decision: 淘宝平台提供七天无理由退货、闪电发货、第三方质检、30天维修、假一赔三和退货运费险等消费者保障规则。
rationale: 这些规则旨在提升消费者购物体验，保障消费者权益，并规范商家行为。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Consumer Protection Rules
scenario_en: When needing to understand the basic protection services provided by the Taobao platform for consumers.
decision_en: The Taobao platform offers consumer protection rules such as seven-day no-reason returns, express shipping, third-party quality inspection, 30-day repair, triple compensation for fakes, and return shipping insurance.

title: 淘宝消费者保障规则概述
scenario: 当消费者在淘宝平台购物时，平台提供一系列保障措施。
decision: 淘宝平台通过“七天无理由退换”、“假一赔三”、“闪电发货”、“30天维修”和“退货运费险”等规则来保障消费者权益。
rationale: 这些规则旨在提升消费者购物体验，解决其在购物过程中可能遇到的退换货、商品质量、物流和售后维修等问题，从而建立信任和促进交易。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Consumer Protection Rules
scenario_en: When consumers shop on the Taobao platform, the platform provides a series of protective measures.
decision_en: The Taobao platform protects consumer rights through rules such as 'seven-day no-reason returns', 'triple compensation for fakes', 'express shipping', '30-day repair', and 'return shipping insurance'.

title: 淘宝消费者保障规则：七天无理由退货、质量问题、未收到货、售后维修、欺骗行为
scenario: 当消费者在淘宝购物过程中遇到商品质量问题、与描述不符、未收到货、需要售后维修或遭遇卖家欺骗行为时。
decision: 消费者可以根据具体情况发起维权，包括七天无理由退货、退款退货、售后维修或举报欺骗行为。
rationale: 为了保障消费者在淘宝平台上的购物权益，提供解决交易纠纷的途径。
title_en: Taobao Consumer Protection Rules: Seven-Day No-Reason Returns, Quality Issues, Non-Receipt, After-Sales Repair, Deceptive Practices
scenario_en: When consumers encounter product quality issues, discrepancies with descriptions, non-receipt of goods, need after-sales repair, or experience seller deceptive practices during shopping on Taobao.
decision_en: Consumers can initiate a claim based on the specific situation, including seven-day no-reason returns, refunds and returns, after-sales repair, or reporting deceptive practices.

title: 淘宝消费者保障退款维权流程及赔付条件
scenario: 买家在淘宝网使用支付宝担保交易服务购物时，收到商品出现质量问题或与描述不符。
decision: 买家可在交易成功之日起15天内向淘宝申请消费者保障赔付。淘宝核实后会进行先行赔付，赔付金额限于买家实际支付的商品价款加邮费（含回邮费）。
rationale: 保障买家权益，确保购物体验，并对卖家不履行退货服务或失联的情况提供解决方案。
title_en: Taobao Consumer Protection Refund Claim Process and Compensation Conditions
scenario_en: When a buyer uses Alipay guaranteed transaction service on Taobao.com and receives goods with quality issues or discrepancies from the description.
decision_en: The buyer can apply for consumer protection compensation from Taobao within 15 days from the date of successful transaction. After verification, Taobao will provide advance compensation, limited to the actual price of the goods paid by the buyer plus postage (including return postage).

title: 淘宝七天无理由退货保障范围说明
scenario: 当消费者就特定类目商品发起七天无理由退货纠纷时。
decision: 淘宝网有权不介入处理此类纠纷。卖家需自行处理与买家之间的交易纠纷，且“消费者保障服务”标识不适用于这些类目商品（淘宝商城商户除外）。
rationale: 某些商品类目因其特殊性（如活体宠物、虚拟商品、成人用品等），不适合或难以适用七天无理由退货政策。
title_en: Explanation of Taobao Seven-Day No-Reason Return Coverage
scenario_en: When a consumer initiates a dispute regarding a seven-day no-reason return for specific product categories.
decision_en: Taobao.com reserves the right not to intervene in such disputes. Sellers must handle transaction disputes with buyers themselves, and the 'Consumer Protection Service' label does not apply to these product categories (except for Taobao Mall merchants).

title: 七天无理由退换货政策例外情况
scenario: 当消费者提出七天无理由退换货请求时，需要判断商品是否属于例外情况。
decision: 苹果手机已激活、散装食品、服装吊牌已剪、Q币、姓名刻字戒指、化妆品小样、赠品、生日蛋糕等商品不适用七天无理由退换货政策。四件套缩水不影响七天无理由退换。
rationale: 这些商品因其性质（如激活后价值受损、食品安全、个性化定制、消耗品、赠品等）或已使用状态，不符合七天无理由退换货的条件，以保护商家利益和商品特性。四件套缩水属于商品质量问题，不属于无理由退换的范畴。
customer_facing_name: 七天无理由退换货政策
title_en: Seven-Day No-Reason Return/Exchange Policy Exceptions
scenario_en: When a consumer requests a seven-day no-reason return or exchange, it is necessary to determine if the item falls under an exception.
decision_en: Products such as activated Apple phones, bulk food, clothing with tags removed, Q coins, custom engraved rings, cosmetic samples, free gifts, and birthday cakes are not eligible for the seven-day no-reason return/exchange policy. Four-piece bedding sets shrinking do not affect eligibility for seven-day no-reason return/exchange.

title: 淘宝交易流程中的高压线问题
scenario: 当处理淘宝交易流程中可能出现的违规或敏感问题时。
decision: 需要熟悉并注意交易流程中的“高压线”问题，包括发票、付款、发货、关闭交易、包邮和信息泄露。
rationale: 这些是淘宝交易中常见的敏感点，处理不当可能导致违规或客户不满。
title_en: High-Risk Issues in Taobao Transaction Process
scenario_en: When dealing with potential violations or sensitive issues that may arise during the Taobao transaction process.
decision_en: It is necessary to be familiar with and pay attention to 'high-risk' issues in the transaction process, including invoices, payments, shipping, closing transactions, free shipping, and information leakage.

title: 淘宝交易流程中的常见问题分类
scenario: 当需要了解淘宝交易流程中可能遇到的问题类型时。
decision: 熟悉并分类淘宝交易流程中常见的付款、发货、关闭交易和包邮问题。
rationale: 为了更好地理解和处理淘宝交易中可能出现的问题，需要对问题进行分类。
title_en: Classification of Common Issues in Taobao Transaction Process
scenario_en: When needing to understand the types of issues that may be encountered during the Taobao transaction process.
decision_en: Familiarize yourself with and categorize common payment, shipping, transaction closure, and free shipping issues in the Taobao transaction process.

title: 沟通证据的举证规范
scenario: 当需要提供沟通证据来解决交易纠纷时。
decision: 旺旺聊天记录、QQ聊天记录、手机短信、电话录音、影像视频都可以作为沟通证据。
rationale: 这些记录能有效还原沟通内容，作为交易纠纷处理的依据。
title_en: Communication Evidence Submission Guidelines
scenario_en: When communication evidence is needed to resolve a transaction dispute.
decision_en: Wangwang chat records, QQ chat records, mobile SMS, phone recordings, and video footage can all be used as communication evidence.

title: 淘宝商品描述不符举证规范
scenario: 当买家声称收到的货物与商品描述不符时，商家需要提供相关凭证。
decision: 商家需在发布商品时如实描述并提供有效截图。同时，商家应联系消费者提供实物图片进行核实，并提供旺旺聊天历史记录截图作为交易约定内容。对于尺寸不符的情况，需提供具体测量图片。
rationale: 确保交易的公平性和透明度，通过凭证核实买家主张的真实性，并解决商品描述不符的争议。
title_en: Taobao Product Description Discrepancy Evidence Guidelines
scenario_en: When a buyer claims that the received goods do not match the product description, the merchant needs to provide relevant proof.
decision_en: Merchants must accurately describe products and provide valid screenshots when listing them. Additionally, merchants should contact consumers to provide physical product images for verification and provide screenshots of Wangwang chat history as evidence of transaction agreements. For size discrepancies, specific measurement images must be provided.

title: 物流证据的有效性：签收底单为法律依据，物流网站记录仅供参考
scenario: 当需要提供物流证据来解决交易纠纷时。
decision: 签收底单是有效的书面法律证据，而物流网站的查询跟踪记录仅作为参考。
rationale: 法律上，签收底单具有更高的证明力。
title_en: Validity of Logistics Evidence: Signed Delivery Receipt as Legal Basis, Logistics Website Records for Reference Only
scenario_en: When logistics evidence is needed to resolve a transaction dispute.
decision_en: A signed delivery receipt is valid written legal evidence, while logistics website tracking records are for reference only.

title: 物流证据：实际签收人与订单收货人一致
scenario: 当需要提供物流证据以证明商品已签收时。
decision: 物流证据（如快递底单）上显示的实际签收人必须与订单上的收货人信息一致。
rationale: 确保交易的真实性和有效性，避免因收货人信息不符导致的争议。
title_en: Logistics Proof: Consignee Matches Order Recipient
scenario_en: When logistics proof is required to confirm that goods have been signed for.
decision_en: The actual consignee displayed on the logistics proof (e.g., courier waybill) must match the recipient information on the order.

title: 物流证据：实际签收人非订单收货人时的举证规范
scenario: 当快递的实际签收人不是订单上指定的收货人时，需要提供物流证据。
decision: 物流公司需出具一份证明，说明收货人因故无法本人签收，并授权了特定人员（实际收货人姓名）代为签收货物。证明中需包含快递单号、收货人姓名、签收日期、实际签收人姓名、物流公司电话、公司盖章及日期。
rationale: 此举旨在明确货物签收的责任归属，避免因非本人签收导致的纠纷，并确保交易流程的透明和可追溯性。
title_en: Logistics Proof: Guidelines for When Actual Consignee Differs from Order Recipient
scenario_en: When the actual consignee of the express delivery is not the recipient specified on the order, logistics proof is required.
decision_en: The logistics company must issue a certificate stating that the recipient was unable to sign in person for a reason, and authorized a specific person (actual consignee's name) to sign for the goods on their behalf. The certificate must include the waybill number, recipient's name, signing date, actual consignee's name, logistics company phone number, company seal, and date.

title: 买家无理由拒签商品的物流证据规范
scenario: 当买家无理由拒签商品时，需要提供物流证据。
decision: 物流公司需出具证明，说明快递单号、收货人、派送日期、派件员以及收件人拒收商品的原因，并承诺情况属实。
rationale: 此证明用于明确买家拒签的事实，作为交易纠纷处理的依据。
title_en: Logistics Proof Guidelines for Buyer's Unjustified Refusal to Sign
scenario_en: When a buyer unjustifiably refuses to sign for goods, logistics proof is required.
decision_en: The logistics company must issue a certificate stating the waybill number, recipient, delivery date, delivery person, and the reason for the recipient's refusal to accept the goods, and confirm the accuracy of the situation.

title: 专柜机打购物小票的举证规范
scenario: 当需要提供专柜机打购物小票作为资质证据时。
decision: 购物小票上的开票时间、商品名称必须与发布的宝贝名称一致。
rationale: 确保证据的真实性和一致性，以符合举证规范。
title_en: Guidelines for Providing Counter Machine-Printed Purchase Receipts
scenario_en: When a counter machine-printed purchase receipt needs to be provided as qualification evidence.
decision_en: The invoice date and product name on the purchase receipt must match the name of the published item.

title: 客服基础：熟悉、掌握、遵守交易流程、工具软件、规则规范
scenario: 作为客服人员，需要掌握基础知识和操作规范。
decision: 客服人员必须熟悉交易流程、掌握工具软件、并遵守规则规范。
rationale: 这是客服工作的基本要求，确保服务质量和效率。
title_en: Customer Service Fundamentals: Familiarity with Transaction Processes, Tools, and Rules
scenario_en: As a customer service representative, it is necessary to master basic knowledge and operational standards.
decision_en: Customer service representatives must be familiar with transaction processes, master tool software, and comply with rules and regulations.

title: Page 71 - Thanks
scenario: This chunk contains only a page number, a 'Thanks' message, and a company name/logo reference.
decision: No specific action can be derived from this content.
rationale: The content is a page footer/header and does not contain actionable policy or guidance.

title: 客户服务SOP：处理客户投诉的通用原则
scenario: 当客户提出投诉时，无论投诉内容或情绪如何。
decision: 客服人员应保持冷静、耐心和专业的态度，积极倾听客户的诉求，并努力提供解决方案。
rationale: 通过专业的服务态度和有效的解决方案，可以平息客户不满，维护品牌声誉，并可能将负面体验转化为正面。
title_en: Customer Service SOP: General Principles for Handling Customer Complaints
scenario_en: When a customer makes a complaint, regardless of the content or emotion.
decision_en: Customer service representatives should remain calm, patient, and professional, actively listen to the customer's demands, and strive to provide solutions.

title: 淘宝客服基础技能系列教程：老客户管理
scenario: This document is an introductory tutorial for Taobao customer service.
decision: The tutorial focuses on the fundamental skills required for managing existing customers.
rationale: Effective management of existing customers is a core skill for Taobao customer service representatives.
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Basic Skills Tutorial Series: Existing Customer Management
scenario_en: This document is an introductory tutorial for Taobao customer service.
decision_en: The tutorial focuses on the fundamental skills required for managing existing customers.

title: 店铺信息展示
scenario: This chunk describes the display of shop information on a platform.
decision: The information displayed includes the shop owner's name, location, positive review rate, return customer rate, main categories, and main brands.
rationale: This information helps users understand the shop's profile and offerings.
title_en: Shop Information Display
scenario_en: This chunk describes the display of shop information on a platform.
decision_en: The information displayed includes the shop owner's name, location, positive review rate, return customer rate, main categories, and main brands.

title: 老客户维护和营销：重要性、分类管理、维护与营销
scenario: 当需要理解和规划老客户的维护与营销策略时。
decision: 本部分将涵盖老客户的重要性、如何进行分类管理、具体的维护方法以及营销策略。
rationale: 有效的老客户维护和营销是业务增长的关键。
title_en: Existing Customer Maintenance and Marketing: Importance, Categorization, Maintenance, and Marketing
scenario_en: When needing to understand and plan strategies for existing customer maintenance and marketing.
decision_en: This section will cover the importance of existing customers, how to categorize them, specific maintenance methods, and marketing strategies.

title: 老客户的重要性及定义
scenario: 在理解和管理客户关系时
decision: 识别并重视老客户，理解其对业务的价值。
rationale: 老客户对业务发展具有重要作用。
title_en: Importance and Definition of Existing Customers
scenario_en: When understanding and managing customer relationships.
decision_en: Identify and value existing customers, understanding their worth to the business.

title: 老客户的定义及重要性
scenario: 当需要识别或讨论老客户时
decision: 老客户是指有过一次以上成功交易的买家。老客户对业务发展具有重要性。
rationale: 明确老客户的定义有助于统一内部认知，并强调其对业务的价值。
title_en: Definition and Importance of Existing Customers
scenario_en: When needing to identify or discuss existing customers.
decision_en: Existing customers are buyers who have had more than one successful transaction. Existing customers are important for business development.

title: 老客户的重要性及作用
scenario: 本节讨论了老客户对业务的重要性。
decision: 应重视老客户，因为他们有助于提升回头率、DSR、客单价和流量价值。
rationale: 老客户对业务增长和各项关键指标的提升具有显著作用。
title_en: Importance and Role of Existing Customers
scenario_en: This section discusses the importance of existing customers to a business.
decision_en: Existing customers should be valued as they help improve repurchase rates, DSR, average transaction value, and traffic value.

title: 老顾客分类和管理
scenario: 本节概述了老客户的分类和管理。
decision: 需要对老客户进行分类和管理。
rationale: 有效的客户分类和管理是提升客户忠诚度的基础。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification and Management
scenario_en: This section outlines the classification and management of existing customers.
decision_en: Existing customers need to be classified and managed.

title: 老客户分类和管理
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类和管理时。
decision: 老客户可以根据活动、信用级别、会员等级、RFM模型和消费习惯进行分类。
rationale: 通过不同的分类方法，可以更有效地理解和管理老客户，从而制定更有针对性的客户维护策略。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification and Management
scenario_en: When needing to classify and manage existing customers.
decision_en: Existing customers can be classified by activity, credit level, membership tier, RFM model, and consumption habits.

title: 使用RFM模型对老客户进行分类和管理
scenario: 当需要对现有客户进行分类管理以优化客户关系和营销策略时。
decision: 使用RFM模型（最近一次购买时间、购买次数、购买金额）对老客户进行分类训练。
rationale: RFM模型是一种常用的客户价值分析工具，能够有效识别不同价值的客户群体，从而进行差异化管理和精准营销。
title_en: Using RFM Model for Existing Customer Classification and Management
scenario_en: When needing to classify and manage existing customers to optimize customer relationships and marketing strategies.
decision_en: Use the RFM model (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) to classify existing customers.

title: 老客户分类：RFM模型
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类管理时，以更好地理解其价值和行为。
decision: 使用RFM模型（Recency, Frequency, Monetary）对老客户进行分类。具体分类标准为：最近一次消费（R）分为4个时间段，消费频率（F）分为4个购买次数，消费金额（M）分为4个金额区间。
rationale: RFM模型是一种常用的客户价值分析工具，通过客户的消费行为数据来评估客户的价值，从而进行精细化管理和营销。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification: RFM Model
scenario_en: When needing to classify existing customers to better understand their value and behavior.
decision_en: Use the RFM model (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) to classify existing customers. Specific classification criteria are: Recency (R) divided into 4 time periods, Frequency (F) divided into 4 purchase counts, and Monetary (M) divided into 4 monetary ranges.

title: 老客户分类和管理：按活动划分
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类和管理时，可以根据他们参与的活动进行划分。
decision: 将老客户按照他们参与的淘宝、天猫、店铺等活动进行分类。
rationale: 通过按活动分类，可以更有效地识别和管理不同类型的老客户，从而进行有针对性的营销和维护。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification and Management: By Activity
scenario_en: When needing to classify and manage existing customers, they can be divided based on their participation in activities.
decision_en: Classify existing customers according to their participation in Taobao, Tmall, store, and other activities.

title: 老客户分类：按活动划分
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类管理时，可以根据他们参与的活动类型进行划分。
decision: 将老客户分为双11/双12大促客户、聚划算客户、新品客户和促销品客户。
rationale: 通过活动类型分类有助于更精准地理解客户的购买偏好和行为模式，从而进行有针对性的营销和管理。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification: By Activity
scenario_en: When needing to classify and manage existing customers, they can be divided based on the type of activities they participate in.
decision_en: Classify existing customers into Double 11/Double 12 promotion customers, Juhuasuan customers, new product customers, and promotional product customers.

title: 老客户分类和管理：按会员等级划分
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类和管理时，应考虑其会员等级。
decision: 根据店铺设定的会员等级对老客户进行分类。
rationale: 通过会员等级分类可以更好地理解客户价值，并实施差异化的管理和营销策略。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification and Management: By Membership Tier
scenario_en: When needing to classify and manage existing customers, their membership tier should be considered.
decision_en: Classify existing customers according to the membership tiers set by the store.

title: 老客户分类：按会员等级划分
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类管理时。
decision: 根据会员等级将老客户分为：普通会员、高级会员、VIP会员、至尊VIP会员。
rationale: 通过会员等级分类，可以更好地管理和识别不同价值的老客户。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification: By Membership Tier
scenario_en: When needing to classify and manage existing customers.
decision_en: Classify existing customers by membership tier: Regular Member, Senior Member, VIP Member, Supreme VIP Member.

title: 根据买家信用分对老客户进行分类和管理
scenario: 当需要对现有客户进行分类管理时，应考虑其在淘宝大学的信用分。
decision: 结合店铺的具体情况，根据买家在淘宝大学的信用级别对老客户进行分类。
rationale: 通过信用分分类有助于更精细化地管理老客户，可能用于提供差异化的服务或营销策略。
title_en: Categorize and Manage Existing Customers by Taobao Credit Score
scenario_en: When classifying existing customers, their Taobao University credit score should be considered.
decision_en: Categorize existing customers based on their Taobao University credit level, combined with the store's specific situation.

title: 老客户分类：按买家信用分
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类管理时，可以根据买家信用分进行划分。
decision: 老客户可根据其信用分分为心级买家、钻级买家、冠级买家和超级买家。
rationale: 通过信用分分类有助于识别不同价值的客户，以便进行差异化管理和维护。

title: 老客户分类：按消费习惯划分
scenario: 需要对老客户进行分类管理时，特别是根据他们的消费习惯。
decision: 结合店铺数据，分析购买不同商品的买家数量，以按消费习惯对老客户进行分类。
rationale: 通过分析消费习惯，可以更好地理解客户群体，从而进行更精准的客户管理和营销。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification: By Consumption Habits
scenario_en: When classifying existing customers, especially according to their consumption habits.
decision_en: Analyze the number of buyers for different products using store data to classify existing customers by consumption habits.

title: 老客户分类：按消费习惯划分
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行分类和管理时，应考虑其消费习惯。
decision: 将老客户按照商品偏好、品牌偏好、购买方式偏好和价格偏好进行分类。
rationale: 通过了解老客户的消费习惯，可以更好地进行客户管理和提供个性化服务。
title_en: Existing Customer Classification: By Consumption Habits
scenario_en: When classifying and managing existing customers, their consumption habits should be considered.
decision_en: Classify existing customers by product preference, brand preference, purchase method preference, and price preference.

title: 老客户分类和管理
scenario: When managing existing customers.
decision: Categorize and manage existing customers effectively.
rationale: Effective management of existing customers is crucial for business success.
title_en: Existing Customer Classification and Management
scenario_en: When managing existing customers.
decision_en: Categorize and manage existing customers effectively.

title: 老客户维护工具与方法
scenario: 本节概述了维护老客户的工具和方法。
decision: 需要利用特定的工具和方法来维护老客户，以提升客户忠诚度。
rationale: 维护老客户对于业务的持续发展至关重要。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Tools and Methods
scenario_en: This section outlines tools and methods for retaining existing customers.
decision_en: Utilize specific tools and methods to retain existing customers and enhance customer loyalty.

title: 老客户维护工具：关怀工具训练
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行维护和关怀时。
decision: 列举所有能用于客户关怀的工具，例如淘宝平台提供的工具。
rationale: 通过识别和利用有效的客户关怀工具，可以更好地维护老客户关系。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Tools: Care Tool Training
scenario_en: When existing customers need to be retained and cared for.
decision_en: List all tools that can be used for customer care, such as those provided by the Taobao platform.

title: 老客户维护工具与渠道
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时
decision: 应通过多种渠道和工具进行人工关怀和互动，包括网页互动、客服互动、Email、短信、社交媒体、优惠券账户、手机APP、旺旺电话、短信群和SNS。
rationale: 通过多渠道、多工具的互动，可以更有效地维护老客户关系，提升客户忠诚度。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Tools and Channels
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships.
decision_en: Provide manual care and interaction through multiple channels and tools, including web interaction, customer service interaction, Email, SMS, social media, coupon accounts, mobile apps, Wangwang calls, SMS groups, and SNS.

title: 老客户维护工具与CRM软件关怀
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时。
decision: 应利用CRM软件进行关怀，并通过多种渠道与老客户互动，包括Email、短信、社交媒体、优惠券账户和手机APP。
rationale: 通过多渠道互动和CRM软件关怀，可以有效维护老客户关系，提升客户忠诚度。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Tools and CRM Software Care
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships.
decision_en: Utilize CRM software for care and interact with existing customers through multiple channels, including Email, SMS, social media, coupon accounts, and mobile apps.

title: 老客户维护方法：交易关怀、情感关怀及其他关怀
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时。
decision: 应通过交易关怀、情感关怀及其他关怀等多种方法来维护老客户。
rationale: 维护老客户关系对于业务发展至关重要，需要多方面策略。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Methods: Transactional, Emotional, and Other Care
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships.
decision_en: Maintain existing customers through various methods such as transactional care, emotional care, and other forms of care.

title: 老客户交易关怀方法
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时，尤其是在交易的不同阶段。
decision: 通过发货、同城、签收和使用关怀等方式，在发货当天或交易当天通过短信进行沟通，话术仅限于关怀，不包含促销内容。
rationale: 旨在通过非促销性的关怀来维护和加强老客户关系。
title_en: Existing Customer Transactional Care Methods
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships, especially at different stages of a transaction.
decision_en: Communicate via SMS on the day of shipment or transaction through shipment, local delivery, receipt, and usage care. The communication should be limited to care and not include promotional content.

title: 老客户交易关怀：发货、同城、签收及使用阶段的沟通策略
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行交易过程中的关怀时，包括发货、货物到达同城、签收和使用等关键时间节点。
decision: 在货物到达同城时（通常是发货后2-5天），通过短信、电话或旺旺等方式主动联系老客户，进行重点提醒和关怀。
rationale: 通过在交易关键节点提供主动关怀，可以增强老客户的购物体验，提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Existing Customer Transactional Care: Communication Strategies for Shipment, Local Delivery, Receipt, and Usage Stages
scenario_en: When providing transactional care to existing customers, including key milestones such as shipment, goods arriving in the same city, receipt, and usage.
decision_en: When goods arrive in the same city (usually 2-5 days after shipment), proactively contact existing customers via SMS, phone, or Wangwang for important reminders and care.

title: 老客户维护方法：交易关怀
scenario: 维护老客户关系，特别是在货物签收后评价前。
decision: 在货物签收后评价前，通过短信或电话进行交易关怀，沟通时要注重咨询和反馈。
rationale: 通过主动关怀和沟通，可以有效维护老客户关系，提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Methods: Transactional Care
scenario_en: Maintaining existing customer relationships, especially after goods are received and before evaluation.
decision_en: Provide transactional care via SMS or phone after goods are received and before evaluation, focusing on inquiries and feedback during communication.

title: 老客户维护方法：交易关怀
scenario: 当客户完成交易后，为了维护老客户关系。
decision: 在签收十天内，通过旺旺、短信或电话进行发货、同城、签收和使用关怀，沟通时应多询问并重视客户反馈。
rationale: 通过主动关怀和重视反馈，可以增强客户满意度和忠诚度，从而维护老客户关系。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Methods: Transactional Care
scenario_en: After a customer completes a transaction, to maintain existing customer relationships.
decision_en: Within ten days of receipt, provide shipment, local delivery, receipt, and usage care via Wangwang, SMS, or phone. During communication, ask more questions and value customer feedback.

title: 老客户交易关怀短信示例
scenario: 当老客户的购买物品已到达目的地城市时，需要发送交易关怀短信。
decision: 发送包含物品到达通知、收货提醒以及店铺晚安问候的短信，内容应富有情感和关怀。
rationale: 通过情感化的交易关怀短信，维护老客户关系，提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Existing Customer Transactional Care SMS Example
scenario_en: When an existing customer's purchased item has arrived in the destination city, a transactional care SMS needs to be sent.
decision_en: Send an SMS including item arrival notification, delivery reminder, and a store's goodnight greeting. The content should be emotional and caring.

title: 客户情感关怀与维护方法
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系或在日常及节日期间对客户进行关怀时。
decision: 实施日常关怀和节日关怀，并遵循老客户维护方法。
rationale: 通过情感关怀和有效维护，可以增强客户忠诚度，提升客户满意度。
title_en: Customer Emotional Care and Retention Methods
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships or provide care to customers during daily routines and holidays.
decision_en: Implement daily care and holiday care, and follow existing customer retention methods.

title: 老客户日常情感关怀与维护方法
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时，尤其是在日常互动中。
decision: 通过日常问候和情感关怀来维护老客户。
rationale: 日常关怀有助于增强客户忠诚度，并有效处理客户异议。
title_en: Existing Customer Daily Emotional Care and Retention Methods
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships, especially in daily interactions.
decision_en: Maintain existing customers through daily greetings and emotional care.

title: 老客户维护方法：情感关怀-日常关怀
scenario: 当维护老客户关系时
decision: 通过日常关怀来提供情感关怀。
rationale: 情感关怀是维护老客户关系的重要方法之一。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Methods: Emotional Care - Daily Care
scenario_en: When maintaining existing customer relationships.
decision_en: Provide emotional care through daily care.

title: 老客户日常关怀训练：培养感情，禁止促销信息
scenario: 在进行老客户日常关怀训练时。
decision: 注重培养与老客户的感情，并严格禁止在关怀中发送任何促销信息。
rationale: 维护老客户关系的核心在于建立信任和情感连接，而非短期销售，促销信息会破坏这种关系。
title_en: Existing Customer Daily Care Training: Cultivate Relationships, Prohibit Promotional Information
scenario_en: When conducting existing customer daily care training.
decision_en: Focus on cultivating relationships with existing customers and strictly prohibit sending any promotional information during care.

title: 老客户维护：情感关怀与节日关怀
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时，尤其是在特殊日期。
decision: 通过情感关怀和节日关怀来维护老客户，例如在生日和节日时进行关怀。
rationale: 情感关怀和节日关怀是维护老客户关系、提升客户忠诚度的有效方法。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention: Emotional Care and Holiday Care
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships, especially on special dates.
decision_en: Maintain existing customers through emotional care and holiday care, such as providing care on birthdays and holidays.

title: 老客户维护方法：节日关怀训练
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行维护时，尤其是在节日期间。
decision: 通过节日关怀来维护老客户关系，重点在于培养感情。
rationale: 培养与老客户的感情有助于维护长期客户关系，避免直接促销信息可以保持客户的良好体验。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention: Holiday Care Training
scenario_en: When needing to retain existing customers, especially during holidays.
decision_en: Maintain existing customer relationships through holiday care, focusing on building rapport.

title: 老客户维护方法：其他关怀
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行额外关怀时。
decision: 除了常规维护，还应考虑系统异常、气候异常和社会异常等特殊情况下的关怀。
rationale: 通过在特殊时期提供关怀，可以增强客户忠诚度和满意度。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention: Other Care
scenario_en: When additional care for existing customers is needed.
decision_en: Beyond regular maintenance, consider care during special circumstances such as system anomalies, abnormal weather, and social disruptions.

title: 老客户维护方法
scenario: 当需要维护老客户关系时。
decision: 应遵循特定的老客户维护方法。
rationale: 维护老客户关系对于业务持续发展至关重要。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention Methods
scenario_en: When needing to maintain existing customer relationships.
decision_en: Specific methods for existing customer retention should be followed.

title: 老客户维护方法：气候异常关怀训练
scenario: 当出现天气突变时，需要与所在地区的老客户进行沟通。
decision: 对老客户进行气候异常关怀训练，学习如何与受天气影响的买家沟通。
rationale: 通过主动关怀老客户，维护客户关系，提升客户忠诚度。
title_en: Existing Customer Retention: Abnormal Weather Care Training
scenario_en: When there is a sudden change in weather and communication with existing customers in the affected area is needed.
decision_en: Provide abnormal weather care training to existing customers, learning how to communicate with buyers affected by the weather.

title: 社会异常关怀训练：与买家沟通社会环境变化
scenario: 当社会环境发生变化时，需要与买家进行沟通。
decision: 客服人员应接受社会异常关怀训练，学习如何与买家沟通社会环境变化。
rationale: 为了确保在社会环境变化时，能够有效且恰当地与买家沟通，维护客户关系。
title_en: Social Anomaly Care Training: Communicating Social Environment Changes to Buyers
scenario_en: When the social environment changes and communication with buyers is needed.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should receive social anomaly care training to learn how to communicate social environment changes to buyers.

title: 老客户的营销 (Marketing to Existing Customers)
scenario: This section broadly discusses marketing strategies, specifically highlighting '老客户的营销' (marketing to existing customers).
decision: Focus on marketing efforts directed towards existing customers.
rationale: The document structure indicates '老客户的营销' as a key area within overall marketing strategies, suggesting its importance.
title_en: Marketing to Existing Customers
scenario_en: This section broadly discusses marketing strategies, specifically highlighting 'Marketing to Existing Customers'.
decision_en: Focus on marketing efforts directed towards existing customers.

title: 淘宝大学主动营销：老客户营销策略
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行营销时。
decision: 采取主动出击和单向传递的营销方式。
rationale: 针对老客户的营销应更具主动性，并可采用直接的信息传递方式。
title_en: Taobao University Proactive Marketing: Existing Customer Marketing Strategy
scenario_en: When marketing to existing customers is needed.
decision_en: Adopt proactive and one-way marketing approaches.

title: 老客户互动营销策略：优惠券与定向优惠
scenario: 针对首次购物的客户，以及在特定时间内未进行购物的老客户。
decision: 对于首次购物的客户，在30天内发放优惠券；对于60天内未购物的老客户，通过短信通知进行定向优惠。
rationale: 通过主动营销策略，鼓励首次购物客户再次消费，并重新激活长时间未购物的老客户，以提升客户忠诚度和复购率。
title_en: Existing Customer Interactive Marketing Strategy: Coupons and Targeted Offers
scenario_en: For first-time shoppers and existing customers who have not made a purchase within a specific period.
decision_en: Issue coupons to first-time shoppers within 30 days; for existing customers who have not shopped within 60 days, send targeted offers via SMS.

title: 老客户营销渠道与互动方式
scenario: 本节描述了与老客户进行营销互动和沟通的多种渠道。
decision: 利用网页互动、客服互动、Email、短信、优惠券账户、手机APP和社交媒体等多种渠道与老客户进行双向沟通和互动营销。
rationale: 通过多样化的渠道可以更有效地触达和维系老客户，提升客户忠诚度和营销效果。
title_en: Existing Customer Marketing Channels and Interaction Methods
scenario_en: This section describes various channels for marketing interaction and communication with existing customers.
decision_en: Utilize multiple channels such as web interaction, customer service interaction, Email, SMS, coupon accounts, mobile apps, and social media for two-way communication and interactive marketing with existing customers.

title: 老客户营销渠道
scenario: 当需要对老客户进行营销时。
decision: 可以利用大学、微博、微信、店铺、旺群等渠道进行互动营销。
rationale: 通过多渠道互动，可以更有效地触达和维护老客户关系。
title_en: Existing Customer Marketing Channels
scenario_en: When marketing to existing customers is needed.
decision_en: Interactive marketing can be conducted through channels such as universities, Weibo, WeChat, stores, and Wangqun groups.

title: 七匹狼官方旗舰店微信互动营销关键词功能
scenario: 当顾客在七匹狼官方旗舰店微信公众号中需要查询信息或进行互动时。
decision: 顾客可以通过回复特定关键词来获取相应的服务或信息，例如优惠、热门商品、最新订单、防伪查询等。
rationale: 通过关键词互动，可以提高用户参与度，简化信息获取流程，并提供便捷的自助服务。
title_en: Septwolves Official Flagship Store WeChat Interactive Marketing Keyword Function
scenario_en: When customers need to inquire about information or interact within the Septwolves Official Flagship Store WeChat official account.
decision_en: Customers can reply with specific keywords to obtain corresponding services or information, such as discounts, popular products, latest orders, and anti-counterfeiting inquiries.

title: 老客户的营销互动营销
scenario: When engaging with existing customers.
decision: Utilize interactive marketing strategies for existing customers.
rationale: To foster customer loyalty and encourage repeat business.
title_en: Existing Customer Interactive Marketing
scenario_en: When engaging with existing customers.
decision_en: Utilize interactive marketing strategies for existing customers.

title: 老客户维护和营销
scenario: This section outlines the importance, classification, management, and marketing strategies for retaining existing customers.
decision: Focus on understanding the importance of existing customers, categorizing them, and developing maintenance and marketing strategies.
rationale: Existing customers are a valuable asset, and effective strategies are needed for their retention and engagement.
title_en: Existing Customer Retention and Marketing
scenario_en: This section outlines the importance, classification, management, and marketing strategies for retaining existing customers.
decision_en: Focus on understanding the importance of existing customers, categorizing them, and developing maintenance and marketing strategies.

title: Placeholder for incomplete content
scenario: The provided source chunk is incomplete and contains only a page number and some branding elements.
decision: No specific action can be derived from this chunk as it lacks substantive content.
rationale: The chunk is a page header/footer and does not contain any actionable policy or information.

title: 客户服务SOP
scenario: This is a general overview of the Customer Service Standard Operating Procedures document.
decision: This section introduces the purpose and scope of the SOP.
rationale: To provide a structured framework for customer service operations.
title_en: Customer Service SOP
scenario_en: This is a general overview of the Customer Service Standard Operating Procedures document.
decision_en: This section introduces the purpose and scope of the SOP.

title: 淘宝客服基础技能系列教程：订单催付
scenario: This document is an introductory tutorial for Taobao customer service, specifically focusing on order payment reminders.
decision: The content will guide customer service representatives on the fundamental skills required for reminding customers to complete payments for their orders.
rationale: To equip customer service staff with the necessary knowledge and techniques to effectively manage and prompt order payments, improving conversion rates.
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Basic Skills Tutorial Series: Order Payment Reminders
scenario_en: This document is an introductory tutorial for Taobao customer service, specifically focusing on order payment reminders.
decision_en: The content will guide customer service representatives on the fundamental skills required for reminding customers to complete payments for their orders.

title: 催付效果对比数据查询与分析
scenario: 需要评估客服人员在订单催付方面的表现和成功率时。
decision: 通过“催付的效果对比”功能，可以查询指定日期范围内（最多70天）的客服人员（旺旺昵称）的各项催付成功率数据，包括询单到下单/付款成功率和下单到付款成功率。
rationale: 此功能旨在帮助运营者监控和分析客服团队的催付效率，识别表现优秀的客服，并找出潜在的改进点，以提高整体订单转化率和付款成功率。
title_en: Payment Reminder Effectiveness Data Query and Analysis
scenario_en: When needing to evaluate customer service performance and success rate in order payment reminders.
decision_en: Through the 'Payment Reminder Effectiveness Comparison' function, you can query various payment reminder success rate data for customer service personnel (Wangwang nicknames) within a specified date range (maximum 70 days), including inquiry-to-order/payment success rate and order-to-payment success rate.

title: 客服催付效果数据分析
scenario: 客服团队在特定月份（2013年1月）进行催付操作后，需要评估其对订单成功率的影响。
decision: 通过查看“询单->最终付款成功率”和“下单->最终付款成功率”等指标，可以量化客服催付的实际效果，并识别表现优秀的客服人员。
rationale: 数据显示，客服付款成功率在一个月内增长了23%，表明催付是提高订单转化率的有效手段。具体数据有助于进行绩效评估和优化策略。
title_en: Customer Service Payment Reminder Effectiveness Data Analysis
scenario_en: After the customer service team performs payment reminder operations in a specific month (January 2013), they need to evaluate its impact on order success rates.
decision_en: By viewing metrics such as 'Inquiry -> Final Payment Success Rate' and 'Order -> Final Payment Success Rate', the actual effect of customer service payment reminders can be quantified, and high-performing customer service personnel can be identified.

title: 订单催付流程概述
scenario: 当需要对未支付订单进行催促付款时。
decision: 遵循“催付五步曲”和“活动催付”的流程进行操作。
rationale: 为了提高订单支付转化率，减少未支付订单。
title_en: Order Payment Reminder Process Overview
scenario_en: When needing to remind customers to pay for unpaid orders.
decision_en: Follow the 'Five-Step Payment Reminder' and 'Activity Payment Reminder' processes.

title: 了解催付：未付款原因与催付价值
scenario: 当需要理解催付操作的背景和重要性时。
decision: 了解未付款的原因是进行有效催付的基础，同时认识到催付对于业务的价值。
rationale: 理解客户未付款的根本原因有助于制定更精准的催付策略，而认识到催付的价值则能驱动团队积极执行催付工作。
title_en: Understanding Payment Reminders: Reasons for Non-Payment and Value of Reminders
scenario_en: When needing to understand the background and importance of payment reminder operations.
decision_en: Understanding the reasons for non-payment is fundamental to effective payment reminders, while also recognizing the value of reminders for the business.

title: 未付款订单的主要原因及催付策略
scenario: 当客户未完成订单支付时，需要了解其未付款的原因。
decision: 识别未付款订单的主要原因，包括服务问题、支付问题、发现更低价格、发现更好产品及其他原因，并针对性地进行催付。
rationale: 未付款客户占所有成交的80%，了解未付款原因有助于提高支付转化率。
title_en: Main Reasons for Unpaid Orders and Payment Reminder Strategies
scenario_en: When a customer has not completed order payment, it is necessary to understand the reasons for non-payment.
decision_en: Identify the main reasons for unpaid orders, including service issues, payment issues, finding lower prices, finding better products, and other reasons, and implement targeted payment reminders.

title: 未付款原因：客观原因分析
scenario: 当客户未完成付款时，需要了解可能存在的客观原因。
decision: 识别并记录客户未付款的客观原因，包括无验证码、忘记密码、系统升级、操作不熟或余额不足。
rationale: 了解未付款的客观原因有助于客服人员更好地理解客户的困境，并提供有针对性的帮助或解决方案。
title_en: Unpaid Order Reasons: Objective Analysis
scenario_en: When a customer has not completed payment, it is necessary to understand the possible objective reasons.
decision_en: Identify and record objective reasons for customer non-payment, including no verification code, forgotten password, system upgrade, unfamiliar operation, or insufficient balance.

title: 未付款订单处理：忘记密码、新手买家、支付宝/网银升级
scenario: 当买家因忘记密码、作为新手买家或因支付宝/网银升级而导致订单未付款时。
decision: 对于忘记密码的买家，帮助其了解找回密码的方法；对于新手买家，主动热情地跟踪并催促付款；对于余额不足的买家，了解其方便充值的时间并提前再次催付；对于支付宝/网银升级，了解升级完成时间并主动告知顾客；对于不明白操作的买家，提供截图说明。
rationale: 通过主动提供解决方案和清晰的指引，可以帮助买家克服支付障碍，提高订单支付成功率。
title_en: Unpaid Order Handling: Forgotten Password, New Buyer, Alipay/Online Banking Upgrade
scenario_en: When a buyer's order remains unpaid due to a forgotten password, being a new buyer, or an Alipay/online banking upgrade.
decision_en: For buyers who forgot their password, help them understand how to retrieve it; for new buyers, proactively and enthusiastically follow up and urge payment; for buyers with insufficient balance, find out their convenient top-up time and send a reminder in advance; for Alipay/online banking upgrades, find out the completion time and inform the customer; for buyers who do not understand the operation, provide screenshot instructions.

title: 未付款原因：客观原因催付话术
scenario: 当客户的订单因客观原因未完成付款时。
decision: 客服应主动联系客户，询问是否遇到付款问题或是否繁忙，并提供帮助，同时附上订单链接。
rationale: 通过主动关怀和提供帮助，可以促使客户完成付款，并提升客户服务体验。
title_en: Unpaid Order Reasons: Objective Reasons for Payment Reminders
scenario_en: When a customer's order remains unpaid due to objective reasons.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the customer, ask if they encountered payment issues or are busy, offer assistance, and include the order link.

title: 未付款主观原因分析：另寻商家、心存不满、议价不成功
scenario: 当客户订单未付款时，需要了解其主观原因。
decision: 识别客户未付款的主观原因包括：另寻商家、心存不满、议价不成功或仍有疑虑。
rationale: 了解客户未付款的具体主观原因有助于后续的催付策略制定和客户服务改进。
title_en: Unpaid Order Subjective Reasons: Found Another Seller, Dissatisfied, Unsuccessful Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer's order is unpaid, it is necessary to understand the subjective reasons.
decision_en: Identify subjective reasons for customer non-payment, including finding another seller, dissatisfaction, unsuccessful bargaining, or remaining doubts.

title: 处理因主观原因导致的未付款订单
scenario: 当买家因主观原因（如对商品有疑虑、服务未完善、议价等）导致订单未付款时。
decision: 客服应了解顾客心理预期，强调商品性价比，寻找情感共鸣，并提供优惠券或赠品来满足顾客心理。同时，要告知买家利益、商品优势及相关服务保障。
rationale: 通过解决买家的主观疑虑，满足其心理预期，并提供额外价值，可以有效促成订单付款。
title_en: Handling Unpaid Orders Due to Subjective Reasons
scenario_en: When a buyer's order remains unpaid due to subjective reasons (e.g., doubts about the product, incomplete service, bargaining).
decision_en: Customer service should understand the customer's expectations, emphasize the product's cost-effectiveness, find emotional resonance, and offer coupons or gifts to meet customer expectations. Additionally, inform the buyer of benefits, product advantages, and service guarantees.

title: 未付款原因：主观原因分析
scenario: 当客户未完成付款时，需要分析其可能的主观原因。
decision: 了解客户未付款的主观原因，以便进行有效的催付。
rationale: 识别主观原因有助于客服人员更有针对性地解决客户疑虑，提高付款转化率。
title_en: Unpaid Order Reasons: Subjective Analysis
scenario_en: When a customer has not completed payment, it is necessary to analyze the possible subjective reasons.
decision_en: Understand the customer's subjective reasons for non-payment to effectively urge payment.

title: 处理客户对商品价格的异议并促成付款
scenario: 当买家询问商品价格为何高于其他商家，并表示犹豫时。
decision: 首先强调产品质量和独特优势，然后通过提供额外赠品来吸引买家完成付款。
rationale: 通过突出产品的高质量、安全性和附加功能来证明价格的合理性，并利用赠品策略提供额外价值，从而促使买家下单。
title_en: Handling Customer Price Objections and Securing Payment
scenario_en: When a buyer asks why the product price is higher than other sellers and expresses hesitation.
decision_en: First, emphasize product quality and unique advantages, then offer additional gifts to entice the buyer to complete payment.

title: 了解催付的价值
scenario: 本节概述了催付在电商运营中的核心价值。
decision: 催付的价值体现在提升下单付款率、降低推广成本和提高销售额三个方面。
rationale: 通过有效的催付，可以促使顾客完成订单支付，从而直接提升销售转化率，并间接降低为获取新客户而投入的推广成本。
title_en: Understanding the Value of Payment Reminders
scenario_en: This section outlines the core value of payment reminders in e-commerce operations.
decision_en: The value of payment reminders is reflected in three aspects: increasing order payment rates, reducing promotion costs, and increasing sales.

title: 催付五步曲：订单催付流程概述
scenario: 当需要对淘宝订单进行催付时。
decision: 催付流程包括五个步骤：挑选把握订单时机、匹配工具、制定话术、执行催付、记录结果并备注。
rationale: 此为淘宝大学推荐的标准化催付流程，旨在提高催付效率和成功率。
title_en: Five Steps of Payment Reminders: Overview of Taobao Order Reminder Process
scenario_en: When it is necessary to send payment reminders for Taobao orders.
decision_en: The payment reminder process includes five steps: selecting the right timing for orders, matching tools, formulating scripts, executing reminders, and recording results and remarks.

title: 淘宝催付五步曲：按订单金额或拍下时间挑选订单
scenario: 当需要对淘宝订单进行催付操作时。
decision: 在催付流程的第一步，应根据订单金额或拍下时间来挑选需要催付的订单。
rationale: 这是淘宝催付流程的起始步骤，旨在明确催付对象。
title_en: Taobao Payment Reminder Five Steps: Selecting Orders by Amount or Time Placed
scenario_en: When it is necessary to perform payment reminder operations for Taobao orders.
decision_en: In the first step of the payment reminder process, orders needing reminders should be selected based on the order amount or the time they were placed.

title: 催单人选及催单话术
scenario: 当需要对淘宝订单进行催单时。
decision: 催单人选最好由接单客服本人进行。如电话催单，应尽量使用普通话，并保持声音温婉亲切。
rationale: 由原接单客服催单能保持服务连贯性，而温婉亲切的普通话有助于提升客户体验和催单成功率。
title_en: Payment Reminder Personnel and Script
scenario_en: When it is necessary to send payment reminders for Taobao orders.
decision_en: The payment reminder should ideally be handled by the customer service representative who took the order. If calling, use Mandarin as much as possible and maintain a gentle and friendly tone.

title: 把握时机：催付时机
scenario: 当顾客拍下商品10分钟后仍未付款时。
decision: 客服应直接通过在线旺旺联系顾客，采用核对地址的方式进行隐形催付。
rationale: 选择合适的时机进行催付可以提高付款转化率。
title_en: Seizing the Opportunity: Payment Reminder Timing
scenario_en: When a customer has placed an order but has not paid after 10 minutes.
decision_en: Customer service should directly contact the customer via Wangwang and use address verification as a subtle payment reminder.

title: 静默下单催付时机与频率
scenario: 当客户完成静默下单但尚未付款时，需要进行催付。
decision: 根据下单时间（上午、下午、傍晚、半夜），在特定时间点（当日12点前、当日17点前、次日10点前、次日10点以后）进行催付。对于大额订单，避免使用同一种方法重复催付，并注意催付频率不可过高。
rationale: 通过把握催付时机和频率，可以提高付款转化率，同时避免过度催付引起客户反感。
title_en: Silent Order Payment Reminder Timing and Frequency
scenario_en: When a customer has placed a silent order but has not yet paid, a payment reminder is needed.
decision_en: Send payment reminders at specific times based on the order time (morning, afternoon, evening, midnight): before 12 PM on the same day, before 5 PM on the same day, before 10 AM the next day, or after 10 AM the next day. For large orders, avoid using the same method repeatedly and ensure the reminder frequency is not too high.

title: 淘宝催付方式概述：免费与付费选项
scenario: 当需要对淘宝订单进行催付时，可选择不同的沟通渠道。
decision: 催付方式分为免费和付费两种。免费方式包括旺旺、站内信和邮件；付费方式包括电话、短信和第三方工具。
rationale: 提供多种催付渠道，以适应不同情况和成本考量，提高订单支付率。
title_en: Overview of Taobao Payment Reminder Methods: Free and Paid Options
scenario_en: When it is necessary to send payment reminders for Taobao orders, different communication channels can be chosen.
decision_en: Payment reminder methods are divided into free and paid options. Free methods include Wangwang, internal messages, and email; paid methods include phone calls, SMS, and third-party tools.

title: 催付工具选择与优缺点
scenario: 当需要对客户进行催付时，客服人员需要选择合适的沟通工具。
decision: 可选择旺旺、短信或电话作为催付工具。旺旺免费、不限字数、可使用表情且骚扰性低；短信收费低、覆盖面广且可群发；电话实时性高、沟通效果好。
rationale: 不同的工具各有优缺点，选择合适的工具可以提高催付效率并降低客户骚扰感。
title_en: Payment Reminder Tool Selection and Pros/Cons
scenario_en: When customer service needs to send payment reminders to customers, they need to choose appropriate communication tools.
