decision_en: Wangwang, SMS, or phone calls can be chosen as payment reminder tools. Wangwang is free, has no character limit, allows emojis, and is less intrusive; SMS is low-cost, has wide coverage, and can be sent in bulk; phone calls are real-time and have good communication effectiveness.

title: 旺旺催付技巧：催付五步曲
scenario: 当客户在淘宝购物时遇到付款困难，或需要提醒付款时。
decision: 使用旺旺催付技巧，通过提供贴心服务、告知发货时间、现有优惠政策、库存情况、交易关闭时间、活动提醒和赠品等信息，创造紧迫感，引导客户完成付款。
rationale: 通过主动提供帮助和相关信息，可以解决客户付款障碍，同时利用紧迫感和优惠信息促使客户尽快完成交易。
title_en: Wangwang Payment Reminder Techniques: Five Steps
scenario_en: When customers encounter payment difficulties or need payment reminders while shopping on Taobao.
decision_en: Use Wangwang payment reminder techniques by providing attentive service, informing about shipping times, current promotions, inventory status, transaction closing times, activity reminders, and gifts to create a sense of urgency and guide customers to complete payment.

title: 赠品提醒促成首次购买付款
scenario: 当买家首次在店铺拍下商品但尚未付款时，客服可以利用赠品作为催付策略。
decision: 客服主动告知买家已为其申请到一份小礼物，以促使买家完成付款。
rationale: 通过提供意外的惊喜和心意，可以增加买家的购买意愿和对店铺的好感度，从而促成首次购买的完成。
title_en: Gift Reminder to Encourage First Purchase Payment
scenario_en: When a buyer places their first order in the store but has not yet paid, customer service can use a gift as a payment reminder strategy.
decision_en: Customer service proactively informs the buyer that a small gift has been arranged for them to encourage the buyer to complete payment.

title: 核对信息与催付技巧
scenario: 当客户拍下商品但尚未支付时，客服需要核对订单信息并进行催付。
decision: 客服应主动与客户核对收货地址等关键信息，确认无误后告知客户支付即可安排发货，并强调快速收货的优势。
rationale: 通过主动核对信息可以减少因地址错误导致的物流问题，同时通过强调发货速度和收货时效可以有效促使客户尽快完成支付。
title_en: Information Verification and Payment Reminder Techniques
scenario_en: When a customer has placed an order but has not yet paid, customer service needs to verify order information and send a payment reminder.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively verify key information such as the shipping address with the customer. Once confirmed, inform the customer that payment will allow for immediate shipping, emphasizing the advantage of quick receipt.

title: 系统消息(改价) - 卖家修改交易价格提醒
scenario: 当卖家修改了交易价格后，系统会向买家发送提醒消息。
decision: 系统会通知买家订单编号、被修改的宝贝价格以及修改后的总价，并提供“立即付款”和“查看详情”的选项。同时，会附带旺旺小贴士解释支付宝的付款流程。
rationale: 确保买家及时了解交易价格变动，并提供付款和详情查看的便捷入口，同时通过支付宝小贴士增强买家信任。
title_en: System Message (Price Change) - Seller Modifies Transaction Price Reminder
scenario_en: When a seller modifies the transaction price, the system sends a reminder message to the buyer.
decision_en: The system will notify the buyer of the order number, the modified item price, and the new total price, providing 'Pay Now' and 'View Details' options. It will also include a Wangwang tip explaining the Alipay payment process.

title: 短信催付技巧与话术要点
scenario: 当客户在淘宝店铺下单后未及时付款时，需要通过短信进行催付。
decision: 发送包含买家姓名、店铺名称、商品信息、价格及付款链接的简洁催付短信。短信应在适当时间发送，并注意发送频率。
rationale: 通过个性化、简洁明了的短信内容，并提供直接的付款链接，可以提高客户的支付意愿和转化率。选择合适的发送时间并控制频率可以避免打扰客户，提升用户体验。
title_en: SMS Payment Reminder Techniques and Key Script Points
scenario_en: When a customer places an order on a Taobao store but does not pay in time, an SMS payment reminder is needed.
decision_en: Send a concise payment reminder SMS including the buyer's name, store name, product information, price, and payment link. The SMS should be sent at an appropriate time, and attention should be paid to the sending frequency.

title: 淘宝短信催付技巧：大众型与个性型模板
scenario: 当客户已将商品加入购物车但尚未完成付款时，商家需要发送催付短信。
decision: 商家可以根据客户类型选择大众型或个性型短信模板进行催付。大众型模板侧重优惠信息和时效性，个性型模板则通过拟人化和情感诉求来吸引客户。
rationale: 通过不同类型的短信模板，可以更有效地触达不同偏好的客户，提高付款转化率。
title_en: Taobao SMS Payment Reminder Techniques: General and Personalized Templates
scenario_en: When a customer has added items to their shopping cart but has not yet completed payment, merchants need to send payment reminder SMS messages.
decision_en: Merchants can choose between general or personalized SMS templates for payment reminders based on the customer type. General templates focus on discount information and urgency, while personalized templates use anthropomorphism and emotional appeals to attract customers.

title: 电话催付技巧：提高声音感染力
scenario: 当客服人员需要通过电话进行催付时，应注意提升语言的感染力。
decision: 客服人员应带着微笑，利用语调的升降、音调的高低、语速的缓急和语气的强弱来表达服务热情，并有效利用自己的语言特点。
rationale: 通过调整声音的各个方面，可以提高语言的感染力，从而更有效地进行电话催付。
title_en: Phone Payment Reminder Techniques: Enhance Voice Appeal
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to make payment reminder calls, they should focus on enhancing the appeal of their language.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should smile, use variations in intonation, pitch, pace, and emphasis to convey enthusiasm for service, and effectively utilize their unique vocal characteristics.

title: 电话催付参考话术模板：未支付订单提醒与优惠促
scenario: 当买家在淘宝店铺拍下商品但尚未完成支付时，客服需要进行电话催付。
decision: 客服应主动联系买家，提醒其未支付订单，并告知当前可享受的优惠（如额外赠品），同时解答买家关于赠品材质和选择的问题，鼓励其尽快支付。
rationale: 通过电话催付可以有效提醒买家完成支付，利用限时优惠和赠品选择的紧迫性促使买家尽快下单，从而提高订单转化率。
title_en: Phone Payment Reminder Script Template: Unpaid Order Reminder and Discount Promotion
scenario_en: When a buyer has placed an order in a Taobao store but has not yet completed payment, customer service needs to make a payment reminder call.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the buyer, remind them of their unpaid order, inform them of current available discounts (e.g., extra gifts), answer any questions the buyer has about gift materials and choices, and encourage them to pay as soon as possible.

title: 催付话术制定与五步曲
scenario: When developing scripts for payment reminders or collections.
decision: The methodology for creating payment reminder scripts involves considering four key elements: who (人物), when (时间), where (地点), and what (事情). Additionally, a 'five-step payment reminder' process should be followed.
rationale: To ensure effective and structured communication when reminding customers about payments, covering all necessary contextual details and following a systematic approach.
title_en: Payment Reminder Script Development and Five-Step Process
scenario_en: When developing scripts for payment reminders or collections.
decision_en: The methodology for creating payment reminder scripts involves considering four key elements: who (人物), when (时间), where (地点), and what (事情). Additionally, a 'five-step payment reminder' process should be followed.

title: 老顾客催付话术制定
scenario: 当需要对老顾客进行催付时。
decision: 制定催付话术时，应首先感谢老顾客再次光临，然后询问他们对产品的感受，最后再委婉亲切地进行催付。
rationale: 老顾客对店铺有信任，并且了解商品，因此催付时应体现出对其特殊性的尊重和关怀。
title_en: Developing Payment Reminder Scripts for Repeat Customers
scenario_en: When a payment reminder needs to be sent to a repeat customer.
decision_en: When developing payment reminder scripts, first thank repeat customers for their return, then ask about their product experience, and finally, gently and kindly remind them to pay.

title: 识别淘宝催单话术中的四个要素
scenario: 当需要分析或制定淘宝催单话术时，识别其中包含的催单四要素。
decision: 从提供的两段话术中识别并提取出催单的四个关键要素。
rationale: 通过识别催单话术的构成要素，可以更好地理解和制定有效的催单策略，提高支付转化率。
title_en: Identifying the Four Elements in Taobao Order Reminder Scripts
scenario_en: When analyzing or developing Taobao order reminder scripts, identify the four key elements of an order reminder.
decision_en: Identify and extract the four key elements of an order reminder from the two provided script segments.

title: 大单二次催付流程及备注
scenario: 当处理大额订单时，如果首次催付未成功。
decision: 可以进行二次催付，并在催付后进行结果备注。
rationale: 大额订单的回收对公司营收有较大影响，二次催付可以提高成功率，并记录结果以便后续跟踪和分析。
title_en: Second Payment Reminder Process and Notes for Large Orders
scenario_en: When handling large orders, if the first payment reminder was unsuccessful.
decision_en: A second payment reminder can be issued, and the outcome should be noted afterwards.

title: 交易备忘信息填写规范及防骗提醒
scenario: 当客服人员在淘宝网系统填写交易备忘信息时，或买家支付宝余额不足时。
decision: 客服人员不应在交易备忘中填写个人敏感信息。如果备忘信息不是本人填写，应警惕诈骗。对于买家支付宝余额不足的情况，应及时备注催付信息。
rationale: 淘宝网系统不会修改任何交易备忘，因此为防止信息泄露和诈骗，需谨慎处理备忘信息。及时备注催付信息有助于后续跟进。
title_en: Transaction Memo Information Filling Standards and Anti-Fraud Reminder
scenario_en: When customer service personnel fill in transaction memo information in the Taobao system, or when a buyer's Alipay balance is insufficient.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should not fill in personal sensitive information in transaction memos. If the memo information was not filled in by the user, be alert for fraud. For cases where a buyer's Alipay balance is insufficient, payment reminder information should be noted promptly.

title: 催付五步曲：订单催付流程与策略
scenario: 当需要对顾客进行订单催付时。
decision: 遵循催付五步曲：根据订单重要性选择催付时机，根据时机选择催付工具，根据催付工具选择催付人选，制定催单话术，并联系顾客进行催付，最后等待结果并进行备注。
rationale: 通过结构化的催付流程，提高催付效率和成功率，并确保每一步都有明确的指导。
title_en: Five-Step Payment Reminder: Order Reminder Process and Strategy
scenario_en: When a customer needs to be reminded to pay for an order.
decision_en: Follow the five-step payment reminder process: choose the timing based on order importance, select the reminder tool based on timing, choose the reminder person based on the tool, develop the reminder script, contact the customer for the reminder, and finally, await results and make notes.

title: 淘宝大学活动催付前期准备与时间
scenario: 当需要进行淘宝活动催付时。
decision: 在进行活动催付前，需要做好前期准备，并关注催单时间及催付ROI。
rationale: 这是淘宝大学关于活动催付的指导性原则，旨在提高催付效果。
title_en: Taobao University Activity Payment Reminder Pre-preparation and Timing
scenario_en: When a Taobao activity payment reminder needs to be conducted.
decision_en: Before conducting an activity payment reminder, pre-preparation is required, and attention should be paid to the reminder timing and payment reminder ROI.

title: 活动催付前期准备
scenario: 在淘宝活动期间进行催付操作时
decision: 需要了解活动特殊性，选取合适的催单工具，提前根据工具制定话术，配合第三方软件，并根据官方活动情况随时调整催单时间。
rationale: 为了提高活动期间的支付转化率和效率。
title_en: Activity Payment Reminder Pre-preparation
scenario_en: When conducting payment reminder operations during a Taobao activity.
decision_en: It is necessary to understand the specifics of the activity, select appropriate reminder tools, prepare scripts in advance based on the tools, cooperate with third-party software, and adjust reminder times as needed based on official activity conditions.

title: 双十一大促活动催付策略
scenario: 在双十一大促期间，为了最大化销售额，需要对官方活动页面的产品展示位置进行调整，并使用多种催单工具。
decision: 根据销售额调整官方活动页面的产品展示位置，并利用400电话、软件群发和旺旺等工具进行活动催付。
rationale: 通过优化产品展示和多渠道催付，可以有效提升订单转化率和整体销售额。
title_en: Double Eleven Promotion Activity Payment Reminder Strategy
scenario_en: During the Double Eleven major promotion, to maximize sales, it is necessary to adjust the product display positions on the official activity page and use multiple reminder tools.
decision_en: Adjust the product display positions on the official activity page based on sales, and use tools such as 400 phone, software mass messaging, and Wangwang for activity payment reminders.

title: 催单时间与策略
scenario: 当需要对订单进行催付时。
decision: 上午10点进行第一波催单，下午1点进行第二波催单。对于大单，采用电话催单，并将催单时间控制在1分钟内。
rationale: 通过分波次催单和针对大单的电话催单，提高催付效率。控制催单时间是为了节约成本。
title_en: Reminder Timing and Strategy
scenario_en: When an order needs to be reminded for payment.
decision_en: Conduct the first wave of reminders at 10 AM and the second wave at 1 PM. For large orders, use phone reminders and keep the reminder call within 1 minute.

title: 淘宝活动期间未支付订单催付流程
scenario: 当顾客在淘宝店铺活动期间拍下商品但未支付时。
decision: 客服应主动联系顾客，询问是否需要保留商品，并提醒尽快支付。如果顾客选择保留，则告知会尽快发货；如果顾客选择不保留，则表示期待下次光临。
rationale: 活动期间库存紧张，通过催付可以提高订单转化率，并有效管理库存。
title_en: Taobao Activity Period Unpaid Order Reminder Process
scenario_en: When a customer places an order in a Taobao store during an activity but does not pay.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the customer, ask if they wish to reserve the item, and remind them to pay as soon as possible. If the customer chooses to reserve, inform them that the item will be shipped promptly; if the customer chooses not to reserve, express anticipation for their next visit.

title: 电话催单的成本效益分析
scenario: 当考虑使用电话进行订单催付时。
decision: 需要评估产品的利润空间是否足以覆盖电话催单的成本。对于利润较低的产品，如充值类产品，不适合采用电话催单。
rationale: 电话催单的成本较高，如果产品利润不足，则电话催单不划算，可能导致亏损。
title_en: Cost-Benefit Analysis of Phone Reminders
scenario_en: When considering using phone calls for order payment reminders.
decision_en: It is necessary to assess whether the product's profit margin is sufficient to cover the cost of phone reminders. For products with low profit margins, such as top-up products, phone reminders are not suitable.

title: 催付ROI：活动催付的最终目的与效果
scenario: 在评估催付策略和活动时
decision: 催付的最终目的是实现催付效果和投资回报率（ROI）。
rationale: 强调催付不仅仅是执行动作，更要关注其带来的实际效益和价值。
title_en: Payment Reminder ROI: Ultimate Goal and Effect of Activity Payment Reminders
scenario_en: When evaluating payment reminder strategies and activities.
decision_en: The ultimate goal of payment reminders is to achieve payment reminder effectiveness and return on investment (ROI).

title: 催单时机与话术制定
scenario: 当顾客下单后未及时付款，需要进行催单时。
decision: 根据店铺类型（如母婴、女装）和顾客情况（如新老顾客、客单价），选择合适的催单时机和工具，并制定个性化的催单话术。
rationale: 有效的催单可以提高订单支付转化率，减少订单流失，同时维护良好的客户关系。
title_en: Reminder Timing and Script Development
scenario_en: When a customer places an order but does not pay in time, and a reminder is needed.
decision_en: Based on the store type (e.g., maternal and child, women's clothing) and customer situation (e.g., new/repeat customer, average order value), choose appropriate reminder timing and tools, and develop personalized reminder scripts.

title: 淘宝订单催付策略与技巧
scenario: 当需要对淘宝订单进行催付时。
decision: 根据店铺情况和产品利润空间选择合适的催付工具和订单。使用旺旺催付时多用表情，并可委婉核对地址。电话催付人员需普通话标准、声音好听。催付话术要言简意赅，注意技巧并考虑顾客情绪。
rationale: 通过优化催付策略和技巧，旨在提高订单支付转化率，同时维护良好的客户关系。
title_en: Taobao Order Payment Reminder Strategies and Techniques
scenario_en: When a Taobao order needs to be reminded for payment.
decision_en: Choose appropriate reminder tools and orders based on store conditions and product profit margins. When using Wangwang for reminders, use more emojis and subtly verify the address. Phone reminder personnel should have standard Mandarin and a pleasant voice. Reminder scripts should be concise, skillful, and consider customer emotions.

title: 淘宝订单催付活动效果评估
scenario: 在淘宝进行为期一周的订单催付活动后，需要评估其效果。
decision: 计算个人下单付款率的增长和业绩增长，以感受催付带来的实际改变，并评估催付的投资回报率（ROI）。
rationale: 通过量化指标来评估催付活动的成效，从而了解其对付款率和业绩的实际影响。
title_en: Taobao Order Payment Reminder Activity Effect Evaluation
scenario_en: After a one-week order payment reminder activity on Taobao, its effect needs to be evaluated.
decision_en: Calculate the increase in individual order payment rate and performance growth to feel the actual changes brought by the reminder, and evaluate the payment reminder's return on investment (ROI).

title: 订单催付：催付五步曲与活动催付
scenario: 当需要对未支付订单进行催款时。
decision: 应了解并遵循“催付五步曲”以及“活动催付”的策略。
rationale: 通过系统化的催付流程和利用活动机会，可以有效提高订单支付率。
title_en: Order Payment Reminder: Five-Step Reminder and Activity Reminder
scenario_en: When payment needs to be collected for unpaid orders.
decision_en: Understand and follow the 'Five-Step Payment Reminder' and 'Activity Payment Reminder' strategies.

title: Page 47 - Thanks
scenario: This chunk contains only a page number and a 'Thanks' message, along with some branding elements.
decision: No specific action is required as this is a concluding or transitional page with minimal content.
rationale: The content is primarily a page marker and a thank you, indicating the end of a section or document.

title: AI客服系统意图分类体系：一级与二级意图定义
scenario: AI客服系统需要对用户咨询进行意图识别和分类，以便进行准确的响应和路由。
decision: 采用“三级分类法”：一级意图区分咨询大类（订单/物流/售后/支付），二级意图细化场景，三级意图匹配具体问题。一级意图包括订单查询、物流查询、退货退款、投诉/索赔、产品咨询、政策咨询、其他。二级意图则进一步细化了订单、物流和售后/退货退款等大类下的具体场景。
rationale: 通过建立清晰的意图分类体系，可以提高AI客服系统的意图识别准确性，为模型训练提供标注参考，并作为知识库的元数据标签，便于检索和路由。
title_en: AI Customer Service System Intent Classification: Level 1 and Level 2 Intent Definitions
scenario_en: The AI customer service system needs to identify and classify user inquiries to provide accurate responses and routing.
decision_en: Adopt a 'three-level classification method': Level 1 intent distinguishes broad inquiry categories (order/logistics/after-sales/payment), Level 2 refines scenarios, and Level 3 matches specific problems. Level 1 intents include order inquiry, logistics inquiry, return/refund, complaint/claim, product inquiry, policy inquiry, and other. Level 2 intents further refine specific scenarios under broad categories like order, logistics, and after-sales/return/refund.

title: 情绪识别与应对策略：AI客服系统如何根据用户情绪等级进行响应
scenario: AI客服系统收到用户消息后，需要根据用户情绪等级选择合适的回复策略或转人工路径。
decision: 系统应首先进行情绪分析（基于关键词+语义+上下文），然后根据情绪等级（E0-E3）执行不同的动作，包括正常处理、使用安抚话术、高共情话术或立即转人工。
rationale: 通过识别用户情绪并采取相应策略，可以提高客户满意度，避免负面评价和索赔，并优化人工客服资源分配。
title_en: Emotion Recognition and Response Strategy: How AI Customer Service Responds Based on User Emotion Levels
scenario_en: After receiving a user message, the AI customer service system needs to select an appropriate response strategy or transfer to a human agent based on the user's emotion level.
decision_en: The system should first perform emotion analysis (based on keywords + semantics + context), then execute different actions according to the emotion level (E0-E3), including normal processing, using soothing language, high-empathy language, or immediate transfer to a human agent.

title: 情绪等级与AI客服响应策略
scenario: 当客户服务系统识别到客户的不同情绪等级时。
decision: 根据情绪等级（E0到E3），系统将采取不同的响应策略，包括AI直接应答、AI加共情话术、AI回复并标记人工，或立即转人工并紧急标记。
rationale: 通过匹配客户情绪等级与相应的系统动作和话术模板，旨在优化客户体验，提高问题解决效率，并确保在必要时及时介入人工服务。
title_en: Emotion Levels and AI Customer Service Response Strategies
scenario_en: When the customer service system identifies different emotion levels from a customer.
decision_en: Based on emotion levels (E0 to E3), the system will adopt different response strategies, including direct AI response, AI with empathetic language, AI response with human agent flagging, or immediate transfer to a human agent with urgent flagging.

title: 处理正常中差评：客服回复慢的应对策略与话术
scenario: 当买家因客服回复慢而给出中差评时。
decision: 首先以诚恳的态度向买家道歉，承认回复慢是由于咨询量大，并表示歉意。提供下次购买优惠作为补偿，以安抚买家情绪并鼓励回购。解释话术应强调客户多、客服忙，并承诺加强培训。
rationale: 通过道歉和补偿可以有效安抚买家情绪，增加修改评价的几率，同时也能吸引买家再次光顾，将负面评价转化为推广机会。
title_en: Handling Normal Negative Reviews: Strategies and Scripts for Slow Customer Service Response
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a neutral or negative review due to slow customer service response.
decision_en: First, sincerely apologize to the buyer, acknowledge that the slow response was due to high inquiry volume, and express regret. Offer a discount for their next purchase as compensation to appease the buyer and encourage repeat business. The explanation should emphasize high customer volume and busy staff, and promise improved training.

title: DSR评分标绿处理流程及客服主管职责
scenario: 当DSR评分出现标绿情况时，客服主管需要介入处理。
decision: 客服主管需要查看DSR评分标绿的详细情况，并根据具体原因采取相应措施，例如与客户沟通、优化服务流程等。
rationale: DSR评分标绿表示评分下降，可能影响店铺信誉和客户满意度，需要及时关注和处理以避免负面影响扩大。
source_doc: 009.DSR评分标绿？ 客服主管还需要做什么？.doc
title_en: DSR Score Highlighted in Green: Processing Flow and Customer Service Supervisor Responsibilities
scenario_en: When the DSR score is highlighted in green, the customer service supervisor needs to intervene.
decision_en: The customer service supervisor needs to review the details of the DSR score highlighted in green and take appropriate measures based on the specific reasons, such as communicating with the customer or optimizing service processes.

title: 客服咨询转化率提升策略：多部门协作与客服核心职责
scenario: 当店铺面临咨询转化率低的问题时，需要识别并解决导致转化率低下的根本原因。
decision: 提升咨询转化率需要多个部门共同努力，客服作为直接沟通者，应揣摩消费者心理、解决问题并做好催付。核心在于提升下单用户数，而非简单降低咨询量。
rationale: 咨询转化率的公式（下单用户数/总咨询量）表明，提升下单用户数是提高转化率的关键。转化率低是推广、运营、产品经理、资源活动以及老板/店主未协调好职责的综合结果。
source_doc: 006.有人问无人买 ？客服咨询转化率全攻略在此.doc
title_en: Customer Service Inquiry Conversion Rate Improvement Strategy: Cross-Departmental Collaboration and Core Responsibilities
scenario_en: When a store faces a low inquiry conversion rate, it needs to identify and address the root causes.
decision_en: Improving inquiry conversion rate requires collaborative efforts from multiple departments. Customer service, as the direct communicator, should understand consumer psychology, solve problems, and facilitate payment. The core is to increase the number of placed orders, not simply reduce inquiry volume.

title: 天猫客服注意事项：发票、信用卡支付与包邮规则
scenario: 处理天猫平台上的客户咨询和交易时，涉及发票开具、信用卡支付和运费设置等问题。
decision: 商家必须为所有订单开具发票，不得额外收费，且发票名称需符合商品或类目。信用卡支付不得收取手续费，且必须支持分期付款。运费设置需通过运费模板明确包邮区域。
rationale: 确保交易的合规性、透明性，并维护消费者权益，同时符合天猫平台的运营规范。
title_en: Tmall Customer Service Notes: Invoices, Credit Card Payments, and Free Shipping Rules
scenario_en: When handling customer inquiries and transactions on the Tmall platform, involving invoice issuance, credit card payments, and shipping fee settings.
decision_en: Merchants must issue invoices for all orders, without additional charges, and the invoice name must comply with the product or category. Credit card payments must not incur handling fees and must support installment payments. Shipping fee settings must clearly define free shipping areas via shipping templates.

title: 客服催付策略：日常与大促场景下的自动与手动催付方法
scenario: 客户在咨询后下单但未付款，需要促使客户完成支付。
decision: 根据询单类别（买家原因或产品原因）采取不同策略。买家原因导致未付款，则进行催付，包括日常催付（自动/手动）和大促催付（实时/短时）。产品原因导致未付款，则根据缺货或营销活动进行处理。
rationale: 通过有效的催付策略，可以将客户的冲动购买转化为实际销售额，并提高客单价。
source_doc: 006.有人问无人买 ？客服咨询转化率全攻略在此.doc
title_en: Customer Service Payment Reminder Strategy: Automatic and Manual Methods for Daily and Promotional Scenarios
scenario_en: A customer places an order after an inquiry but has not paid, requiring action to prompt payment completion.
decision_en: Adopt different strategies based on the inquiry category (buyer's reason or product reason). If non-payment is due to the buyer's reason, proceed with payment reminders, including daily reminders (automatic/manual) and major promotion reminders (real-time/short-term). If non-payment is due to a product reason, handle according to stock-out or marketing activities.

title: 禁止关闭买家交易以避免恶意投诉
scenario: 在任何情况下，商家都不能主动关闭买家交易，尤其当买家要求关闭交易时。
decision: 商家不能关闭买家交易。应告知买家商家无权关闭，可由买家自行关闭或不予理会，不会有影响。
rationale: 主动关闭买家交易可能导致恶意买家投诉，造成商家扣分。天猫规定关闭买家订单会扣分。
title_en: Prohibiting Closing Buyer Transactions to Avoid Malicious Complaints
scenario_en: Under no circumstances should a merchant actively close a buyer's transaction, especially when the buyer requests it.
decision_en: Merchants cannot close buyer transactions. Inform the buyer that the merchant has no right to close it, and the buyer can close it themselves or ignore it without consequence.

title: 跨部门沟通对客服处理效率的影响及优化方法
scenario: 当客服需要处理涉及多个部门（如财务、仓库、快递）的客户问题时。
decision: 客服应主动与相关部门进行有效沟通，核实问题本源，并提供解决方案，以提高问题处理效率和客户满意度。
rationale: 有效沟通能避免信息遗漏、部门间推诿，减少人力成本，并提升客户体验。反之，沟通不畅会导致问题拖延，客户投诉增加。
title_en: Impact of Cross-Departmental Communication on Customer Service Efficiency and Optimization Methods
scenario_en: When customer service needs to handle customer issues involving multiple departments (e.g., finance, warehouse, courier).
decision_en: Customer service should proactively communicate effectively with relevant departments, verify the root cause of the problem, and provide solutions to improve problem-solving efficiency and customer satisfaction.

title: 天猫差评回复策略：常见差评情景及官方解释范例
scenario: 当天猫顾客给出差评时，商家需要进行评价解释以维护店铺形象和顾客关系。
decision: 利用天猫评价管理中的“解释”功能，针对不同类型的差评（有评论内容、无评论内容、有追加评论内容）进行巧妙回复，尤其要注意买家晒图情况，并提供具体问题解决方案或安抚性话语。
rationale: 有效的差评解释不仅能留住回头客，还能吸引新顾客，是一种免费且高效的顾客互动方式。
source_doc: 010.如何巧妙的解释天猫顾客给的差评？.doc
title_en: Tmall Negative Review Response Strategy: Common Scenarios and Official Explanation Examples
scenario_en: When a Tmall customer leaves a negative review, the merchant needs to explain the review to maintain store image and customer relationships.
decision_en: Use the 'Explain' function in Tmall's review management to cleverly respond to different types of negative reviews (with comments, without comments, with additional comments), paying special attention to buyer-uploaded photos, and providing specific solutions or comforting words.

title: 如何识别并应对职业差评师及中差评处理技巧
scenario: 当卖家需要避免职业差评师的侵害，或在遇到中差评时需要进行有效处理。
decision: 识别职业差评师的特征，并采取预防措施；若已产生中差评，应第一时间联系买家沟通，并根据具体情况运用协商、解释、提供操作指导等技巧进行处理。
rationale: 职业差评师严重破坏交易秩序，给卖家带来损失，因此需全力打击。及时有效处理中差评能提高解决效率，降低损失，并挽回客户。
source_doc: 007.教你完美避开职业差评师（附：客服处理中差评的应对技巧）.doc
title_en: How to Identify and Respond to Professional Negative Reviewers and Handle Neutral/Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When sellers need to avoid harm from professional negative reviewers, or effectively handle neutral or negative reviews.
decision_en: Identify characteristics of professional negative reviewers and take preventive measures; if a neutral or negative review has occurred, contact the buyer immediately to communicate, and use negotiation, explanation, and operational guidance techniques as appropriate.

title: 提升淘宝客服咨询转化率的关键策略
scenario: 当客服遇到顾客咨询但最终未购买的情况，需要提高咨询转化率时。
decision: 提升下单用户数是提高咨询转化率的关键。
rationale: 咨询转化率的公式为“下单用户数/总咨询量”。降低总咨询量通常不是卖家所希望的，因此，提升下单用户数成为提高转化率的主要途径。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Key Strategies for Improving Taobao Customer Service Inquiry Conversion Rate
scenario_en: When customer service encounters customer inquiries that do not result in a purchase, and needs to improve the inquiry conversion rate.
decision_en: Increasing the number of placed orders is key to improving the inquiry conversion rate.

title: 客服追评的“三要”与“三不要”：提升复购率和信任度
scenario: 客服在处理买家评论时，需要进行追评以影响复购率和购买率。
decision: 客服追评应遵循“三要”和“三不要”原则：及时回复好评并感谢；及时解释和回复差评，包括物流问题；及时跟踪和提醒买家反馈的受骗信息。同时，不要爆粗口或使用不舒服的语气词；不要不看内容统一回复；不要对不利差评置之不理。
rationale: 有效的客服追评能够提升买家信任度，对负面评价进行合理解释，并展现卖家真诚提高购物体验的态度，从而促进复购和新买家购买。不当的追评则可能适得其反。
title_en: Customer Service Follow-up Reviews: The 'Three Dos' and 'Three Don'ts' to Boost Repurchase Rate and Trust
scenario_en: Customer service needs to conduct follow-up reviews when handling buyer comments to influence repurchase and purchase rates.
decision_en: Customer service follow-up reviews should adhere to the 'Three Dos' and 'Three Don'ts' principles: promptly reply to positive reviews with thanks; promptly explain and reply to negative reviews, including logistics issues; promptly track and remind buyers about reported fraud information. At the same time, do not use rude or uncomfortable language; do not reply uniformly without reading the content; do not ignore unfavorable negative reviews.

title: 低咨询转化率的跨部门责任分析
scenario: 当店铺的咨询转化率较低时，需要识别并解决根本原因。
decision: 咨询转化率低并非仅是客服的问题，而是推广、运营、产品经理、资源/活动部门以及老板/店主等多部门协作不力导致的结果。
rationale: 推广可能引入无效流量；运营可能未能清晰表达产品卖点；产品本身可能存在问题；资源和活动选择不当可能导致有效流量不足；最终，老板/店主未能有效协调各部门职责是根本原因。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Cross-Departmental Responsibility Analysis for Low Inquiry Conversion Rate
scenario_en: When a store's inquiry conversion rate is low, the root causes need to be identified and addressed.
decision_en: A low inquiry conversion rate is not solely a customer service issue, but rather a result of poor collaboration among multiple departments, including promotion, operations, product managers, resource/activity departments, and the owner/shopkeeper.

title: 淘宝中差评回复技巧：面向未来顾客的评价管理
scenario: 当买家给出中差评且无法通过沟通修改评价时，卖家需要进行评价回复。
decision: 评价回复应以未来浏览商品的顾客为目标受众，旨在消除他们的疑虑，而非与给出差评的顾客争辩。回复内容应专业、有礼，并提供解决方案或解释。
rationale: 评价回复的主要目的是向潜在买家展示卖家的良好服务态度和解决问题的能力，避免因负面评价而流失未来的订单。
title_en: Taobao Neutral/Negative Review Reply Skills: Review Management for Future Customers
scenario_en: When a buyer leaves a neutral or negative review that cannot be modified through communication, the seller needs to reply to the review.
decision_en: Review replies should target future customers browsing the product, aiming to alleviate their concerns, rather than arguing with the customer who left the negative review. The reply content should be professional, polite, and offer solutions or explanations.

title: 提升咨询转化率：客服如何通过产品理解和用户洞察来促进销售
scenario: 当客服需要提高客户咨询的转化率时。
decision: 客服应深入理解产品属性、卖点和用户痛点，并结合用户需求、性别、欲望和积极的服务态度来引导用户完成购买。
rationale: 咨询转化率的提升是团队共同责任，客服通过做好产品知识储备和有效搞定用户心理，能够直接影响用户的购买决策。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Improving Inquiry Conversion Rate: How Customer Service Promotes Sales Through Product Understanding and User Insight
scenario_en: When customer service needs to improve the conversion rate of customer inquiries.
decision_en: Customer service should deeply understand product attributes, selling points, and user pain points, and combine this with user needs, gender, desires, and a proactive service attitude to guide users to complete purchases.

title: 处理顾客退换货申请：个人原因与难缠顾客的运费承担及退货流程
scenario: 当顾客要求退换货时，根据退货原因（个人原因或非个人原因）和顾客态度（好沟通或难缠）进行处理。
decision: 对于个人原因退换货且顾客好沟通的，顾客承担运费，客服需登记ID、退货原因、运费承担方及物流单号。对于难缠顾客因个人原因要求承担运费的，可协商一人一半运费，避免小二介入。退货申请需区分七天无理由退换货（对店铺无影响）和其他理由（需核对聊天记录，不符则拒绝）。
rationale: 规范退换货流程，确保物流信息可追溯，避免因运费纠纷导致小二介入增加退款纠纷率，同时保护店铺信誉。
source_doc: 看别人家客服怎样做好售后.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Return/Exchange Requests: Shipping Costs and Return Process for Personal Reasons and Difficult Customers
scenario_en: When a customer requests a return or exchange, handle it based on the reason for return (personal or non-personal) and the customer's attitude (easy to communicate with or difficult).
decision_en: For returns/exchanges due to personal reasons with an easy-to-communicate customer, the customer bears the shipping cost. Customer service needs to record the ID, return reason, party responsible for shipping, and logistics tracking number. For difficult customers requesting shipping costs for personal reasons, negotiate a 50/50 split to avoid platform intervention. Return applications must distinguish between 7-day no-reason returns/exchanges (no impact on the store) and other reasons (requires checking chat records; reject if inconsistent).

title: 理解消费者心理以提升咨询转化率
scenario: 当客服人员与消费者进行咨询互动时，旨在提升转化率。
decision: 客服人员应深入理解消费者从产生需求到最终购买的决策过程，并解决消费者对信任和优惠的顾虑。
rationale: 熟悉消费者需求和心理是提升咨询转化率的关键。通过解决消费者核心问题，可以促成购买。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Understanding Consumer Psychology to Improve Inquiry Conversion Rate
scenario_en: When customer service personnel interact with consumers during inquiries, aiming to improve the conversion rate.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should deeply understand the consumer's decision-making process from generating a need to making a final purchase, and address consumer concerns regarding trust and discounts.

title: 客服如何解决消费者问题及常见问题分类
scenario: 客服在日常工作中，需要有效解决消费者提出的问题，并优化产品信息以减少咨询量。
decision: 客服应归类并分析消费者问题占比，优先解决高占比问题，并关注虽小但关键的问题。同时，将常见问题及其答案展示在商品详情页，并为功能性产品提供简要说明。
rationale: 我们的价值在于帮助客户解决问题，而非仅仅销售商品。通过系统性地解决问题，可以提升客户满意度，减少咨询量，并优化用户决策过程。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: How Customer Service Solves Consumer Problems and Common Problem Classification
scenario_en: In daily work, customer service needs to effectively solve consumer problems and optimize product information to reduce inquiry volume.
decision_en: Customer service should categorize and analyze the proportion of consumer problems, prioritize solving high-proportion issues, and pay attention to small but critical problems. Additionally, display common questions and their answers on the product detail page, and provide concise descriptions for functional products.

title: 如何通过优化商品描述和主图来避免中差评
scenario: 商家希望通过优化商品展示来减少因描述不清或实物不符导致的中差评，从而提升产品转化率。
decision: 商家应注重宝贝描述和主图的清晰度与准确性，详细注明商品参数（尺寸、成分、用法），清晰描述产品可能存在的缺陷和瑕疵，并避免使用夸张词汇，以确保客户对产品有清晰认知。
rationale: 清晰准确的商品描述能有效管理客户期望，避免因信息不对称或误解而产生不满，从而从源头上减少中差评的发生。
source_doc: 最强差评应对术：让差评秒变广告.doc
title_en: How to Avoid Negative Reviews by Optimizing Product Descriptions and Main Images
scenario_en: Merchants want to reduce negative reviews caused by unclear descriptions or discrepancies with the actual product by optimizing product display, thereby improving product conversion rates.
decision_en: Merchants should focus on the clarity and accuracy of product descriptions and main images, detailing product parameters (size, ingredients, usage), clearly describing potential defects and flaws, and avoiding exaggerated language to ensure customers have a clear understanding of the product.

title: 客服职能与技巧：服务态度、响应率、专业性与关联销售
scenario: 客服人员在日常工作中与客户互动时。
decision: 客服应保持客户至上的服务态度，善用话术；通过设置快捷短语提高响应效率；专业介绍产品；并在客户下单后尝试关联销售以提升客单价。
rationale: 这些是提升客户满意度、工作效率和销售业绩的关键要素。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Customer Service Functions and Skills: Service Attitude, Response Rate, Professionalism, and Cross-selling
scenario_en: Customer service staff interacting with customers in their daily work.
decision_en: Customer service should maintain a customer-first attitude and use appropriate communication techniques; improve response efficiency by setting up quick phrases; professionally introduce products; and attempt cross-selling after a customer places an order to increase average order value.

title: 售前售后客服问答技巧：客户接待与常见问题处理
scenario: 客服在售前售后与客户沟通时，需要遵循公司政策并有效回答客户问题。
decision: 客服应热情接待每一位顾客，在三分钟内回复客户消息。若无法及时回复，需告知客户并承诺尽快处理。针对客户关于库存、尺码、品牌、价格、促销、颜色、色差、面料、发票和运费等常见问题，需根据公司政策和产品信息给出准确、正面且专业的回答。
rationale: 确保客户得到及时、准确和专业的服务，提升客户满意度，促进销售并维护品牌形象。
source_doc: 售前售后客服问答技巧.doc
title_en: Pre-sales and After-sales Customer Service Q&A Skills: Customer Reception and Common Issue Handling
scenario_en: Customer service needs to follow company policies and effectively answer customer questions during pre-sales and after-sales communication.
decision_en: Customer service should warmly greet every customer and respond to messages within three minutes. If unable to reply promptly, inform the customer and promise to handle it as soon as possible. For common customer questions regarding inventory, size, brand, price, promotions, color, color difference, fabric, invoices, and shipping fees, provide accurate, positive, and professional answers based on company policies and product information.

title: 客户咨询后未下单付款的催付策略
scenario: 客户咨询店铺产品后未下单付款，需要判断是买家原因还是产品原因。
decision: 如果是买家原因，进行日常或大促催付；如果是产品原因，根据缺货或营销活动情况进行处理。
rationale: 通过有效催付将客户的咨询转化为实际销售额，提高客单价，并针对不同原因采取不同策略以优化转化率。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Payment Reminder Strategy for Customers Who Consulted but Did Not Place an Order
scenario_en: A customer consulted about store products but did not place an order. It is necessary to determine if the reason is due to the buyer or the product.
decision_en: If it's due to the buyer, proceed with daily or promotional payment reminders; if it's due to the product, handle it according to stock availability or marketing activities.

title: 快递选择与运费政策
scenario: 客户咨询快递选择、运费或对运费有异议时。
decision: 默认使用圆通快递，若需其他快递需补差价。明码实价，不议价不包邮。若订单中含包邮商品，则整个订单包邮。若需发EMS或顺丰，需补10元差价。
rationale: 公司政策规定明码实价，薄利多销，且快递公司收费标准不同。包邮政策旨在提升客户购物体验。
source_doc: 售前售后客服问答技巧.doc
title_en: Express Delivery Options and Shipping Policy
scenario_en: Customer inquires about express delivery options, shipping fees, or disputes shipping fees.
decision_en: YTO Express is used by default; an additional fee is required for other express services. Prices are clearly marked, no bargaining or free shipping. If the order includes a free shipping item, the entire order qualifies for free shipping. An additional 10 RMB fee is required for EMS or SF Express.

title: 客服数据指导运营以了解消费者心理和需求
scenario: 当商家需要了解消费者心理和需求，并指导运营策略时。
decision: 通过整理和归类旺旺、短信和用户评价等沟通渠道中的客服数据，可以更深入地了解消费者心理和需求。
rationale: 旺旺是唯一能与消费者实时沟通的工具，用户常通过它咨询问题，这些数据是了解消费者行为和需求的关键。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Customer Service Data Guides Operations to Understand Consumer Psychology and Needs
scenario_en: When merchants need to understand consumer psychology and needs, and guide operational strategies.
decision_en: By organizing and categorizing customer service data from communication channels such as Wangwang, SMS, and user reviews, a deeper understanding of consumer psychology and needs can be achieved.

title: 关联销售策略：相似、互补与促销
scenario: 当客服需要向顾客推荐额外商品或优惠时，以增加销售额。
decision: 客服应根据顾客购买的商品，推荐相似商品（如牛奶配酸奶）、互补商品（如奶粉配奶瓶），或告知促销活动（如满减、满送）。
rationale: 通过关联销售可以有效提升客单价和销售额，同时满足顾客潜在需求。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Cross-selling Strategies: Similar, Complementary, and Promotional
scenario_en: When customer service needs to recommend additional products or offers to customers to increase sales.
decision_en: Customer service should recommend similar products (e.g., milk with yogurt), complementary products (e.g., formula with baby bottles), or inform about promotional activities (e.g., full discount, free gift with purchase) based on the customer's purchased items.

title: 处理客户收货后发现质量问题或发错货的流程
scenario: 客户收到货后发现有质量问题或收到的商品与订单不符（发错货）。
decision: 首先向客户道歉，并要求客户提供照片证明。确认问题后，承诺承担来回运费。询问客户是希望退货还是换货，并提供退货地址。承诺收到退货后会尽快处理（退款或重新发货）并以支付宝转账形式退还运费。
rationale: 通过快速响应、承担责任和提供灵活的解决方案，旨在解决客户问题，挽回客户满意度，并弥补因公司过失造成的损失。
source_doc: 售前售后客服问答技巧.doc
title_en: Process for Handling Quality Issues or Incorrect Shipments After Customer Receives Goods
scenario_en: Customer receives goods and finds quality issues or receives items different from the order (incorrect shipment).
decision_en: First, apologize to the customer and request photo proof. After confirming the issue, promise to cover round-trip shipping costs. Ask the customer if they prefer a return or exchange, and provide the return address. Promise to process promptly upon receipt of the return (refund or reshipment) and refund shipping costs via Alipay transfer.

title: 客服职能发展趋势：以服务为驱动提升转化率和客单价
scenario: 当商家需要确定客服职能定位，并希望提升客户咨询转化率和客单价时。
decision: 商家应根据产品类型（如服装、电子产品）冷静考虑并定义客服职能。对于服装类产品，客服应多具备服务意识，提供搭配建议以提高转化率和客单价。对于电子产品，客服应定位为服务人员，关注服务态度和产品价值阐述，而非强行推销。
rationale: 通过将客服职能从单纯销售转向服务驱动，可以更好地满足消费者对服务态度和个性化建议的需求，从而有效提升客户满意度、咨询转化率和客单价。
source_doc: 001.超全的淘宝客服咨询高转化率攻略.doc
title_en: Customer Service Function Development Trends: Service-Driven Conversion Rate and AOV Improvement
scenario_en: When merchants need to define the role of customer service and aim to improve customer inquiry conversion rates and average order value.
decision_en: Merchants should calmly consider and define customer service functions based on product type (e.g., apparel, electronics). For apparel products, customer service should have a strong service orientation, offering styling advice to increase conversion rates and average order value. For electronic products, customer service should be positioned as service personnel, focusing on service attitude and product value explanation, rather than aggressive selling.

title: 售后客服日常工作流程与罚则
scenario: 售后客服的日常工作，包括早晚班职责、问题处理、退款维权、物流异常、退换货、费用跟进、交接班及疑难问题处理。
decision: 售后客服需按规定时间上班，处理前一天遗留问题，及时处理退款维权（避免系统自动退款），处理物流异常，拆解退回件，跟进邮费，完成打款并提交报表。早晚班需做好交接，疑难问题及时上报组长，换货前确认库存，并优先处理线上咨询。
rationale: 确保售后问题及时有效解决，避免延误导致客户不满或损失，并通过罚款机制强化责任心和流程执行。
title_en: After-sales Customer Service Daily Workflow and Penalties
scenario_en: Daily work of after-sales customer service, including morning/evening shift responsibilities, issue handling, refund disputes, logistics anomalies, returns/exchanges, expense tracking, shift handover, and complex issue resolution.
decision_en: After-sales customer service must start work on time, address pending issues from the previous day, promptly handle refund disputes (to avoid automatic system refunds), manage logistics anomalies, unpack returned items, track postage, complete payments, and submit reports. Morning and evening shifts must ensure proper handover, escalate complex issues to the team leader, confirm inventory before exchanges, and prioritize online inquiries.

title: 售后服务技巧分析：物流、退换货、投诉与客户关怀
scenario: 本指南适用于售后客服在处理日常客户服务问题时，包括物流查询、退换货、客户投诉及客户关怀等场景。
decision: 售后客服需主动进行物流查件，及时处理退换货，耐心并客观地处理客户投诉，并定期进行客户关怀回访。
rationale: 通过主动、耐心和专业的服务，可以有效避免客户投诉，提升客户满意度，并维护品牌形象。
title_en: After-sales Service Skill Analysis: Logistics, Returns/Exchanges, Complaints, and Customer Care
scenario_en: This guide applies to after-sales customer service when handling daily customer service issues, including logistics inquiries, returns/exchanges, customer complaints, and customer care scenarios.
decision_en: After-sales customer service needs to proactively track logistics, promptly handle returns/exchanges, patiently and objectively address customer complaints, and conduct regular customer care follow-ups.

title: 网店售后服务流程与技巧：缺货与质量问题处理案例
scenario: 在经营淘宝店铺过程中，售后服务是交易的重要组成部分，直接影响客户满意度和回头率。
decision: 提供优质的售后服务，提升客户满意度，以增加回头客并避免差评或投诉。
rationale: 良好的售后服务是店铺长期发展的基础，能提高好评率和动态评分，并带来持续的回头客。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Online Store After-sales Service Process and Skills: Out-of-Stock and Quality Issue Handling Cases
scenario_en: During the operation of a Taobao store, after-sales service is a crucial part of the transaction, directly impacting customer satisfaction and repeat purchase rates.
decision_en: Provide high-quality after-sales service to improve customer satisfaction, increase repeat customers, and avoid negative reviews or complaints.

title: 淘宝催单技巧与三不原则
scenario: 当客户在淘宝店铺拍下商品但未付款时，需要进行催单操作。
decision: 遵循“三不原则”：不催已有成交订单的客户，不强行催单，不重复催单。选择电话或短信催单时，优先选择客单价在2倍以上的订单。催单语言可选择日常版或活动版，并注意催单时间。
rationale: 避免打扰客户，维护客户关系，同时通过适当的催单技巧提高付款转化率。
title_en: Taobao Order Reminder Techniques and Three-No Principles
scenario_en: When a customer places an order on a Taobao store but has not yet paid, an order reminder operation is needed.
decision_en: Follow the 'Three-No Principles': do not remind customers with existing completed orders, do not force reminders, and do not send duplicate reminders. When choosing phone or SMS reminders, prioritize orders with an average order value of 2x or more. Reminder language can be a daily version or an activity-specific version, and pay attention to reminder timing.

title: 淘宝售后服务流程建议
scenario: 当淘宝卖家或买家需要了解售后服务流程，或淘宝平台考虑建立一套售后处理流程时。
decision: 建议建立一套完整的售后问题处理流程，以规范市场行为，减少纠纷，并提升店铺信誉。
rationale: 淘宝网本身不提供售后服务，建立统一流程可以约束无良卖家和买家行为，解决纷争，并为买家提供指导，从而提升店铺信誉和顾客满意度。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Taobao After-sales Service Process Recommendations
scenario_en: When Taobao sellers or buyers need to understand the after-sales service process, or when the Taobao platform considers establishing an after-sales processing flow.
decision_en: It is recommended to establish a complete after-sales issue processing flow to standardize market behavior, reduce disputes, and enhance store reputation.

title: 金冠店铺售后服务原则：短、平、快
scenario: 处理客户售后问题时
decision: 遵循“短、平、快”原则：在最短时间用最有效方式解决问题，保持平和心态，并高效处理问题。
rationale: 售后工作琐碎复杂，需要强大的抗压能力和平和的心态，以提升客户满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Golden Crown Store After-sales Service Principles: Short, Smooth, Fast
scenario_en: When handling customer after-sales issues.
decision_en: Follow the 'Short, Smooth, Fast' principle: resolve issues in the shortest time using the most effective method, maintain a calm mindset, and handle problems efficiently.

title: 买卖双方售后服务流程信息收集
scenario: 当买卖双方需要进行售后服务时，系统和人工需要收集相关信息。
decision: 系统会自动收集买卖双方账户、商品、订单及卖家保障服务类型等信息。买卖双方需手动输入服务名称、有效时间、注意事项、售后服务类型、数量、物流订单号、收件人信息等。
rationale: 为了确保售后服务流程的顺畅和公正，需要全面收集交易和售后相关信息，并对收货日期和物流选择提供指导，以防止不当行为。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Buyer and Seller After-sales Service Process Information Collection
scenario_en: When buyers and sellers require after-sales service, the system and human agents need to collect relevant information.
decision_en: The system automatically collects information such as buyer and seller accounts, products, orders, and seller guarantee service types. Both buyers and sellers need to manually input service name, validity period, precautions, after-sales service type, quantity, logistics order number, recipient information, etc.

title: 卖家确认收到问题商品
scenario: 当买家退回的问题商品到达卖家处时。
decision: 卖家在快递签收后，需在淘宝网上对该问题商品进行确认。如有必要，可在快递签收时进行举证。
rationale: 确保退货流程的完整性，并为可能出现的争议提供证据。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Seller Confirms Receipt of Problematic Item
scenario_en: When the problematic item returned by the buyer arrives at the seller's location.
decision_en: After signing for the express delivery, the seller needs to confirm the problematic item on Taobao. If necessary, evidence can be provided at the time of signing for the express delivery.

title: 处理正常中差评的策略：客服、发货、物流及商品损坏问题
scenario: 当买家因客服回复慢、服务态度差、发货问题（错发、漏发、不及时）、物流速度慢或商品在运输途中损坏而给出中差评时。
decision: 卖家应首先真诚道歉，站在买家立场思考，并提供相应的补偿（如优惠、返现、免邮、小礼品），同时解释原因并承诺改进，以争取买家修改评价或留下好印象。
rationale: 通过积极沟通、表达歉意和提供补偿，可以有效平息买家不满，增加改评几率，并将负面评价转化为店铺推广和客户回购的机会。
source_doc: 中差评：解决方法+回复话术.doc
title_en: Strategies for Handling Normal Negative Reviews: Customer Service, Shipping, Logistics, and Product Damage Issues
scenario_en: When a buyer gives a negative review due to slow customer service response, poor service attitude, shipping issues (wrong item, missing item, delayed), slow logistics, or product damage during transit.
decision_en: The seller should first sincerely apologize, empathize with the buyer, and offer appropriate compensation (e.g., discount, cashback, free shipping, small gift), while explaining the reason and promising improvement, to encourage the buyer to modify the review or leave a good impression.

title: 处理商品质量问题导致的中差评
scenario: 当买家因商品质量问题给出中差评时。
decision: 首先核实问题，若确属商品质量问题，应主动承担退货运费并提供退款，可额外赠送小礼物或提供其他款式优惠。对于换货请求应爽快答应并承担运费。
rationale: 保证商品质量是留住客户的关键。我们的失误不应让客户承担，站在买家角度解决问题，同时引导客户购买其他商品，实现双赢。
source_doc: 中差评：解决方法+回复话术.doc
title_en: Handling Negative Reviews Caused by Product Quality Issues
scenario_en: When a buyer gives a negative review due to product quality issues.
decision_en: First, verify the issue. If it is indeed a product quality problem, proactively bear the return shipping cost and provide a refund, possibly offering an additional small gift or discount on other styles. For exchange requests, readily agree and cover shipping costs.

title: 商品问题确认与责任界定
scenario: 当客户提出商品存在问题时，需要确认问题的性质和责任归属。
decision: 客服人员需要判断商品问题是产品本身质量问题还是人为因素造成。责任界定可依赖第三方举证，例如商品官方检测结果。
rationale: 明确商品问题的性质和责任方是解决客户投诉和后续处理的基础，确保公平公正。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Product Issue Confirmation and Responsibility Definition
scenario_en: When a customer raises a product issue, it is necessary to confirm the nature of the problem and assign responsibility.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to determine whether the product issue is a product quality problem or caused by human factors. Responsibility can be determined by third-party evidence, such as official product inspection results.

title: 售后问题处理结果及淘宝网录入
scenario: 当处理完售后问题后，需要记录处理结果时。
decision: 售后处理结果包括包换、包退、保修、维修、退回买家等，并将最终结果录入淘宝网，确保买卖双方可见。
rationale: 确保售后处理过程透明化，买卖双方对处理结果有清晰的了解，并作为官方记录。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: After-sales Issue Resolution and Taobao Entry
scenario_en: When needing to record the resolution after handling an after-sales issue.
decision_en: After-sales resolutions include exchange, refund, warranty, repair, return to buyer, etc. The final result must be entered into Taobao to be visible to both buyer and seller.

title: 售后详细处理流程与运费、退款、问题登记规范
scenario: 处理客户售后问题时，包括退换货、退款、丢件、少发错发、质量问题及客服问题。
decision: 基本步骤包括安抚顾客、核实信息、联系处理、跟踪进度和回访顾客。七天无理由退换货运费：质量问题由卖家承担，非质量问题包邮产品双方各承担发货运费，非包邮产品买家承担所有运费。交易成功后的退款必须通过支付宝进行，并核实支付宝账号和真实姓名。所有问题需登记备注，丢件问题登记表格并每月汇总，少发错发问题需找到责任人并告知，质量问题需保存图片并登记，每周汇总或特殊情况即时汇报，客服问题需提出并提醒同事。
rationale: 确保售后流程标准化，明确运费承担责任，保障退款安全，并通过详细登记和责任追溯提升问题解决效率和避免重复错误。
source_doc: 经典！售后详细处理流程.doc
title_en: Detailed After-sales Process, Shipping, Refund, and Issue Registration Guidelines
scenario_en: When handling customer after-sales issues, including returns/exchanges, refunds, lost items, incorrect/missing shipments, quality issues, and customer service problems.
decision_en: Basic steps include appeasing the customer, verifying information, contacting for resolution, tracking progress, and following up with the customer. For 7-day no-reason returns/exchanges: seller bears shipping for quality issues; for non-quality issues, if free shipping, both parties bear their respective shipping costs; if not free shipping, buyer bears all shipping costs. Refunds after successful transactions must be processed via Alipay, verifying the Alipay account and real name. All issues require registration and remarks. Lost item issues require a registration form and monthly summary. Incorrect/missing shipment issues require identifying and informing the responsible party. Quality issues require saving pictures and registration, with weekly summaries or immediate reporting for special cases. Customer service issues require raising and reminding colleagues.

title: 处理客户投诉的沟通策略与补救措施
scenario: 当客户因商品问题或服务不周而情绪激动、愤怒，甚至谩骂时。
decision: 客服人员应快速反应、热情接待、表示愿意提供帮助、诚恳道歉，并及时提出有效的补救措施，以缓解客户情绪并解决问题。
rationale: 客户投诉时情绪激动是一种宣泄，他们最希望得到同情、尊重和重视。通过积极的沟通和补救措施，可以消除客户的对立情绪，建立信任，并将不满转化为满意。
title_en: Communication Strategies and Remedies for Customer Complaints
scenario_en: When customers are emotional, angry, or even abusive due to product issues or poor service.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should react quickly, greet warmly, express willingness to help, sincerely apologize, and promptly propose effective remedies to de-escalate customer emotions and resolve the problem.

title: 卖方售后发货所需信息
scenario: 当卖方需要处理售后发货时，需要收集相关信息。
decision: 卖方在售后发货时，必须收集买方姓名、商品成交订单号、售后问题处理结果以及服务运费支付方。
rationale: 确保售后发货流程的准确性和责任归属，便于记录和追踪。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Information Required for Seller After-sales Shipment
scenario_en: When the seller needs to process an after-sales shipment, relevant information must be collected.
decision_en: When processing an after-sales shipment, the seller must collect the buyer's name, transaction order number, after-sales issue resolution, and the party responsible for service shipping costs.

title: 买方确认收货后的评价与协商流程
scenario: 买方确认收到商品后，系统应提供评价和解释功能，并鼓励买卖双方先行协商。
decision: 在买方确认收货后，应设置买方评价栏目和卖方解释栏目。在发起淘宝售后服务前，应提示买方先与卖家协商。
rationale: 本流程旨在促进买卖双方友好协商，且考虑到中国电子商务的初期阶段，不建议采用好/差评百分比统计，而应使用纯文字评价和解释。
source_doc: 网店售后服务流程与技巧.doc
title_en: Buyer Evaluation and Negotiation Process After Confirmation of Receipt
scenario_en: After the buyer confirms receipt of goods, the system should provide evaluation and explanation functions, and encourage buyers and sellers to negotiate first.
decision_en: After the buyer confirms receipt, a buyer evaluation section and a seller explanation section should be set up. Before initiating Taobao after-sales service, the buyer should be prompted to negotiate with the seller first.

title: 售后客服七项工作原则：热情、快速、倾听、安抚、道歉、补救、跟进
scenario: 当顾客在收到商品后反映问题或表达不满时，售后客服应如何处理。
decision: 售后客服应热情接待、快速反应、认真倾听、安抚解释、诚恳道歉、提出补救措施并及时通知顾客和跟进。在沟通中，要站在顾客角度，使用尊称“您”和团队称谓“我们”。
rationale: 通过提供卓越的售后服务，可以增强顾客信任，将不满转化为满意，并促进顾客再次购买，避免因服务不佳而流失顾客。
source_doc: 写给售后客服的一份信....doc
title_en: Seven Principles of After-sales Customer Service: Enthusiasm, Speed, Listening, Appeasement, Apology, Remedy, Follow-up
scenario_en: When customers report problems or express dissatisfaction after receiving goods, how after-sales customer service should handle it.
decision_en: After-sales customer service should greet warmly, respond quickly, listen carefully, appease and explain, sincerely apologize, propose remedies, and promptly notify and follow up with the customer. In communication, adopt the customer's perspective, use the respectful 'you' (您) and the team pronoun 'we'.

title: 售后处理不及时导致客户流失的案例分析
scenario: 一位合作多年的老客户因不良品售后问题长期未得到解决而感到不满，并表示已转向其他供应商。
decision: 最终通过经理批准为客户更换新产品，解决了不良品问题，但处理时间过长。
rationale: 未能及时处理客户的售后问题，导致客户对公司失去信任，并可能造成客户流失。即使问题最终解决，长时间的拖延也会在客户心中留下负面印象。
title_en: Case Study: Customer Churn Due to Delayed After-sales Processing
scenario_en: A long-term customer was dissatisfied because a defective product after-sales issue remained unresolved for an extended period, stating they had switched to other suppliers.
decision_en: The defective product issue was eventually resolved by replacing the product with a new one, approved by the manager, but the processing time was too long.

title: 处理淘宝中差评的售后服务话术与策略
scenario: 当客户对淘宝购物给出中差评，需要进行售后服务沟通以解决问题并争取修改评价时。
decision: 通过电话沟通，首先表达歉意并理解客户感受，然后了解具体问题，统一战线解释问题，给出模糊的解决方案和优惠，最后请求客户修改评价，必要时可提供小额补偿。
rationale: 通过真诚的道歉、共情、解决问题和提供补偿，旨在平息客户不满，挽回客户信任，并争取客户修改负面评价，以减少对店铺的影响。
source_doc: 淘宝中差评服务售后分享.doc
title_en: After-sales Service Script and Strategy for Taobao Negative Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a neutral or negative review on Taobao, requiring after-sales service communication to resolve the issue and encourage review modification.
decision_en: Through phone communication, first apologize and acknowledge customer feelings, then understand the specific problem, align with the customer to explain the issue, offer vague solutions and discounts, and finally request the customer to modify the review, providing a small compensation if necessary.

title: 防范利用错发货品进行欺诈的售后处理策略
scenario: 当客户声称收到错误商品（例如，价格较低的商品），并提出购买错误商品并补发正确商品，或在退货时可能存在欺诈意图时。
decision: 客服在处理错发货品时，需警惕客户可能利用价格差异进行欺诈。应坚持客户退回错误商品后，再进行换货或补发正确商品的流程，避免客户同时持有多种商品并从中牟利。
rationale: 防止客户通过声称错发、购买低价错发商品并要求补发高价商品，或在退货时进行商品调包等方式，利用商品差价进行欺诈，从而导致商家损失。
title_en: After-sales Strategy to Prevent Fraud Using Incorrect Shipments
scenario_en: When a customer claims to have received the wrong item (e.g., a lower-priced item) and proposes to buy the incorrect item and have the correct item reshipped, or when there might be fraudulent intent during a return.
decision_en: Customer service must be vigilant about potential fraud using price differences when handling incorrect shipments. Insist on the customer returning the incorrect item before proceeding with an exchange or reshipment of the correct item, to prevent the customer from holding multiple items and profiting from it.

title: 淘宝售后服务技巧：提升客户满意度和忠诚度
scenario: 在淘宝交易完成后，为了提升客户满意度、增加回头客并建立客户忠诚度。
decision: 客服应积极回复好评、及时跟踪包裹并处理运输意外、对运输损坏的商品先行补偿、适时关怀客户、及时联系确认收货并处理退换货、平和处理投诉，并有效管理买家资料以发展潜在忠实买家。
rationale: 良好的售后服务能给买家带来愉悦心情，增强信任，从而转化为忠实客户并带来口碑推荐。亏信誉比亏钱更严重，真诚的关怀能感动客户，主动沟通能缓和气氛，细致的客户管理有助于个性化服务和经验积累。
source_doc: 做好淘宝售后服务的技巧.doc
title_en: Taobao After-sales Service Skills: Enhancing Customer Satisfaction and Loyalty
scenario_en: After a Taobao transaction is completed, to enhance customer satisfaction, increase repeat business, and build customer loyalty.
decision_en: Customer service should actively respond to positive reviews, promptly track packages and handle shipping incidents, compensate for shipping-damaged goods first, show timely care for customers, promptly contact to confirm receipt and handle returns/exchanges, calmly handle complaints, and effectively manage buyer data to develop potential loyal buyers.

title: 通过售后服务提升用户粘性与口碑
scenario: 当商家希望通过售后服务不仅解决问题，还能增强客户忠诚度和品牌口碑时。
decision: 主动追踪用户使用情况，认真分析和吸收用户反馈，及时处理产品和物流问题，并与客户保持良好沟通。
rationale: 流量是基础，但信誉和口碑是生存的关键。积极的售后服务和用户沟通能将用户转化为朋友，促进产品改进，并带来复购和批量订单，从而增加用户粘性。
source_doc: 谈谈用售后服务增加用户粘性.doc
title_en: Enhancing User Engagement and Reputation Through After-sales Service
scenario_en: When merchants want to use after-sales service not only to resolve issues but also to strengthen customer loyalty and brand reputation.
decision_en: Actively track user usage, carefully analyze and incorporate user feedback, promptly address product and logistics issues, and maintain good communication with customers.

title: 中差评修改服务常见问题解答
scenario: 当客户对中差评修改服务有疑问时
decision: 提供关于修改成功率、周期、付费方式、可修改评价范围、沟通方式、安全性、投诉处理及合同签订等方面的详细解答。
rationale: 通过解答常见问题，消除客户疑虑，建立信任，并明确服务流程和预期。
source_doc: 中差评售后的那些事儿.doc
title_en: FAQ for Neutral/Negative Review Modification Service
scenario_en: When customers have questions about the neutral/negative review modification service.
decision_en: Provide detailed answers regarding modification success rate, duration, payment methods, scope of modifiable reviews, communication methods, security, complaint handling, and contract signing.

title: 淘宝店铺售后纠纷处理指南
scenario: 在淘宝店铺经营过程中，需要处理售后服务和解决售后纠纷时。
decision: 店铺应重视售后服务，主动与客户沟通，并遵循安抚、核实、处理、跟踪、回访的五步流程。对于常见纠纷，如未及时发货、物流慢、产品降价、质量不一、货物损毁、发错快递、产品与图片不符、拍后无货、送错地址/货、恶意差评和职业差评师敲诈等，应采取相应的解决措施。
rationale: 良好的售后服务能提升客户满意度，巩固老客户，吸引回头客，从而实现店铺利润最大化。售后是交易过程中不可避免的一环，妥善处理能避免差评并促进生意源源不断。
source_doc: 快来学习售后纠纷(含售后流程图).doc
title_en: Taobao Store After-sales Dispute Resolution Guide
scenario_en: When operating a Taobao store and needing to handle after-sales service and resolve disputes.
decision_en: The store should prioritize after-sales service, proactively communicate with customers, and follow the five-step process: appease, verify, process, track, and follow up. For common disputes such as delayed shipment, slow logistics, price drops, inconsistent quality, damaged goods, wrong courier, product not matching pictures, out of stock after purchase, wrong address/goods, malicious negative reviews, and professional negative review blackmailers, appropriate resolution measures should be taken.

title: 售后问题处理原则：客户满意与公司利益平衡
scenario: 在处理客户售后问题时，尤其是涉及质量、错发、漏发等情况。
decision: 在确保公司无损失的前提下，让客户接受歉意并同意解决方案。对于公司自身问题，需负责到底并尊重客户意愿处理；非公司问题，则讲道理但不迁就买家。
rationale: 售后服务是体现真正服务的关键环节，妥善处理能提升客户满意度并可能获得好评。老板注重客户服务的态度也为员工提供了处理售后问题的支持。
source_doc: 常见三大售后问题解决话术.doc
title_en: After-sales Issue Handling Principles: Balancing Customer Satisfaction and Company Interests
scenario_en: When handling customer after-sales issues, especially those involving quality, incorrect shipments, or missing items.
decision_en: Ensure the company incurs no loss while the customer accepts the apology and agrees to the solution. For company-related issues, take full responsibility and respect customer wishes; for non-company issues, explain reasonably but do not indulge the buyer.

title: 售后服务：通过真诚沟通和主动解决问题，将不满客户转化为忠实粉丝
scenario: 当客户对产品或服务不满意，尤其是在出现发错货等严重失误时。
decision: 主动联系客户，真诚道歉，并立即补发正确商品，附赠小礼物和手写道歉信。即使可能损失一件商品，也要优先考虑客户满意度和忠诚度。
rationale: 通过超预期的真诚服务和快速响应，可以将一次负面体验转化为建立客户信任和忠诚度的机会，从而获得更多忠实粉丝，长远来看收益更大。
source_doc: 说说 客服售后的那些事儿~.doc
title_en: After-sales Service: Turning Dissatisfied Customers into Loyal Fans Through Sincere Communication and Proactive Problem Solving
scenario_en: When customers are dissatisfied with a product or service, especially in cases of serious errors like incorrect shipments.
decision_en: Proactively contact the customer, sincerely apologize, immediately reship the correct item, and include a small gift and a handwritten apology letter. Even if it means losing one item, prioritize customer satisfaction and loyalty.

title: 网店客服话术技巧与营销策略
scenario: 当买家通过广告或淘宝搜索进入店铺并咨询相关问题时，客服需要有效沟通以提高成交率和转化率。
decision: 客服应体现亲切和专业，多用表情符号，不轻易承诺不确定的事情。同时，掌握应对讨价还价、辨别真伪、确认产品效果以及发货问题的营销技巧。
rationale: 良好的客服沟通直接影响店铺的成交率和转化率。通过专业的沟通技巧和营销策略，可以有效解决客户疑虑，提升客户满意度，并最终促成交易。
title_en: Online Store Customer Service Communication Skills and Marketing Strategies
scenario_en: When buyers enter the store through advertising or Taobao search and inquire about products, customer service needs to communicate effectively to increase conversion rates.
decision_en: Customer service should be friendly and professional, use emoticons, and avoid making uncertain promises. Additionally, master marketing techniques for handling bargaining, verifying authenticity, confirming product effectiveness, and addressing shipping issues.

title: 淘宝网客服销售话术：打招呼与商品询问技巧
scenario: 客服与客户进行初次互动或客户询问商品时。
decision: 初次打招呼时，应避免俗套，可使用祝福语或淘宝PP图标等独特方式拉近距离。客户询问商品时，需详细了解客户意向，并适当恭维客户，同时及时告知商品可能存在的问题，引导客户提问。
rationale: 独特的打招呼方式能给客户留下良好第一印象，拉近买卖双方距离。深入了解客户购买心理并引导提问，有助于更好地推荐商品和建立信任。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Sales Script: Greeting and Product Inquiry Skills
scenario_en: When customer service interacts with customers for the first time or customers inquire about products.
decision_en: When greeting for the first time, avoid clichés; use blessings or Taobao PP icons to build rapport. When customers inquire about products, understand their intentions in detail, compliment them appropriately, promptly inform them of potential product issues, and guide them to ask questions.

title: 客服基本素质：避免机械式开头、尊重客户、化解不满
scenario: 客服与客户互动时，尤其是在对话开始、处理议价或退换货时。
decision: 客服应避免机械式、冷冰冰的开头，要热情并让客户感受到尊重。不要对客户耍大牌，即使交易不成，也要运用技巧化解客户不满，而非争论。
rationale: 一个好的开始能建立积极的客户关系。客户是上帝，应被尊重。通过技巧性沟通可以提升客户满意度，即使未能成交也能维护品牌形象。
title_en: Basic Customer Service Qualities: Avoid Mechanical Openings, Respect Customers, Resolve Dissatisfaction
scenario_en: When customer service interacts with customers, especially at the start of a conversation, when handling bargaining, or returns/exchanges.
decision_en: Customer service should avoid mechanical, cold openings, be enthusiastic, and make customers feel respected. Do not act superior to customers; even if a transaction doesn't happen, use skills to resolve customer dissatisfaction rather than argue.

title: 客服处理客户还价及不合理要求时的沟通策略
scenario: 当客户进行讨价还价、提出不合理要求或对运费有疑问时，以及在整个交易流程中与客户沟通时。
decision: 客服应避免与客户争吵，运用专业知识突出产品优势，对于不讲理的客户可选择不交易。对于老客户应给予适当优惠或特权。在沟通中要展现人情味和幽默感，尝试与客户建立朋友关系，例如加QQ、聊家常，以培养忠实客户。在客户初次光临、付款、收货及售后等环节，提供及时、礼貌且专业的回复。
rationale: 与客户争吵会破坏气氛并影响心情。通过专业沟通和建立良好关系，可以提升客户满意度，培养忠实客户，从而带来更多订单。给予老客户特权能增强其归属感和忠诚度。灵活和人性化的服务能让店铺更具吸引力。
title_en: Customer Service Communication Strategy for Handling Bargaining and Unreasonable Requests
scenario_en: When customers bargain, make unreasonable requests, or have questions about shipping fees, and throughout the entire transaction process.
decision_en: Customer service should avoid arguing with customers, use professional knowledge to highlight product advantages, and may choose not to transact with unreasonable customers. Offer appropriate discounts or privileges to loyal customers. In communication, show warmth and humor, try to build a friendly relationship with customers, for example, by adding them on QQ or chatting about daily life, to cultivate loyal customers. Provide timely, polite, and professional responses at every stage: initial visit, payment, receipt, and after-sales.

title: 退换货流程与注意事项
scenario: 当顾客询问退换货政策时。
decision: 告知顾客本店支持7天无理由退换货，并引导他们参照首页“服务中心”页面获取退换货的注意事项和流程。对于因买家原因造成的退换货，邮费由买家承担。
rationale: 提供清晰的退换货指引，确保顾客了解政策和流程，同时明确邮费责任。
title_en: Return and Exchange Process and Precautions
scenario_en: When customers inquire about the return and exchange policy.
decision_en: Inform customers that the store supports 7-day no-reason returns and exchanges, and guide them to refer to the 'Service Center' page on the homepage for return and exchange precautions and procedures. For returns and exchanges due to buyer reasons, the postage is borne by the buyer.

title: 20种绝对成交技巧：根据客户情况灵活运用成交策略
scenario: 当与客户进行销售洽谈，旨在达成交易时。
decision: 应根据不同客户、不同情况、不同环境，采取不同的成交策略，掌握主动权，并趁客户购买欲望强烈时鼓励其购买，尽快结束商谈。
rationale: 灵活运用成交策略可以提高销售成功率，抓住客户的购买意愿，促使交易达成。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: 20 Closing Techniques: Flexible Strategies Based on Customer Situation
scenario_en: When engaging in sales negotiations with a customer, aiming to close a deal.
decision_en: Adopt different closing strategies based on the customer, situation, and environment. Take the initiative and encourage the customer to purchase when their desire to buy is strong, concluding the negotiation as soon as possible.

title: 退款流程：已买宝贝退货给卖家
scenario: 当客户需要退款并退货给卖家时。
decision: 引导客户进入“已买宝贝”页面，选择“退款中”，然后选择“退货给卖家”，填写快递单号即可。
rationale: 提供清晰的步骤指引，方便客户自助完成退款退货流程。
title_en: Refund Process: Returning Purchased Items to Seller
scenario_en: When a customer needs a refund and wants to return an item to the seller.
decision_en: Guide the customer to the 'Purchased Items' page, select 'Refund in Progress', then 'Return to Seller', and fill in the courier tracking number.

title: 直接要求法：识别购买信号后直接促成交易
scenario: 销售人员在收到客户明确的购买信号后，希望直接促成交易。
decision: 销售人员应直接提出交易请求，例如“既然您没有其他意见，那我们现在就签单吧。”提出后应保持沉默，等待客户回应，避免多言。
rationale: 直接要求法旨在抓住客户的购买意愿，通过直接提问促成交易。提出请求后保持沉默是为了避免分散客户注意力，给客户思考和决定的空间。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Direct Request Method: Close Deal Directly After Identifying Buying Signals
scenario_en: Sales personnel wish to close a deal directly after receiving clear buying signals from the customer.
decision_en: Sales personnel should directly propose the transaction, for example, 'Since you have no other comments, let's sign the order now.' After proposing, remain silent and wait for the customer's response, avoiding excessive talking.

title: 客服话术：介绍与推荐商品
scenario: 当顾客询问商品信息、尺码推荐、质量保证或产品特性时。
decision: 客服应根据顾客提供的信息给出建议，强调产品质量、售后服务和穿着体验，但最终决定权在于顾客。同时，可以使用描述性语言突出产品优点。
rationale: 提供专业建议能帮助顾客做出购买决策，强调质量和售后服务能增强顾客信任，而将最终决定权留给顾客则体现了尊重和避免责任。
title_en: Customer Service Script: Product Introduction and Recommendation
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product information, size recommendations, quality assurance, or product features.
decision_en: Customer service should provide suggestions based on the information provided by the customer, emphasizing product quality, after-sales service, and wearing experience, but the final decision rests with the customer. Additionally, descriptive language can be used to highlight product advantages.

title: 总结利益成交法：展示客户实际利益促成交易
scenario: 当客户对达成交易犹豫不决时，需要通过强调交易带来的实际利益来促成最终协议。
decision: 将客户与达成交易所带来的所有实际利益展示给客户，并根据客户关心的事项对这些利益进行排序。将产品的特点与客户的关注点紧密结合，总结客户最关心的利益，以促使客户最终达成协议。
rationale: 通过清晰地展示和总结客户最关心的实际利益，可以有效解决客户的疑虑，增强其购买意愿，从而促成交易。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Benefit Summary Closing Method: Show Actual Customer Benefits to Close Deal
scenario_en: When a customer is hesitant to close a deal, it is necessary to emphasize the actual benefits of the transaction to reach a final agreement.
decision_en: Present all actual benefits of the transaction to the customer, and prioritize these benefits according to what the customer cares about. Closely link product features with customer concerns, and summarize the benefits most important to the customer to encourage them to finalize the agreement.

title: 导购推荐话术：应对顾客对价格、折扣、尺码和款式等常见疑问
scenario: 当顾客对商品价格、折扣、尺码、款式、流行性或购买时机有疑问时，导购应提供专业的解答和引导。
decision: 导购应通过强调商品价值、设计、质量、适合度，或提供小礼物、代金券等方式，引导顾客关注商品本身而非单纯价格。同时，要利用限时折扣、尺码齐全等优势，并鼓励顾客试穿体验，承诺不满意可退换。
rationale: 通过专业的销售话术，可以有效解决顾客的疑虑，提升顾客对商品的认知和购买意愿，同时维护品牌形象和顾客关系。
title_en: Sales Guide Script: Addressing Common Customer Questions on Price, Discounts, Sizes, and Styles
scenario_en: When customers have questions about product price, discounts, sizes, styles, popularity, or purchase timing, sales guides should provide professional answers and guidance.
decision_en: Sales guides should emphasize product value, design, quality, and suitability, or offer small gifts, vouchers, etc., to guide customers to focus on the product itself rather than just the price. At the same time, leverage advantages like limited-time discounts and full size availability, and encourage customers to try on items, promising returns/exchanges if unsatisfied.

title: 优惠成交法：通过提供特殊优惠促使客户立即购买
scenario: 当销售人员希望通过提供优惠条件促使客户立即购买时。
decision: 销售人员应让客户感觉优惠是专属的，避免随意给予优惠，并适时表达权限有限，但愿意为客户争取额外优惠。
rationale: 通过制造专属感提升客户尊贵体验；避免随意优惠以防客户得寸进尺；通过表达权限有限并争取，管理客户期望值，即使未能提供额外优惠也能获得客户理解。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Discount Closing Method: Offer Special Discounts to Encourage Immediate Purchase
scenario_en: When sales personnel wish to encourage immediate purchase by offering favorable conditions.
decision_en: Sales personnel should make the customer feel the discount is exclusive, avoid giving discounts casually, and appropriately express limited authority while being willing to strive for additional discounts for the customer.

title: 预先框视法：在客户提出要求前预设结果并引导
scenario: 当销售人员希望引导客户接受特定产品或服务，并在客户提出要求之前预设好结果时。
decision: 在客户提出要求之前，销售人员应为客户确定好结果，同时对客户进行认同和赞赏，以引导客户按照销售人员的说法去做。
rationale: 通过预先设定框架和积极认同，可以影响客户的认知和决策，使其更倾向于接受预设的结果。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Pre-framing Method: Preset Outcomes and Guide Before Customer Requests
scenario_en: When sales personnel want to guide customers to accept a specific product or service, and preset the outcome before the customer makes a request.
decision_en: Before the customer makes a request, sales personnel should determine the outcome for the customer, while also acknowledging and praising the customer, to guide them to follow the sales personnel's suggestions.

title: 处理顾客对发货时效、商品质量、促销活动、商品属性及回复速度的询问
scenario: 当顾客询问发货时效、商品质量、促销活动、商品详细属性或抱怨回复慢时。
decision: 针对发货时效，告知48小时内发货，并说明不同地区的预计到货时间及物流公司。针对质量问题，强调实拍、质量好、有评价，并提供7天无条件退换货承诺。针对促销活动，如实告知店铺当前活动。针对商品属性，如实回答有无附送物等。针对回复慢，道歉并提供除活动商品外9.5折优惠。
rationale: 通过提供明确的发货承诺、质量保证、促销信息和商品详情，可以打消顾客疑虑，促进购买。对于回复慢的情况，提供补偿可以平息顾客不满，提升满意度并可能带来更多成交。
title_en: Handling Customer Inquiries on Shipping Time, Product Quality, Promotions, Product Attributes, and Response Speed
scenario_en: When customers inquire about shipping time, product quality, promotional activities, detailed product attributes, or complain about slow responses.
decision_en: For shipping time, inform that items ship within 48 hours, and explain estimated arrival times for different regions and logistics companies. For quality issues, emphasize real photos, good quality, existing reviews, and offer a 7-day unconditional return/exchange policy. For promotions, truthfully inform about current store activities. For product attributes, truthfully answer about included accessories, etc. For slow responses, apologize and offer a 5% discount on non-promotional items.

title: 利用激将法促使客户购买高价商品
scenario: 当客户对高价商品表现出兴趣但因价格犹豫不决时。
decision: 销售员可以利用客户的好胜心和自尊心，通过平静、自然地提及他人（尤其是知名人士）也曾对商品感兴趣但未购买的案例，来促使客户购买。
rationale: 客户可能为了显示自己的实力或地位，在被“激”后做出购买决定。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Using the Provocation Method to Encourage Customers to Buy High-Priced Items
scenario_en: When a customer shows interest in a high-priced item but hesitates due to the cost.
decision_en: Salespeople can leverage the customer's competitiveness and self-esteem by calmly and naturally mentioning cases where others (especially well-known individuals) were also interested in the item but did not purchase it, thereby encouraging the customer to buy.

title: 议价对话标准话术
scenario: 当客户尝试议价时，客服需要进行标准化回复以降低沟通成本并维护公司定价策略。
decision: 客服应遵循预设的议价话术，从表达折扣权限、请示上级、提供有限优惠到最终拒绝无法满足的折扣请求，并引导客户接受现有价格或替代方案。
rationale: 标准化对话能有效管理客户期望，减少不必要的议价时间，提高客服效率，并确保公司定价政策的一致性。
title_en: Standard Bargaining Dialogue Script
scenario_en: When a customer attempts to bargain, customer service needs to provide standardized responses to reduce communication costs and maintain the company's pricing strategy.
decision_en: Customer service should follow the preset bargaining script, from expressing discount authority, requesting approval from superiors, offering limited discounts, to finally refusing discount requests that cannot be met, and guiding customers to accept existing prices or alternative solutions.

title: 从众成交法：利用社会认同促进客户购买决策
scenario: 当客户对产品犹豫不决，不愿意冒险尝试新产品时。
decision: 销售人员应强调产品的受欢迎程度、热销状态或内部员工的使用情况，以利用客户的从众心理。
rationale: 客户在购买产品时倾向于避免风险，并更容易信任和喜欢已被他人认可的产品。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Bandwagon Closing Method: Using Social Proof to Promote Customer Purchase Decisions
scenario_en: When a customer is hesitant about a product and unwilling to take a risk on a new product.
decision_en: Sales personnel should emphasize the product's popularity, hot-selling status, or use by internal staff, to leverage the customer's bandwagon mentality.

title: 淘宝客服快捷短语大全：缺货与退换货处理
scenario: 当客户订购的商品缺货、收到商品有质量问题或需要退换货时。
decision: 对于缺货商品，客服应询问客户是否愿意更换其他款式；对于质量问题，客户需在24小时内联系换货；对于买家原因的退换货，来回邮费由买家承担；退货需寄到指定地址并附上字条说明；退款申请需等待财务确认；若因仓库发货错误导致缺货，可免费补寄或申请退款。
rationale: 提供明确的指引以处理缺货、质量问题和退换货，确保客户服务流程的顺畅和责任划分清晰。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Quick Phrases: Out-of-Stock and Return/Exchange Handling
scenario_en: When a customer's ordered item is out of stock, receives a defective item, or needs to return/exchange an item.
decision_en: For out-of-stock items, customer service should ask if the customer is willing to switch to another style; for quality issues, the customer needs to contact for exchange within 24 hours; for buyer-initiated returns/exchanges, round-trip postage is borne by the buyer; returns must be sent to the designated address with a note explaining the reason; refund applications require financial confirmation; if out of stock due to warehouse shipping error, free re-shipment or refund application is available.

title: 惜失成交法：利用稀缺性促使客户购买
scenario: 当客户对产品犹豫不决时，希望促使其尽快做出购买决定。
decision: 通过制造稀缺感（数量、时间、服务、价格限制）来利用客户“怕买不到”的心理，促使他们立即行动。
rationale: 人们对难以获得或即将失去的东西有更强的购买欲望，这是人性的弱点。通过施加适当的压力，可以敦促客户及时做出购买决定。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Scarcity Closing Method: Using Scarcity to Encourage Customer Purchase
scenario_en: When a customer is hesitant about a product and needs to be prompted to make a purchase decision quickly.
decision_en: Create a sense of scarcity (quantity, time, service, price limits) to leverage the customer's fear of missing out, prompting them to act immediately.

title: 淘宝客服快捷短语大全：基本准则与常用场景话术
scenario: 本文件旨在为淘宝客服提供一套标准化的沟通准则和常用快捷短语，以提高服务效率和客户满意度。
decision: 客服应遵循礼貌、为客户着想的态度，使用“您”称呼客户。无法满足要求时，首句需表达歉意。禁止使用负面词汇和语气词。对欢迎语、对话、议价、支付、物流、售后和评价等常见场景提供标准化话术。
rationale: 标准化客服用语可以显著提高客服效率，减少沟通成本，确保服务质量一致性，并有效应对咨询量激增的情况，从而提升交易转化率和客户满意度。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Quick Phrases: Basic Principles and Common Scenarios
scenario_en: This document aims to provide Taobao customer service with a set of standardized communication guidelines and common quick phrases to improve service efficiency and customer satisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service should maintain a polite and customer-centric attitude, using 'you' when addressing customers. When unable to meet a request, the first sentence must express apology. Negative words and filler words are prohibited. Standardized scripts are provided for common scenarios such as greetings, conversations, bargaining, payment, logistics, after-sales, and reviews.

title: 步步紧逼成交法：处理客户拖延的销售技巧
scenario: 当客户在购买前表现出拖延，例如说“我再考虑考虑”或“过几天再说吧”时。
decision: 首先赞同客户的慎重态度，然后通过层层递进的提问，引导客户说出他们真正担心的具体问题，并解决这些问题以促成交易。
rationale: 客户的拖延通常源于未表达的担忧或疑问。通过引导客户说出这些担忧，销售人员可以有针对性地解决，从而消除购买障碍。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Step-by-Step Closing Method: Sales Technique for Handling Customer Procrastination
scenario_en: When a customer procrastinates before purchasing, for example, saying 'I'll think about it' or 'Let's talk about it in a few days'.
decision_en: First, agree with the customer's cautious attitude, then, through a series of progressive questions, guide the customer to articulate their specific concerns, and resolve these issues to close the deal.

title: A to A+ 品牌客服快捷短语和常见问题解答
scenario: 客户咨询常见问题，包括商品信息、订单状态、物流、退换货等。
decision: 使用预设的快捷短语和标准答案回复客户，确保信息一致性和服务效率。
rationale: 通过标准化回复，提高客服响应速度，减少重复性工作，并确保客户获得准确一致的信息。
title_en: A to A+ Brand Customer Service Quick Phrases and FAQs
scenario_en: Customers inquire about common issues, including product information, order status, logistics, returns, and exchanges.
decision_en: Use preset quick phrases and standard answers to respond to customers, ensuring information consistency and service efficiency.

title: 协助客户成交法：帮助客户挑选而非直接推销订单
scenario: 当客户有意购买但犹豫不决，在产品细节上反复挑选时。
decision: 销售员应暂时避免提及订单，转而积极热情地协助客户挑选产品。一旦客户确定了选择，订单自然会达成。
rationale: 客户不喜欢被迅速推销，通过帮助他们挑选，可以建立信任并引导他们做出购买决定。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Assisted Closing Method: Helping Customers Choose Rather Than Directly Pushing Orders
scenario_en: When a customer is interested in buying but hesitant, repeatedly deliberating over product details.
decision_en: The salesperson should temporarily avoid mentioning the order and instead actively and enthusiastically assist the customer in choosing products. Once the customer makes a choice, the order will naturally follow.

title: 淘宝网店客服快捷短语大全
scenario: 网店客服在日常工作中需要回答大量重复性问题，或在特定情境下与顾客沟通。
decision: 客服应预设快捷短语，涵盖问候、应答、产品说明、还价处理、发货指引、道歉及道别等多个方面，以提高效率并保持服务质量。
rationale: 通过使用快捷短语，可以减少重复劳动，提高工作效率，避免客服因长时间重复回答相同问题而产生厌烦情绪，同时确保沟通的标准化和专业性。
title_en: Taobao Online Store Customer Service Quick Phrases Collection
scenario_en: Online store customer service needs to answer a large number of repetitive questions or communicate with customers in specific situations during daily work.
decision_en: Customer service should pre-set quick phrases covering greetings, responses, product descriptions, bargaining handling, shipping guidance, apologies, and farewells, among other aspects, to improve efficiency and maintain service quality.

title: 欲擒故纵法：促使犹豫不决的客户做出购买决定
scenario: 当客户对产品有兴趣但优柔寡断，迟迟不愿做出购买决定时。
decision: 销售人员可以故意收拾东西，做出要离开的姿态，以此促使客户下定决心购买。
rationale: 通过制造一种即将失去机会的紧迫感，可以激发客户的购买意愿。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Playing Hard to Get Method: Prompting Hesitant Customers to Make a Purchase Decision
scenario_en: When a customer is interested in a product but indecisive, delaying making a purchase decision.
decision_en: Sales personnel can deliberately pack up their belongings and make a gesture of leaving, thereby prompting the customer to make up their mind to purchase.

title: 淘宝客服售后快捷短语大全
scenario: 本文件提供了淘宝客服在售前、售中、售后各个环节与客户沟通的快捷短语和应对策略。
decision: 客服人员应根据客户的具体情况和沟通阶段，灵活运用这些快捷短语和应对范例，以提高沟通效率和客户满意度。
rationale: 通过使用预设的快捷短语和应对策略，可以标准化客服服务，减少客服人员的思考时间，提高响应速度，并确保沟通的专业性和一致性。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service After-Sales Quick Phrases
scenario_en: This document provides quick phrases and response strategies for Taobao customer service to communicate with customers at various stages: pre-sales, in-sales, and after-sales.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should flexibly use these quick phrases and response examples based on the customer's specific situation and communication stage to improve communication efficiency and customer satisfaction.

title: 订单成交法：通过填写订单促成销售
scenario: 当销售接近尾声，客户可能仍在犹豫是否购买时。
decision: 拿出订单或合约并开始填写客户资料。如果客户没有制止，则视为其已决定购买。若客户表示未决定，可告知其订单可修改或取消，给予充分考虑时间。
rationale: 通过实际填写订单的动作，可以测试客户的购买意愿，并给予客户一个明确的购买信号，同时缓解其立即做决定的压力。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Order Closing Method: Completing Orders to Drive Sales
scenario_en: When a sale is nearing completion, but the customer is still hesitant to purchase.
decision_en: Take out the order form or contract and begin filling in the customer's information. If the customer does not stop you, assume they have decided to purchase. If the customer indicates they haven't decided, inform them that the order can be modified or canceled, allowing them ample time to consider.

title: 宠物成交法：通过免费试用或体验促成交易
scenario: 当企业希望通过让客户亲身体验产品或服务来促成交易时。
decision: 提供免费试用、免费会员、在家试用、免费杂志或将产品送至客户处试用等方式，让客户在无压力下体验产品，从而产生拥有感和不舍。
rationale: 通过让客户亲身体验产品或服务，可以建立客户对产品的感情和依赖，使其难以放弃，从而提高成交率。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Pet Closing Method: Free Trial or Experience to Drive Sales
scenario_en: When a business wants to encourage a transaction by letting customers experience the product or service firsthand.
decision_en: Offer free trials, free memberships, in-home trials, free magazines, or deliver products to the customer for trial, allowing them to experience the product without pressure, thereby fostering a sense of ownership and reluctance to part with it.

title: 客户服务常用快捷短语
scenario: 客服与客户沟通时，需要快速响应常见问题或表达品牌态度。
decision: 使用预设的快捷短语来提高沟通效率，并保持积极、友好的品牌形象。
rationale: 快捷短语能确保信息传递的一致性，节省客服时间，并能有效管理客户期望，例如解释发货时间、退款流程或产品质量。
title_en: Common Customer Service Quick Phrases
scenario_en: Customer service needs to quickly respond to common questions or express brand attitude when communicating with customers.
decision_en: Use pre-set quick phrases to improve communication efficiency and maintain a positive, friendly brand image.

title: 特殊待遇法：处理要求独享最低价格的大客户
scenario: 当客户自认为是重要人物，并要求特殊待遇，例如个人独享的最低价格时。
decision: 对客户说：“您是我们的大客户，这样吧——”，然后提供一个看似特殊的解决方案。
rationale: 此技巧适用于认为自己是重要人物并要求特殊待遇的客户，通过认可其“大客户”身份来满足其心理需求。
source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Special Treatment Method: Handling Key Accounts Requesting Exclusive Lowest Prices
scenario_en: When a customer considers themselves important and demands special treatment, such as an exclusive lowest price.
decision_en: Tell the customer: 'You are a valued customer of ours, how about this—', then offer a seemingly special solution.

title: 客服快捷短语：问候、价格、运输、合并运费及确认
scenario: 客户服务日常沟通中，涉及问候、价格咨询、运输时效、运费修改及收货确认等场景。
decision: 使用预设的快捷短语进行回复，包括欢迎语、产品信息确认、价格协商、运输说明、运费修改通知和售后服务提醒。
rationale: 提高客服效率，确保信息传递的准确性和一致性，同时维护品牌形象和客户满意度。
title_en: Customer Service Quick Phrases: Greetings, Price, Shipping, Combined Shipping, and Confirmation
scenario_en: Daily customer service communication involves scenarios such as greetings, price inquiries, shipping times, shipping fee modifications, and delivery confirmation.
decision_en: Use pre-set quick phrases for replies, including welcome messages, product information confirmation, price negotiation, shipping instructions, shipping fee modification notifications, and after-sales service reminders.

title: 讲故事成交法：通过分享客户案例打消疑虑
scenario: 当客户对产品有特定疑虑或担忧，犹豫不决时。
decision: 通过讲述一个与客户情况相似的成功案例，描述前一位客户如何克服了同样的担忧并最终满意，以打消当前客户的疑虑。
rationale: 人们喜欢听故事，通过分享相关案例，可以帮助客户产生共鸣，并让他们感觉像亲身经历一样，从而建立信任并促成交易。
