source_doc: 赠：独家提供整理20种绝对成交技巧（现实生活中也能用到）.pdf
title_en: Storytelling Closing Method: Addressing Concerns by Sharing Customer Cases
scenario_en: When a customer has specific doubts or concerns about a product and is hesitant to make a purchase.
decision_en: Share a success story similar to the customer's situation, describing how a previous customer overcame the same concerns and was ultimately satisfied, to alleviate the current customer's doubts.

title: 客服快捷短语：价格与价值
scenario: 当顾客对商品价格表示犹豫或认为价格过高时。
decision: 向顾客解释价格与价值成正比，强调好产品能带来长期价值，避免因追求低价而牺牲质量。
rationale: 通过强调产品质量和长期价值，帮助顾客理解价格的合理性，并建立对品牌的信任。
title_en: Customer Service Quick Phrases: Price and Value
scenario_en: When a customer hesitates about the product price or considers it too high.
decision_en: Explain to the customer that price is proportional to value, emphasizing that good products provide long-term value, and avoid sacrificing quality for low prices.

title: 处理客户投诉的策略：快速响应、热情接待、诚恳道歉与补救措施
scenario: 当客户对商品或服务提出投诉时，客服人员需要有效处理以解决问题并维护客户关系。
decision: 客服人员应快速响应，热情接待客户，并诚恳道歉。同时，要表示愿意提供帮助，并及时提出有效的补救措施。
rationale: 快速响应能缓解客户焦虑；热情接待能让客户感受到重视；诚恳道歉能消除对立情绪；提供帮助和补救措施能解决实际问题，将客户的不满转化为感谢和满意，从而维持心理平衡并建立依赖感。
title_en: Customer Complaint Handling Strategies: Quick Response, Enthusiastic Reception, Sincere Apology, and Remedial Measures
scenario_en: When a customer complains about a product or service, customer service personnel need to handle it effectively to resolve the issue and maintain customer relationships.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should respond quickly, receive customers enthusiastically, and apologize sincerely. At the same time, they should express willingness to help and promptly propose effective remedial measures.

title: 双十一活动期间订单发货与库存管理规则
scenario: 在双十一活动期间，客户咨询发货时间、库存情况、订单合并、尺寸选择及发票开具等问题时。
decision: 自动回复告知客户咨询量大，能拍能选的宝贝均有货，拍完即止，付款后7天内发货，3天内勿催单。对于尺寸、颜色等，以拍下为准，备注无效。发票需备注抬头，活动结束后统一寄出。多个订单不合并发货，需使用购物车。库存与系统同步，拍下后需及时付款。
rationale: 双十一期间订单量和咨询量巨大，需要通过自动化和标准化回复来提高效率，同时明确告知客户规则，避免误解和不必要的纠纷。库存实时更新，付款后才减库存，确保公平性。
title_en: Double Eleven Event Order Shipping and Inventory Management Rules
scenario_en: During the Double Eleven event, customers inquire about shipping times, inventory status, order consolidation, size selection, and invoice issuance.
decision_en: Automatically reply to inform customers that due to high inquiry volume, all available items can be purchased while supplies last, and will be shipped within 7 days after payment. Do not rush orders within 3 days. For sizes and colors, the selection made at checkout is final, remarks are invalid. Invoices require a remarked title and will be sent out after the event. Multiple orders will not be combined for shipping; use the shopping cart. Inventory is synchronized with the system; prompt payment is required after placing an order.

title: 客服欢迎语、回复语、对话用语及议价策略
scenario: 客服与顾客进行互动时，包括首次接触、回复咨询、日常对话以及议价环节。
decision: 客服应使用亲切、礼貌的欢迎语和回复语，积极引导顾客，并提供帮助。在议价时，应明确告知折扣权限，并灵活处理，必要时可请示主管。
rationale: 统一的欢迎语和回复语能提升顾客体验，展现专业性。在议价时，明确权限并寻求支持，既能维护公司利益，又能尽可能满足顾客需求。
title_en: Customer Service Welcome, Reply, Dialogue Phrases, and Bargaining Strategies
scenario_en: Customer service interacts with customers, including first contact, replying to inquiries, daily conversations, and bargaining.
decision_en: Customer service should use friendly and polite welcome and reply phrases, actively guide customers, and offer assistance. When bargaining, clearly state discount authority and handle flexibly, escalating to a supervisor if necessary.

title: 解释活动价格和未来价格调整
scenario: 当顾客询问是否能获得更多优惠，或对当前活动价格有疑问时。
decision: 告知顾客当前活动是亏本销售，旨在获得顾客肯定，并说明未来价格会上调，因此无法再提供优惠。
rationale: 通过解释活动性质和未来价格趋势，让顾客理解当前价格的优惠性，并接受无法进一步降价的事实。
title_en: Explaining Event Prices and Future Price Adjustments
scenario_en: When a customer asks for more discounts or has questions about the current event price.
decision_en: Inform the customer that the current event is a loss-making sale aimed at gaining customer affirmation, and explain that prices will increase in the future, thus no further discounts can be offered.

title: 多件商品购买流程与折扣自动应用
scenario: 当顾客购买单件商品或多件商品时，系统如何处理订单和折扣。
decision: 购买单件商品直接点击“立刻购买”；购买多件商品需将所有商品加入购物车，然后点击“提交订单”和“结算”，系统将自动应用折扣后的价格。
rationale: 确保顾客能正确享受多件商品的折扣，并简化购买流程。
title_en: Multiple Item Purchase Process and Automatic Discount Application
scenario_en: How the system handles orders and discounts when customers purchase single or multiple items.
decision_en: For a single item, click 'Buy Now'; for multiple items, add all to the shopping cart, then click 'Submit Order' and 'Checkout'. The system will automatically apply the discounted price.

title: 售前客服话术流程与常见问题解答规范
scenario: 本文件旨在规范售前客服在日常接待、节假日、老客户接待、延误接待以及处理客户常见问题时的沟通流程和话术。
decision: 客服需遵循标准化的开头语、疑问解答和结束语。针对不同客户类型和购买阶段，使用预设的话术。对于商品属性、服务、物流、价格和操作等常见问题，提供统一的规范化回答。
rationale: 通过标准化的话术和流程，提升客服服务质量和效率，确保品牌形象一致性，并有效引导客户完成购买或解决疑问。
title_en: Pre-Sales Customer Service Script Flow and FAQ Guidelines
scenario_en: This document aims to standardize the communication flow and scripts for pre-sales customer service during daily reception, holidays, returning customer reception, delayed reception, and handling common customer questions.
decision_en: Customer service must follow standardized opening, Q&A, and closing remarks. Use pre-set scripts for different customer types and purchase stages. Provide standardized answers for common questions regarding product attributes, services, logistics, prices, and operations.

title: 节假日促销活动类型及关注方式
scenario: 当顾客询问节假日促销活动时。
decision: 告知顾客公司在节假日会有促销活动回馈新老顾客，但促销类型多样，不一定仅限于送礼品，并建议顾客积极关注。
rationale: 公司在节假日会推出多种促销活动，旨在回馈顾客，但具体形式不固定，需引导顾客主动关注最新信息。
title_en: Holiday Promotion Types and How to Follow Them
scenario_en: When customers inquire about holiday promotions.
decision_en: Inform customers that the company will have holiday promotions to reward new and old customers, but promotion types vary and are not limited to gifts. Advise customers to actively follow updates.

title: 库存咨询：查询商品库存及预售信息
scenario: 客户咨询特定商品的款式、颜色、尺码是否有货，或商品处于预售状态。
decision: 询问客户具体需求以查询库存；若商品预售，告知发货日期并建议尽早预定；若有货，告知客户可直接购买并提及当前促销活动。
rationale: 提供准确的库存信息和预售详情，引导客户购买，并利用促销活动增加销售机会。
title_en: Inventory Inquiry: Checking Product Stock and Pre-order Information
scenario_en: Customers inquire about the availability of specific product styles, colors, sizes, or if a product is on pre-order.
decision_en: Ask for specific customer needs to check inventory; if the product is on pre-order, inform them of the shipping date and suggest pre-ordering early; if in stock, inform the customer they can purchase directly and mention current promotions.

title: 售后对话：无条件退换货及问题处理流程
scenario: 客户对商品不满意或遇到快递问题时。
decision: 客服应首先表达歉意，并告知客户公司实行无条件退换货政策，承诺提供满意答复。对于代付款订单，应主动联系客户确认疑问并协助付款。对于退货换货，需明确邮费承担方和处理流程。
rationale: 通过主动承担责任和提供灵活的解决方案，可以安抚客户情绪，提升客户满意度，并促进交易完成。明确流程可提高效率。
title_en: After-Sales Dialogue: Unconditional Returns/Exchanges and Problem Resolution Process
scenario_en: When customers are dissatisfied with a product or encounter delivery issues.
decision_en: Customer service should first apologize and inform the customer that the company offers an unconditional return/exchange policy, promising a satisfactory resolution. For 'pay on delivery' orders, proactively contact the customer to confirm questions and assist with payment. For returns/exchanges, clearly state who bears the postage and the processing procedure.

title: 淘宝发货流程与物流查询指引
scenario: 客户询问发货时间、物流状态或催单时。
decision: 告知客户付款后三天内为正常发货时间，36小时内寄出，一般三到五天送达。物流信息需自行查询，且不接受急件催单。强调快递公司更新记录，非商家可控。
rationale: 明确发货时效和物流查询方式，管理客户预期，减少不必要的催单和查询，同时解释因发货量大和厂家工作安排导致无法即时发货或接受催单。
title_en: Taobao Shipping Process and Logistics Tracking Guide
scenario_en: Customers inquire about shipping time, logistics status, or rush orders.
decision_en: Inform customers that normal shipping time is within three days after payment, items are usually dispatched within 36 hours, and delivered in three to five days. Logistics information must be checked by the customer, and urgent orders cannot be rushed. Emphasize that courier company updates are beyond the merchant's control.

title: 处理客户议价的策略与技巧
scenario: 当客户在购买过程中提出议价请求时。
decision: 根据客户的议价类型（试探型、允诺型、对比型、武断型、威逼利诱型、博取同情型、借口型、死缠烂打型），采取不同的应对策略，包括介绍套餐、强调性价比、坚持价格、提供小礼物或拒绝。
rationale: 旨在在达成交易的同时，提升客户满意度、增加店铺访问深度、维护品牌形象，并避免因不合理议价而导致的损失或差评。
title_en: Strategies and Techniques for Handling Customer Bargaining
scenario_en: When a customer requests to bargain during the purchase process.
decision_en: Employ different strategies based on the customer's bargaining type (exploratory, promising, comparative, assertive, threatening/enticing, sympathy-seeking, excuse-making, persistent), including introducing packages, emphasizing value for money, maintaining price, offering small gifts, or refusing.

title: 售前快捷短语：议价、礼物、返现处理指南
scenario: 客户在售前咨询环节提出议价、索要礼物或要求返现时。
decision: 告知客户商品价格已是实惠价，产品质量有保障，无法再优惠或提供礼物。强调除了价格问题，其他如仔细检查发货、优先发货等服务可以满足。
rationale: 维护品牌定价策略和产品价值，同时通过提供其他增值服务来提升客户满意度。
title_en: Pre-Sales Quick Phrases: Bargaining, Gifts, and Cashback Handling Guide
scenario_en: When customers inquire about bargaining, asking for gifts, or requesting cashback during the pre-sales consultation.
decision_en: Inform customers that the product price is already a good value, product quality is guaranteed, and no further discounts or gifts can be provided. Emphasize that other services, such as careful inspection before shipping and priority shipping, can be met, apart from price issues.

title: 内裤商品退换货政策
scenario: 客户希望退换内裤商品。
decision: 内裤商品属于私密物品，淘宝规定不接受任何退换货，质量问题除外。
rationale: 基于淘宝平台对私密物品的规定以及卫生考虑。
source_doc: 淘宝客服快捷语示例60条涵盖各个方面.xls
title_en: Underwear Return/Exchange Policy
scenario_en: Customer wishes to return or exchange underwear.
decision_en: Underwear is a personal item. Taobao policy states no returns or exchanges are accepted, except for quality issues.

title: 客服快捷回复短语：发票、发货、信用卡、包邮、货到付款、信息泄露、7天无理由退换货
scenario: 客服在处理买家关于发票、发货、支付方式、运费、信息安全及退换货等常见问题时。
decision: 客服应使用预设的快捷回复短语，并根据店铺实际情况进行调整。对于发票、发货、信用卡、包邮、货到付款、信息泄露和7天无理由退换货等问题，有具体的回复范例和注意事项。
rationale: 统一规范的回复可以提高客服效率，减少不必要的纠纷，并确保信息传达的准确性和一致性。
source_doc: 常见买家问题快捷回复短语.doc
title_en: Customer Service Quick Replies: Invoice, Shipping, Credit Card, Free Shipping, Cash on Delivery, Information Leakage, 7-Day No-Reason Return/Exchange
scenario_en: Customer service is handling common buyer questions regarding invoices, shipping, payment methods, shipping fees, information security, and returns/exchanges.
decision_en: Customer service should use preset quick reply phrases and adjust them according to the actual store situation. Specific reply examples and注意事项 are available for questions about invoices, shipping, credit cards, free shipping, cash on delivery, information leakage, and 7-day no-reason returns/exchanges.

title: 客服接待语：欢迎、分类指引、收藏与优惠
scenario: 当顾客进入店铺或客服主动问候时。
decision: 使用热情友好的欢迎语，引导顾客浏览商品分类或使用搜索功能，并鼓励顾客收藏店铺以获取新品和优惠信息。
rationale: 通过积极主动的问候和清晰的指引，提升顾客的购物体验，增加店铺的吸引力，并促进潜在的销售。
title_en: Customer Service Greetings: Welcome, Category Guidance, Favorites & Offers
scenario_en: When a customer enters the store or customer service proactively greets them.
decision_en: Use a warm and friendly welcome message, guide customers to browse product categories or use the search function, and encourage them to favorite the store for new product and offer information.

title: 客服处理客户咨询与投诉的流程及话术
scenario: 客户在售前、售中、售后及使用过程中提出咨询或遇到问题，特别是当客户情绪激动时。
decision: 客服人员需真诚服务，在售后环节，即使问题不在公司，也要先向客户道歉，并灵活运用话术安抚客户情绪。对于常见问题，应提供标准化的回答。
rationale: 真诚服务不仅是为了促成当前交易，更是为了培养忠实客户，带来更多客源。良好的服务质量直接影响销售业绩。理解客户心理并掌握其情绪变化是关键。
title_en: Customer Service Process and Script for Consultations and Complaints
scenario_en: Customers raise inquiries or encounter problems before, during, or after a sale, or during product use, especially when they are emotional.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must provide sincere service. In after-sales, even if the problem is not with the company, apologize to the customer first and flexibly use scripts to calm their emotions. For common issues, provide standardized answers.

title: 淘宝客服沟通技巧：积极用词与“我”代替“你”
scenario: 在与淘宝客户沟通时，客服需要选择恰当的用词和表达方式。
decision: 客服应选择积极正面的词语，避免使用负面或指责性的表达。同时，在某些情况下，应尽量使用“我”来代替“你”，以避免给客户带来被指责的感觉。
rationale: 积极的用词能够提升客户的满意度，通过赞扬客户来表达感谢，并避免强化负面感受。使用“我”代替“你”可以减少客户的抵触情绪，建立更友好的沟通氛围。
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Communication Skills: Positive Wording and 'I' Instead of 'You'
scenario_en: When communicating with Taobao customers, customer service needs to choose appropriate wording and expressions.
decision_en: Customer service should choose positive words and avoid negative or accusatory expressions. Also, in some cases, use 'I' instead of 'you' to avoid making the customer feel blamed.

title: 价格最优承诺
scenario: 当客户询问产品价格或比较价格时。
decision: 告知客户我们的价格是最优惠的。
rationale: 确保客户对我们的价格有信心，并强调我们的竞争力。
title_en: Best Price Guarantee
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product price or compares prices.
decision_en: Inform the customer that our price is the most favorable.

title: 客户服务沟通技巧：感同身受的表达方式
scenario: 当客户表达不满、生气、着急、委屈或失望等负面情绪时，客服人员需要进行回应。
decision: 客服人员应使用“我能理解”、“我非常理解您的心情”、“换成是我我也会跟您一样的感受”等表达方式，向客户传达同理心和理解。
rationale: 通过表达感同身受，可以安抚客户情绪，建立信任，让客户感受到被尊重和重视，从而为解决问题创造良好的沟通氛围。
source_doc: 100个电商客服话术秘籍，做电商必看.docx
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skills: Empathetic Expressions
scenario_en: When customers express negative emotions such as dissatisfaction, anger, urgency, grievance, or disappointment, customer service personnel need to respond.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should use expressions like 'I understand', 'I deeply understand how you feel', or 'I would feel the same way if I were you' to convey empathy and understanding to the customer.

title: 倾听客户问题并使用礼貌用语
scenario: 在与客户沟通的整个过程中，尤其是在客户提出问题时。
decision: 让客户充分表达问题，然后提供解决方案。在沟通过程中，应多使用“您”、“请”、“稍等”等礼貌用语。
rationale: 充分倾听客户问题有助于准确理解客户需求，从而提供更有效的帮助。使用礼貌用语能体现对客户的尊重，提升客户满意度。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Listen to Customer Issues and Use Polite Language
scenario_en: Throughout the entire communication process with customers, especially when customers raise questions.
decision_en: Allow customers to fully express their problems, then provide solutions. During communication, frequently use polite terms such as 'you' (您), 'please', and 'just a moment'.

title: 店铺称谓使用规范：导购时用“小店”，解决问题时用“本店”
scenario: 在与顾客沟通时，根据不同的情境介绍店铺。
decision: 当为顾客做导购时，应多用“小店”；当为顾客解决问题时，应多用“本店”。
rationale: 使用“小店”能提升顾客的优越感，提供“上帝式”服务体验；使用“本店”则能展现专业性。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Store Naming Convention: 'Our small shop' for guidance, 'Our shop' for problem-solving
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, introduce the store according to different situations.
decision_en: When guiding customers, use 'our small shop' (小店); when solving customer problems, use 'our shop' (本店).

title: 客服表情和心态：用表情符号代替冰冷文字，保持耐心和礼貌
scenario: 在与客户沟通时，尤其是在售前客户咨询时。
decision: 在适当的时候使用表情符号来代替冰冷的文字，并始终保持耐心和礼貌，即使面对刁难的客户。
rationale: 表情符号可以改变客户对文字的印象，避免情绪传染，并能有效解决问题，因为耐心和礼貌本身就能解决一半的问题。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Customer Service Expressions and Mindset: Use Emojis Instead of Cold Text, Maintain Patience and Politeness
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, especially during pre-sales inquiries.
decision_en: Use emojis at appropriate times to replace cold text, and always maintain patience and politeness, even when dealing with difficult customers.

title: 客户服务常用语：专业表达
scenario: 当客户有疑问、担忧、需要帮助或对产品/服务有不满时。
decision: 使用专业、清晰、安抚和积极的语言与客户沟通，例如承认客户的担忧、提供帮助、解释情况或请求必要信息。
rationale: 通过专业和同理心的表达，可以有效解决客户问题，提升客户满意度，并建立信任。
source_doc: 天猫淘宝客服销售专业话术.doc
title_en: Common Customer Service Phrases: Professional Expressions
scenario_en: When customers have questions, concerns, need help, or are dissatisfied with a product/service.
decision_en: Communicate with customers using professional, clear, reassuring, and positive language, such as acknowledging their concerns, offering help, explaining the situation, or requesting necessary information.

title: 关于价格优惠和包邮的回复策略
scenario: 当顾客询问商品价格是否能优惠或能否包邮时。
decision: 告知顾客本店可以提供优惠和包邮，但需达到一定的消费金额。同时，引导顾客关注本店正在进行的“买就送”活动，并提供相关链接或截图。
rationale: 通过设定消费金额门槛来管理优惠和包邮成本，同时利用当前活动吸引顾客消费，提升转化率。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Reply Strategy for Price Discounts and Free Shipping
scenario_en: When a customer asks if the product price can be discounted or if shipping is free.
decision_en: Inform the customer that our shop can offer discounts and free shipping, but a certain purchase amount must be met. Also, guide the customer to our ongoing 'buy one get one free' activity and provide relevant links or screenshots.

title: 客户询问尺码时的回复指南
scenario: 当客户询问商品尺码时。
decision: 告知客户本店商品为标准尺码，建议按平时穿着尺码购买。同时，可主动询问客户身高体重，提供更个性化的尺码推荐。
rationale: 提供明确的尺码信息，并主动提供个性化帮助，以提升客户满意度和购物体验。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Guidance for Responding to Size Inquiries
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product sizing.
decision_en: Inform the customer that our products are standard sizes and suggest buying their usual size. Additionally, proactively ask for the customer's height and weight to provide more personalized size recommendations.

title: 回答关于商品颜色和款式的问题
scenario: 当顾客询问商品的颜色或款式时。
decision: 客服应使用亲切的称呼，并明确告知顾客商品可用的颜色或款式。
rationale: 提供清晰、友好的信息，以满足顾客的咨询需求。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Answering Questions About Product Colors and Styles
scenario_en: When a customer asks about the color or style of a product.
decision_en: Customer service should use a friendly address and clearly inform the customer of the available colors or styles.

title: 客服快捷回复分类与处理流程
scenario: 客服在与买家沟通时，根据买家咨询的时间点（付款前或付款后）和具体问题，需要提供快速且标准化的回复。
decision: 客服回复分为售前和售后两类，每类包含基础问候、库存咨询、商品推荐、商品信息、议价、发货快递、流程图、其他服务、退换货问题、查件问题、退款处理等具体场景的快捷回复话术和处理流程。
rationale: 通过标准化快捷回复，提高客服效率，确保信息准确性，并统一服务口径，提升客户满意度。
source_doc: 淘宝客服常见问题快捷短语回复.doc
title_en: Customer Service Quick Reply Classification and Processing Flow
scenario_en: When customer service communicates with buyers, they need to provide quick and standardized replies based on the timing of the buyer's inquiry (before or after payment) and the specific question.
decision_en: Customer service replies are divided into pre-sales and after-sales categories. Each category includes quick reply scripts and processing flows for specific scenarios such as basic greetings, inventory inquiries, product recommendations, product information, bargaining, shipping and delivery, flowcharts, other services, return/exchange issues, tracking issues, and refund processing.

title: 处理客户关于商品色差的询问
scenario: 当客户询问商品是否存在色差问题时。
decision: 告知客户所有商品均为实物拍摄，并已尽力确保颜色逼真，但显示器和环境光线等因素可能导致色差，这是网络购物无法避免的问题，请客户谨慎购买。
rationale: 通过解释色差的常见原因（显示器、环境光线），并强调已尽力还原实物颜色，以安抚客户并管理其对网络购物的预期。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Inquiries About Product Color Difference
scenario_en: When a customer asks if there is a color difference in the product.
decision_en: Inform the customer that all products are photographed in kind and every effort has been made to ensure realistic colors, but factors such as monitors and ambient light may cause color differences. This is an unavoidable issue in online shopping, and customers should purchase with caution.

title: 高销量店铺客服标准用语分享：客服用语基本准则
scenario: 客服在与客户沟通时，需要遵循基本的礼仪和态度准则。
decision: 客服应保持礼貌但不过于亲密，为客户着想，对客户使用“您”的称呼。当无法满足客户要求时，第一句话需以“非常抱歉”开头。
rationale: 标准化管理能让员工快速上手，减少错误，并提高工作效率。统一的客服用语能提升客户服务质量和专业性。
source_doc: 高销量店铺客服标准用语分享.docx
title_en: High-Volume Store Customer Service Standard Phrases: Basic Principles
scenario_en: Customer service needs to follow basic etiquette and attitude guidelines when communicating with customers.
decision_en: Customer service should remain polite but not overly familiar, consider the customer's perspective, and use 'you' (您) when addressing customers. When unable to meet a customer's request, the first sentence should begin with 'I am very sorry'.

title: 回答客户关于面料材质的询问
scenario: 当客户询问产品所使用的面料材质时。
decision: 根据面料类型（亚麻或棉），使用预设的话术向客户解释面料的优质性及其带来的成本差异。
rationale: 强调产品面料的优质和纯正，区别于市面上廉价的混纺面料，以此证明产品的高价值和合理定价。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Answering Customer Inquiries About Fabric Material
scenario_en: When a customer asks about the fabric material used in the product.
decision_en: Based on the fabric type (linen or cotton), use a preset script to explain the high quality of the fabric and the resulting cost difference.

title: 回答关于产品细节的询问
scenario: 当客户询问产品细节时，例如缝制工艺。
decision: 客服应提供具体的产品细节信息，并强调产品质量，例如说明每厘米的针数，并保证不会出现脱线、绣珠脱落和短线等质量问题。
rationale: 通过提供具体的细节和质量保证，可以增强客户对产品质量的信任和信心。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Answering Questions About Product Details
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product details, such as the stitching process.
decision_en: Customer service should provide specific product detail information and emphasize product quality, for example, stating the number of stitches per centimeter and guaranteeing no quality issues such as loose threads, detached beads, or short threads.

title: 关于做工的回复
scenario: 当顾客询问产品做工时
decision: 告知顾客产品由自有工厂手工缝制，并经过严格检查。
rationale: 强调产品的独特性、质量控制和匠心，以提升顾客信任和品牌形象。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Reply Regarding Workmanship
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product workmanship.
decision_en: Inform the customer that the product is hand-sewn in our own factory and has undergone strict inspection.

title: 处理客户关于价格差异的询问
scenario: 当客户询问产品价格差异时。
decision: 围绕面料、细节和做工三个方面来解释价格差异。
rationale: 通过具体的产品属性解释价格差异，能提供客户更清晰的理解。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Inquiries on Price Differences
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product price differences.
decision_en: Explain price differences based on fabric, details, and workmanship.

title: 发货问题：承诺48小时内发货，并告知具体发货时间
scenario: 当客户询问发货时间时，或需要告知客户发货承诺时。
decision: 告知客户本店承诺48小时内发货，并说明一般情况下上午订单当天发货，下午订单次日发货。
rationale: 明确发货时间预期，避免客户等待焦虑，提高客户满意度。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Shipping Issue: Promise 48-hour delivery and provide specific times
scenario_en: When a customer asks about shipping time or needs to be informed of the shipping commitment.
decision_en: Inform the customer that the store commits to shipping within 48 hours, and explain that orders placed in the morning are generally shipped the same day, while afternoon orders are shipped the next day.

title: 确认默认快递公司申通
scenario: 当客户询问快递公司或需要确认快递方式时。
decision: 告知客户默认快递公司是申通，并询问客户是否接受。
rationale: 明确告知客户默认快递选项，并征求客户同意，以确保客户满意度并避免后续物流问题。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Confirm Shentong as Default Courier
scenario_en: When a customer asks about the courier company or needs to confirm the shipping method.
decision_en: Inform the customer that the default courier company is Shentong and ask if they accept it.

title: 推广其他商品：确认客户信息后，推荐店内其他商品
scenario: 在与客户确认收货地址和联系信息后，客服人员应主动推广店内其他商品。
decision: 在确认客户信息（如地址和联系方式）后，使用亲切的语言（如“亲，您看小店还有许多漂亮的YY，还有亲中意的吗？”）向客户推荐其他商品。
rationale: 通过在确认客户信息后进行商品推广，可以提高客户的购买意愿和客单价，同时保持友好的沟通氛围。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Promote Other Products: Recommend after confirming customer information
scenario_en: After confirming the customer's shipping address and contact information, customer service should actively promote other products in the store.
decision_en: After confirming customer information (e.g., address and contact details), use friendly language (e.g., "Dear, our store has many other beautiful items, is there anything else you like?") to recommend other products to the customer.

title: 网店客服基本工作流程：产品熟悉、客户接待与订单处理
scenario: 作为网店客服，需要了解并执行日常工作流程，以提升客户满意度和运营效率。
decision: 客服需熟悉产品信息、热情接待客户、核对订单信息、处理货到付款订单、及时发货通知、处理中差评，并学习相关软件。
rationale: 规范的工作流程能确保客户获得优质服务，减少运营失误，提高客户忠诚度，并最终促进销售。
source_doc: 第五篇.网店客服的基本工作流程10条必备.doc
title_en: Online Store Customer Service Workflow: Product Familiarity, Customer Reception, and Order Processing
scenario_en: As an online store customer service representative, you need to understand and execute daily work processes to improve customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
decision_en: Customer service must be familiar with product information, warmly receive customers, verify order information, process cash-on-delivery orders, send timely shipping notifications, handle negative reviews, and learn relevant software.

title: 促成付款、收藏、分享与会员注册的话术
scenario: 当客户在购物流程中，需要引导其完成付款、收藏店铺、分享商品或注册会员时。
decision: 使用预设的话术来引导客户完成付款，鼓励收藏店铺以便接收新品信息，请求客户在收到商品后分享，并提醒客户可以注册会员以享受最新活动和资讯。
rationale: 通过积极引导和提供便利，可以提高转化率、增加客户粘性、扩大品牌影响力并促进复购。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Scripts for Encouraging Payment, Collection, Sharing, and Membership Registration
scenario_en: When a customer is in the shopping process and needs to be guided to complete payment, collect the store, share products, or register as a member.
decision_en: Use preset scripts to guide customers to complete payment, encourage collecting the store to receive new product information, ask customers to share after receiving products, and remind customers they can register as members to enjoy the latest activities and information.

title: 客户服务核心理念：创造价值与正面关键时刻
scenario: 在任何与客户的互动中，客户服务人员面临的挑战是尽可能为客户创造最多的价值。
decision: 目标是达成正面的关键时刻，即通过服务给客户留下持续的正面印象。
rationale: 客户服务是公司策略的核心，旨在吸引和留住客户。糟糕的服务是客户流失的主要原因，而优质服务能带来长期利润增长和口碑传播。
source_doc: 第十一篇：不能遗忘的电商客服管理手册 .doc
title_en: Customer Service Core Concept: Value Creation and Positive Moments of Truth
scenario_en: In any customer interaction, the challenge for customer service personnel is to create as much value as possible for the customer.
decision_en: The goal is to achieve positive moments of truth, which means leaving a lasting positive impression on the customer through service.

title: 旺旺群发活动通知：区分会员与非会员
scenario: 当需要通过旺旺群发通知客户关于XX活动时。
decision: 对于会员，群发消息应强调“针对会员还有更大回馈”；对于非会员，群发消息应提及“同时还有小礼品赠送”。
rationale: 通过区分会员和非会员的群发内容，可以更好地针对不同客户群体进行营销，提升会员的忠诚度，并吸引非会员参与活动。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Wangwang Group Message for Event Notifications: Differentiate Members and Non-members
scenario_en: When needing to send a group message via Wangwang to notify customers about an event.
decision_en: For members, the group message should emphasize "even greater rewards for members"; for non-members, the group message should mention "small gifts also included."

title: 电话礼仪：声音运用与通话行为规范
scenario: 与顾客进行电话沟通时
decision: 在电话沟通中，客服人员应注意声音的运用（声调、音量、语气、语速）和通话行为规范，包括保持微笑、话音清晰、耐心诚恳、不推诿、不使用忌语、不随意提供客户资料、不隐瞒差错、及时解决问题并负责任，同时具备专业知识和解决问题的能力。
rationale: 正确使用恰当的措辞和良好的电话礼仪能够提高客户满意度，形成良好口碑，增强公司在电子商务行业的美誉度。
source_doc: 第十一篇：不能遗忘的电商客服管理手册 .doc
title_en: Telephone Etiquette: Voice Usage and Call Behavior Standards
scenario_en: When communicating with customers by phone.
decision_en: During phone communication, customer service personnel should pay attention to voice usage (tone, volume, intonation, speed) and call behavior standards, including maintaining a smile, speaking clearly, being patient and sincere, not shirking responsibility, not using taboo language, not arbitrarily providing customer data, not concealing errors, promptly resolving problems and taking responsibility, while also possessing professional knowledge and problem-solving abilities.

title: 淘宝网店售前客服沟通的七个步骤（七步诗）
scenario: 当淘宝网店的售前客服与顾客进行沟通时。
decision: 客服应遵循“七步诗”沟通流程：招呼、询问推荐、议价、核实、道别、跟进。每个步骤都有具体的操作指导，旨在提升客户体验和成交率。
rationale: 通过标准化的沟通流程，可以提高客服的服务质量，塑造店铺的品牌形象，增加成交量，并培养忠实顾客，从而提升店铺的整体运营效率和客户满意度。
source_doc: 第四篇.淘宝网店售前客服沟通的七个步骤，简称“七步诗.doc
title_en: Taobao Store Pre-sales Customer Service Communication: Seven Steps
scenario_en: When a Taobao store's pre-sales customer service communicates with a customer.
decision_en: Customer service should follow the "Seven-Step Poem" communication process: greeting, inquiry/recommendation, bargaining, verification, farewell, and follow-up. Each step has specific operational guidelines aimed at improving customer experience and conversion rates.

title: 会员短信营销策略：活动、生日和节日祝福
scenario: 当需要向会员发送营销短信时，包括会员活动通知、生日祝福和节日祝福。
decision: 根据不同的场景，发送定制化的短信内容。活动短信应突出回馈和让利，引导会员登录；生日短信应包含祝福语和专属优惠（如包邮、让利），鼓励会员选购；节日短信则应包含祝福语和节日活动信息，引导会员参与。
rationale: 通过个性化的短信营销，增强会员的归属感和忠诚度，刺激消费，提升销售额。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: Member SMS Marketing Strategy: Events, Birthdays, and Holiday Greetings
scenario_en: When needing to send marketing SMS messages to members, including member event notifications, birthday wishes, and holiday greetings.
decision_en: Send customized SMS content based on different scenarios. Event SMS should highlight rewards and discounts, guiding members to log in; birthday SMS should include greetings and exclusive offers (e.g., free shipping, discounts), encouraging members to shop; holiday SMS should include greetings and holiday event information, guiding members to participate.

title: 高端会员生日祝福与优惠
scenario: 当高端会员生日时，客服需要进行生日祝福并告知专属优惠。
decision: 客服应主动联系高端会员，称呼其姓名，代表见喜服饰送上生日祝福，并告知其在3天内购物可享受包邮、大幅度让利等优惠活动。同时询问其对见喜售后是否满意。
rationale: 通过个性化的生日祝福和专属优惠，增强高端会员的归属感和忠诚度，促进再次消费，并借机了解客户对售后服务的满意度。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: High-End Member Birthday Wishes and Offers
scenario_en: When it's a high-end member's birthday, customer service needs to send birthday wishes and inform them of exclusive offers.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact high-end members, address them by name, send birthday wishes on behalf of JX Apparel, and inform them that they can enjoy free shipping, significant discounts, and other promotional activities if they shop within 3 days. Also, ask about their satisfaction with JX after-sales service.

title: 客服服务准则：顾客至上与全面妥协
scenario: 在与顾客进行沟通和提供服务时，尤其是在处理顾客问题和不合理要求时。
decision: 将顾客视为上帝，秉持“顾客至上”和“全面妥协”的原则。所有服务都应以顾客满意为目标，并对不合理要求学会谅解。
rationale: 良好的客服体验是顾客回头的关键，能带来无尽的财富。通过适应顾客而非让顾客适应我们，可以建立信任和诚信。
source_doc: 第十五篇：做客服没有那么简单.doc
title_en: Customer Service Guidelines: Customer First and Full Compromise
scenario_en: When communicating with customers and providing service, especially when dealing with customer issues and unreasonable requests.
decision_en: Treat customers as paramount, adhering to the principles of "customer first" and "full compromise." All services should aim for customer satisfaction, and learn to understand unreasonable requests.

title: 客服沟通技巧与不足分析
scenario: 客服与顾客的对话结束后，对客服的表现进行复盘和分析。
decision: 客服应提升沟通的委婉度、主动性，并关注细节，进行关联销售引导，同时确保对店铺活动和发货时效有明确认知。
rationale: 提升顾客满意度，避免售后问题，增加店铺关注度和销售额。
source_doc: 第十五篇：做客服没有那么简单.doc
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skills and Deficiencies Analysis
scenario_en: After a customer service conversation, review and analyze the customer service representative's performance.
decision_en: Customer service should improve the subtlety and proactiveness of communication, pay attention to details, guide associated sales, and ensure a clear understanding of store activities and shipping timeliness.

title: 如何说服顽固拒绝他人的人
scenario: 当客户顽固拒绝被说服，并表现出僵硬的表情和姿势时。
decision: 首先寻找与对方一致的地方，让对方赞同远离主题的意见，引起其兴趣，然后逐步引入你的主意，最终获得对方的同意。
rationale: 顽固拒绝者常处于“不”的心理状态，直接提问无法打破这种心理。通过先建立共识和兴趣，可以软化其立场。
source_doc: 客服常用话术 精髓解析.doc
title_en: How to Persuade Stubborn Refusers
scenario_en: When a customer stubbornly refuses to be persuaded and exhibits rigid expressions and postures.
decision_en: First, find common ground with the other party, get them to agree on opinions unrelated to the main topic, pique their interest, then gradually introduce your idea, and finally gain their agreement.

title: 客服新人培训流程与考核标准
scenario: 新入职客服人员的培训安排和考核。
decision: 培训周期为一个月，分为四个阶段：熟悉产品（生产线、仓库）、学习打包、上机实战。培训内容包括产品理论知识和服务技能。培训结束后进行综合测试，打字速度不达标者需加班练习，不符合要求者考虑转岗或淘汰。
rationale: 旨在帮助新人快速上手工作，同时作为试用期筛选不符合公司发展的员工，并确保客服具备以客户为中心的服务理念和应对实际问题的能力。
source_doc: 第六篇..淘宝网店客服培训流程安排.doc
title_en: New Customer Service Training Process and Assessment Standards
scenario_en: Training arrangements and assessment for newly hired customer service personnel.
decision_en: The training period is one month, divided into four stages: familiarization with products (production line, warehouse), learning packing, and on-machine practice. Training content includes product theoretical knowledge and service skills. A comprehensive test is conducted after training; those who do not meet typing speed standards must practice overtime, and those who do not meet requirements will be considered for reassignment or elimination.

title: 客服选拔与培训：打造以客户为中心的精英团队
scenario: 在客服团队的选拔、培训和日常管理中，旨在建立一支以客户为中心、具备高服务质量的团队。
decision: 选拔爱笑、耐心、声音甜美、百问不烦的客服；通过反复提问考察耐心和应变能力；培训产品知识和鼻炎知识，并鼓励试用产品；每周总结最新问题和话术；奖励真正站在顾客角度考虑问题的客服。
rationale: 通过严格的选拔和持续的培训，确保客服具备良好的服务素质和专业知识。奖励以客户为中心的服务行为，能激励客服主动为顾客着想，提升顾客体验和忠诚度，最终带来更高的效益和品牌口碑。
source_doc: 第十八篇：帮你打造一个精英客服.doc
title_en: Customer Service Selection and Training: Building a Customer-Centric Elite Team
scenario_en: In the selection, training, and daily management of the customer service team, aiming to build a customer-centric team with high service quality.
decision_en: Select customer service representatives who are cheerful, patient, have pleasant voices, and are unfazed by numerous questions; assess patience and adaptability through repeated questioning; train on product knowledge and rhinitis knowledge, and encourage product trials; summarize the latest issues and scripts weekly; reward customer service representatives who truly consider issues from the customer's perspective.

title: 淘宝网购物流程：账户注册、搜索、下单与付款方式详解
scenario: 用户希望了解如何在淘宝网进行购物，包括账户注册、商品搜索、下单以及多种付款方式。
decision: 提供详细的淘宝网和支付宝账户注册步骤，指导用户如何搜索商品、加入购物车或立即购买，并详细说明支付宝余额、储蓄卡、信用卡及找人代付等多种付款方式的操作流程。
rationale: 本指南旨在帮助新用户熟悉淘宝网的购物流程，确保他们能够顺利完成从注册到付款的整个购物体验。
title_en: Taobao Shopping Process: Account Registration, Search, Order Placement, and Payment Methods Explained
scenario_en: Users want to understand how to shop on Taobao, including account registration, product search, order placement, and various payment methods.
decision_en: Provide detailed steps for Taobao and Alipay account registration, guide users on how to search for products, add to cart or buy now, and explain the operation procedures for various payment methods such as Alipay balance, debit cards, credit cards, and paying on behalf of someone.

title: 处理刁蛮顾客和危机的培训：心态、策略与流程优化
scenario: 客服在处理售后问题、中差评等刁蛮顾客或危机情况时。
decision: 客服应端正心态，将危机视为机会，将刁蛮顾客视为有趣人物。面对中差评，先解决问题，若遇职业差评师则毫不留情，并利用解释窗口展示自身。同时，重视顾客情绪和不满，找出问题并及时改进，必要时通过赠送小礼品等方式平息怒火并优化流程。
rationale: 积极的心态能帮助客服更好地应对挑战，提升处理危机的能力。将中差评解释视为一次重要的沟通机会，可以向其他买家展示自身。理解顾客情绪并优化流程，能提升顾客满意度，甚至通过小成本投入带来长期价值。
source_doc: 第十八篇：帮你打造一个精英客服.doc
title_en: Training for Handling Difficult Customers and Crises: Mindset, Strategy, and Process Optimization
scenario_en: Customer service dealing with difficult customers or crisis situations such as after-sales issues and negative reviews.
decision_en: Customer service should adopt a positive mindset, view crises as opportunities, and difficult customers as interesting individuals. For negative reviews, resolve the issue first; if encountering professional negative reviewers, be uncompromising and use the explanation window to showcase oneself. Simultaneously, value customer emotions and dissatisfaction, identify problems and make timely improvements, and if necessary, appease anger through small gifts and optimize processes.

title: 代付操作流程及退款流程概述
scenario: 用户需要了解如何进行代付操作或查询退款流程。
decision: 提供详细的代付操作步骤，包括指定人代付和任何人代付两种方式，并概述不同场景下的买家退款流程。
rationale: 确保用户能够顺利完成支付和退款操作，提高用户体验。
title_en: Overview of Pay-on-Behalf Operation and Refund Process
scenario_en: Users need to understand how to perform pay-on-behalf operations or inquire about the refund process.
decision_en: Provide detailed steps for pay-on-behalf operations, including designated person payment and anyone payment methods, and outline the buyer refund process for different scenarios.

title: 客服接待流失案例分析及推荐话术
scenario: 客服在与客户交流过程中出现各种问题，导致客户流失或体验不佳。
decision: 通过分析具体案例，提供推荐话术核心和示例，指导客服如何更有效地与客户沟通，避免流失。
rationale: 有效的沟通和积极的服务态度能够提升客户满意度，增加成交可能性，并维护店铺信誉。
source_doc: 第十七篇：如何避免客服接待流失之案例分析.doc
title_en: Customer Service Attrition Case Analysis and Recommended Scripts
scenario_en: Customer service encounters various issues during interactions with customers, leading to customer attrition or poor experience.
decision_en: Analyze specific cases and provide core recommended scripts and examples to guide customer service on how to communicate more effectively with customers and prevent attrition.

title: 客服语言规范准则：最高标准与原则
scenario: 所有与顾客互动的客服场景
decision: 客服人员应以“听得到的微笑”和“看得到的微笑”为最高标准，并遵循“让顾客舒服、放心”的最高原则进行沟通。
rationale: 这些是指导所有客服互动的核心理念，旨在确保顾客获得积极、愉快的体验。
source_doc: 第一篇.客服语言规范准则 .doc
title_en: Customer Service Language Standards: Highest Principles
scenario_en: All customer service scenarios involving customer interaction.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should communicate with the highest standard of 'audible smile' and 'visible smile,' adhering to the supreme principle of 'making customers feel comfortable and reassured.'

title: 网络交易平台SEO与优化整治：商品关键字优化策略
scenario: 在网络交易平台（如淘宝）上提高商品曝光率和成交量时。
decision: 通过SEO优化商品关键字，并结合消费者心理需求优化商品描述文案，以实现长期健康发展。
rationale: 消费者主要通过搜索商品关键字进行购买，且过度依赖广告投入不利于企业长期发展。优化关键字和商品描述能有效提高搜索排名和转化率，建立消费者信任。
source_doc: 分享二：运营总监不肯透露的密码.doc
title_en: E-commerce Platform SEO and Optimization: Product Keyword Strategy
scenario_en: When increasing product exposure and sales on e-commerce platforms (e.g., Taobao).
decision_en: Optimize product keywords through SEO and enhance product description copy based on consumer psychological needs to achieve long-term healthy development.

title: 客服如何通过客户关系管理和心理分析提升转化率和客单价
scenario: 客服在日常工作中，希望提升个人绩效和为企业创造更大价值时。
decision: 客服应专注于建立和管理老客户群（CRM），深入分析买家心理，并运用销售技巧（如锚定效应、限制选择）来提高转化率和客单价，而非仅仅追求响应速度等KPI。
rationale: 老客户贡献的订单支付率和客单价更高，且通过有效的心理分析和销售策略，可以最大化单位时间内的客户价值，从而为企业带来更大的销售额和利润。
source_doc: 第十篇..一个年薪20万客服的思考-我如何能不一样 .doc
title_en: How Customer Service Can Improve Conversion Rate and Average Order Value Through CRM and Psychological Analysis
scenario_en: When customer service wants to improve personal performance and create greater value for the company in their daily work.
decision_en: Customer service should focus on building and managing a loyal customer base (CRM), deeply analyzing buyer psychology, and using sales techniques (e.g., anchoring effect, limited choice) to increase conversion rates and average order value, rather than just pursuing KPIs like response speed.

title: 商品描述优化：用户反馈、商品特性、亲情策略与相关营销商品展示
scenario: 在撰写或优化商品描述时，旨在提高消费者兴趣和转化率。
decision: 在商品描述中展示用户反馈（如评价截图），结合文字和图片详细描述商品特性，运用轻松关怀的“亲情策略”拉近与消费者距离，并在描述末尾展示相关营销商品以增加曝光率。
rationale: 用户反馈能增强消费者信任；图文结合的商品特性描述能缓解审美疲劳并提供全面信息；亲情策略能建立情感连接；展示相关商品能利用现有流量，提高店铺整体转化率。
source_doc: 分享二：运营总监不肯透露的密码.doc
title_en: Product Description Optimization: User Feedback, Product Features, Affinity Strategy, and Related Marketing Product Display
scenario_en: When writing or optimizing product descriptions, aiming to increase consumer interest and conversion rates.
decision_en: Display user feedback (e.g., review screenshots) in the product description, detail product features with text and images, use a relaxed and caring 'affinity strategy' to connect with consumers, and display related marketing products at the end of the description to increase exposure.

title: 通过CRM建立客户忠诚度与个人品牌
scenario: 客服希望通过与客户建立深厚关系来提升复购率和销售额，并打造个人品牌。
decision: 投入时间与客户进行个性化沟通，建立VIP群，并提供专属特权（如优先知情权、新品体验、更低包邮门槛、VIP售后、加急发货等）。同时，通过识别并培养群内的“联系员”和“推销员”作为管理员，维护群活跃度。此外，可尝试手写信件等复古微创新方式，在重要节日寄送给老客户，以表达真诚和情感。
rationale: 通过深入的情感沟通和提供专属价值，可以建立客户对客服个人的信任和忠诚度，促使客户重复购买并推荐，从而提升销售业绩，并将客服从单纯的销售角色转变为具有销售性质的个人品牌自媒体。手写信件等方式能体现真心实意，与批量打印的信件形成差异化，增强客户感动和归属感。
source_doc: 第十篇..一个年薪20万客服的思考-我如何能不一样 .doc
title_en: Building Customer Loyalty and Personal Brand Through CRM
scenario_en: Customer service hopes to build deep relationships with customers to increase repurchase rates and sales, and to build a personal brand.
decision_en: Invest time in personalized communication with customers, establish VIP groups, and offer exclusive privileges (e.g., priority information, new product trials, lower free shipping thresholds, VIP after-sales, expedited shipping). Simultaneously, identify and cultivate 'connectors' and 'promoters' within the group as administrators to maintain group activity. Additionally, consider retro micro-innovations like handwritten letters sent to loyal customers on important holidays to express sincerity and emotion.

title: 商城内部搜索类目优化策略
scenario: 当商城需要优化内部搜索功能以提升用户体验和销售效率时。
decision: 商城应根据商品特性和消费者需求，优化内部搜索类目，包括“最新上架”、“礼物专区”、“闪电发货”、“年底清仓”、“商品用途”和“品牌导航”等，并进行内部搜索引擎优化。
rationale: 通过细化搜索类目和优化搜索引擎，可以帮助消费者更高效、准确地找到所需商品，减轻售前导购工作量，提高购物体验满意度，并促进商品销售和资金周转。
source_doc: 分享二：运营总监不肯透露的密码.doc
title_en: Mall Internal Search Category Optimization Strategy
scenario_en: When a mall needs to optimize its internal search function to improve user experience and sales efficiency.
decision_en: The mall should optimize internal search categories based on product characteristics and consumer needs, including 'Newly Listed,' 'Gift Zone,' 'Express Shipping,' 'Year-End Clearance,' 'Product Usage,' and 'Brand Navigation,' and perform internal search engine optimization.

title: 处理客户服务讨论中的负面情绪与视野狭窄
scenario: 当客服人员在内部讨论中遇到带有负面情绪、攻击性言论或对行业缺乏了解的同事时。
decision: 保持冷静，将攻击性言论视为“笑谈”，并尝试引导对方关注事物的本质，避免人身攻击，同时指出对方可能存在的视野局限性。
rationale: 负面情绪和视野狭窄会阻碍有效沟通和问题解决。通过保持冷静和引导讨论，可以避免冲突升级，并促使对方反思。
source_doc: 第十篇..一个年薪20万客服的思考-我如何能不一样 .doc
title_en: Handling Negative Emotions and Narrow Perspectives in Customer Service Discussions
scenario_en: When customer service personnel encounter colleagues with negative emotions, aggressive remarks, or a lack of industry understanding in internal discussions.
decision_en: Stay calm, treat aggressive remarks as 'jokes,' and try to guide the other party to focus on the essence of the matter, avoid personal attacks, and point out their potential limited perspective.

title: 直通车推广策略与效果分析
scenario: 当使用淘宝直通车推广商品时。
decision: 根据市场反馈、直通车关键词报表排名和关键词优化工具选择商品和关键词，并决定竞价层次。每日分析点击效果趋势图和报表，若浏览量、收藏指数和成交指数效果良好且隔日有提升，则保持或加大推广力度；若平均点击效果无提升，则减轻推广力度并分析问题，避免盲目耗资。
rationale: 直通车是淘宝商家引进流量的主要推广工具，通过数据分析可以优化推广策略，提高推广效果，避免不必要的推广成本。
source_doc: 分享二：运营总监不肯透露的密码.doc
title_en: Taobao Express Promotion Strategy and Effect Analysis
scenario_en: When using Taobao Express to promote products.
decision_en: Select products and keywords based on market feedback, Taobao Express keyword report rankings, and keyword optimization tools, then determine bidding levels. Daily analyze click effect trend charts and reports; if page views, collection index, and transaction index show good results and improve the next day, maintain or increase promotion efforts. If average click effect does not improve, reduce promotion efforts and analyze the problem to avoid blind spending.

title: 天天特价活动商品选择策略
scenario: 当需要通过“天天特价”活动推广商品时。
decision: 选择节日属性强、囤货量大且短期内难以售罄的商品，以接近成本价进行销售，而非推广新商品。
rationale: “天天特价”旨在提供高性价比商品，与酷奇奇高贵精美的品牌形象不符，不适合推广新商品。通过清理库存商品可避免折旧费，增加信誉度，加快资金周转，并吸引新顾客。
source_doc: 分享二：运营总监不肯透露的密码.doc
title_en: Daily Special Offer Activity Product Selection Strategy
scenario_en: When needing to promote products through the 'Daily Special Offer' activity.
decision_en: Select products with strong holiday attributes, large stock, and unlikely to sell out quickly, selling them at near cost price, rather than promoting new products.

title: 网络设备知识普及：IP地址的分类与作用
scenario: 客户需要了解IP地址的基本概念、分类及其在网络中的作用。
decision: IP地址是每台计算机在互联网中的唯一标识，类似于门牌号。它分为A、B、C、D、E五类，其中A、B、C类是主要类型，D类用于多点传送，E类用于扩展备用地址。
rationale: IP地址是网络通信的基础，理解其分类有助于理解网络规模和数据传输机制。
source_doc: 公司主要产品知识普及 .doc
title_en: Network Device Knowledge: IP Address Classification and Function
scenario_en: Customers need to understand the basic concepts, classification, and function of IP addresses in a network.
decision_en: An IP address is the unique identifier for each computer on the internet, similar to a house number. It is divided into five classes: A, B, C, D, and E. A, B, and C are the main types, D is for multicast, and E is for extended reserved addresses.

title: 售前客服工作流程图
scenario: This entry describes the overall workflow for pre-sales customer service.
decision: Refer to the provided flowchart for the detailed steps and processes involved in pre-sales customer service operations.
rationale: A visual workflow diagram helps in understanding and following the standard operating procedures for pre-sales customer service efficiently.
source_doc: 第十四篇：售前客服工作流程图.doc
title_en: Pre-sales Customer Service Workflow
scenario_en: This entry describes the overall workflow for pre-sales customer service.
decision_en: Refer to the provided flowchart for the detailed steps and processes involved in pre-sales customer service operations.

title: 无线路由器辐射与人体健康及信号增强方法
scenario: 客户询问无线路由器辐射问题、辐射对人体健康的影响以及如何改善无线信号。
decision: 家用无线路由器发射功率远低于手机，辐射微乎其微，目前无医学研究证明有害。加大天线增益不增加发射功率。改善信号可通过调整位置、选择合适天线或增加AP。
rationale: 电磁辐射需达到一定数值才构成污染，小量辐射人体可自行调节。天线增益仅提高传输效率。通过多种方法可有效改善无线信号覆盖。
source_doc: 公司主要产品知识普及 .doc
title_en: Wireless Router Radiation, Human Health, and Signal Enhancement Methods
scenario_en: Customers inquire about wireless router radiation, its impact on human health, and how to improve wireless signals.
decision_en: Household wireless routers emit far less power than mobile phones, and their radiation is negligible; currently, no medical research proves harm. Increasing antenna gain does not increase transmit power. Signal improvement can be achieved by adjusting placement, selecting appropriate antennas, or adding APs.

title: 客服绩效指标设计原则：因果关系、考核成本、可执行性、权重与可调节性
scenario: 在设计客服绩效考核指标时，需要遵循一系列原则以确保其有效性和公平性。
decision: 设计绩效指标时，应注重指标与结果的因果关系，评估考核成本，确保指标可执行，并为不同岗位和指标设定权重，同时赋予主管一定的调节权力。
rationale: 有效的绩效指标能够激励员工，引导其行为与公司战略保持一致，避免资源浪费和管理漏洞，并促进公平性。
source_doc: 第九篇..手把手教你，提高客服绩效.doc
title_en: Customer Service Performance Indicator Design Principles: Causality, Assessment Cost, Feasibility, Weight, and Adjustability
scenario_en: When designing customer service performance indicators, a series of principles must be followed to ensure their effectiveness and fairness.
decision_en: When designing performance indicators, focus on the causal relationship between indicators and results, evaluate assessment costs, ensure indicators are executable, set weights for different positions and indicators, and grant supervisors some adjustment authority.

title: 天线接口类型与信号增益
scenario: 当客户需要了解天线类型、信号增益或接口匹配问题时。
decision: 天线增益值越大，信号强度越好。天线接口主要有SMA和TNC两种。SMA接口常见于NetGear、D-LINK、TP-LINK等品牌设备，特征为内部螺纹、针式接头。TNC接口较粗，常见于CISCO、LINKSYS等品牌设备，特征为针式接头，外部与内部触点间有金属屏蔽层。如果接口不匹配，可使用转接头或转接线连接。
rationale: 提供关于天线信号增强原理和接口兼容性的基础知识，以便客户选择合适的天线或解决连接问题。
source_doc: 公司主要产品知识普及 .doc
title_en: Antenna Interface Types and Signal Gain
scenario_en: When customers need to understand antenna types, signal gain, or interface matching issues.
decision_en: The higher the antenna gain value, the better the signal strength. Antenna interfaces are mainly SMA and TNC. SMA interfaces are common on brands like NetGear, D-LINK, TP-LINK, featuring internal threads and pin connectors. TNC interfaces are thicker, common on brands like CISCO, LINKSYS, featuring pin connectors with a metal shield between the outer and inner contacts. If interfaces don't match, use an adapter or adapter cable.

title: 无线产品导购咨询：路由器、网卡、天线和AP的选择
scenario: 当顾客需要购买无线网络产品并进行咨询时。
decision: 客服人员需要了解顾客的具体需求，包括共享电脑数量、速度要求、设备类型和使用环境，然后根据这些信息推荐合适的路由器、网卡、天线或AP产品。
rationale: 通过了解顾客的详细需求，可以提供更精准的产品推荐，确保产品满足顾客的使用场景和性能期望，从而提高顾客满意度。
source_doc: 公司主要产品知识普及 .doc
title_en: Wireless Product Shopping Guide: Router, Network Card, Antenna, and AP Selection
scenario_en: When customers need to purchase wireless network products and seek advice.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to understand the customer's specific needs, including the number of computers to share, speed requirements, device types, and usage environment, then recommend suitable routers, network cards, antennas, or AP products based on this information.

title: 客服工作制度：日常行为规范与客户服务标准
scenario: 客服人员在日常工作中，包括上下班、客户沟通、处理评价、议价、维护公司利益以及使用工作工具等场景。
decision: 客服人员需严格遵守作息时间，及时报到；对客户热情友好，及时回复，并尝试多说一句话；积极处理中差评，争取好评；客户议价时需进行两轮以上劝导；维护公司利益，禁止发送其他店铺或银行信息；禁止代岗；下班前需完成客户接待；仅限修改邮费和价格，工作交流使用本店旺旺。
rationale: 规范客服行为，提升客户服务质量，维护公司品牌形象和利益，确保工作效率和信息安全。
source_doc: 第十二篇：客服工作制度及工资计算标准.doc
title_en: Customer Service Work System: Daily Conduct Norms and Customer Service Standards
scenario_en: Customer service personnel in daily work, including attendance, customer communication, handling reviews, bargaining, protecting company interests, and using work tools.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must strictly adhere to work schedules and report on time; be enthusiastic and friendly to customers, respond promptly, and try to add an extra sentence; actively address negative reviews and strive for positive ones; engage in at least two rounds of persuasion when customers bargain; protect company interests, prohibit sending other store or bank information; prohibit proxy attendance; complete customer reception before clocking out; only modify postage and price, use the store's Wangwang for work communication.

title: 金门菜刀产品特点与优势
scenario: 当客户询问金门菜刀的特点、优势或制作工艺时。
decision: 向客户强调金门菜刀的锋利、不生锈、耐用性以及不同刀柄的独特优点。
rationale: 突出产品核心卖点，增强客户对产品质量和价值的认知，促进购买意愿。
source_doc: 公司主要产品知识普及 .doc
title_en: Kinmen Cleaver Product Features and Advantages
scenario_en: When customers inquire about the features, advantages, or manufacturing process of Kinmen cleavers.
decision_en: Emphasize to customers the sharpness, rust-resistance, durability, and unique advantages of different handles of Kinmen cleavers.

title: 淘宝宝贝标题优化技巧：关键词搜索规律与长尾关键词应用
scenario: 当卖家希望优化淘宝店铺的宝贝标题以提高搜索流量和转化率时。
decision: 卖家应深入理解淘宝搜索的“紧密排列搜索规律”和“顺序无关搜索规律”，并利用长尾关键词策略来优化标题，同时注意标题字节限制和视觉可读性。
rationale: 理解淘宝搜索规律能确保宝贝被买家有效搜索到，长尾关键词能提高转化率并避免激烈竞争，而标题长度和可读性则影响用户体验和关键词覆盖。
source_doc: 分享一：打造爆款的几大技巧.doc
title_en: Taobao Product Title Optimization Tips: Keyword Search Rules and Long-Tail Keyword Application
scenario_en: When sellers want to optimize Taobao store product titles to increase search traffic and conversion rates.
decision_en: Sellers should deeply understand Taobao search's 'tight arrangement search rule' and 'order-independent search rule,' and utilize a long-tail keyword strategy to optimize titles, while also paying attention to title character limits and visual readability.

title: 淘宝宝贝标题关键词优化策略
scenario: 当需要优化淘宝店铺宝贝标题以提升搜索排名时。
decision: 收集关键词，并在淘宝首页搜索验证，分析排名前十宝贝的标题规律。根据宝贝是新品还是人气产品，分别侧重利用“剩余时间”和“橱窗推荐”或结合“人气搜索结果”进行优化。新品标题优化周期为7天，需每日查看和记录关键词效果。
rationale: 准确的关键词组合能充分利用淘宝搜索引擎，提升宝贝曝光。理解不同搜索结果的排名规律，并针对新品和人气产品采取不同的优化策略，能更好地利用搜索引擎带来的流量。标题优化是最基础、最经济且效果显著的网店推广方式。
source_doc: 分享一：打造爆款的几大技巧.doc
title_en: Taobao Product Title Keyword Optimization Strategy
scenario_en: When needing to optimize Taobao store product titles to improve search ranking.
decision_en: Collect keywords, verify them by searching on the Taobao homepage, and analyze the title patterns of the top ten ranked products. Depending on whether the product is new or popular, focus on 'remaining time' and 'showcase recommendation' or combine with 'popular search results' for optimization. The title optimization cycle for new products is 7 days, requiring daily monitoring and recording of keyword effectiveness.

title: 客服技巧：帮助客户选择、应对讨价还价、辨别真伪、评估产品效果及连带销售
scenario: 本文件提供了淘宝商城客服在日常销售中可能遇到的多种场景及应对策略。
decision: 客服应掌握帮助客户选择产品、处理讨价还价、证明产品真伪、客观评估产品效果以及进行连带销售的技巧。
rationale: 通过专业的客服技巧，可以提升客户满意度，促成交易，并增加销售额。
source_doc: 第七篇..解密！淘宝商城客服技巧精华.doc
title_en: Customer Service Skills: Helping Customers Choose, Handling Bargaining, Authenticating Products, Evaluating Product Effectiveness, and Cross-selling
scenario_en: This document provides various scenarios and response strategies that Taobao Mall customer service may encounter in daily sales.
decision_en: Customer service should master the skills of helping customers choose products, handling bargaining, authenticating products, objectively evaluating product effectiveness, and performing cross-selling.

title: 物流政策与快递选择指南
scenario: 客户购买产品后，需要了解物流配送、快递选择、运费计算及派送时效。
decision: 客服人员需熟练掌握不同快递公司的优缺点、服务区域、运费标准和派送时效，以便为客户提供准确信息并协助选择合适的快递服务。在客户无特定要求时，由仓储部决定快递公司；若客户有指定要求，客服需确认快递可达性并备注。
rationale: 确保产品能高效、准确地送达客户手中，同时提升客户满意度，避免因物流问题影响公司信誉。
title_en: Logistics Policy and Courier Selection Guide
scenario_en: After purchasing a product, customers need to understand logistics distribution, courier selection, shipping cost calculation, and delivery times.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must be proficient in the advantages and disadvantages, service areas, shipping standards, and delivery times of different courier companies to provide accurate information and assist customers in choosing suitable courier services. If the customer has no specific requirements, the warehouse department will decide the courier company; if the customer has a specific request, customer service needs to confirm courier availability and make a note.

title: 处理顾客关于发货时间的询问
scenario: 当顾客付款后询问订单是否发货或为何未发货时。
decision: 首先，在顾客付款后明确告知物流发货的具体时间。如果顾客查询物流时，已发货则提供物流信息；未发货则找出具体原因，正面回答，并真诚道歉，以提升客户体验。
rationale: 顾客普遍关心发货速度，及时且透明的沟通能有效管理顾客期望，避免不满，并提升整体客户体验。
source_doc: 第七篇..解密！淘宝商城客服技巧精华.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Inquiries About Shipping Time
scenario_en: When a customer asks if an order has shipped or why it hasn't shipped after payment.
decision_en: First, clearly inform the customer of the specific logistics shipping time after payment. If the customer inquires about logistics and the item has shipped, provide tracking information; if not, find the specific reason, respond directly, and sincerely apologize to enhance customer experience.

title: 淘宝商城售前客服主动营销话术：缺货与咨询场景下的沟通策略
scenario: 当客户咨询缺货商品或无明确购买意向时，客服需要进行主动营销。
decision: 客服应避免使用机械的快捷回复，而是通过提问了解客户深层需求，并基于此推荐替代商品或新款，强调产品优势和售后保障，以“傻傻惹人爱”的真诚态度与客户沟通。
rationale: 客户更喜欢真诚、个性化的沟通，而非标准化的自动回复。通过深入了解客户需求并提供有针对性的建议，可以提升客户体验和满意度，从而促进销售。淘宝规则也日益重视客户体验和产品评价。
source_doc: 第八篇..淘宝商城售前客服主动营销话术   客服技巧干货5条.doc
title_en: Taobao Mall Pre-sales Customer Service Proactive Marketing Script: Communication Strategies for Out-of-Stock and Inquiry Scenarios
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about an out-of-stock item or has no clear purchase intent, customer service needs to engage in proactive marketing.
decision_en: Customer service should avoid using mechanical quick replies. Instead, they should ask questions to understand the customer's deeper needs, then recommend alternative or new products based on this, emphasizing product advantages and after-sales guarantees, and communicate with customers with a 'sincerely endearing' attitude.

title: 客服的三重境界：从基础接待到战略性客户洞察
scenario: 客服人员在日常工作中，面对客户服务和公司运营的不同阶段和挑战时。
decision: 客服工作应从基础的客户接待和顺利成交，逐步提升到理解客户特质、灵活解决问题并维护公司形象，最终达到通过数据分析和客户洞察为公司战略提供建议的境界。
rationale: 通过分层级的境界描述，旨在指导客服人员提升专业能力，不仅满足客户需求，更能为公司创造长期价值，并促进跨部门协作。
source_doc: 第三篇..浅谈客服的三重境界.doc
title_en: Three Levels of Customer Service: From Basic Reception to Strategic Customer Insight
scenario_en: Customer service personnel face different stages and challenges in customer service and company operations in their daily work.
decision_en: Customer service work should progress from basic customer reception and successful transactions to understanding customer characteristics, flexibly solving problems, and maintaining the company's image, ultimately reaching the level of providing strategic advice to the company through data analysis and customer insight.

title: 客服工作的重要性及核心原则
scenario: 在网店运营中，客服是影响业绩的关键因素。
decision: 客服人员应秉持真诚、积极的心态，用心服务，善于倾听，换位思考，并恰当使用表情符号来优化沟通。
rationale: 真诚能建立信任，积极心态能提升客户体验和成交率，用心服务能精准满足客户需求并解决疑虑，换位思考能更好地处理售后问题，表情符号能弥补语言局限性，拉近买卖双方距离。
source_doc: 第二篇..网店，客服是关键.doc
title_en: Importance and Core Principles of Customer Service
scenario_en: In online store operations, customer service is a key factor affecting performance.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should maintain a sincere and positive attitude, serve with care, be good listeners, empathize, and appropriately use emojis to optimize communication.

title: 引导客户选择商品：基于质地、销量和季节性搭配的推荐
scenario: 当客户在两款商品之间犹豫不决，寻求建议时，客服需要提供有依据的推荐。
decision: 客服应从商品的质地、销售数据、以及季节性搭配等多个维度给出具体且有说服力的推荐，并最终帮助客户做出选择。
rationale: 通过提供具体的产品信息和销售数据，结合客户的偏好和外部因素（如季节），可以增强客户的信任感，并有效引导客户完成购买。
source_doc: 第八篇..淘宝商城售前客服主动营销话术   客服技巧干货5条.doc
title_en: Guiding Customers to Choose Products: Recommendations Based on Material, Sales, and Seasonal Pairing
scenario_en: When a customer is indecisive between two products and seeks advice, customer service needs to provide evidence-based recommendations.
decision_en: Customer service should provide specific and persuasive recommendations from multiple dimensions, such as product material, sales data, and seasonal pairing, and ultimately help the customer make a choice.

title: 客服沟通中的情绪管理与心态调整
scenario: 当客服在与客户沟通中遇到令人烦恼或气愤的情况时。
decision: 客服应保持平常心，不因他人的错误惩罚自己，并专注于改变能改变的，接受不能改变的。
rationale: 情绪管理对客服工作至关重要，能帮助客服有效应对挑战，避免负面情绪影响自身和工作表现，同时肯定客服在店铺运营中的核心价值。
source_doc: 第二篇..网店，客服是关键.doc
title_en: Emotional Management and Mindset Adjustment in Customer Service Communication
scenario_en: When customer service encounters annoying or frustrating situations during communication with customers.
decision_en: Customer service should maintain a calm mindset, not punish themselves for others' mistakes, and focus on changing what can be changed and accepting what cannot.

title: 淘宝店客服如何通过提升能力和效率来涨工资
scenario: 客服希望提高自身能力以获得更高的薪资和职业发展。
decision: 客服应通过熟悉产品、提高工作效率、分享经验和学习管理来提升自身价值，从而实现涨工资的目标。
rationale: 提升个人能力和效率直接关联到业绩和团队贡献，是获得薪资增长和职业晋升的基础。
source_doc: 第十三篇：淘宝店客服如何才能涨工资.doc
title_en: How Taobao Store Customer Service Can Increase Salary by Improving Skills and Efficiency
scenario_en: Customer service wants to improve their abilities to achieve higher salaries and career development.
decision_en: Customer service should enhance their value by familiarizing themselves with products, improving work efficiency, sharing experiences, and learning management, thereby achieving the goal of salary increase.

title: 客服相关事宜
scenario: 此条目作为客服相关事宜的总括性标题。
decision: 此条目本身不包含具体决策，而是作为后续详细政策和规则的引导。
rationale: 提供一个清晰的标题，以便组织和分类客服相关的文档和信息。
source_doc: 第十六篇：关于客服的那些事.doc
title_en: Customer Service Related Matters
scenario_en: This entry serves as a general title for customer service related matters.
decision_en: This entry itself does not contain specific decisions, but serves as a guide for subsequent detailed policies and rules.

title: 淘宝客服培训流程与技巧
scenario: 当淘宝店铺需要培训新客服，并希望他们快速上手时。
decision: 根据新客服的经验背景（无经验、有经验、售后客服）制定不同的培训时长和内容，并提供具体的培训步骤和沟通技巧。
rationale: 通过分类培训和系统指导，可以提高新客服的上手速度和工作效率，同时提升客户满意度。
source_doc: 第十六篇：关于客服的那些事.doc
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Training Process and Skills
scenario_en: When a Taobao store needs to train new customer service staff and wants them to get up to speed quickly.
decision_en: Develop different training durations and content based on the new customer service's experience background (no experience, experienced, after-sales customer service), and provide specific training steps and communication skills.

title: 客服团队激励策略：工作重塑、员工参与、正负激励与竞争激励
scenario: 客服团队工作单调重复，人员密集，容易产生消极情绪并扩散，需要通过激励手段提升员工积极性。
decision: 通过工作重塑（工作轮换、工作丰富化、工作自主性）、员工参与、正向激励与负向激励结合、以及竞争激励等多种方法，激发员工积极情绪和工作动力。
rationale: 积极的员工情绪和工作动力不仅是对员工负责，也是对团队负责，能提升工作效率、满意度和客户满意度。
source_doc: 客服管理的5大核心激励办法.docx
title_en: Customer Service Team Incentive Strategies: Job Redesign, Employee Participation, Positive and Negative Incentives, and Competitive Incentives
scenario_en: Customer service team work is monotonous and repetitive, with high staff density, easily leading to negative emotions and their spread, requiring incentive measures to boost employee morale.
decision_en: Utilize various methods such as job redesign (job rotation, job enrichment, job autonomy), employee participation, a combination of positive and negative incentives, and competitive incentives to stimulate positive emotions and work motivation among employees.

title: 客服人员薪资及考核标准
scenario: 公司为了提高客服人员福利，规范和加强客服管理，优化薪资结构时。
decision: 客服人员的薪资制度将进行调整，并根据客服职称（初级、中级、高级、资深）划分基本工资和考核标准。
rationale: 旨在提高客服人员福利，规范管理，并优化薪资结构。
title_en: Customer Service Personnel Salary and Assessment Standards
scenario_en: When the company aims to improve customer service personnel welfare, standardize and strengthen customer service management, and optimize the salary structure.
decision_en: The salary system for customer service personnel will be adjusted, and basic salaries and assessment standards will be divided according to customer service titles (junior, intermediate, senior, principal).

title: 客服人员等级要求与薪资结构
scenario: 当需要了解不同级别客服人员的职责要求及薪资构成时
decision: 客服人员分为初级、中级、高级、资深四个等级，每个等级有对应的能力要求和晋升条件。薪资由基本工资和绩效奖金组成，并实行年度核算月保底制度，新入职客服有试用期。
rationale: 明确各级别客服的职责和晋升路径，确保客服团队的专业性和效率，并通过薪资制度激励员工。
title_en: Customer Service Personnel Level Requirements and Salary Structure
scenario_en: When needing to understand the responsibilities and salary composition of different levels of customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service personnel are divided into four levels: junior, intermediate, senior, and principal, each with corresponding ability requirements and promotion conditions. Salary consists of basic salary and performance bonus, with an annual settlement and monthly guaranteed minimum. New customer service hires have a probationary period.

title: 客服日常工作制度：工作时间、记录要求与行为规范
scenario: 本文件概述了客服团队的日常工作流程、行为准则和绩效管理要求。
decision: 客服人员需遵守排班制度、使用三本记录本、掌握产品知识、提供文明服务、备注订单工号、遵守考勤纪律、禁止无关活动、保持桌面整洁、参与培训、保守公司秘密、主动学习并遵守电脑使用规则。
rationale: 通过明确的工作制度和行为规范，旨在提高客服团队的专业素养、服务质量和工作效率，同时保障公司信息安全和员工绩效考核的准确性。
source_doc: 卖家必收：最全客服管理手册~.doc
title_en: Customer Service Daily Work System: Working Hours, Record Requirements, and Behavioral Norms
scenario_en: This document outlines the daily workflow, code of conduct, and performance management requirements for the customer service team.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must adhere to the scheduling system, use three record books, master product knowledge, provide courteous service, note order work numbers, comply with attendance discipline, prohibit irrelevant activities, maintain a tidy desk, participate in training, keep company secrets, proactively learn, and follow computer usage rules.

title: 客服人员薪资与绩效奖金计算规则
scenario: 计算客服人员的月度薪资和绩效奖金时
decision: 客服人员的月度薪资由基本工资和绩效奖金组成。基本工资根据职称和工龄确定。绩效奖金由订单总量提成和综合考评两部分组成，综合考评结果会影响提成比例。
rationale: 通过设定基本工资保障员工收入，并通过绩效奖金激励客服人员提升订单处理量、服务质量和团队协作。
title_en: Customer Service Personnel Salary and Performance Bonus Calculation Rules
scenario_en: When calculating the monthly salary and performance bonus for customer service personnel.
decision_en: The monthly salary of customer service personnel consists of a basic salary and a performance bonus. The basic salary is determined by title and years of service. The performance bonus is composed of a commission based on total orders and a comprehensive evaluation, with the comprehensive evaluation result affecting the commission percentage.

title: 日常工作流程：售前、售中、售后及交接班规范
scenario: 本文件概述了客服人员在日常工作中的各个阶段，包括售前准备、咨询、订单处理、交易完成以及交接班的指导原则。
decision: 客服人员需熟悉产品知识、掌握沟通技巧（太极法）、及时跟进未付款订单、制作订单确认表、准确备注订单信息，并遵循交接班流程。
rationale: 通过标准化流程和沟通技巧，旨在提高客户满意度，减少退换货，并确保团队协作顺畅。
source_doc: 卖家必收：最全客服管理手册~.doc
title_en: Daily Work Procedures: Pre-sales, In-sales, After-sales, and Handover Norms
scenario_en: This document outlines the guiding principles for customer service personnel at various stages of daily work, including pre-sales preparation, inquiries, order processing, transaction completion, and shift handover.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to be familiar with product knowledge, master communication skills (Tai Chi method), promptly follow up on unpaid orders, create order confirmation forms, accurately note order information, and follow handover procedures.

title: 客服人员绩效考核细则
scenario: 评估客服人员的整体工作表现和能力时。
decision: 客服人员的绩效评估将基于四个主要方面：工作情况（30分）、工作交接与完成情况（20分）、客户回访满意度（20分）以及业务素质和能力（30分）。
rationale: 通过多维度评估，确保全面衡量客服人员的业绩、效率、客户服务质量和专业能力，以促进其发展和团队整体表现。
title_en: Customer Service Personnel Performance Appraisal Details
scenario_en: When evaluating the overall work performance and capabilities of customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service personnel performance appraisal will be based on four main aspects: work situation (30 points), work handover and completion (20 points), customer callback satisfaction (20 points), and business quality and ability (30 points).

title: 客服标准用语：咨询处理与议价策略
scenario: 顾客进入店铺咨询或进行议价时。
decision: 客服需主动热情回应，针对库存、尺码、物流、色差、退换货等问题提供标准答案。对于议价，根据顾客类型（允诺型、对比型、武断干脆型、借口型）采取不同的策略，包括引导多买、提供VIP折扣、强调品质、或在合理范围内让步。
rationale: 旨在提高顾客满意度，促成交易，并提升客单价，同时维护品牌形象和政策一致性。
source_doc: 卖家必收：最全客服管理手册~.doc
title_en: Customer Service Standard Phrases: Inquiry Handling and Bargaining Strategies
scenario_en: When customers enter the store to inquire or bargain.
decision_en: Customer service needs to respond proactively and enthusiastically, providing standard answers for issues such as inventory, size, logistics, color difference, and returns/exchanges. For bargaining, different strategies should be adopted based on customer type (promising, comparative, decisive, excuse-making), including encouraging more purchases, offering VIP discounts, emphasizing quality, or making concessions within a reasonable range.

title: 客服基本能力：电脑操作与快速录入
scenario: 当招聘或评估客服人员时，需要了解其基本操作技能。
decision: 客服人员需要熟悉电脑基本操作，包括WINDOS系统、WORD和EXCEL使用、电子邮件收发、电子文件管理、上网搜索。同时，应熟练掌握一种输入法并能盲打。
rationale: 这些是客服日常工作的基础，确保能高效处理客户咨询和信息管理。
title_en: Customer Service Basic Abilities: Computer Operation and Fast Data Entry
scenario_en: When recruiting or evaluating customer service personnel, it is necessary to understand their basic operational skills.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to be familiar with basic computer operations, including Windows system, WORD and EXCEL usage, email sending and receiving, electronic file management, and internet searching. Additionally, they should be proficient in one input method and be able to touch-type.

title: 客服人员日常管理加分与扣分标准
scenario: 本文件规定了客服人员在日常工作中表现的加分和扣分标准，适用于评估客服人员的绩效和行为。
decision: 客服人员将根据其工作表现、遵守规章制度的情况获得加分或被扣分，具体标准涵盖工作量、质量、考试成绩、应急响应、额外工作、投诉率、合理化建议、以及各种轻度、中度和重度违规行为。
rationale: 通过明确的加分和扣分标准，旨在激励客服人员积极工作、提升服务质量、遵守公司纪律，并对违规行为进行惩戒，以维护团队的专业性和效率。
title_en: Customer Service Performance Scoring Standards
scenario_en: This document defines the scoring standards for customer service representatives' daily performance, applicable for evaluating their performance and behavior.
decision_en: Customer service representatives will receive points or deductions based on their work performance and adherence to regulations. Specific criteria include workload, quality, test scores, emergency response, extra work, complaint rate, improvement suggestions, and various minor, moderate, and severe violations.

title: 客服部日常工作规范流程
scenario: 本文件概述了客服部门的日常工作规范和流程。
decision: 客服人员应遵循考勤、快递签收、发货单录入、售后登记、订单登记、评价管理、投诉处理、退款处理以及日常事务等方面的具体规定。
rationale: 确保客服工作的标准化、高效性，减少错误，提升客户满意度，并明确责任归属。
source_doc: 客服部日常工作规范流程.docx
title_en: Customer Service Department Daily Workflow Standards
scenario_en: This document outlines the daily work standards and procedures for the customer service department.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should follow specific regulations regarding attendance, express delivery receipt, shipping order entry, after-sales registration, order registration, review management, complaint handling, refund processing, and daily tasks.

title: 顾客生命周期与品牌定位：长短生命周期产品的营销策略
scenario: 当品牌需要制定营销规划或理解顾客关系时，需要考虑顾客的理论生命周期。
decision: 品牌定位除了占领心智、竞争对手、定价、命名外，更重要的是根据定位的顾客理论生命周期来做营销规划。长生命周期产品应注重优质服务以提高回购率和购买频次；短生命周期产品则需投入更多营销费用，或通过成为行业领跑者、增加品类来应对。
rationale: 顾客理论生命周期直接影响营销费用投入、老客户规模和利润获取。长生命周期允许品牌沉淀老客户，而短生命周期则需要更积极的策略来维持业务。
source_doc: 一个客服眼中的顾客生命周期与品牌定位 .doc
title_en: Customer Lifecycle and Brand Positioning: Marketing Strategies for Long and Short Lifecycle Products
scenario_en: When a brand needs to develop a marketing plan or understand customer relationships, the theoretical customer lifecycle must be considered.
decision_en: Beyond mindshare, competitors, pricing, and naming, brand positioning is crucially about developing marketing plans based on the theoretical customer lifecycle. Long-lifecycle products should focus on quality service to increase repurchase rates and frequency. Short-lifecycle products require more marketing investment or can be managed by becoming an industry leader or expanding product categories.

title: 处理物流问题：未发出、未捡货、已发出、未收到货的核实与沟通
scenario: 当顾客询问物流状态，如发货无更新、物流中断更新、或显示签收但未收到货时。
decision: 根据具体情况核实仓库、快递或收件人，并向顾客解释原因和处理进展。对于未发出或未捡货，核实仓库并解释遗漏；对于物流中断，核实快递并告知正在跟进；对于显示签收但未收到，核实快递和收件地址，并请顾客自查。
rationale: 通过主动核实和及时沟通，可以解决顾客的物流疑问，平复不满情绪，并提供清晰的解决方案，避免问题升级。
source_doc: 淘宝客服六大售后技巧和案例解析.docx
title_en: Handling Logistics Issues: Verification and Communication for Not Shipped, Not Picked, Shipped, and Not Received
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about logistics status, such as no shipping updates, interrupted logistics updates, or 'signed for' but not received.
decision_en: Verify with the warehouse, courier, or recipient based on the specific situation, and explain the reason and progress to the customer. For 'not shipped' or 'not picked', verify with the warehouse and explain the oversight. For interrupted logistics, verify with the courier and inform the customer that it's being followed up. For 'signed for' but not received, verify with the courier and shipping address, and ask the customer to check themselves.

title: 弱品牌短生命周期产品的多渠道和高利润策略
scenario: 当品牌是弱品牌，产品生命周期短，且经营单一品类时。
decision: 应考虑多渠道销售策略，避免单一渠道；同时，不应追求超乎寻常的高利润，因为这在弱势品牌中难以实现。
rationale: 多渠道可以分摊风险，增加触达客户的机会，而高利润在弱品牌短生命周期产品中不切实际，可能加速品牌消亡。延长顾客生命周期和品类丰富度是京东等领跑者成功的关键。
source_doc: 一个客服眼中的顾客生命周期与品牌定位 .doc
title_en: Multi-Channel and High-Profit Strategies for Weak Brands with Short Lifecycle Products
scenario_en: When a brand is weak, has a short product lifecycle, and operates in a single category.
decision_en: Consider a multi-channel sales strategy to avoid reliance on a single channel. Also, do not pursue unusually high profits, as this is difficult to achieve for weaker brands.

title: 公司淘宝店铺类型及运费标准
scenario: 当客户在公司旗下淘宝、拍拍、易趣网店购物时，需要了解店铺类型或计算运费。
decision: 根据店铺所在地和客户收货地址，按照既定标准收取运费。厦门本地快递1KG内6元，福建省内8元。上海本地（江浙沪）6元/KG。东北、西北、西南及内蒙、山西等区域15元/KG。西藏需确认实际运费。其他未列明地区12元/KG。顺丰及EMS按官方标准。淘宝店铺分为集市店和商城店，集市店有信用评分，商城店无。
rationale: 明确不同类型店铺的特点，并根据商品所在地和收货地址制定统一的运费标准，以便于客服人员准确报价和处理订单。
title_en: Company Taobao Store Types and Shipping Standards
scenario_en: When customers shop at the company's Taobao, Paipai, or Eachnet stores and need to understand store types or calculate shipping fees.
decision_en: Shipping fees are charged according to established standards based on the store's location and the customer's shipping address. Xiamen local express within 1KG is 6 RMB, within Fujian Province is 8 RMB. Shanghai local (Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Shanghai) is 6 RMB/KG. Northeast, Northwest, Southwest, Inner Mongolia, Shanxi, and other regions are 15 RMB/KG. Tibet requires confirmation of actual shipping fees. Other unlisted areas are 12 RMB/KG. SF Express and EMS follow official standards. Taobao stores are divided into C2C (Jishi) stores and Tmall (Shangcheng) stores; C2C stores have credit ratings, Tmall stores do not.

title: 售前客服语言规范与准则
scenario: 客服在进行售前沟通时
decision: 客服应遵循“听得到的微笑”、“看得到的微笑”的最高标准，以及“让顾客舒服、放心”的最高原则，并确保沟通快速、礼貌、专业、亲切、细心、有经验，并善于找话题。
rationale: 这些准则旨在提升客户满意度，促进销售，并建立品牌忠诚度。
source_doc: 客服工作流程和规范术语.doc
title_en: Pre-Sales Customer Service Language Norms and Guidelines
scenario_en: When customer service engages in pre-sales communication.
decision_en: Customer service should adhere to the highest standards of 'audible smile' and 'visible smile', and the guiding principle of 'making customers comfortable and reassured'. Communication must be fast, polite, professional, friendly, meticulous, experienced, and adept at initiating conversation.

title: 淘宝旺旺客服工具使用指南
scenario: 客服人员使用淘宝旺旺与客户沟通和处理订单时。
decision: 客服应熟练使用旺旺的各项功能，包括快捷回复、小工具、信息群发，并了解其在订单管理中的应用，如修改订单信息、查看交易状态等。未经领导允许，不得私自挂起旺旺号。
rationale: 旺旺是客服与客户沟通和完成交易的重要工具，熟练使用能提高工作效率和服务质量。挂起旺旺号会影响客户咨询分流，需严格管理。
title_en: Taobao Wangwang Customer Service Tool Usage Guide
scenario_en: Customer service personnel use Taobao Wangwang to communicate with customers and process orders.
decision_en: Customer service should be proficient in using all Wangwang functions, including quick replies, mini-tools, and mass messaging, and understand its application in order management, such as modifying order information and checking transaction status. Wangwang accounts must not be set to 'away' without management's permission.

title: 处理客户关于物流、收货、产品不满意、尺码不符及7天无理由退换货的咨询
scenario: 客户咨询物流进度、如何确认收货、对产品不满意、对尺码不满意或要求7天无理由退换货时。
decision: 针对物流查询，引导客户自行查询或代查；针对确认收货，引导客户到商城确认并评价；针对产品不满意，强调产品质量和实拍；针对尺码不符，确认按订单发货，并提供换货选项；针对7天无理由退换货，承诺支持并说明退换货流程。
rationale: 提供清晰、一致的客户服务指引，解决常见客户问题，提升客户满意度。
source_doc: 客服工作流程和规范术语.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Inquiries: Logistics, Receipt Confirmation, Product Dissatisfaction, Size Mismatch, and 7-Day No-Reason Returns
scenario_en: When customers inquire about logistics progress, how to confirm receipt, express dissatisfaction with a product or size, or request a 7-day no-reason return/exchange.
decision_en: For logistics inquiries, guide customers to check themselves or check on their behalf. For receipt confirmation, guide customers to confirm and review on the marketplace. For product dissatisfaction, emphasize product quality and actual photos. For size mismatch, confirm the order was shipped correctly and offer exchange options. For 7-day no-reason returns/exchanges, confirm support and explain the return/exchange process.

title: 客服挑选与培训：以客户为中心的策略及奖励机制
scenario: 本政策适用于电商客服的招聘、培训和日常管理，旨在提升客户服务质量和客户满意度。
decision: 挑选客服时，应注重其爱笑、耐心、声音甜美、百问不烦等性格特质，并通过压力测试考察其应变能力。培训中，除了产品知识和常见问题解答，还需培养员工对产品的热爱，并建立奖励机制鼓励客服站在顾客角度解决问题。
rationale: 通过精心挑选和系统培训，确保客服能提供优质服务，提升客户体验和忠诚度。奖励机制能激励客服主动为顾客着想，从而带来更好的口碑和长期效益。
source_doc: 你还在为客服培训发愁吗？电商客服培训心得，绝对的干货！附思维导图！ .doc
title_en: Customer Service Selection and Training: Customer-Centric Strategy and Incentive Mechanisms
scenario_en: This policy applies to the recruitment, training, and daily management of e-commerce customer service, aiming to improve service quality and customer satisfaction.
decision_en: When selecting customer service personnel, prioritize personality traits such as being cheerful, patient, having a pleasant voice, and being unfailingly helpful. Use stress tests to assess adaptability. Training should cover product knowledge and common FAQs, cultivate employees' passion for the products, and establish incentive mechanisms to encourage customer service to solve problems from the customer's perspective.

title: 因卖方失误导致退换货的运费处理
scenario: 当客户因卖方失误需要退换货时，涉及运费承担问题。
decision: 客服应向客户表达歉意，并告知客户寄回商品的运费将由公司承担。客户需先行垫付运费，公司将在交易完成后退还。
rationale: 为了弥补因卖方失误给客户带来的不便，并确保客户体验。
source_doc: 客服工作流程和规范术语.doc
title_en: Shipping Fee Handling for Returns/Exchanges Due to Seller Error
scenario_en: When a customer needs to return or exchange an item due to seller error, involving shipping fee responsibility.
decision_en: Customer service should apologize to the customer and inform them that the company will cover the shipping cost for returning the item. The customer needs to pay the shipping fee upfront, and the company will refund it after the transaction is completed.

title: 处理刁蛮顾客和危机：将挑战转化为提升客服能力的机会
scenario: 当客服面对刁蛮顾客、售后问题或中差评等危机情况时。
decision: 客服应端正心态，将危机视为提升自身能力的机会，不急不躁地化解问题。对于职业差评师，则无需留情，并利用解释窗口展示自身优势。同时，培养客服理解顾客情绪并持续改进服务的意识。
rationale: 处理刁蛮顾客最能考验客服的水平，将其视为机会能促使客服成长。通过有效处理危机，可以提升顾客满意度，甚至将负面评价转化为品牌宣传的机会。理解顾客情绪并及时改进是优化服务流程的关键。
source_doc: 你还在为客服培训发愁吗？电商客服培训心得，绝对的干货！附思维导图！ .doc
title_en: Handling Difficult Customers and Crises: Turning Challenges into Opportunities for Customer Service Improvement
scenario_en: When customer service faces difficult customers, after-sales issues, or negative reviews (medium/poor ratings) and other crisis situations.
decision_en: Customer service should maintain a positive attitude, viewing crises as opportunities to improve their abilities, and resolve issues calmly. For professional negative reviewers, no leniency is needed, and the explanation window should be used to showcase the company's strengths. Simultaneously, cultivate customer service's ability to understand customer emotions and continuously improve service.

title: 确认客户地址和电话
scenario: 当需要与客户确认物流信息时。
decision: 与客人确认其地址和电话信息。
rationale: 确保物流信息准确无误，避免配送错误。
source_doc: 客服工作流程和规范术语.doc
title_en: Confirm Customer Address and Phone Number
scenario_en: When logistics information needs to be confirmed with the customer.
decision_en: Confirm the customer's address and phone number.

title: 客服日常工作制度：排班、记录、产品知识、服务规范与违规处罚
scenario: 本文件概述了客服团队的日常工作制度，涵盖了从工作时间、记录要求、产品知识掌握、客户服务规范到违规行为处理等多个方面。
decision: 客服人员需遵守轮班制度，使用三本记录本（问题登记、服务统计、交接记录），在新产品上线前掌握产品知识，文明礼貌接待客户，并在订单中备注工号以计算提成。同时，需遵守考勤纪律，禁止在工作时间进行与工作无关的活动，保持桌面整洁，并严格保守公司秘密。
rationale: 这些制度旨在规范客服团队的工作流程，提高服务质量和效率，确保公司形象，并明确员工的职责和奖惩机制。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Customer Service Daily Work System: Scheduling, Records, Product Knowledge, Service Standards, and Violation Penalties
scenario_en: This document outlines the daily work system for the customer service team, covering aspects from working hours, record-keeping requirements, product knowledge mastery, customer service standards, to handling violations.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must adhere to the shift system, use three record books (problem registration, service statistics, handover records), master product knowledge before new products launch, treat customers politely and courteously, and note their employee ID in orders for commission calculation. Additionally, they must observe attendance discipline, refrain from non-work-related activities during work hours, keep their desks tidy, and strictly maintain company confidentiality.

title: 说明发货、填单及预计到货时间
scenario: 当客户询问发货流程或到货时间时。
decision: 向客户说明发货流程、填单情况以及预计到货时间。
rationale: 提供清晰的物流信息能提升客户满意度并管理客户预期。
source_doc: 客服工作流程和规范术语.doc
title_en: Explain Shipping, Order Filling, and Estimated Delivery Time
scenario_en: When a customer asks about the shipping process or estimated delivery time.
decision_en: Explain the shipping process, order filling status, and estimated delivery time to the customer.

title: 禁止私自安装程序或插件
scenario: 员工在公司电脑上操作时。
decision: 未经允许，员工不得在公司电脑上私自安装任何程序或插件。
rationale: 此规定旨在维护公司电脑系统的安全性和稳定性，防止未经授权的软件可能带来的风险。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Prohibition of Unauthorized Software or Plugin Installation
scenario_en: When employees operate on company computers.
decision_en: Employees are not allowed to install any software or plugins on company computers without permission.

title: 售前客服工作流程：批发与零售客户的沟通与引导
scenario: 客户在售前阶段进行咨询，包括批发和零售客户。
decision: 对于批发客户，告知批发条件并引导查看主页“批发请进”；对于零售客户，提示优惠政策和店铺热门商品。在所有售前沟通中，需客气说明，加好友，有货通知，并推荐相似产品。同时，需告知客户签收注意事项、商品使用注意事项，并鼓励好评及有问题先联系协商。
rationale: 通过明确的沟通流程，提高客户满意度，促进销售转化，并为售后服务打下良好基础。
source_doc: 客服工作流程和规范术语.doc
title_en: Pre-Sales Customer Service Workflow: Communication and Guidance for Wholesale and Retail Customers
scenario_en: Customers consult during the pre-sales stage, including both wholesale and retail customers.
decision_en: For wholesale customers, inform them of wholesale conditions and guide them to the 'Wholesale Entry' section on the homepage. For retail customers, highlight promotions and popular store items. In all pre-sales communication, be polite, add friends, notify when items are in stock, and recommend similar products. Also, inform customers about important notes for signing for packages, product usage, and encourage positive reviews, advising them to contact customer service first for any issues.

title: 未经允许不得私自在电脑上使用U盘、MP3等任何移动存储介质
scenario: 当员工需要在公司电脑上使用U盘、MP3等移动存储介质时。
decision: 员工不得在未经允许的情况下，私自在公司电脑上使用U盘、MP3等任何移动存储介质。
rationale: 此规定旨在保护公司信息安全，防止数据泄露或恶意软件感染。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Unauthorized Use of USB Drives, MP3s, and Other Mobile Storage Devices on Computers is Prohibited
scenario_en: When employees need to use USB drives, MP3s, or other mobile storage devices on company computers.
decision_en: Employees are not allowed to use USB drives, MP3s, or any other mobile storage devices on company computers without prior permission.

title: 客服部卫生制度与上班纪律
scenario: 客服人员日常工作期间，包括到岗、工作、离岗以及个人行为规范。
decision: 客服人员需遵守公司卫生制度，保持工作区域整洁，个人物品摆放有序。上班期间不得迟到、早退，不得从事与工作无关的事情，如看视频、玩游戏、大声谈论私事。着装需符合基本要求，不得穿拖鞋或过于暴露。所有罚款将计入部门活动经费。
rationale: 确保公司环境整洁，维护良好的工作秩序和公司形象，提高工作效率。
title_en: Customer Service Department Hygiene System and Work Discipline
scenario_en: During daily work, including arrival, work, departure, and personal conduct of customer service personnel.
