decision_en: Customer service personnel must comply with company hygiene regulations, keep their work areas tidy, and personal items organized. During work hours, they must not be late or leave early, nor engage in non-work-related activities such as watching videos, playing games, or discussing private matters loudly. Dress code must meet basic requirements; no slippers or overly revealing clothing. All fines will be allocated to department activity funds.

title: 工作期间网站访问限制
scenario: 员工在工作期间需要访问网站时。
decision: 员工不得访问除淘宝、新浪、网易、腾讯等大型门户网站以外的任何网站。如有工作需要访问其他网站，必须事先请示负责人。
rationale: 此规定旨在规范员工的工作行为，确保工作效率和信息安全。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Website Access Restrictions During Work Hours
scenario_en: When employees need to access websites during work hours.
decision_en: Employees are not allowed to access any websites other than major portals like Taobao, Sina, NetEase, and Tencent. If access to other websites is required for work, prior approval from the supervisor must be obtained.

title: 每周电脑全面杀毒以消除安全隐患
scenario: 为了维护电脑系统安全和数据完整性。
decision: 每周必须对电脑进行一次全面的杀毒扫描。
rationale: 定期杀毒可以及时发现并清除潜在的安全威胁，保障系统稳定运行。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Weekly Full Computer Virus Scan for Security
scenario_en: To maintain computer system security and data integrity.
decision_en: A full computer virus scan must be performed weekly.

title: 网店客服工作手册目录
scenario: This document outlines the structure and content of a comprehensive e-commerce customer service work manual.
decision: The manual covers various aspects of customer service, including basic concepts, classifications, importance, requirements, qualities, skills, knowledge, communication techniques, work techniques, customer needs, customer types, buyer psychology, handling bargaining, resolving customer doubts, after-sales service, complaint handling, reducing customer churn, common errors, standardized language, and the compilation of the work manual itself.
rationale: To provide a structured framework for training and guiding e-commerce customer service personnel, ensuring consistent and high-quality service delivery.
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Online Store Customer Service Manual Directory
scenario_en: This document outlines the structure and content of a comprehensive e-commerce customer service work manual.
decision_en: The manual covers various aspects of customer service, including basic concepts, classifications, importance, requirements, qualities, skills, knowledge, communication techniques, work techniques, customer needs, customer types, buyer psychology, handling bargaining, resolving customer doubts, after-sales service, complaint handling, reducing customer churn, common errors, standardized language, and the compilation of the work manual itself.

title: 客服日常工作流程与沟通技巧
scenario: 客服在日常工作中，包括售前咨询、订单处理和售后跟进的各个阶段。
decision: 客服需熟悉产品知识、打字迅速、掌握标准用语。在咨询中运用“太极法”：先倾听客户观点（接），再借力佐证己方观点（卸），最后引导客户思维（打）。对于未付款订单，负责客服需跟进催促。成交后立即制作订单确认表，并根据客户确认信息打印快递单。交易完成后，需备注重要信息并欢送客户。
rationale: 通过掌握产品知识和沟通技巧，可以提高服务效率和客户满意度。太极法有助于有效处理客户异议。订单确认和备注可以减少错误和退换货，确保信息准确传递。欢送客户并引导收藏关注有助于提升客户忠诚度。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Daily Customer Service Workflow and Communication Skills
scenario_en: Customer service in daily work, including pre-sales consultation, order processing, and after-sales follow-up stages.
decision_en: Customer service must be familiar with product knowledge, type quickly, and master standard language. During consultations, use the 'Tai Chi method': first listen to the customer's point of view (receive), then leverage it to support your own point of view (deflect), and finally guide the customer's thinking (strike). For unpaid orders, the responsible customer service must follow up and urge payment. After a deal is made, immediately create an order confirmation form and print the express delivery slip based on the customer's confirmed information. After the transaction is completed, important information needs to be noted and the customer bid farewell.

title: 接班人员提前到达工作岗位进行交接班准备
scenario: 当接班人员准备开始工作时。
decision: 接班人员应提前10-15分钟到达工作岗位，并做好交接班准备。
rationale: 确保工作顺利交接，避免延误。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Incoming Staff Arrive Early for Shift Handover Preparation
scenario_en: When incoming staff are preparing to start work.
decision_en: Incoming staff should arrive at their workstation 10-15 minutes early and prepare for the shift handover.

title: 网店客服的基本概念、分类、作用及基本要求
scenario: 本文件旨在为淘宝店主提供网店客服的专业教材，用于提升自身能力和员工培训。
decision: 网店客服是利用各种通讯工具，以网上即时通讯工具为主，为客户提供相关服务的人员。服务内容包括客户答疑、促成订单、店铺推广、完成销售、售后服务等。客服在塑造店铺形象、提高成交率、提高客户回头率和更好地服务客户方面起着重要作用。
rationale: 随着网络购物的兴起，网店客服成为新兴职业，但缺乏专业培训和指导。本宝典旨在填补这一空白，提供全面、实用、凝练的专业知识和技能，以帮助店主和客服人员提升服务质量和效率。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Basic Concepts, Classification, Role, and Requirements of Online Store Customer Service
scenario_en: This document aims to provide professional training materials for Taobao store owners to enhance their own capabilities and for employee training.
decision_en: Online store customer service refers to personnel who use various communication tools, primarily online instant messaging tools, to provide relevant services to customers. Service content includes answering customer inquiries, facilitating orders, promoting the store, completing sales, and after-sales service. Customer service plays an important role in shaping the store's image, increasing conversion rates, improving customer retention, and better serving customers.

title: 交接班人员必须严肃认真，交接要详细、明确、并当面履行交接手续
scenario: 当进行工作交接时。
decision: 交接班人员必须严肃认真，交接内容要详细、明确，并当面履行交接手续。
rationale: 确保工作顺利过渡，避免信息遗漏或误解。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Shift Handover Procedures: Seriousness, Detail, and In-Person Completion
scenario_en: When performing a work handover.
decision_en: Personnel performing the handover must be serious and meticulous, the handover content must be detailed and clear, and the handover procedures must be completed in person.

title: 客服人员应具备的素质与能力：热情、自控、沟通、专业及营销技能
scenario: 本文件旨在概述客户服务人员在日常工作中应具备的基本素质、技能和综合能力，以及营销类网店客服的特定能力要求。
decision: 客户服务人员应展现热情主动的服务态度、良好的自控力、优秀的文字和语言沟通技巧、丰富的专业和行业知识、敏锐的洞察力、良好的人际关系沟通能力、专业的电话接听技巧和倾听能力。营销类网店客服还需具备文字表达、资料收集、动手操作、代码了解、网页制作、参与交流、思考总结、适应变化、终身学习、深入了解网民、建立品牌、耐心、敏感细致、踏实坚韧等能力。
rationale: 这些素质和能力是确保客户满意度、促进产品销售、建立客户忠诚度以及在竞争激烈的电商环境中取得成功的关键。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Customer Service Qualities & Abilities: Enthusiasm, Self-Control, Communication, Professionalism, and Marketing Skills
scenario_en: This document aims to outline the basic qualities, skills, and comprehensive abilities that customer service personnel should possess in their daily work, as well as the specific ability requirements for marketing-oriented online store customer service.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should demonstrate an enthusiastic and proactive service attitude, good self-control, excellent written and verbal communication skills, rich professional and industry knowledge, keen insight, good interpersonal communication skills, professional telephone answering skills, and listening ability. Marketing-oriented online store customer service also needs to possess abilities such as written expression, data collection, hands-on operation, understanding code, web page production, participating in communication, thinking and summarizing, adapting to changes, lifelong learning, in-depth understanding of netizens, brand building, patience, sensitivity and meticulousness, and steadfast perseverance.

title: 值班和交接班期间问题处理流程
scenario: 在值班或交接班过程中出现问题时。
decision: 值班期间发生的问题应在本班内解决并报告领导。交接班期间发生的问题由交接人员负责处理，接班人员积极协助，处理完毕后再完成交接。
rationale: 确保问题及时解决，明确责任，并保障工作顺利交接。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Problem Handling During Shifts and Handover
scenario_en: When problems occur during a shift or handover.
decision_en: Problems occurring during a shift should be resolved within that shift and reported to the supervisor. Problems occurring during handover are the responsibility of the handover personnel, with active assistance from the incoming personnel, and the handover is completed after the problem is resolved.

title: 网店客服需具备的商品、交易规则、支付与物流知识
scenario: 作为网店客服，需要为客户提供专业的咨询和指导服务时。
decision: 客服应全面了解商品专业知识、商品周边知识、网站交易规则、支付网关流程与规则、以及物流的种类、价格、速度、查询和处理方式。
rationale: 全面的知识储备能帮助客服更好地解答客户疑问，指导客户完成交易，并处理可能出现的问题，从而提升客户满意度和交易成功率。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Online Store Customer Service: Product, Transaction Rules, Payment, and Logistics Knowledge
scenario_en: As an online store customer service representative, when needing to provide professional consultation and guidance to customers.
decision_en: Customer service should have a comprehensive understanding of product professional knowledge, related product knowledge, website transaction rules, payment gateway processes and rules, and logistics types, prices, speeds, inquiry methods, and handling procedures.

title: 值班人员换班规定及责任承担
scenario: 值班人员需要换班时，以及因换班导致脱班的情况。
decision: 值班人员换班必须事先征得相关人员同意。如果因换班造成脱班，换班双方均需承担责任。
rationale: 确保值班安排的连续性和责任明确，避免因擅自换班导致工作中断。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Shift Change Regulations and Responsibility
scenario_en: When a shift worker needs to change shifts, and in cases of absence due to a shift change.
decision_en: Shift changes must be approved by relevant personnel in advance. If a shift change results in an absence, both parties involved in the change are responsible.

title: 客服标准用语：总原则与欢迎语
scenario: 顾客进入店铺或发起咨询时
decision: 客服应主动热情欢迎顾客，并遵循“不能轻易放走咨询顾客”的总原则。
rationale: 通过积极的欢迎语和留客策略，提高顾客的停留时间和转化率。
source_doc: 推荐给客服主管 — 客服管理手册完整版.doc
title_en: Customer Service Standard Phrases: General Principles and Welcome Greetings
scenario_en: When a customer enters the store or initiates an inquiry
decision_en: Customer service should proactively and warmly welcome customers, adhering to the general principle of 'never easily letting go of an inquiring customer'.

title: 客服沟通中的语言艺术与技巧
scenario: 在与客户进行沟通时，无论是口头还是书面形式。
decision: 应多采用礼貌、谦和的态度和语气，避免使用负面语言，并根据客户对商品的了解程度和价格要求调整沟通方式。
rationale: 良好的沟通能顺利与客户建立信任，避免误会和纠纷，提升客户满意度和购物体验。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Language Art and Skills in Customer Service Communication
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, whether verbally or in writing.
decision_en: Always use a polite and humble attitude and tone, avoid negative language, and adjust communication methods based on the customer's understanding of the product and price requirements.

title: 第一章 总则
scenario: This is a general introductory section of a document.
decision: This section outlines the overall principles and scope of the document.
rationale: To provide a foundational understanding for the subsequent detailed sections.
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Chapter 1 General Provisions
scenario_en: This is a general introductory section of a document.
decision_en: This section outlines the overall principles and scope of the document.

title: 与不同类型顾客的沟通策略：还价、商品认知及挑剔型顾客
scenario: 当顾客对商品价格有疑问、对商品质量有不同认知或表现出挑剔时。
decision: 对于试探性还价的顾客，坚定告知不能还价，但强调商品物有所值并感谢理解。对于坚持讨价还价的顾客，重申原则并有理有节拒绝，可建议查看其他便宜商品。对于对商品质量有清晰认知的顾客，正常沟通即可。对于将信将疑的顾客，耐心解释实物拍摄，并提醒可能存在的色差。对于非常挑剔的顾客，实事求是介绍商品及可能存在的问题，并委婉建议选择实体店购买。
rationale: 通过区分顾客类型并采取差异化沟通策略，既能维护品牌原则和商品价值，又能有效管理顾客期望，避免不必要的纠纷和负面情绪。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Communication Strategies for Different Customer Types: Bargainers, Product-Aware, and Picky Customers
scenario_en: When customers have questions about product prices, different perceptions of product quality, or are picky.
decision_en: For customers who tentatively bargain, firmly state that bargaining is not possible, but emphasize the product's value for money and thank them for their understanding. For customers who insist on bargaining, reiterate the policy and politely refuse, suggesting they look at other cheaper items. For customers with a clear understanding of product quality, communicate normally. For skeptical customers, patiently explain that photos are of the actual product and remind them of potential color differences. For very picky customers, truthfully introduce the product and any potential issues, and subtly suggest purchasing from a physical store.

title: 企业简介与文化概述
scenario: This section provides an overview of the company and its culture.
decision: Understand the basic information about the company and its corporate culture.
rationale: To provide foundational knowledge about the organization.
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Company Profile and Culture Overview
scenario_en: This section provides an overview of the company and its culture.
decision_en: Understand the basic information about the company and its corporate culture.

title: 避免使用网络语言与顾客交流
scenario: 在与顾客进行交流时，如果顾客可能不理解网络语言或不喜欢过于年轻化的语言风格。
decision: 客服人员应尽量避免使用过多的网络语言。
rationale: 顾客可能对网络语言不理解，导致沟通障碍，或不喜欢过于年轻化的语言风格，影响交流体验。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Avoid Using Internet Slang in Customer Communication
scenario_en: When communicating with customers, if the customer may not understand internet slang or dislikes overly youthful language styles.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should try to avoid using too much internet slang.

title: 客服基本行为准则
scenario: 本节概述了客服人员应遵循的基本行为准则。
decision: 客服人员应遵守本章规定的基本行为准则。
rationale: 确保客服团队提供一致且专业的服务。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Basic Customer Service Code of Conduct
scenario_en: This section outlines the basic code of conduct that customer service personnel should follow.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should adhere to the basic code of conduct specified in this chapter.

title: 网店客户需求与类型分析及应对策略
scenario: 当客服人员需要理解和应对不同类型的网店客户需求和行为时。
decision: 客服人员应识别客户的非商品需求（如安全、尊重、被理解等），并根据客户的性格特征、购买行为和常规购物类型采取相应的沟通和销售策略。
rationale: 满足客户的非商品需求能有效促进商品成交，而了解客户类型并采取针对性策略能显著提高服务质量和效率。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Online Store Customer Needs and Types Analysis & Response Strategies
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to understand and respond to different types of online store customer needs and behaviors.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should identify customers' non-product needs (e.g., security, respect, being understood) and adopt corresponding communication and sales strategies based on customers' personality traits, purchasing behavior, and typical shopping types.

title: 客服操作流程目录
scenario: This chunk is a table of contents for the customer service operation process document.
decision: This section outlines the main topics covered in the customer service operation manual, including basic requirements, service flow, precautions, and backend operations.
rationale: To provide a structured overview of the customer service standard operating procedures.
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Customer Service Operation Process Directory
scenario_en: This chunk is a table of contents for the customer service operation process document.
decision_en: This section outlines the main topics covered in the customer service operation manual, including basic requirements, service flow, precautions, and backend operations.

title: 买家网上消费心理分析及应对策略
scenario: 当与买家进行在线交流和销售时，需要理解并利用其不同的消费心理。
decision: 根据买家的不同心理（如求实、求新、求美、求名、求廉、偏好、猎奇、从众、隐秘性、疑虑、安全），采取相应的描述策略和沟通方式，突出产品特点或提供特定保障。
rationale: 理解买家的消费心理有助于更有效地进行产品描述和销售沟通，从而提高转化率和客户满意度。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Buyer Online Consumption Psychology Analysis and Response Strategies
scenario_en: When interacting and selling to buyers online, it is necessary to understand and utilize their different consumption psychologies.
decision_en: Based on the buyer's different psychologies (e.g., practicality, novelty, aesthetics, reputation, affordability, preference, curiosity, conformity, privacy, doubt, security), adopt corresponding description strategies and communication methods to highlight product features or provide specific guarantees.

title: 第五章 你的工作
scenario: This section outlines general principles for customer service representatives' work.
decision: Customer service representatives should adhere to principles of being realistic, enthusiastic, detail-oriented, maintaining a positive mindset, and showing care.
rationale: These principles are foundational for effective and empathetic customer service.
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Chapter 5: Your Work
scenario_en: This section outlines general principles for customer service representatives' work.
decision_en: Customer service representatives should adhere to principles of being realistic, enthusiastic, detail-oriented, maintaining a positive mindset, and showing care.

title: 处理胡搅蛮缠型买家的讨价还价策略
scenario: 当遇到胡搅蛮缠、没完没了讨价还价的买家，即使告知最低价仍要求降价时。
decision: 网店主应一开始将报价抬高，在讨价还价过程中每次只降一点，并每次都强调“又亏了”，重复五六次，以满足买家心理。对于有标价的商品，降价幅度要更小。
rationale: 这类买家与其说是想占便宜，不如说是成心捉弄人。通过多次小幅降价并表达“亏损”，可以满足其心理需求，促成交易。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Bargaining Strategies for Difficult Buyers
scenario_en: When encountering a difficult buyer who endlessly haggles, even after being told the lowest price.
decision_en: The online store owner should initially quote a higher price, then lower it incrementally during negotiations, emphasizing 'another loss' each time, repeating five or six times to satisfy the buyer's psychology. For items with marked prices, the discount should be even smaller.

title: 处理买家刁难：客服与顾客、色差、尺码问题
scenario: 当买家提出刁难性问题，例如关于色差或尺码问题时。
decision: 本章节概述了处理买家刁难性问题的策略，具体包括客服与顾客的互动、色差问题和尺码问题的处理。
rationale: 为了有效管理客户期望并解决潜在的冲突，需要针对常见问题制定明确的处理指导。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Handling Difficult Buyer Questions: Customer Service, Color Difference, and Size Issues
scenario_en: When a buyer asks difficult questions, such as about color difference or size issues.
decision_en: This chapter outlines strategies for handling difficult buyer questions, specifically including customer service interaction with customers, and handling color difference and size issues.

title: 售后服务是销售过程的重点，建立真诚服务观念
scenario: 在商品销售完成后，需要进行售后服务时。
decision: 售后服务是整个销售过程的重点之一，应树立“真诚为客户服务”的观念，并重视与买家的每一次交流机会。
rationale: 良好的售后服务能带来极佳的购物体验，将买家转化为忠实用户，并可能通过口碑推荐带来新客户。真诚服务虽不能保证百分百满意，但能获得相应回报。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: After-Sales Service is Key: Establish a Concept of Sincere Service
scenario_en: When after-sales service is required after a product has been sold.
decision_en: After-sales service is one of the key aspects of the entire sales process. The concept of 'sincerely serving customers' should be established, and every communication opportunity with buyers should be valued.

title: 沟通技巧章节目录
scenario: 当需要了解客户服务沟通技巧的整体结构时。
decision: 本章节概述了售前、售中和售后的沟通技巧。
rationale: 为了提供清晰的沟通指南，将沟通技巧分为售前、售中和售后三个阶段进行阐述。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Communication Skills Chapter Directory
scenario_en: When needing to understand the overall structure of customer service communication skills.
decision_en: This chapter outlines communication skills for pre-sales, in-sales, and after-sales.

title: 处理客户投诉：快速反应、热情接待与提供帮助
scenario: 当客户对商品或服务不满意并提出投诉时。
decision: 客服人员应快速反应，热情接待，并主动表示愿意提供帮助。即使问题不能立即解决，也要告知客户正在处理。
rationale: 客户在投诉时情绪激动是正常的发泄，他们最希望得到同情、尊重和重视。快速、热情的响应能缓解客户情绪，建立信任，并促使问题解决。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Complaints: Quick Response, Enthusiastic Reception, and Offering Help
scenario_en: When a customer is dissatisfied with a product or service and files a complaint.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should respond quickly, greet enthusiastically, and proactively offer help. Even if the problem cannot be resolved immediately, the customer should be informed that it is being processed.

title: 化解非好评
scenario: 当客户给出非好评时。
decision: 需要化解客户的非好评。
rationale: 为了维护客户满意度和品牌声誉。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Resolving Non-Positive Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a non-positive review.
decision_en: It is necessary to resolve the customer's non-positive review.

title: 处理客户投诉：倾听、认同、安抚、道歉与补救措施
scenario: 当客户提出投诉时，客服人员需要有效处理以维护客户关系。
decision: 客服人员应认真倾听客户问题，认同客户感受，进行安抚和解释，诚恳道歉，并提出及时有效的补救措施，同时提供选择和适当补偿，并及时跟进。
rationale: 通过倾听和理解，可以准确把握问题；认同和安抚能缓解客户情绪，建立信任；诚恳道歉和有效补救能将客户不满转化为满意，并减少客户流失。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Complaints: Listen, Acknowledge, Pacify, Apologize, and Remediate
scenario_en: When a customer files a complaint, customer service personnel need to handle it effectively to maintain customer relationships.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should listen carefully to customer issues, acknowledge customer feelings, pacify and explain, sincerely apologize, and propose timely and effective remedial measures, while also offering choices and appropriate compensation, and following up promptly.

title: 员工手册总则与适用范围
scenario: 当需要规范部门人事作业、员工管理，并提高工作效率、责任感和归属感时。
decision: 本手册旨在规范化、制度化和统一化部门人事作业，并适用于正式员工、短期合同工、借聘人员和实习员工。员工需认真学习并服从管理。
rationale: 为了使公司员工管理有章可循，提高工作效率、责任感和归属感。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Employee Handbook General Principles and Scope
scenario_en: When there is a need to standardize departmental HR operations, employee management, and improve work efficiency, responsibility, and sense of belonging.
decision_en: This handbook aims to standardize, institutionalize, and unify departmental HR operations and applies to permanent employees, short-term contract workers, seconded personnel, and interns. Employees must study it carefully and comply with management.

title: 客户流失的预防策略与常见错误
scenario: 当店铺面临客户流失问题或希望提升客户忠诚度时。
decision: 店铺应通过质量营销、树立“客户至上”服务意识、强化与顾客沟通、增加品牌形象价值、建立良好客情关系以及持续创新来预防客户流失。同时，避免客服过度幽默和缺乏耐心等常见错误。
rationale: 客户流失会带来巨大损失，且通常是由于客户需求未得到有效满足。通过多方面策略提升客户满意度和忠诚度，是保持店铺增长和盈利的关键。不当的客服行为会直接导致客户流失。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Customer Churn Prevention Strategies and Common Mistakes
scenario_en: When a store faces customer churn issues or wishes to improve customer loyalty.
decision_en: Stores should prevent customer churn through quality marketing, establishing a 'customer first' service mindset, strengthening communication with customers, increasing brand image value, building good customer relationships, and continuous innovation. At the same time, common mistakes such as excessive humor and lack of patience from customer service should be avoided.

title: 客服行为准则
scenario: 本章概述了客服人员在日常工作中的行为规范和职责。
decision: 客服人员需遵守工作时间、会议制度、产品学习、客户服务、订单备注、考勤、工作内容、着装、办公环境、保密等各项规定。
rationale: 确保客服团队高效运作，维护公司形象，保障客户服务质量，并明确员工责任。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Customer Service Code of Conduct
scenario_en: This chapter outlines the code of conduct and responsibilities for customer service personnel in their daily work.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must comply with various regulations including working hours, meeting systems, product learning, customer service, order remarks, attendance, work content, dress code, office environment, and confidentiality.

title: 客服操作流程：宗旨与基本要求
scenario: 本节概述了客服工作的核心理念和基本能力要求。
decision: 客服人员应以客户为中心，提供贴心服务，目标是让客户享受愉快的购物体验。客服人员需具备快速打字、熟悉淘宝操作、细心耐心、了解产品、主动沟通和善用工具的能力。
rationale: 通过以客户为中心的服务宗旨和明确的服务目标，可以提升客户满意度。同时，设定具体的技能要求是为了确保客服团队能够高效且高质量地完成工作。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Customer Service Operating Procedures: Purpose and Basic Requirements
scenario_en: This section outlines the core philosophy and basic skill requirements for customer service work.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should be customer-centric, provide attentive service, with the goal of ensuring customers enjoy a pleasant shopping experience. Customer service personnel need to have fast typing skills, be familiar with Taobao operations, be meticulous and patient, understand products, communicate proactively, and be adept at using tools.

title: 客服沟通规范：避免不礼貌用语和迟钝回应
scenario: 在与客户进行在线或电话沟通时，客服人员需要注意沟通方式和用语。
decision: 客服人员应避免使用“晕”、“恩”等不礼貌或敷衍的词语，避免迟钝回应，并正面详细回答客户问题。在电话沟通中，应使用规范的问候语，并处理好无声电话、听不清或方言沟通等情况。
rationale: 礼貌、及时和专业的沟通能提升客户满意度，避免投诉和差评，并有助于建立良好的客户关系，促进销售。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Customer Service Communication Standards: Avoid Impolite Language and Slow Responses
scenario_en: When communicating with customers online or by phone, customer service personnel need to pay attention to communication methods and language.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should avoid using impolite or perfunctory words like '晕' (dizzy) or '恩' (uh-huh), avoid slow responses, and answer customer questions positively and in detail. In phone communication, standard greetings should be used, and situations like silent calls, unclear audio, or dialect communication should be handled appropriately.

title: 欢迎语
scenario: 当客户服务代表开始与客户互动时。
decision: 使用欢迎语。
rationale: 欢迎语是客户服务互动的基本组成部分，有助于建立积极的初始印象。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Welcome Message
scenario_en: When a customer service representative begins interacting with a customer.
decision_en: Use a welcome message.

title: 处理客户投诉和特殊情况的沟通规范
scenario: 客户服务代表在处理客户投诉、技术故障、个人信息询问或特殊互动（如骚扰、约会、感谢）时。
decision: 客户代表应使用礼貌、专业的语言，表达歉意、感谢或提供解决方案。对于无法立即解决的问题，应承诺跟进或转交主管。禁止使用不礼貌、责怪或敷衍的语气。
rationale: 保持专业的品牌形象，有效安抚客户情绪，提供清晰的解决方案，并确保客户满意度。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Communication Standards for Handling Customer Complaints and Special Situations
scenario_en: When customer service representatives handle customer complaints, technical faults, personal information inquiries, or special interactions (e.g., harassment, dating, thanks).
decision_en: Customer representatives should use polite, professional language, express apologies, gratitude, or provide solutions. For issues that cannot be resolved immediately, they should promise to follow up or escalate to a supervisor. Impolite, blaming, or perfunctory tones are prohibited.

title: 网店客服工作手册编制指南
scenario: 当需要为新进客服人员提供快速融入服务角色、提高服务水平的指导，并为客服工作提供依据时。
decision: 编制网店客服工作手册，内容应包括《商品明细及销售准则》、《快递选择原则及资费标准》、《网店客服行为规范》和《销售、售后处理流程》等。
rationale: 工作手册有助于新客服快速上手，提高服务水平和工作效率，并为客服人员提供明确的工作依据和流程。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Online Store Customer Service Handbook Preparation Guide
scenario_en: When there is a need to provide guidance for new customer service personnel to quickly integrate into their service role, improve service levels, and provide a basis for customer service work.
decision_en: Prepare an online store customer service handbook, which should include 'Product Details and Sales Guidelines', 'Express Delivery Selection Principles and Fee Standards', 'Online Store Customer Service Code of Conduct', and 'Sales and After-Sales Processing Procedures'.

title: 订单确认
scenario: This section title indicates the process of order confirmation.
decision: The specific actions for order confirmation are not detailed in this chunk, but it signifies a stage in the customer service process.
rationale: This is a high-level heading, indicating a distinct phase in the order fulfillment or customer interaction workflow.
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Order Confirmation
scenario_en: This section title indicates the process of order confirmation.
decision_en: The specific actions for order confirmation are not detailed in this chunk, but it signifies a stage in the customer service process.

title: 客服经典语录集锦：服务理念与客户关系
scenario: 客服人员在日常工作中与客户互动时，以及管理者在团队管理和决策时。
decision: 客服人员应秉持“客户永远是对的”、“用心倾听、用心服务”等原则，将服务视为销售的开始，并以积极、感恩的态度对待客户。管理者应注重“先处理心情，再处理事情”、“持续改善”等原则，并鼓励团队学习和自律。
rationale: 这些语录旨在塑造积极的客服文化，提升服务质量，维护客户关系，并通过良好的管理理念促进团队成长和效率。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Collection of Classic Customer Service Quotes: Service Philosophy and Customer Relationships
scenario_en: When customer service personnel interact with customers in their daily work, and when managers are involved in team management and decision-making.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should adhere to principles such as 'the customer is always right' and 'listen with your heart, serve with your heart', viewing service as the beginning of sales, and treating customers with a positive and grateful attitude. Managers should focus on principles like 'handle emotions first, then issues' and 'continuous improvement', and encourage team learning and self-discipline.

title: 客服服务注意事项与实事求是原则
scenario: 在客户服务过程中，客服人员与客户互动时。
decision: 客服人员应避免直接拒绝客户、与客户争吵、回复过于简单或不耐心、不正面回答问题、在订单未确认前关闭聊天窗口以及不按服务流程服务客户。同时，客服应实事求是，真诚解答客户问题，不隐瞒产品缺点。
rationale: 避免负面行为是为了维护客户关系和提升服务质量。实事求是是为了帮助客户获得全面信息，避免购物纠纷，并培养长期客户关系。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Customer Service Guidelines and Factual Principle
scenario_en: During customer service interactions.
decision_en: Customer service representatives should avoid directly rejecting customers, arguing, giving overly simple or impatient replies, not directly answering questions, closing chat windows before order confirmation, and not following service procedures. They should also be factual, sincerely answer customer questions, and not conceal product shortcomings.

title: 客服人员应保持热情，缩短与客户的心理距离
scenario: 在销售和售后服务过程中，与客户互动时。
decision: 客服人员应始终保持热情，主动与客户沟通，缩短心理距离，以建立信任并提升服务价值。
rationale: 客户的态度和行为受客服人员的影响和刺激。热情能让客户相信我们，选择我们，并在售后增加满意度和回头率。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Maintain Enthusiasm and Reduce Psychological Distance with Customers
scenario_en: During sales and after-sales service interactions with customers.
decision_en: Customer service representatives should always maintain enthusiasm and proactively communicate with customers to reduce psychological distance, build trust, and enhance service value.

title: 客服人员的企业成功关键作用与服务水平提升
scenario: 当客服人员需要理解其在企业中的重要性以及如何提升个人和团队表现时。
decision: 客服人员应认识到自身是企业成功的关键，并通过持续学习、团队协作和贡献来提升服务水平，而非仅关注收入。
rationale: 现代市场竞争中，服务战的重要性日益增加，客服人员的服务水平直接影响企业竞争力。通过个人成长和团队建设，可以创造更多价值。
source_doc: 网店客服培训资料超实用60p.doc
title_en: Key Role of Customer Service in Company Success and Service Level Improvement
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to understand their importance to the company and how to improve individual and team performance.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should recognize their critical role in the company's success and improve service levels through continuous learning, teamwork, and contribution, rather than focusing solely on income.

title: 帮助顾客缓和罪恶感与建立信任
scenario: 当顾客因发火或责问而感到愧疚时，或在售前、售中与顾客沟通时。
decision: 安慰顾客，理解其情绪，并真诚地提供建议和信息，以建立信任和好感。在售前，确保店铺整洁和宝贝介绍完善。在售中，微笑面对客户，尊重并真诚地提供帮助，站在客户立场思考。
rationale: 通过理解和共情，可以减轻顾客的愧疚感，建立情感连接。真诚的建议和专业的服务能拉近与顾客的距离，提升信任度，从而促进成交并避免后续纠纷。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Alleviate Customer Guilt and Build Trust
scenario_en: When customers feel guilty after getting angry or questioning, or when communicating with customers before or during a sale.
decision_en: Comfort customers, understand their emotions, and sincerely offer advice and information to build trust and goodwill. Pre-sale, ensure the store is tidy and product descriptions are complete. During the sale, smile, respect, and sincerely help customers, thinking from their perspective.

title: 客服部新进职员培训计划
scenario: 新进客服部职员入职时
decision: 新进职员需完成一系列培训，包括公司文化、组织框架、客服部职责与规定、各部门工作职责、淘宝平台操作、产品知识、物流知识、仓储流程、售后处理方法等，并进行模拟操作和技能考核。
rationale: 确保新进职员全面了解公司运营、掌握客服工作所需各项技能和知识，以便能有效履行职责。
title_en: Customer Service Department New Hire Training Plan
scenario_en: Upon a new employee joining the Customer Service Department.
decision_en: New employees must complete a series of training modules including company culture, organizational structure, CS department responsibilities and regulations, departmental duties, Taobao platform operations, product knowledge, logistics knowledge, warehousing processes, after-sales handling methods, and undergo simulated operations and skill assessments.

title: 培训周期
scenario: 当需要了解培训计划的总时长时。
decision: 整个培训周期为18天/三周。
rationale: 明确培训时间框架，以便于规划和管理。
title_en: Training Duration
scenario_en: When the total duration of the training plan needs to be known.
decision_en: The entire training period is 18 days / three weeks.

title: 处理新手买家非好评的策略
scenario: 当新手买家给出非好评（通常是中评）时，这通常不是因为对服务或商品非常不满意，而是因为他们不熟悉淘宝规则，不了解中评对卖家好评率的影响。
decision: 客服应耐心向新手买家解释中评对好评率的影响，并引导他们修改评价。在买家咨询购买时，客服可以提前留意买家的信誉级别、是否是新手以及其购买记录中的非好评原因，做到心中有数。
rationale: 新手买家通常并非恶意给出非好评，而是不了解淘宝评价机制。通过耐心沟通和解释，可以有效化解非好评，维护店铺好评率，并提升客户满意度。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Strategy for Handling Non-Positive Reviews from New Buyers
scenario_en: When a new buyer leaves a non-positive review (usually a neutral review), which is often not due to extreme dissatisfaction with the service or product, but because they are unfamiliar with Taobao rules and unaware of the impact of neutral reviews on the seller's positive feedback rate.
decision_en: Customer service should patiently explain to new buyers the impact of neutral reviews on the positive feedback rate and guide them to modify their review. When buyers inquire about purchasing, customer service can proactively check the buyer's credit level, whether they are new, and the reasons for any non-positive reviews in their purchase history to be prepared.

title: 处理客户不满意评价的联系方式选择与沟通技巧
scenario: 当客户对店铺做出不满意评价时，需要主动联系客户进行沟通和解决。
decision: 优先通过旺旺留言，附上联系电话和QQ；若不在线，可发短信探询态度；最有效方式是电话沟通，但需选择合适时机，言简意赅，避免频繁骚扰。若无联系方式，可尝试通过买家资料中的邮箱或QQ邮箱联系。
rationale: 多种联系方式确保能触达客户，电话沟通更具亲切感和效率，但需注意沟通方式和时机，避免负面体验。细心观察买家资料能提供更多联系途径。
source_doc: 最好的电商客服培训手册（21P）.doc
title_en: Contact Methods and Communication Skills for Dissatisfied Customer Reviews
scenario_en: When a customer leaves a dissatisfied review for the store, proactive contact is needed for communication and resolution.
decision_en: Prioritize leaving a message via Wangwang, including a contact phone number and QQ; if offline, send a text message to gauge their attitude; the most effective method is a phone call, but choose an appropriate time, be concise, and avoid frequent harassment. If no contact information is available, try contacting via the buyer's email or QQ email in their profile.

title: 淘宝客服常用语
scenario: This chunk is a header indicating a section on commonly used phrases for Taobao customer service.
decision: This section will contain standard phrases and responses for customer service interactions on Taobao.
rationale: To ensure consistent and efficient communication with customers.
title_en: Common Taobao Customer Service Phrases
scenario_en: This chunk is a header indicating a section on commonly used phrases for Taobao customer service.
decision_en: This section will contain standard phrases and responses for customer service interactions on Taobao.

title: 淘宝客服沟通技巧：积极用词与“我”代替“你”
scenario: 在淘宝客服与客户沟通时，需要提升沟通效率和客户满意度。
decision: 客服应选择积极正面的词语进行沟通，避免使用负面或指责性的表达。同时，在某些语境下，应善用“我”来代替“你”，以避免给客户带来被指责的感觉。
rationale: 积极的用词能够营造更好的沟通氛围，强化客户的正面感受，而非负面感受。使用“我”而非“你”能够避免让客户感到被指责，从而提升客户体验和对公司的满意度，有助于促成交易和建立长期客户关系。
title_en: Taobao CS Communication Skills: Positive Language and 'I' Instead of 'You'
scenario_en: When Taobao customer service communicates with customers, it is necessary to improve communication efficiency and customer satisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service should choose positive language for communication, avoiding negative or accusatory expressions. Additionally, in certain contexts, 'I' should be used instead of 'you' to avoid making customers feel blamed.

title: 表达合作意愿
scenario: 在与客户的互动结束时，如果希望保持未来的合作关系。
decision: 使用“希望我们还有机会合作”这句话来表达积极的合作意愿。
rationale: 这句话能够传达出对未来合作的开放态度和友好愿望，有助于维护客户关系。
title_en: Expressing Willingness to Cooperate
scenario_en: At the end of an interaction with a customer, if future cooperation is desired.
decision_en: Use the phrase 'We hope to have the opportunity to cooperate again' to express a positive willingness to cooperate.

title: 价格最优承诺
scenario: 当客户询问产品价格或比较价格时。
decision: 告知客户我们的价格是最优惠的。
rationale: 确保客户对我们的价格有信心，并强调我们的竞争力。
title_en: Best Price Guarantee
scenario_en: When a customer asks about product price or compares prices.
decision_en: Inform the customer that our price is the most favorable.

title: 批量购买赠送小礼品
scenario: 当顾客购买数量较多时。
decision: 向顾客赠送小礼品。
rationale: 通过赠送小礼品来提升顾客满意度和忠诚度。
title_en: Gift for Bulk Purchases
scenario_en: When a customer purchases a large quantity.
decision_en: Offer the customer a small gift.

title: 强调产品质量与一流售后服务
scenario: 当客户对产品价格或价值提出疑问时。
decision: 向客户强调“一份价格一份货”的价值理念，并保证产品质量和一流的售后服务。
rationale: 通过强调产品质量和优质售后服务，增强客户信任，证明产品物有所值。
title_en: Emphasize Product Quality and First-Class After-Sales Service
scenario_en: When a customer questions the product price or value.
decision_en: Emphasize the value concept of 'you get what you pay for' to the customer, and guarantee product quality and first-class after-sales service.

title: 客服部培训规程：新员工快速上岗与老员工问题解决指南
scenario: 客服部新进职员需要快速上岗并提高工作效率，老员工在工作中遇到问题需要有章可循。
decision: 通过培训手册，使新进职员能够快速上岗，提高工作效率，尽快为公司提供结果。老员工在工作中遇到问题也有章可循。最终目的是打造一支服务精神佳、业务技能精、文化素质高的客户服务队伍。
rationale: 确保客服团队具备高水平的服务精神、业务技能和文化素质，以提升整体工作效率和客户满意度。
title_en: CS Department Training Procedures: New Employee Onboarding & Veteran Problem Solving
scenario_en: New customer service department employees need to get up to speed quickly and improve work efficiency, and veteran employees need clear guidelines when encountering problems.
decision_en: Through the training manual, new employees can quickly get up to speed, improve work efficiency, and provide results for the company as soon as possible. Veteran employees also have guidelines when encountering problems. The ultimate goal is to build a customer service team with excellent service spirit, proficient business skills, and high cultural literacy.

title: 客服部培训框架与参考手册
scenario: 当需要了解客服部门的培训内容和可参考的手册时。
decision: 客服部培训框架包括公司和部门结构、淘宝网概况、岗位职责、岗位技能、绩效考核和纪律准则。参考手册为《客服语录》。
rationale: 这些是客服部门进行内部培训和日常工作指导的基础文件。
title_en: CS Department Training Framework and Reference Manual
scenario_en: When there is a need to understand the training content and reference manuals for the customer service department.
decision_en: The customer service department training framework includes company and department structure, Taobao overview, job responsibilities, job skills, performance appraisal, and disciplinary guidelines. The reference manual is 'Customer Service Quotations'.

title: 客服基本素质与技巧：责任心、耐心、细心、同理心、自控力
scenario: 客服在日常工作中与客户互动时
decision: 客服应具备责任心、耐心、细心、同理心和自控力，并掌握商品知识、交易规则、支付流程、物流信息以及微笑、积极、礼貌、诚信、留有余地、为顾客着想、虚心请教等基本技巧。
rationale: 这些素质和技巧是确保提供优质客户服务、建立良好店铺形象、有效解决客户问题、提升客户满意度和购物体验的基础。
title_en: Essential CS Qualities & Skills: Responsibility, Patience, Meticulousness, Empathy, Self-Control
scenario_en: When customer service interacts with customers in daily work.
decision_en: Customer service should possess responsibility, patience, meticulousness, empathy, and self-control, and master product knowledge, transaction rules, payment processes, logistics information, as well as basic skills such as smiling, being positive, polite, honest, leaving room for negotiation, thinking for the customer, and humbly asking questions.

title: 处理砍价顾客的沟通技巧与原则
scenario: 当顾客在销售过程中提出议价要求时。
decision: 商家应坚持自己的定价原则，明确告知顾客不议价的政策。对于不同类型的砍价顾客，需采取不同的沟通策略，例如对大方顾客表达感谢并告知优惠，对试探性顾客坚定拒绝但态度和缓，对执意砍价顾客有理有节地拒绝并可建议查看其他商品。
rationale: 坚持原则能维护店铺的纪律性、专业形象和商品价值感，避免给其他顾客造成不公平感，并减少未来议价的时间成本。同时，通过恰当的沟通技巧，可以在拒绝议价的同时保持顾客的满意度和信任感。
title_en: Communication Skills and Principles for Handling Bargaining Customers
scenario_en: When a customer requests to negotiate prices during the sales process.
decision_en: Merchants should adhere to their pricing principles and clearly inform customers of the no-bargaining policy. Different communication strategies are needed for different types of bargaining customers, such as thanking generous customers and informing them of discounts, firmly but gently refusing exploratory customers, and reasonably and politely refusing persistent bargainers while suggesting other products.

title: 处理顾客对商品图片和实物的疑问
scenario: 当顾客对商品图片与实物是否一致表示怀疑时，或对商品细节（如瑕疵、色差）反复询问时。
decision: 对于将信将疑的顾客，要耐心解释是实物拍摄，并提醒可能存在色差，避免顾客期望过高。对于挑剔的顾客，要实事求是介绍商品，告知可能存在的问题，并建议追求完美的顾客选择实体店购买。
rationale: 通过提前告知潜在问题，管理顾客期望，避免因信息不对称导致的售后纠纷。对于追求极致完美的顾客，引导至实体店是更合适的选择。
title_en: Addressing Customer Concerns about Product Images vs. Actual Items
scenario_en: When customers express doubt about whether product images match the actual item, or repeatedly ask about product details (e.g., flaws, color difference).
decision_en: For skeptical customers, patiently explain that photos are of the actual item and remind them of potential color differences to manage expectations. For picky customers, describe the product factually, inform them of potential issues, and suggest that those seeking perfection consider purchasing from a physical store.

title: 处理顾客不满：诚恳道歉、提出补救措施并及时跟进
scenario: 当顾客因任何原因表示不满时。
decision: 首先，诚恳地向顾客道歉，承认给他们带来的不愉快和损失。其次，及时提出补救措施并明确告知顾客。最后，将补救措施的进展通知顾客并及时跟进。对于不讲理的顾客，可选择性忽略不雅文字，但仍需关注关键信息并提供合理解答。
rationale: 诚恳的道歉能缓解顾客情绪；及时有效的补救措施能将不满转化为感谢和满意；告知进展能让顾客感到被重视和放心。即使面对无理顾客，也应关注其核心不满并提供解决方案，以维护服务质量。
title_en: Handling Customer Dissatisfaction: Sincere Apology, Remedial Measures, and Timely Follow-up
scenario_en: When a customer expresses dissatisfaction for any reason.
decision_en: First, sincerely apologize to the customer, acknowledging the unpleasantness and loss caused. Second, promptly propose remedial measures and clearly inform the customer. Finally, notify the customer of the progress of the remedial measures and follow up in a timely manner. For unreasonable customers, selectively ignore inappropriate language but still focus on key information and provide reasonable answers.

title: 客服考核与级别划分标准
scenario: 当评估客服人员的绩效和确定其级别时。
decision: 客服考核包括基础知识、售前、售中、售后客服及子账号管理，总分100分，60分及格。根据分数划分为一般客服（60分）、初级客服（70分）、中级客服（80分）、高级客服（90分）。打字速度要求55字/分钟及格。
rationale: 建立明确的考核标准和级别划分，以激励客服提升服务质量和专业技能。
title_en: Customer Service Assessment and Level Classification Standards
scenario_en: When evaluating the performance of customer service personnel and determining their levels.
decision_en: Customer service assessment includes basic knowledge, pre-sales, in-sales, after-sales customer service, and sub-account management, with a total score of 100 points and 60 points for passing. Levels are classified as General CS (60 points), Junior CS (70 points), Mid-level CS (80 points), and Senior CS (90 points). Typing speed requirement is 55 words/minute to pass.

title: 客户服务部与其他部门的协作流程
scenario: 客户服务部在日常运营中需要与其他部门进行协作时。
decision: 客户服务部需与仓储部、售后部、营销部、人资部和技术部进行协调管理，以确保公司正常运转和客户服务质量。
rationale: 通过部门间的有效沟通与协作，可以及时解决客户问题，优化运营流程，提升客户满意度和公司整体效益。
source_doc: 客服部工作职责 君.doc
title_en: Customer Service Department Collaboration Process with Other Departments
scenario_en: When the Customer Service Department needs to collaborate with other departments in daily operations.
decision_en: The Customer Service Department needs to coordinate and manage with the Warehousing Department, After-Sales Department, Marketing Department, Human Resources Department, and Technology Department to ensure normal company operations and customer service quality.

title: 天猫平台发票开具规则：实买实开，禁止虚开
scenario: 当消费者要求开具发票时，特别是要求开具超出实际购买金额的发票时。
decision: 拒绝消费者的虚开发票要求，并告知消费者天猫平台要求发票必须实买实开。
rationale: 天猫平台有明确的发票开具规则，要求商家按照实际交易金额开具发票，虚开发票属于违规行为。
title_en: Tmall Platform Invoice Issuance Rules: Issue for Actual Purchase Only, No Fictitious Invoices
scenario_en: When a consumer requests an invoice, especially when requesting an invoice for an amount exceeding the actual purchase amount.
decision_en: Reject the consumer's request for a fictitious invoice and inform the consumer that the Tmall platform requires invoices to be issued only for actual purchases.

title: 客服工作核心原则与服务理念
scenario: 本文件旨在为客服部门工作人员提供指导，提升服务质量和客户满意度。
decision: 客服人员应秉持以客户为中心、积极主动、真诚倾听、快速响应、良好态度、有效解决问题的原则，并通过优质服务创造价值。
rationale: 通过采纳这些客服心声和原则，旨在提升客服团队的专业素养，优化客户体验，并最终为公司带来更大的价值。
title_en: Core Principles and Service Philosophy of Customer Service Work
scenario_en: This document aims to provide guidance for customer service staff to improve service quality and customer satisfaction.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should adhere to the principles of being customer-centric, proactive, genuinely listening, responding quickly, maintaining a good attitude, and effectively solving problems, thereby creating value through quality service.

title: 客服员工定期考核标准与激励机制
scenario: 对客服员工进行定期考核，以督促和激励员工提升服务质量和工作效率。
decision: 考核分为三个阶段，分别侧重基本岗位技能、服务态度和方式。考核内容包括打字速度、多客户记忆能力、旺旺/网银/支付宝使用、后台操作、物流信息、宝贝和产品知识、问候语热情度、了解客户需求准确度、回复及时准确度、产品介绍推荐准确度、售后问题处理合理度、投诉处理得体度、个别要求处理完成度、道别语亲切度。
rationale: 通过公平、公正的考核，可以有效督促和激励员工，提升客户服务质量，减少退换货，降低公司成本，并提高客户满意度和复购率。
title_en: Customer Service Employee Regular Assessment Standards and Incentive Mechanism
scenario_en: To conduct regular assessments of customer service employees to encourage and motivate them to improve service quality and work efficiency.
decision_en: The assessment is divided into three stages, focusing on basic job skills, service attitude, and methods, respectively. Assessment content includes typing speed, multi-customer memory, Wangwang/online banking/Alipay usage, backend operations, logistics information, product knowledge, greeting enthusiasm, accuracy in understanding customer needs, timeliness and accuracy of replies, accuracy of product introductions and recommendations, reasonableness of after-sales problem handling, appropriateness of complaint handling, completion of individual requests, and friendliness of farewells.

title: 客服服务准则：顾客至上与全面妥协
scenario: 在与顾客进行沟通和提供服务时，尤其是在处理问题和不合理要求时。
decision: 将顾客视为上帝，遵循“顾客至上”和“全面妥协”的原则。所有服务都应以顾客满意为目标，并对不合理要求学会谅解。
rationale: 良好的客服体验是促使顾客回购的关键因素。通过满足顾客，即使是少数“不好”的顾客，也能带来长期的财富和信任。适应顾客而非让顾客适应我们。
source_doc: 想要做好客服没有那么简单~！ .doc
title_en: Customer Service Guidelines: Customer First and Full Compromise
scenario_en: When communicating with customers and providing service, especially when dealing with problems and unreasonable requests.
decision_en: Treat customers as paramount, following the principles of 'customer first' and 'full compromise'. All services should aim for customer satisfaction, and unreasonable requests should be understood.

title: 客服沟通技巧与服务质量提升要点
scenario: 客服与顾客进行日常沟通时，尤其是在处理订单、物流、商品推荐及售后服务等环节。
decision: 客服应主动、委婉、具体地与顾客沟通，关注细节，并进行关联销售和引导好评。同时，要确保对店铺政策和活动有充分了解。
rationale: 提升顾客满意度，增强顾客对店铺的信任感和忠诚度，减少售后问题，并促进销售转化。
source_doc: 想要做好客服没有那么简单~！ .doc
title_en: Customer Service Communication Skills and Key Points for Service Quality Improvement
scenario_en: When customer service interacts with customers daily, especially in handling orders, logistics, product recommendations, and after-sales service.
decision_en: Customer service should communicate proactively, tactfully, and specifically with customers, pay attention to details, engage in associated sales, and guide for positive reviews. At the same time, ensure a thorough understanding of store policies and activities.

title: 双11大促未付款订单催付话术集锦
scenario: 双11大促期间，客户拍下商品但未完成付款，商家希望通过追单话术吸引顾客完成支付。
decision: 提供多种风格的催付话术，包括严谨规范、调皮卖萌等，供客服选择使用，以提高订单支付率。
rationale: 千篇一律的催付话术难以吸引顾客注意力，多样化的沟通方式能更有效地促使顾客完成付款，同时提升客户体验。
title_en: Double 11 Promotion Unpaid Order Reminder Scripts Collection
scenario_en: During the Double 11 promotion, customers have placed orders but not completed payment, and the merchant wants to encourage payment through follow-up scripts.
decision_en: Provide various styles of payment reminder scripts, including rigorous and playful, for customer service to choose from, to increase order payment rates.

title: 退货处理流程：先安抚情绪，再了解原因，最后提供地址
scenario: 当顾客主动联系客服要求退货时。
decision: 首先给予顾客安全感，承诺7天无理由退货，但不直接提供地址。然后耐心询问退货原因，尝试挽回。若顾客坚持退货，最后再提供退货地址和注意事项。
rationale: 顾客在售后时常缺乏安全感且可能情绪激动，先安抚情绪能避免矛盾激化，并为后续沟通创造条件。了解退货原因有助于解决潜在问题、挽回顾客，并为店铺改善提供反馈。平衡顾客体验和店铺利益是关键。
source_doc: 【淘宝双11】遇见退货你先做什么？.doc
title_en: Return Processing Flow: First Soothe Emotions, Then Understand Reason, Finally Provide Address
scenario_en: When a customer proactively contacts customer service to request a return.
decision_en: First, reassure the customer by promising 7-day no-reason returns, but do not directly provide the address. Then, patiently ask for the return reason and try to salvage the sale. If the customer insists on returning, finally provide the return address and important notes.

title: 催促客户完成未付款订单的沟通策略与话术
scenario: 当客户已将商品加入购物车或已下单但尚未完成付款时。
decision: 客服应主动联系客户，询问未付款原因，解答疑问，并提供付款后的优惠或服务承诺，如优先发货、赠送礼品、提供运费险、优惠券或支付方式指导等，以促成订单完成。
rationale: 通过主动关怀、解决疑虑和提供额外价值，可以有效降低客户流失率，提高订单转化率。同时，运用亲切、幽默或拟人化的语言能增强客户体验。
title_en: Communication Strategies and Scripts for Prompting Customers to Complete Unpaid Orders
scenario_en: When a customer has added items to their cart or placed an order but has not yet completed payment.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the customer, inquire about the reason for non-payment, answer questions, and offer post-payment benefits or service commitments, such as priority shipping, free gifts, shipping insurance, coupons, or payment method guidance, to facilitate order completion.

title: 处理快递时效慢的客户投诉：理解、专业分析与全程跟进
scenario: 当顾客因快递时效慢而查询或催促物流时。
decision: 客服应首先理解顾客的焦虑心情，表明店铺会负责到底的态度。其次，专业分析可能导致延迟的原因（如假期、天气、线路规划、分拣错误），并告知顾客。最后，尽快联系快递公司确认情况，及时反馈给顾客，并全程跟进直至顾客收到货，主动确认。
rationale: 敷衍或推诿会激化顾客不满，影响DSR评分和产品评价。通过理解、专业分析和全程跟进，能安抚顾客情绪，争取处理时间，并提升顾客对店铺服务的满意度。
source_doc: 【淘宝双11】快递时效太慢怎么办.doc
title_en: Handling Customer Complaints about Slow Express Delivery: Empathy, Professional Analysis, and Full Follow-up
scenario_en: When a customer inquires about or urges logistics due to slow express delivery.
decision_en: Customer service should first understand the customer's anxiety and state that the store will take full responsibility. Second, professionally analyze possible reasons for delay (e.g., holidays, weather, route planning, sorting errors) and inform the customer. Finally, contact the express company as soon as possible to confirm the situation, provide timely feedback to the customer, and follow up until the customer receives the goods, proactively confirming delivery.

title: 提升快捷话术使用效率的方法
scenario: 客服在使用快捷话术时，因话术过多导致查找困难，影响回复速度。
decision: 通过设置分组、快捷编码和使用“/”按键来提高快捷话术的查找和发送效率。
rationale: 提高响应时间，减少顾客等待时间，同时避免因话术过多而降低回复速度。
source_doc: 【淘宝双11】提高客服的接单效率.doc
title_en: Methods to Improve Quick Reply Efficiency
scenario_en: When customer service uses quick replies, finding the right phrase is difficult due to too many options, affecting response speed.
decision_en: Improve the efficiency of finding and sending quick replies by setting up groups, quick codes, and using the '/' key.

title: 催付话术：未付款订单提醒及促成付款
scenario: 当顾客在店铺购买商品但尚未完成付款时，客服需要发送提醒信息。
decision: 客服应主动联系顾客，提醒其完成付款，并强调付款后的发货安排、商品优势（如七天无理由退换、运费险）以及情感连接（如宝贝在等您回家）。同时，提供咨询渠道和工作时间。
rationale: 通过主动提醒和提供附加价值，可以促使顾客尽快完成付款，减少订单流失。情感化的沟通能拉近与顾客的距离。
title_en: Payment Reminder Script: Unpaid Order Reminder and Payment Facilitation
scenario_en: When a customer has purchased items in the store but has not yet completed payment, customer service needs to send a reminder message.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively contact the customer, remind them to complete payment, and emphasize post-payment shipping arrangements, product advantages (e.g., 7-day no-reason return/exchange, shipping insurance), and emotional connection (e.g., 'your item is waiting for you to take it home'). Also, provide inquiry channels and working hours.

title: 处理顾客指定快递但店铺无法满足时的客服策略
scenario: 当顾客在网购时指定了店铺不合作的快递公司，并且坚持使用该快递时。
decision: 客服应首先安抚顾客情绪，理解其对快递服务的不满，分享个人经历打消疑虑，并承诺负责处理派送中遇到的问题。如果顾客仍坚持，则说明合作快递的优势和不合作快递的劣势，引导顾客选择店铺合作的快递。
rationale: 直接拒绝可能导致顾客放弃订单，降低转化率。通过共情、承诺和对比优势，可以有效打消顾客疑虑，提高订单转化率，并确保商品安全送达。
source_doc: 【淘宝双11】顾客非要指定其他快递.doc
title_en: Customer Service Strategy for When Customer Specifies Courier Not Supported by Store
scenario_en: When a customer specifies a courier company that the store does not partner with during online shopping and insists on using it.
decision_en: Customer service should first soothe the customer's emotions, understand their dissatisfaction with courier services, share personal experiences to alleviate concerns, and promise to handle any issues encountered during delivery. If the customer still insists, explain the advantages of partnered couriers and disadvantages of non-partnered couriers, guiding the customer to choose a store-partnered courier.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 第一章 总篇 - 参考数据说明
scenario: 当遇到图表数据时
decision: 图表数据应被视为参考数据。
rationale: 明确图表数据的性质，避免误解为精确或最终数据。
title_en: Chapter 1 General - Reference Data Explanation
scenario_en: When encountering chart data.
decision_en: Chart data should be considered reference data.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服工作认知：服务是商品价值的一部分
scenario: 在进行客服工作时，需要理解客服服务的核心价值。
decision: 客服工作应以服务为导向，引导客户购买产品并促成交易，同时树立店铺品牌和形象。
rationale: 服务被视为商品价值的组成部分，良好的服务能促进销售并建立品牌形象。
title_en: Customer Service Understanding: Service is Part of Product Value
scenario_en: When performing customer service work, it is necessary to understand the core value of customer service.
decision_en: Customer service work should be service-oriented, guiding customers to purchase products and facilitating transactions, while also establishing the store's brand and image.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服工作职责：引导购物、塑造形象、提高成交率和回头率、处理纠纷
scenario: 客服人员日常工作职责的概述。
decision: 客服人员应引导顾客快乐购物，塑造店铺和品牌形象，通过解答疑问、了解需求、催促付款和引导付款来提高成交率，同时也要提高顾客回头率并处理包括中差评在内的纠纷。
rationale: 这些职责旨在确保顾客满意度，提升销售业绩，并维护品牌声誉。
title_en: Customer Service Responsibilities: Guide Shopping, Shape Image, Increase Conversion and Retention Rates, Handle Disputes
scenario_en: Overview of daily responsibilities for customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should guide customers to happy shopping, shape the store and brand image, increase conversion rates by answering questions, understanding needs, prompting payment, and guiding payment, while also increasing customer retention rates and handling disputes, including neutral and negative reviews.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服人员基本要求：专业、高效、良好心态
scenario: 客服人员在日常工作中与客户互动时，以及进行内部交接时。
decision: 客服人员需具备良好的语言组织能力、沟通技巧、快速的打字和反应速度，并保持良好的工作心态。在工作交接时，需提供明确详细的留言或公告。
rationale: 规范专业的语言和沟通技巧能有效解决客户问题；快速响应能让客户感到被重视；良好的心态有助于处理纠纷；明确的交接能确保客服工作不间断。
title_en: Basic Requirements for Customer Service Personnel: Professional, Efficient, Good Mindset
scenario_en: When customer service personnel interact with customers in daily work and during internal handovers.
decision_en: Customer service personnel need to have good language organization skills, communication skills, fast typing and reaction speed, and maintain a good work mindset. During work handovers, clear and detailed messages or announcements must be provided.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服应具备的知识
scenario: 客服人员在日常工作中，需要掌握多方面的知识以提供优质服务并提升客户忠诚度。
decision: 客服应掌握商品知识、商品周边知识、电商平台规则、顾客质疑点、物流知识、二次营销能力，并具备开发新客户及培养忠诚客户的能力。
rationale: 全面的知识储备能帮助客服有效解决客户问题，激发购买欲，维护老客户，并提升客户对品牌的忠诚度。
title_en: Knowledge Required for Customer Service
scenario_en: Customer service personnel need to master various types of knowledge in their daily work to provide quality service and enhance customer loyalty.
decision_en: Customer service should master product knowledge, related product knowledge, e-commerce platform rules, customer pain points, logistics knowledge, secondary marketing capabilities, and possess the ability to acquire new customers and cultivate loyal customers.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服人员持续学习与自我提升
scenario: 客服人员需要持续提升服务能力和了解平台规则时。
decision: 客服人员应定期进行购物体验验证，学习同行客服的优点，并及时学习和了解淘宝规则的更新。同时，要不断总结工作中的问题并加以修正。
rationale: 通过学习同行、了解平台规则和自我反思，可以不断优化客服能力，提升服务质量。
title_en: Customer Service Personnel Continuous Learning and Self-Improvement
scenario_en: When customer service personnel need to continuously improve service capabilities and understand platform rules.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should regularly conduct shopping experience verification, learn from the strengths of peer customer service, and promptly learn and understand updates to Taobao rules. At the same time, they should continuously summarize and correct problems encountered in their work.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 服务态度与纠纷处理：快速反应、热情接待与安抚理解
scenario: 当客户出现不满、投诉或产生纠纷时，以及在日常服务互动中。
decision: 客服人员应快速反应、热情接待、认真倾听，并安抚理解客户（无论对错），诚恳道歉，提出补救措施，并及时跟进。在沟通中，应保持专业、轻松、热情而不做作的语气，多用敬语，并避免使用“不”字。
rationale: 良好的服务态度和周到的服务可以平息客户的不满，使客户感到被重视和贴心，从而降低企业成本并着眼于长远利益。
title_en: Service Attitude & Dispute Resolution: Prompt Response, Enthusiastic Reception & Empathetic Understanding
scenario_en: When customers express dissatisfaction, file complaints, or disputes arise, as well as during routine service interactions.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should respond promptly, provide an enthusiastic reception, listen attentively, and empathize with customers (regardless of fault). They should sincerely apologize, propose remedial measures, and follow up in a timely manner. During communication, maintain a professional, relaxed, enthusiastic, and natural tone, use polite language, and avoid using 'no'.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服人员自身素质要求
scenario: 客服人员在与客户互动时，应展现出特定的个人素质。
decision: 客服人员应具备诚信、耐心、细心、亲和力、同理心和自控力。
rationale: 这些素质有助于提供高质量的服务，即使面对困难客户也能保持专业和积极的心态。
title_en: Customer Service Personnel Qualities
scenario_en: Customer service personnel should exhibit specific personal qualities when interacting with customers.
decision_en: Customer service personnel should possess integrity, patience, meticulousness, amiability, empathy, and self-control.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服人员自我管理：工作期间避免无关事项
scenario: 淘宝、拍拍客服人员在工作期间，因工作环境需要利用网络促成交易时。
decision: 客服人员必须进行自我管理，避免进行与工作无关的事项。
rationale: 确保工作效率和专业性，专注于促成交易。
title_en: Customer Service Self-Management: Avoid Non-Work Related Matters During Work Hours
scenario_en: When Taobao and Paipai customer service personnel need to use the internet to facilitate transactions due to work environment requirements during work hours.
decision_en: Customer service personnel must practice self-management and avoid engaging in non-work related matters.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 团队精神：无私奉献，互帮互助、心存感激
scenario: 在日常工作和团队协作中，员工应展现团队精神。
decision: 员工应做到无私奉献、互帮互助，并对团队成员心存感激。
rationale: 这些行为有助于建立积极的工作环境和高效的团队协作。
title_en: Team Spirit: Selfless Dedication, Mutual Assistance, and Gratitude
scenario_en: Employees should demonstrate team spirit in daily work and team collaboration.
decision_en: Employees should be selflessly dedicated, help each other, and be grateful to team members.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 优秀客服的构成要素与培养方法
scenario: 本条原则适用于定义和培养优秀的客服人员。
decision: 优秀客服需熟悉商品、淘宝操作与规则、物流特点、客户沟通技巧，并能妥善处理售后问题，同时具备服从性和持续学习的能力。培养方法包括考核、强化操作、背诵考核、培训、培训点评、明确方法和严格管理。
rationale: 通过多方面能力的培养和严格的管理，可以确保客服团队具备高水平的服务质量和效率。
title_en: Components and Cultivation Methods of Excellent Customer Service
scenario_en: This principle applies to defining and cultivating excellent customer service personnel.
decision_en: Excellent customer service requires familiarity with products, Taobao operations and rules, logistics characteristics, customer communication skills, and the ability to properly handle after-sales issues, along with obedience and continuous learning. Cultivation methods include assessment, reinforced operations, memorization assessments, training, training reviews, clear methodologies, and strict management.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服工作职责与任职要求
scenario: 本文件描述了客服人员的日常工作职责和任职资格要求。
decision: 客服人员需负责售前咨询、售中订单跟踪、售后问题处理、数据整理及老客户维护。任职要求包括年龄、打字速度、销售经验、沟通能力、学习能力、抗压能力、淘宝后台操作熟悉度及团队合作精神。
rationale: 明确客服职责和任职要求，以确保客服团队高效运作，提供优质客户服务，并促进销售和客户满意度。
source_doc: 客服培训-11.客服岗位工作职责及任职要求.doc
title_en: Customer Service Job Responsibilities and Requirements
scenario_en: This document describes the daily job responsibilities and qualification requirements for customer service personnel.
decision_en: Customer service personnel are responsible for pre-sales consultation, in-sales order tracking, after-sales issue resolution, data organization, and old customer maintenance. Job requirements include age, typing speed, sales experience, communication skills, learning ability, stress resistance, familiarity with Taobao backend operations, and teamwork spirit.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 销售异议处理策略：八种常见客户拒绝的成交方法
scenario: 当销售员在销售过程中遇到客户提出各种异议（如“我要考虑一下”、“太贵了”、“没有预算”等）时。
decision: 销售员应根据客户的具体异议，灵活运用询问法、假设法、直接法、比较法、拆散法、平均法、赞美法、讨好法、化小法、例证法、得失法、底牌法、诚实法、分析法、转向法、提醒法、前瞻法、攻心法、投资法、反驳法、肯定法、吹牛法、比心法、死磨法等多种成交方法来解决客户疑虑，促成交易。
rationale: 销售的本质是成交，客户的异议是成交的障碍。通过系统化的方法解决客户疑虑，可以帮助销售员克服障碍，实现销售目标。
title_en: Sales Objection Handling Strategies: Eight Common Closing Methods for Customer Rejections
scenario_en: When salespeople encounter various customer objections during the sales process (e.g., 'I need to think about it,' 'It's too expensive,' 'No budget').
decision_en: Salespeople should flexibly apply various closing methods based on the specific customer objection, such as inquiry, assumption, direct, comparison, breakdown, average, compliment, flattery, minimization, exemplification, gain/loss, bottom line, honesty, analysis, redirection, reminder, foresight, psychological, investment, rebuttal, affirmation, bragging, empathy, and persistence methods to resolve customer concerns and close the deal.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 淘宝网客服快捷短语、自动回复语大全
scenario: This document provides a collection of quick phrases and automatic replies for Taobao customer service.
decision: Use these pre-defined phrases for various customer interactions, including new customer reception, product introduction, price negotiation, logistics inquiries, and automatic replies during busy periods.
rationale: To improve efficiency and consistency in customer service interactions on Taobao, saving time and effort for both customers and service agents.
source_doc: 客服培训-12.客服快捷短语.doc
title_en: Taobao Customer Service Quick Phrases and Auto-Replies Collection
scenario_en: This document provides a collection of quick phrases and automatic replies for Taobao customer service.
decision_en: Use these pre-defined phrases for various customer interactions, including new customer reception, product introduction, price negotiation, logistics inquiries, and automatic replies during busy periods.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 客服如何通过多维度标签构建客户画像并优化沟通
scenario: 客服在与顾客首次互动或交易过程中，需要快速了解顾客信息以优化沟通和营销策略。
decision: 客服应主动给顾客打标签，包括手动标签（通过沟通获取信息）和自动标签（系统筛选），以构建客户画像。标签分为使用场景、购买因素、参与度等组别，并可根据沟通进展逐步完善。
rationale: 通过构建客户画像，客服能更有效地判断沟通话术和营销策略，提升询单转化率、服务态度和顾客满意度，并加深顾客对品牌或客服的印象。
source_doc: 客服培训-13.如何给顾客手动打标.doc
title_en: How Customer Service Builds Customer Profiles with Multi-Dimensional Tags and Optimizes Communication
scenario_en: Customer service needs to quickly understand customer information during the first interaction or transaction to optimize communication and marketing strategies.
decision_en: Customer service should proactively tag customers, including manual tags (information obtained through communication) and automatic tags (system filtering), to build customer profiles. Tags are categorized into groups such as usage scenarios, purchase factors, and engagement, and can be progressively refined as communication progresses.

domain: 客服知识库4-赠送：新人入职培训
title: 天猫评价展示规则与解释技巧
scenario: 客户对产品、商家服务和快递进行评价时，以及商家需要对评价进行解释时。
decision: 了解天猫评价的展示规则，包括带追评、有用点击数、关键词、标签词、字数、晒图、账号等级、时间、服务物流、细节特写等因素。商家在解释评价时，差评应遵循“感恩-道歉-原因-措施-售后保障-祝福”的思路，好评遵循“感恩-售后保障-祝福”的思路。解释内容不得包含敏感广告信息或辱骂词语，且需在一个月内完成。
rationale: 评价是客户了解产品质量和商家服务的重要参考，对店铺和产品考核至关重要。有效的评价展示和解释能提升产品转化，避免客户流失，并展示商家的服务和解决方案。
source_doc: 客服培训-14.评价解释资料.doc
title_en: Tmall Review Display Rules and Explanation Techniques
scenario_en: When customers review products, merchant services, and express delivery, and when merchants need to explain reviews.
decision_en: Understand Tmall's review display rules, including factors like follow-up reviews, helpful clicks, keywords, tags, character count, photos, account level, time, service logistics, and detail close-ups. When explaining reviews, for negative reviews, follow the 'gratitude-apology-reason-measure-after-sales guarantee-blessing' approach. For positive reviews, follow the 'gratitude-after-sales guarantee-blessing' approach. Explanations must not contain sensitive advertising information or abusive language and must be completed within one month.

title: 亚马逊平台FAQ（含2026年新规）
scenario: This section outlines the frequently asked questions (FAQs) for the Amazon platform, including new regulations effective in 2026.
decision: Refer to the specific FAQ entries for detailed guidance on logistics, returns, complaints, and product inquiries on Amazon.
rationale: To provide comprehensive and up-to-date information for customer service on the Amazon platform, incorporating future policy changes.
title_en: Amazon Platform FAQ (Including New Regulations for 2026)
scenario_en: This section outlines the frequently asked questions (FAQs) for the Amazon platform, including new regulations effective in 2026.
decision_en: Refer to the specific FAQ entries for detailed guidance on logistics, returns, complaints, and product inquiries on Amazon.

title: 亚马逊FBM退款处理期调整
scenario: 当处理亚马逊FBM（Fulfillment by Merchant）订单的退款时，需要了解最新的退款处理期限。
decision: 自2026年1月26日起，亚马逊FBM订单的退款处理期限从2个工作日延长至4个自然日（含周末和节假日）。
rationale: 这是亚马逊平台2026年生效的最新政策变更，旨在确保AI客服系统使用最新政策，避免提供过期信息。
title_en: Amazon FBM Refund Processing Period Adjustment
scenario_en: When processing refunds for Amazon FBM (Fulfillment by Merchant) orders, it is necessary to understand the latest refund processing period.
decision_en: Effective January 26, 2026, the refund processing period for Amazon FBM orders will be extended from 2 business days to 4 calendar days (including weekends and holidays).

title: 知识库动态更新机制：采集、训练与部署闭环
scenario: 当需要建立和维护AI客服系统的知识库时，此机制提供了一个持续优化的流程。
decision: 建立“采集—训练—部署”的闭环机制，包括数据采集、知识清洗与标准化、模型训练、知识图谱构建（进阶）和知识有效性管理。
rationale: 通过持续的知识库优化，可以提高系统常见问题解决率，降低人力成本，并确保知识库的时效性和准确性。
title_en: Knowledge Base Dynamic Update Mechanism: Collect, Train, and Deploy Closed Loop
scenario_en: When establishing and maintaining the knowledge base for an AI customer service system, this mechanism provides a continuous optimization process.
decision_en: Establish a 'collect-train-deploy' closed-loop mechanism, including data collection, knowledge cleansing and standardization, model training, knowledge graph construction (advanced), and knowledge effectiveness management.
